clean_body: Did you know... It has been more than 50 years since New Jersey had a Republican Senator. It is time to break the streak once and for all, and I am the man for the job. | Peter, It has been more than 50 years since New Jersey had a Republican Senator. It is time to break the streak once and for all,and I am the man for the job. I believe this race is a once-in-a-generation opportunity, and am ready to prove to the rest of the country that New Jersey is a lot more purple than people realize. I’m a lifelong Republican who stands strong in what I believe. So, I’m standing up and being the change that I so greatly want to see. Washington doesn’t need another politician who heads to Capitol Hill just to go viral online and generate a million clicks. If that’s what you’re looking for, I’m not your guy. Washington doesn’t need another politician who is willing to discard their beliefs for whichever SuperPAC is writing the biggest check. Washington needs someone who can get people to work together to get things done for the American people. That’s what I’ve done for 35 years in business and that’s what I’ll do in Washington as New Jersey’s next Senator. We have a real opportunity here to make a change in New Jersey, but I know I can’t do it without a strong team around me, comprised of freedom-loving Americans just like yourself. Gratefully, Curtis Bashaw Entrepreneur. Husband. Preservationist. PS – if you want to volunteer your time to help me in my campaign efforts, give my team a shout here so we can be in further contact with you. | GET TO KNOW CURTIS Curtis Bashaw is a hotel entrepreneur, job creator, and preservationist. He’s running for United States Senate to provide greater freedom and opportunities for all New Jerseyans. A lifelong New Jersey resident, Curtis grew up in Camden County and spent his summers at the Jersey Shore working as a bellhop and waiting tables at Congress Hall in Cape May. He has spent his life in the real estate and hospitality industries, and is the Founder and Managing Partner of Cape Resorts, a hotel company focusing on the restoration and operation of classic American resort properties in New Jersey and New York. Throughout his career, Curtis has worked to build communities and bring people together. He is widely recognized for leading the landmark restorations of Congress Hall and the Virginia Hotel in Cape May, and for launching creative programming to dramatically extend Cape May’s season, a catalyst for the economic rebirth of one of the Jersey Shore’s most beautiful communities. Curtis is a successful businessman and job creator, employing more than 1,000 people in New Jersey and New York. Curtis’ company owns and operates eight hotels, ten cottages, six restaurants, four retail outlets and a working farm, all on the Jersey Shore and Long Island’s East End. Curtis lives in Cape May with his husband, Will. | If you'd like to unsubscribe, please . | PAID FOR BY CURTIS BASHAW FOR US SENATE, INC.

subject: Republican Women's Success, Eagles 168, and Liars Exposed
body:
| | | | | |
---
| |
---
| |
---
| |

| | **Republican women get things done!****
****SUCCESS AND CAMARADERIE!****** Last week, the [Oregon Federation of Republican Women ](https://sptr.eocampaign1.com/f/a/QZR-I-KxDVF9W4h6Mt9PWQ~~/AAAHUQA~/RgRoDt33P0UgNTAwZGFlNTQzM2FlNTlhM2VkNDgzOWIyN2VkYmRmOTJEF2h0dHBzOi8vd3d3Lm15b2Zydy5vcmcvVwVzcGNldUIKZin3WCxmEksmV1IUZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb21YBAAAX2M~)held its Spring Board Meeting in Baker City along with dinner - Hawaiian-themed. The next day, the [Baker County Republican Women](https://sptr.eocampaign1.com/f/a/yaf4qhCzFxrcJd-S5hoqfQ~~/AAAHUQA~/RgRoDt33P0UgYzlhYWNjNjA5NDQ5MmE2OWYxZWI1MzYzNTg0YmVjZGNEEWh0dHBzOi8vYmNydy5vcmcvVwVzcGNldUIKZin3WCxmEksmV1IUZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb21YBAAAX2M~) held our first annual banquet. We raised several thousand dollars for our Patriot Kids Camp and couldn't be more thrilled with the outpouring of support from our community.

THANK YOU to all the OFRW clubs and members who came; Boise conservative radio personality [Nate Shelman](https://sptr.eocampaign1.com/f/a/m8AQ2ZgCeblrwu3g72x9-A~~/AAAHUQA~/RgRoDt33P0UgNzEyMmFlMDUxNmRmMTYxY2NiZWQ0YjlkOWQzZTM5ZTVEH2h0dHBzOi8vdHdpdHRlci5jb20vbmF0ZXNoZWxtYW5XBXNwY2V1QgpmKfdYLGYSSyZXUhRkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbVgEAABfYw~~) who made the evening so much fun; Alisa Anderson for making the quilt that brought in $1,000 all on its own in the auction - and to the gentleman who bought it; our local Boy Scouts for all their help; the candidates and elected officials who came and spoke; [NFRW](https://sptr.eocampaign1.com/f/a/0HQDU_Y-pipxK2CBNbk5EA~~/AAAHUQA~/RgRoDt33P0UgMDJmMGFiYmJiMGNhMmMwMjUyYmIxOGFmNTRjNzdiMDFEFWh0dHBzOi8vd3d3Lm5mcncub3JnL1cFc3BjZXVCCmYp91gsZhJLJldSFGRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tWAQAAF9j) President Julie Harris who flew so far to be our keynote speaker; the members from Idaho who traveled over to introduce themselves; and finally, Frank and Kellie Carlson for the music.

**This **is what unity looks like.

**EAGLES 168 and TRUMP 47 COMMITTEE. Congratulations to Solomon Yue **who is now the first and only ORP member in history (as far as anyone can find!) to become a member of RNC's Eagles 168 Club. Solomon's incredible, documented fundraising totals and work to bring in major donors to the T47C qualified him for the Eagles 168. This club first formed in the 1970s.

If anyone wants to donate to Trump, donate direct: **[](https://sptr.eocampaign1.com/f/a/RK_FujjG4mvAtSt3uNmYUw~~/AAAHUQA~/RgRoDt33P0UgZmQ1MjM5NmVkZDg0OGYzNWMzNmIyNzA1MGNlYjVjNmREimh0dHBzOi8vc2VjdXJlLndpbnJlZC5jb20vdHJ1bXAtNDctY29tbWl0dGVlLzIwMjQ_ZnVuZHJhaXNlcl9pZD0zNjQyMSZmYmNsaWQ9SXdBUjBlb3ZuVGZvZmRQaTlORmFhQ0dBalQ5b1hMVTV4RzhuNmcxd0FpQnVlVW9Zc21kcU1iWktCbkdjRVcFc3BjZXVCCmYp91gsZhJLJldSFGRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tWAQAAF9j)**[](https://sptr.eocampaign1.com/f/a/RK_FujjG4mvAtSt3uNmYUw~~/AAAHUQA~/RgRoDt33P0UgZmQ1MjM5NmVkZDg0OGYzNWMzNmIyNzA1MGNlYjVjNmREimh0dHBzOi8vc2VjdXJlLndpbnJlZC5jb20vdHJ1bXAtNDctY29tbWl0dGVlLzIwMjQ_ZnVuZHJhaXNlcl9pZD0zNjQyMSZmYmNsaWQ9SXdBUjBlb3ZuVGZvZmRQaTlORmFhQ0dBalQ5b1hMVTV4RzhuNmcxd0FpQnVlVW9Zc21kcU1iWktCbkdjRVcFc3BjZXVCCmYp91gsZhJLJldSFGRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tWAQAAF9j)[Trump 47 Committee](https://sptr.eocampaign1.com/f/a/RK_FujjG4mvAtSt3uNmYUw~~/AAAHUQA~/RgRoDt33P0UgZmQ1MjM5NmVkZDg0OGYzNWMzNmIyNzA1MGNlYjVjNmREimh0dHBzOi8vc2VjdXJlLndpbnJlZC5jb20vdHJ1bXAtNDctY29tbWl0dGVlLzIwMjQ_ZnVuZHJhaXNlcl9pZD0zNjQyMSZmYmNsaWQ9SXdBUjBlb3ZuVGZvZmRQaTlORmFhQ0dBalQ5b1hMVTV4RzhuNmcxd0FpQnVlVW9Zc21kcU1iWktCbkdjRVcFc3BjZXVCCmYp91gsZhJLJldSFGRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tWAQAAF9j)[](https://sptr.eocampaign1.com/f/a/RK_FujjG4mvAtSt3uNmYUw~~/AAAHUQA~/RgRoDt33P0UgZmQ1MjM5NmVkZDg0OGYzNWMzNmIyNzA1MGNlYjVjNmREimh0dHBzOi8vc2VjdXJlLndpbnJlZC5jb20vdHJ1bXAtNDctY29tbWl0dGVlLzIwMjQ_ZnVuZHJhaXNlcl9pZD0zNjQyMSZmYmNsaWQ9SXdBUjBlb3ZuVGZvZmRQaTlORmFhQ0dBalQ5b1hMVTV4RzhuNmcxd0FpQnVlVW9Zc21kcU1iWktCbkdjRVcFc3BjZXVCCmYp91gsZhJLJldSFGRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tWAQAAF9j)**[](https://sptr.eocampaign1.com/f/a/RK_FujjG4mvAtSt3uNmYUw~~/AAAHUQA~/RgRoDt33P0UgZmQ1MjM5NmVkZDg0OGYzNWMzNmIyNzA1MGNlYjVjNmREimh0dHBzOi8vc2VjdXJlLndpbnJlZC5jb20vdHJ1bXAtNDctY29tbWl0dGVlLzIwMjQ_ZnVuZHJhaXNlcl9pZD0zNjQyMSZmYmNsaWQ9SXdBUjBlb3ZuVGZvZmRQaTlORmFhQ0dBalQ5b1hMVTV4RzhuNmcxd0FpQnVlVW9Zc21kcU1iWktCbkdjRVcFc3BjZXVCCmYp91gsZhJLJldSFGRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tWAQAAF9j)**

**BIGGER TRUTH MEDIA SPILLS THE TEA. **During last month's National Committeeman and Committeewoman election, delegates will remember candidate Don Powers bringing Cade Lamb, Kyle Rittenhouse and some of their acquaintances to the ORP reception to show their "support" for him. Powers labeled them in photos as part of SEAL Team 3 and said they were "his team." In the weeks prior, Diane Rich, whom delegates knew was assisting with Powers' campaign, posted across various chats that Sheriff Mark Lamb had endorsed Powers, and was _sending_ Cade, Kyle, _et al._ to Oregon. This week, journalist Scott McMahan interviewed Sheriff Lamb on[ ](https://sptr.eocampaign1.com/f/a/6ynFZFpOts7qHbl6tTrdWQ~~/AAAHUQA~/RgRoDt33P0UgZTQ0NjlmZTE2NjY4MjViNzgyYTA4MjRkNTM5YTIwM2ZEJGh0dHBzOi8vd3d3LnlvdXR1YmUuY29tL0BCaWdnZXJUcnV0aFcFc3BjZXVCCmYp91gsZhJLJldSFGRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tWAQAAF9j)[Bigger Truth Media - YouTube](https://sptr.eocampaign1.com/f/a/6ynFZFpOts7qHbl6tTrdWQ~~/AAAHUQA~/RgRoDt33P0UgZTQ0NjlmZTE2NjY4MjViNzgyYTA4MjRkNTM5YTIwM2ZEJGh0dHBzOi8vd3d3LnlvdXR1YmUuY29tL0BCaWdnZXJUcnV0aFcFc3BjZXVCCmYp91gsZhJLJldSFGRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tWAQAAF9j) . In the middle of the live chat, the Sheriff typed that he had NOT endorsed Don Powers. After the interview, he clarified that he had NOT sent his son or Rittenhouse to Oregon, but rather, Powers had **hired** them to take him to the border for photo ops and then **paid** for them to come to Oregon to attend the reception. These gentleman, by the way, never claimed to be SEALS, nor were they part of a team that included Powers working against human trafficking at the border. These gentlemen no longer want anything to do with Powers and his group, and believe what he did was "wrong," according to Bigger Truth. Powers is now running for ORP's CD6 Chair as well as for a delegate slot in the presidential convention. I hope PCPs value a party filled with honesty and integrity, and will vote accordingly next month.

Over & out,

**_Kerry_**
---
| | |
---
---

subject: Did you know… It has been more than 50 years since New Jersey had a Republican Senator. It is time to break the streak once and for all, and I am the man for the job.

body:
N.J. could elect a Republican U.S. Senator for the first time since 1972. | [](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=8867b23878c8479aa81f65182df06a19&_e=_G-2yGzo4JEiE6Ma0XXpineqMdTIWGfLogsLWbAhX_ZWEyleQwqiFYfqkZP0ung7R48iQJCiWPwqnOW6W4YeR3OwLkQjpG7SO1GPxXyTTg7NeSY6xI4gSedcZU_wxqjv2WLQuVem7AGwAKABZsdyAYyJM8gI5yNDXDhPNcKnBaKwjVi-eu0LZKYUXcSJdxxryYgKf9fqalYKqVIe3rdyNDXr3c00idSflf1L4QbPpuvf8qPE8UWVJBoC4YpAnv-sLFhkc460mZjfgtjOWhByf939hZe0iGEQIINMyr4I1GkOOi7BIEo5BHlZr6mI1HQ74e2iaES6OlqN5NVQulPeOvR7RWgus1bkQatgyMbk_ws9NpCBJFIfKlqq2d-vbLJtjzJNsQ-FrdjwetpD0jp_xkkt2O7r4368I774PkL58Vg%3D)

Peter,

It has been more than 50 years since New Jersey had a Republican Senator. _It is time to break the streak once and for all,**and I am the man for the job.**_ [**Are you with me?**](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=8867b23878c8479aa81f65182df06a19&_e=_G-2yGzo4JEiE6Ma0XXpineqMdTIWGfLogsLWbAhX_ZWEyleQwqiFYfqkZP0ung7R48iQJCiWPwqnOW6W4YeR3OwLkQjpG7SO1GPxXyTTg7NeSY6xI4gSedcZU_wxqjv2WLQuVem7AGwAKABZsdyAYyJM8gI5yNDXDhPNcKnBaKwjVi-eu0LZKYUXcSJdxxryYgKf9fqalYKqVIe3rdyNDXr3c00idSflf1L4QbPpuvf8qPE8UWVJBoC4YpAnv-sR-6A49tfc9larc50E3Ujx6dPR87KY6gUAZCkx8HE3gq-qjkdMeTwSoFPS0WbP6enhgdbW-JveNaPm__5dVFQSNpQ3m2sLcQpqihedUyYuIgEgpBh1tNr2nVaZnPbhVjlXUi4p-OmHo-flEPTgG7-Thhs_8_bh7EDbG8OP4iofq0%3D)

[** FLIP NEW JERSEY RED **](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=8867b23878c8479aa81f65182df06a19&_e=_G-2yGzo4JEiE6Ma0XXpineqMdTIWGfLogsLWbAhX_ZWEyleQwqiFYfqkZP0ung7R48iQJCiWPwqnOW6W4YeR3OwLkQjpG7SO1GPxXyTTg7NeSY6xI4gSedcZU_wxqjv2WLQuVem7AGwAKABZsdyAYyJM8gI5yNDXDhPNcKnBaKwjVi-eu0LZKYUXcSJdxxryYgKf9fqalYKqVIe3rdyNDXr3c00idSflf1L4QbPpuvf8qPE8UWVJBoC4YpAnv-s1-jT-WuBB9GaBJD4ulOAajSpdaRkzcszVjlvDS0qljqRCvDMxAf2oaEsyNxQrkTRV5xpK6VwQQ7jqwZa-PdGnjHBBLC1wl2g5WCW6uj4-UJ4C_30LS569Ihv-qsZ-jiVh1DUMbyUiXUGEKeP_9RyUJjisZpZxdRNTorBiVrUx3U%3D)
I believe this race is a once-in-a-generation opportunity, and am ready to prove to the rest of the country that New Jersey is a lot more purple than people realize.

**I’m a lifelong Republican who stands strong in what I believe.** So, I’m standing up and being the change that I so greatly want to see.

**Washington doesn’t need another politician who heads to Capitol Hill just to go viral online and generate a million clicks.** If that’s what you’re looking for, _I’m not your guy._

_Washington doesn’t need another politician who is willing to discard their beliefs for whichever SuperPAC is writing the biggest check._

**Washington needs someone who can get people to work together to get things done for the American people. That’s what I’ve done for 35 years in business and that’s what I’ll do in Washington as New Jersey’s next Senator.**

We have a real opportunity here to make a change in New Jersey, but I know I can’t do it without a strong team around me, comprised of freedom-loving Americans just like yourself. [**Can I count on you to step off the sidelines and support me on this mission today?**](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=8867b23878c8479aa81f65182df06a19&_e=_G-2yGzo4JEiE6Ma0XXpineqMdTIWGfLogsLWbAhX_ZWEyleQwqiFYfqkZP0ung7R48iQJCiWPwqnOW6W4YeR3OwLkQjpG7SO1GPxXyTTg7NeSY6xI4gSedcZU_wxqjv2WLQuVem7AGwAKABZsdyAYyJM8gI5yNDXDhPNcKnBaKwjVi-eu0LZKYUXcSJdxxryYgKf9fqalYKqVIe3rdyNDXr3c00idSflf1L4QbPpuvf8qPE8UWVJBoC4YpAnv-s6EL8X9iJv1p_WXsc3C-pDSw7yTCpwSuNK8SYOFK-wbBOLRDhADqg1AkZOAMjvtdxMdrS-Haa57gMQUpZODfwRIKghwKiKODl0Oy0tQw1HCzvtnDu0kcpXM8we7udOhi0PXU8Cjkvao5DdFH2oELc-9K4AN-1Ee7ncNuvy93dFNY%3D)

[** SUPPORT CURTIS BASHAW **](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=8867b23878c8479aa81f65182df06a19&_e=_G-2yGzo4JEiE6Ma0XXpineqMdTIWGfLogsLWbAhX_ZWEyleQwqiFYfqkZP0ung7R48iQJCiWPwqnOW6W4YeR3OwLkQjpG7SO1GPxXyTTg7NeSY6xI4gSedcZU_wxqjv2WLQuVem7AGwAKABZsdyAYyJM8gI5yNDXDhPNcKnBaKwjVi-eu0LZKYUXcSJdxxryYgKf9fqalYKqVIe3rdyNDXr3c00idSflf1L4QbPpuvf8qPE8UWVJBoC4YpAnv-sbNkxH_iNl4i5ajtrpeTGkZ57fz97E9Pbl1MvEkD2gr1oeo3ciuTHZ-cf2xKPtCE3cUQnEFI7OTN1W7iJ33UW1dv6ucP2ebTrflt7wn_CU4ETPQM_umqO8MZZsE7Ip7ZnGwpHadYNBv6THDSgCDagU993ZMI71ZMnrEBAJstCsFU%3D)

Gratefully,

[ ](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=8867b23878c8479aa81f65182df06a19&_e=_G-2yGzo4JEiE6Ma0XXpineqMdTIWGfLogsLWbAhX_ZWEyleQwqiFYfqkZP0ung7R48iQJCiWPwqnOW6W4YeR3OwLkQjpG7SO1GPxXyTTg7NeSY6xI4gSedcZU_wxqjv2WLQuVem7AGwAKABZsdyAYyJM8gI5yNDXDhPNcKnBaKwjVi-eu0LZKYUXcSJdxxryYgKf9fqalYKqVIe3rdyNDXr3c00idSflf1L4QbPpuvf8qPE8UWVJBoC4YpAnv-sHA6cbpbdNMrASe3Xi7jCdF2HxQkodcxNq-13G1DCjhbPhGhwWinUEHFjBfuuWTZeqZ2y4H004W_O5hq99acZjaaN0UDXvH0aA0kP6MXHARWkrejBE6fyTrwlkN9T7KTK3dJKu759TeSW5WFT5GE-g80vEGuoqM7RFk1DmbOZYFU%3D)

Curtis Bashaw
Entrepreneur. Husband. Preservationist.

PS – if you want to volunteer your time to help me in my campaign efforts, give my team a shout here so we can be in further contact with you.

| **_GET TO KNOW CURTIS_**

**Curtis Bashaw is a hotel entrepreneur, job creator, and preservationist. He’s running for United States Senate to provide greater freedom and opportunities for all New Jerseyans.**

A lifelong New Jersey resident, Curtis grew up in Camden County and spent his summers at the Jersey Shore working as a bellhop and waiting tables at Congress Hall in Cape May. He has spent his life in the real estate and hospitality industries, and is the Founder and Managing Partner of Cape Resorts, a hotel company focusing on the restoration and operation of classic American resort properties in New Jersey and New York.

Throughout his career, Curtis has worked to build communities and bring people together. He is widely recognized for leading the landmark restorations of Congress Hall and the Virginia Hotel in Cape May, and for launching creative programming to dramatically extend Cape May’s season, a catalyst for the economic rebirth of one of the Jersey Shore’s most beautiful communities.

Curtis is a successful businessman and job creator, employing more than 1,000 people in New Jersey and New York. Curtis’ company owns and operates eight hotels, ten cottages, six restaurants, four retail outlets and a working farm, all on the Jersey Shore and Long Island’s East End. Curtis lives in Cape May with his husband, Will.

I believe this race is a once-in-a-generation opportunity, and am ready to prove to the rest of the country that New Jersey is a lot more purple than people realize. I’m a lifelong Republican who stands strong in what I believe. So, I’m standing up and being the change that I so greatly want to see. Washington doesn’t need another politician who heads to Capitol Hill just to go viral online and generate a million clicks. If that’s what you’re looking for, I’m not your guy. Washington doesn’t need another politician who is willing to discard their beliefs for whichever SuperPAC is writing the biggest check. Washington needs someone who can get people to work together to get things done for the American people. That’s what I’ve done for 35 years in business and that’s what I’ll do in Washington as New Jersey’s next Senator. We have a real opportunity here to make a change in New Jersey, but I know I can’t do it without a strong team around me, comprised of freedom-loving Americans just like yourself. Gratefully, Curtis Bashaw Entrepreneur. Husband. Preservationist. PS – if you want to volunteer your time to help me in my campaign efforts, give my team a shout here so we can be in further contact with you. | GET TO KNOW CURTIS Curtis Bashaw is a hotel entrepreneur, job creator, and preservationist. He’s running for United States Senate to provide greater freedom and opportunities for all New Jerseyans. A lifelong New Jersey resident, Curtis grew up in Camden County and spent his summers at the Jersey Shore working as a bellhop and waiting tables at Congress Hall in Cape May. He has spent his life in the real estate and hospitality industries, and is the Founder and Managing Partner of Cape Resorts, a hotel company focusing on the restoration and operation of classic American resort properties in New Jersey and New York. Throughout his career, Curtis has worked to build communities and bring people together. He is widely recognized for leading the landmark restorations of Congress Hall and the Virginia Hotel in Cape May, and for launching creative programming to dramatically extend Cape May’s season, a catalyst for the economic rebirth of one of the Jersey Shore’s most beautiful communities. Curtis is a successful businessman and job creator, employing more than 1,000 people in New Jersey and New York. Curtis’ company owns and operates eight hotels, ten cottages, six restaurants, four retail outlets and a working farm, all on the Jersey Shore and Long Island’s East End. Curtis lives in Cape May with his husband, Will. | If you'd like to unsubscribe, please . | PAID FOR BY CURTIS BASHAW FOR US SENATE, INC.

His obsession with power and control is so weird.

**He’s obsessed with using his power to control how the rest of us live our lives.**
Last year, he published a whole book about “Manhood,” lecturing men about how they should be made in his own creepy image. Now, he’s crusading against reproductive rights across the spectrum, from abortion to birth control to IVF.
**It’s weird, it’s creepy, and I’ll never be able to understand it.**

name: SmartAsset
subject: Who Are You Partnered With? Fidelity vs. Vanguard vs. Schwab
body:

---
|
## Fidelity vs. Vanguard vs. Schwab
---
| [Take Retirement Quiz](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c691930%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=%2bMXXPCMPjTjuTKNRBtcFCw&sysid=1 "Take Retirement Quiz")
---
| _Get matched with up to 3 vetted financial advisors that serve your area, free!_
---
| Your advisor matches may not necessarily be associated with the above institutions
---
| | | SPONSORED BY SMARTASSET
---
| [ ](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c691931%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=6HuT%2fXmDYZfdJcXZZy9R1A&sysid=1)
---
|
---
| _Who are you partnered with?_ It’s no secret that Vanguard, Fidelity and Charles Schwab could be considered three of the most popular and well-known brokerage firms. Each offers a wide range of products and services, from banking and investment products to financial advisors and financial planning services.

However, there are some important differences, from fees to financial services to research resources, each of which could impact your customer experience. [Learn how these firms compare so you can decide on the right fit for you.](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c691932%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=ckEXYieGxaZ9IEr4QYBzAQ&sysid=1)

Ready to kickstart your retirement? Working with a financial advisor can be a crucial part of any healthy retirement plan. But with thousands of options available, it can seem daunting to choose one. That’s why SmartAsset created a [no-cost tool](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c691933%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=gYt3AiT2A4S7BqKXPZqWpA&sysid=1) to help match you with up to three financial advisors serving your area. All advisors on the platform are rigorously screened through a proprietary due diligence process and legally bound to work in your best interest.

While your advisor matches may not necessarily be associated with the above institutions, research suggests people who work with a financial advisor:
* feel more at ease about their finances
* could end up with about 15% more money to spend in retirement.1

It's never too late to work towards a comfortable retirement.

[See how Fidelity, Vanguard, and Schwab stack up »](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c691934%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=h%2b3PZVfwF70mrzn7DiR9zA&sysid=1)
---
|
---
| **Try SmartAsset's Financial Advisor Matching Tool**
Get retirement ready. Take this no-cost quiz to get matched with up to 3 vetted financial advisors serving your area, each
---
| [Take Retirement Quiz](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c691930%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=%2bMXXPCMPjTjuTKNRBtcFCw&sysid=1 "Take Retirement Quiz")
---
| Your advisor matches may not necessarily be associated with the above institutions
---
|
---
| | | Unless otherwise indicated, information is as of 5/4/2023. SmartAsset has no obligation to update any content in this article. This article may potentially include a firm or firms that have a business relationship with SmartAsset, in which SmartAsset is compensated for lead referrals or cost per engagement. SmartAsset is not a client of the aforementioned firms. SmartAsset did not receive compensation for including any of the firms in the aforementioned article. This article contains links to SmartAsset’s financial advisor matching tool, which may or may not match you with the firms mentioned in this profile. The matching tool does not include all available advisors and firms and matches based on specific criteria (investable assets, geography, and willingness to work with a remote advisor). This is not an offer to buy or sell any security or interest. All investing involves risk, including loss of principal. Working with an adviser may come with potential downsides such as payment of fees (which will reduce returns). There are no guarantees that working with an adviser will yield positive returns. The existence of a fiduciary duty does not prevent the rise of potential conflicts of interest. SmartAsset Advisors, LLC ("SmartAsset"), a wholly owned subsidiary of Financial Insight Technology, is registered with the U.S. Securities and Exchange Commission as an investment adviser. SmartAsset’s services are limited to referring users to third party advisers registered or chartered as fiduciaries ("Adviser(s)") with a regulatory body in the United States that have elected to participate in our matching platform based on information gathered from users through our online questionnaire. SmartAsset does not review the ongoing performance of any Adviser, participate in the management of any user’s account by an Adviser or provide advice regarding specific investments. We do not manage client funds or hold custody of assets, we help users connect with relevant financial advisors. SmartAsset.com is not intended to provide legal advice, tax advice, accounting advice or financial advice (Other than referring users to third party advisers registered or chartered as fiduciaries ("Adviser(s)") with a regulatory body in the United States). SmartAsset is not a financial planner, broker or tax adviser. The Service is intended only to assist you in your understanding of financial organization and decision-making and is broad in scope. Your personal financial situation is unique, and any information and investing strategies obtained through SmartAsset.com may not be appropriate for your situation. Accordingly, before making any final decisions or implementing any financial strategy, you should consider obtaining additional information and advice from your accountant or other financial advisers who are fully aware of your individual circumstances. Sources:

["Journal of Retirement Study Winter" (2020)](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c691945%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=6qxzKMH0h%2bl%2foJvhcaDZ7g&sysid=1). The projections or other information regarding the likelihood of various investment outcomes are hypothetical in nature, do not reflect actual investment results, and are not guarantees of your future results. Please follow the link to see the methodologies employed in the [Journal of Retirement study](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c691946%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=3zx27XlyPVf0W5XIhNGeig&sysid=1).

subject: Claim your SIGNED copy today!

body:
There's only 100 signed books left

|
---
| | | | [](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zqvuo2cqo97ab7pmso9ovtlclucollv0dbl3dh8o_rp22sh2s8i6ep31c9i64p37c3h2bs)
---

Hey there Friend, Governor Kristi Noem here!

"We don't complain about things, Kristi. We fix them." These words from my father have guided me throughout my life from the ranch of my youth to the South Dakota Governor's Residence.

And in my new memoir No Going Back, I share stories about the chaos and function in DC, and the lessons I learned in South Dakota on how to fix them. Because America needs commonsense practical solutions, not more complaining from our leaders.

**So I 'd like to offer you an exclusive signed copy today. BUT I only have 100 left! [YOU CAN CLAIM YOUR SIGNED COPY HERE >>>](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zr9ce0lbu7mv32li6rb5afk3dcfhu43pjcsgpt78_rp22sh2s8i6ep31c9i64p37c3h2bs "YOU CAN CLAIM YOUR SIGNED COPY HERE")**

## Fidelity vs. Vanguard vs. Schwab
---
| [Take Retirement Quiz](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zkuqmepem8mg86ntb437ct9c53m54pkldtggu140_rp22sh2s8i6ep31c9i64o31clh2bs "Take Retirement Quiz")

---

---
| | | SPONSORED BY SMARTASSET
---
| [](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zfujihdo2r2ebeh020rmpeduigg3p84212tr7dc0_rp22sh2s8i6ep31c9i64o31clh2bs)
---
|
---
| _Who are you partnered with?_ It’s no secret that Vanguard, Fidelity and Charles Schwab could be considered three of the most popular and well-known brokerage firms. Each offers a wide range of products and services, from banking and investment products to financial advisors and financial planning services.

However, there are some important differences, from fees to financial services to research resources, each of which could impact your customer experience. [Learn how these firms compare so you can decide on the right fit for you.](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z9ih0bjk7q6iq63ha9nti0ugiibqfib8q5uj5kag_rp22sh2s8i6ep31c9i64o31clh2bs)

Ready to kickstart your retirement? Working with a financial advisor can be a crucial part of any healthy retirement plan. But with thousands of options available, it can seem daunting to choose one. That’s why SmartAsset created a [no-cost tool](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zsfva0j5gae8agnposvv39lqo0d5si6163u95hlg_rp22sh2s8i6ep31c9i64o31clh2bs) to help match you with up to three financial advisors serving your area. All advisors on the platform are rigorously screened through a proprietary due diligence process and legally bound to work in your best interest.

While your advisor matches may not necessarily be associated with the above institutions, research suggests people who work with a financial advisor:
* feel more at ease about their finances
* could end up with about 15% more money to spend in retirement.1

It's never too late to work towards a comfortable retirement.

[See how Fidelity, Vanguard, and Schwab stack up »](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zagsngdu0r6mr6a2l00l46aj8na5em5pu5sc8qt8_rp22sh2s8i6ep31c9i64o31clh2bs)
---
|
---
| **Try SmartAsset's Financial Advisor Matching Tool**
Get retirement ready. Take this no-cost quiz to get matched with up to 3 vetted financial advisors serving your area, each
---
| [Take Retirement Quiz](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2ze9bidq0a2gk23daohj0ic015qamtck619hs8930_rp22sh2s8i6ep31c9i64o31clh2bs "Take Retirement Quiz")
---
| Your advisor matches may not necessarily be associated with the above institutions

This article may potentially include a firm or firms that have a business relationship with SmartAsset, in which SmartAsset is compensated for lead referrals or cost per engagement. | _Who are you partnered with?_ It’s no secret that Vanguard, Fidelity and Charles Schwab could be considered three of the most popular and well-known brokerage firms. Each offers a wide range of products and services, from banking and investment products to financial advisors and financial planning services.

However, there are some important differences, from fees to financial services to research resources, each of which could impact your customer experience. [Learn how these firms compare so you can decide on the right fit for you.](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c33529%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=gHpifM4PswIGVHnrTWK62Q&sysid=1)

Ready to kickstart your retirement? Working with a financial advisor can be a crucial part of any healthy retirement plan. But with thousands of options available, it can seem daunting to choose one. That’s why SmartAsset created a [no-cost tool](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c33520%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=qAUFtOPe9hw3X6dnlPXAOg&sysid=1) to help match you with up to three financial advisors serving your area. All advisors on the platform are rigorously screened through a proprietary due diligence process and legally bound to work in your best interest.

While your advisor matches may not necessarily be associated with the above institutions, research suggests people who work with a financial advisor:
* feel more at ease about their finances
* could end up with about 15% more money to spend in retirement.1

It's never too late to work towards a comfortable retirement.

[See how Fidelity, Vanguard, and Schwab stack up »](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c33521%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=XwEpWNm7zuqOCT7V4Iy5Dg&sysid=1)

name: Hillsdale College via American Briefing
subject: Justice, weaponized
body:
Please particpate in this survey on the Department of Justice.

This sponsored message from American Briefing is on behalf of Hillsdale College
[](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2z2ji96jhehe4r8s1ujm2jp95dc6958atspa5v15o_rp22sh2s8i6ep31c9i6co72c1h2bs) Dear Fellow American, Before you move on to your next email—I would appreciate it if you would take a few moments to participate in Hillsdale College's **National Survey on the Department of Justice.** The survey will only take a few moments of your time, and its subject affects your liberty and the very survival of the rule of law in America. **The current administration's weaponization of the Department of Justice is unprecedented in American history.** Instead of protecting your God-given constitutional rights, the administration uses the Department of Justice to attack its political opponents... ...as well as Christians, parents, and anyone who dares to stand up for our constitutional liberties. At the same time, with the help of the media it...
* Covers up a two-tiered justice system that violates your constitutional rights

* Hides the corruption of the ruling class

* Attacks those with traditional viewpoints

**That's why I'm asking you to take the Hillsdale College National Survey on the Department of Justice.** By completing this survey, you will help us more clearly understand the views of mainstream Americans like you on this critical issue. Your responses will help Hillsdale strengthen its nationwide educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty—including the importance of the rule of law and checks and balances, which the American Founders saw as essential safeguards against corruption. Friend, you can complete the National Survey on the Department of Justice by using the link below: **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/department-of-justice-survey/](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zfpma9k9m785cqbk7666t9660odb7jsdmfj5esvg_rp22sh2s8i6ep31c9i6co72c1h2bs)** The **Declaration of Independence** argues that **the purpose of just government is to secure our natural rights** and that **just government is founded on the consent of the governed.** Yet today's ruling class regularly disregards the will of the American people, and our rights—to the freedoms of speech, assembly, and religion, to due process, to gun ownership, and more—are under constant attack. **You and I know that liberty in America is under serious threat. But as I travel around the country, I tell the audiences I speak to how we are engaging in the fight against this threat.** A vital part of our efforts in this fight—in which Hillsdale College is a leader—is **reaching** and **teaching** millions of citizens, with the TRUTH about America's great heritage of liberty. We are heavily invested in our educational outreach efforts through our **Project to Defend Liberty Nationwide by Reaching and Teaching Millions.** These efforts include:
* **Teaching bright and principled students** —on our campuses in Hillsdale, Michigan, and Washington, D.C.—who receive a rigorous, **classical liberal arts education, including** a required course on the Constitution

* **Distributing _Imprimis_** , America's leading digest of liberty, which is mailed to more than 6.4 million homes and businesses ten times per year; previous issues include “The Politicization of the Department of Justice” by Harmeet K. Dhillon

* **Producing and promoting free online courses** for any citizen who wishes to learn, on topics such as the Constitution, American history, and free market economics

* **Providing a classical K-12 curriculum** with a solid grounding in American history, constitutional government, and economics to schools that educate thousands of students nationwide

After everything we've seen over the past few years, the need for Hillsdale's educational outreach efforts is undeniable. So please share your views by completing our **National Survey on the Department of Justice** and returning it to me as soon as possible. It will only take a few minutes of your time. Your completed survey will help us form the most effective strategy to **reach** and **teach** millions of Americans on behalf of liberty. As you might know, Hillsdale College is almost unique in American higher education in its refusal to accept EVEN ONE PENNY of government funding—not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans. **This independence frees the College from burdensome and corrupting government regulations. But it also means that our work depends entirely on the generous support of private citizens, like you, who understand the importance of education to liberty.** If you agree that we are now seeing an unprecedented assault on the American way of life, I hope you will partner with Hillsdale College by making a generous tax-deductible gift today. You can easily do so after completing the attached **National Survey on the Department of Justice** , which you can access at this secure link: **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/department-of-justice-survey/](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2z1nqac7hcdliouoojvq1nhfe2vuk0t0g3tcc20h0_rp22sh2s8i6ep31c9i6co72c1h2bs)** Thank you for your time and attention. I look forward to receiving your completed survey, and I sincerely appreciate your support of Hillsdale's educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty. Warm regards, Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844 |
---

American Briefing
---
_PO Box 2221 Fort Collins, CO 80522_
_[**unsubscribe**](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zg8aof7o4bp9q9c1gmu5k717qtfbn6tiql44tnq0_rp22sh2s8i6ep31c9i6co72c1h238h5e8he485he5o75pt7kuo72ttle5pq8ddl69qbcd1jm8p79d9j6iprect66uqrf9bjmpqn4djm69qb4d9nkvijbo9getqb3cdkmppmeo0n6mq39cdjkorrbcp4mni64pr0cpjmaoh5u)_ | _[manage data preferences](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2z3b6ecvpen3iq55gcvnaqjpua9i8sf991reuuang_rp22sh2s8i6ep31c9i6co72c1h2bs)_

[](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zcri8ahietvk0gtddhbv5be8b3e52sker16f7rtg_rp2ash2s8j2ccdkmorb4dthe8gq48bi4bh28pr4c5h68pj0s9g649fg)

| _Who are you partnered with?_ It’s no secret that Vanguard, Fidelity and Charles Schwab could be considered three of the most popular and well-known brokerage firms. Each offers a wide range of products and services, from banking and investment products to financial advisors and financial planning services.

However, there are some important differences, from fees to financial services to research resources, each of which could impact your customer experience. [Learn how these firms compare so you can decide on the right fit for you.](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zbnsdjvkthssos5j2m06ja0gvromljpisdo67gg8_rp22sh2s8i6ep31c9i6co72c1h2bs)

Ready to kickstart your retirement? Working with a financial advisor can be a crucial part of any healthy retirement plan. But with thousands of options available, it can seem daunting to choose one. That’s why SmartAsset created a [no-cost tool](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zd5nnfer3h5cta5unc6rkn5dnlkt4s34420o5emo_rp22sh2s8i6ep31c9i6co72c1h2bs) to help match you with up to three financial advisors serving your area. All advisors on the platform are rigorously screened through a proprietary due diligence process and legally bound to work in your best interest.

While your advisor matches may not necessarily be associated with the above institutions, research suggests people who work with a financial advisor:
* feel more at ease about their finances
* could end up with about 15% more money to spend in retirement.1

It's never too late to work towards a comfortable retirement.

## Fidelity vs. Vanguard vs. Schwab
---
| [Take Retirement Quiz](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zeih6bda7gbdp4paiv1621q3ukt4k56oir9v85g8_rp22sh2s8i6ep31c9i6aor0c3h2bs "Take Retirement Quiz")
---
| _Get matched with up to 3 vetted financial advisors that serve your area, free!_
---
| Your advisor matches may not necessarily be associated with the above institutions
---
| | | SPONSORED BY SMARTASSET
---
| [](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z4lece60dcqciodil9egmknutkgn0omn0tn8iku0_rp22sh2s8i6ep31c9i6aor0c3h2bs)
---
|
---
| _Who are you partnered with?_ It’s no secret that Vanguard, Fidelity and Charles Schwab could be considered three of the most popular and well-known brokerage firms. Each offers a wide range of products and services, from banking and investment products to financial advisors and financial planning services.

However, there are some important differences, from fees to financial services to research resources, each of which could impact your customer experience. [Learn how these firms compare so you can decide on the right fit for you.](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zue1sqpkske8ruslhcdabqv4mjcp3nc9dkifb3i0_rp22sh2s8i6ep31c9i6aor0c3h2bs)

Ready to kickstart your retirement? Working with a financial advisor can be a crucial part of any healthy retirement plan. But with thousands of options available, it can seem daunting to choose one. That’s why SmartAsset created a [no-cost tool](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zfsr7kktsql81s068q7mr0mnkurrnd022mdfug9g_rp22sh2s8i6ep31c9i6aor0c3h2bs) to help match you with up to three financial advisors serving your area. All advisors on the platform are rigorously screened through a proprietary due diligence process and legally bound to work in your best interest.

While your advisor matches may not necessarily be associated with the above institutions, research suggests people who work with a financial advisor:
* feel more at ease about their finances
* could end up with about 15% more money to spend in retirement.1

It's never too late to work towards a comfortable retirement.

[See how Fidelity, Vanguard, and Schwab stack up »](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zg13qf4r98atsembjd2aqdbb9sttkhhcbb5oa988_rp22sh2s8i6ep31c9i6aor0c3h2bs)
---
|
---

SmartAsset is not a client of the aforementioned firms. SmartAsset did not receive compensation for including any of the firms in the aforementioned article. This article contains links to SmartAsset’s financial advisor matching tool, which may or may not match you with the firms mentioned in this profile. The matching tool does not include all available advisors and firms and matches based on specific criteria (investable assets, geography, and willingness to work with a remote advisor). This is not an offer to buy or sell any security or interest. All investing involves risk, including loss of principal. Working with an adviser may come with potential downsides such as payment of fees (which will reduce returns). There are no guarantees that working with an adviser will yield positive returns. The existence of a fiduciary duty does not prevent the rise of potential conflicts of interest. SmartAsset Advisors, LLC ("SmartAsset"), a wholly owned subsidiary of Financial Insight Technology, is registered with the U.S. Securities and Exchange Commission as an investment adviser. SmartAsset’s services are limited to referring users to third party advisers registered or chartered as fiduciaries ("Adviser(s)") with a regulatory body in the United States that have elected to participate in our matching platform based on information gathered from users through our online questionnaire. SmartAsset does not review the ongoing performance of any Adviser, participate in the management of any user’s account by an Adviser or provide advice regarding specific investments. We do not manage client funds or hold custody of assets, we help users connect with relevant financial advisors. SmartAsset.com is not intended to provide legal advice, tax advice, accounting advice or financial advice (Other than referring users to third party advisers registered or chartered as fiduciaries ("Adviser(s)") with a regulatory body in the United States). SmartAsset is not a financial planner, broker or tax adviser. The Service is intended only to assist you in your understanding of financial organization and decision-making and is broad in scope. Your personal financial situation is unique, and any information and investing strategies obtained through SmartAsset.com may not be appropriate for your situation. Accordingly, before making any final decisions or implementing any financial strategy, you should consider obtaining additional information and advice from your accountant or other financial advisers who are fully aware of your individual circumstances. Sources:

The projections or other information regarding the likelihood of various investment outcomes are hypothetical in nature, do not reflect actual investment results, and are not guarantees of your future results. name: Hillsdale College via American Action News
subject: Department of Justice
body:
Please particpate in this survey on the Department of Justice.

This sponsored message from American Action News is on behalf of Hillsdale College
[](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zpc989373lh61l3ij0rp5jvvjtna61vk9t336j4g_rp22sh2s8i6ep31c9i6aor4chh2bs) Dear Fellow American, Before you move on to your next email—I would appreciate it if you would take a few moments to participate in Hillsdale College's **National Survey on the Department of Justice.** The survey will only take a few moments of your time, and its subject affects your liberty and the very survival of the rule of law in America. **The current administration's weaponization of the Department of Justice is unprecedented in American history.** Instead of protecting your God-given constitutional rights, the administration uses the Department of Justice to attack its political opponents... ...as well as Christians, parents, and anyone who dares to stand up for our constitutional liberties. At the same time, with the help of the media it...
* Covers up a two-tiered justice system that violates your constitutional rights

* Hides the corruption of the ruling class

* Attacks those with traditional viewpoints

**That's why I'm asking you to take the Hillsdale College National Survey on the Department of Justice.** By completing this survey, you will help us more clearly understand the views of mainstream Americans like you on this critical issue. Your responses will help Hillsdale strengthen its nationwide educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty—including the importance of the rule of law and checks and balances, which the American Founders saw as essential safeguards against corruption. Friend, you can complete the National Survey on the Department of Justice by using the link below: **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/department-of-justice-survey/](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zveib4fg0pd3p0o94l98m36fipmfksnpf7j141d8_rp22sh2s8i6ep31c9i6aor4chh2bs)** The **Declaration of Independence** argues that **the purpose of just government is to secure our natural rights** and that **just government is founded on the consent of the governed.** Yet today's ruling class regularly disregards the will of the American people, and our rights—to the freedoms of speech, assembly, and religion, to due process, to gun ownership, and more—are under constant attack. **You and I know that liberty in America is under serious threat. But as I travel around the country, I tell the audiences I speak to how we are engaging in the fight against this threat.** A vital part of our efforts in this fight—in which Hillsdale College is a leader—is **reaching** and **teaching** millions of citizens, with the TRUTH about America's great heritage of liberty. We are heavily invested in our educational outreach efforts through our **Project to Defend Liberty Nationwide by Reaching and Teaching Millions.** These efforts include:
* **Teaching bright and principled students** —on our campuses in Hillsdale, Michigan, and Washington, D.C.—who receive a rigorous, **classical liberal arts education, including** a required course on the Constitution

* **Distributing _Imprimis_** , America's leading digest of liberty, which is mailed to more than 6.4 million homes and businesses ten times per year; previous issues include “The Politicization of the Department of Justice” by Harmeet K. Dhillon

* **Producing and promoting free online courses** for any citizen who wishes to learn, on topics such as the Constitution, American history, and free market economics

* **Providing a classical K-12 curriculum** with a solid grounding in American history, constitutional government, and economics to schools that educate thousands of students nationwide

After everything we've seen over the past few years, the need for Hillsdale's educational outreach efforts is undeniable. So please share your views by completing our **National Survey on the Department of Justice** and returning it to me as soon as possible. It will only take a few minutes of your time. Your completed survey will help us form the most effective strategy to **reach** and **teach** millions of Americans on behalf of liberty. As you might know, Hillsdale College is almost unique in American higher education in its refusal to accept EVEN ONE PENNY of government funding—not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans. **This independence frees the College from burdensome and corrupting government regulations. But it also means that our work depends entirely on the generous support of private citizens, like you, who understand the importance of education to liberty.** If you agree that we are now seeing an unprecedented assault on the American way of life, I hope you will partner with Hillsdale College by making a generous tax-deductible gift today. You can easily do so after completing the attached **National Survey on the Department of Justice** , which you can access at this secure link: **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/department-of-justice-survey/](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zvllp2kdk7ian181c1mq887p44n42pqh8sbkqhbg_rp22sh2s8i6ep31c9i6aor4chh2bs)** Thank you for your time and attention. I look forward to receiving your completed survey, and I sincerely appreciate your support of Hillsdale's educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty. Warm regards, Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844 |
---

American Action News
---
_PO Box 1177 Fort Collins, CO 80522_
_[**unsubscribe**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zk6dcf15jglsloiosfkfe8ehqbbhqenr4aest6l8_rp2ash2s8gb2sbgebjqf9tge5rrasbjkgqracjkmoq37d1m65qbfctjmkrncst66uqrf9bjmpqn4djm69qb4d9nkvijbo9getqb3cdkmppmeo0n6mq39cdjkorrbcp4mni64pr0cpge0oh1k8gn48n24hjm8ob2chim6p34c8iv0)_ | _[manage data preferences](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z4t4l30f05s9epbn2qq4gksthbdhn1gg85cdvc10_rp22sh2s8i6ep31c9i6aor4chh2bs)_

[](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zo1iem634pp40p72ocfnhvcpg1npq5u4amjj6ulo_rp2ash2s8j2ccdkmorb4dthe8gq48bi4bh28pr4c5h68pb3chi649fg)

# **['I'm coming back blind!' Michael Bisping says he'll come out of retirement to fight Luke Rockhold despite having one eye](http://trk.libertyledger.)**
---
UFC legend and former middleweight champion Michael Bisping said that he is "100%" willing to come out of retirement to fight his rival Luke Rockhold.Bisping, now 45, lost to Rockhold in the UFC in 2014 before beating him in 2016 for the middleweight championship despite filling in for another fighter on just two weeks notice. The 185-pound fighter would defend the title once before losing to Georges St. Pierre, who is viewed as one of the greatest fighters of all time.

A parental rights organization filed civil-rights complaints against
two school districts in Colorado on Friday, alleging they
discriminated against parents by race. Parents Defending Education
(PDE) accused the Summit School District and the Greeley-Evans School
District of racial discrimination through the creation of “affinity
groups” for Hispanic and black parents, respectively, in complaints
filed with the Department of Education’s Office of Civil Rights.

Friend,
---
This letter I’ve written to you comes entirely from the heart...
---
I knew full well the price I could one day pay for defending President Trump from one of the most vile witch hunts in American history.
---
_But the fight for justice is always worth it.__
---
Now, I find myself in a battle for my own freedom and justice as Crooked Joe Biden’s accomplices seek to destroy me...
---
**Wall Street Journal: “Trump Advisers, Including Giuliani and Meadows, Indicted in Arizona”**
---
It wasn’t enough for the Biden Regime to have its FBI raid my home, wrongfully arrest me, take my mugshot, or push me to the point of bankruptcy... _**They have now indicted me before a Grand Jury**_
---
But despite all of these vicious attacks, despite the Fake News calling me “a dead man walking,” I’m still standing strong – _thanks to unbelievably kind souls like YOU who have given me the resources and support I need to stay free, and ensure that justice prevails for ALL Americans._
---
_Times are tough in Crooked Joe’s America, so if you can’t afford it, please take care of yourself. But, if you can, any contribution you can make will be greatly appreciated to fight this INDICTMENT._

name: Hillsdale College via Restore Our Nation
subject: Survey on the Department of Justice
body:
Please particpate in this survey on the Department of Justice.

This sponsored message from Restore Our Nation is on behalf of Hillsdale College

[](http://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/V7SVGoRH9cNMs28c3vikvg~~/AARclAA~/RgRoD1V-P0SsaHR0cHM6Ly9scC5oaWxsc2RhbGUuZWR1L2RlcGFydG1lbnQtb2YtanVzdGljZS1zdXJ2ZXkvP3NjPTAxMDQwTjAyNDJMMEFET0RFRVMmdXRtX3NvdXJjZT1wcm9zcGVjdGluZyZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPWVtYWlsJnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj1kb2pzdXJ2ZXkmdXRtX2NvbnRlbnQ9U0FMX1BBLVJPTi0yMDI0MDQyN1cDc3BjQgpmJ9K7LGbgfBToUhRkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbVgEAAAAAA~~) Dear Fellow American, Before you move on to your next email—I would appreciate it if you would take a few moments to participate in Hillsdale College's **National Survey on the Department of Justice.** The survey will only take a few moments of your time, and its subject affects your liberty and the very survival of the rule of law in America. **The current administration's weaponization of the Department of Justice is unprecedented in American history.** Instead of protecting your God-given constitutional rights, the administration uses the Department of Justice to attack its political opponents... ...as well as Christians, parents, and anyone who dares to stand up for our constitutional liberties. At the same time, with the help of the media it...
* Covers up a two-tiered justice system that violates your constitutional rights

* Hides the corruption of the ruling class

* Attacks those with traditional viewpoints

**That's why I'm asking you to take the Hillsdale College National Survey on the Department of Justice.** By completing this survey, you will help us more clearly understand the views of mainstream Americans like you on this critical issue. Your responses will help Hillsdale strengthen its nationwide educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty—including the importance of the rule of law and checks and balances, which the American Founders saw as essential safeguards against corruption. Friend, you can complete the National Survey on the Department of Justice by using the link below: **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/department-of-justice-survey/](http://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/V7SVGoRH9cNMs28c3vikvg~~/AARclAA~/RgRoD1V-P0SsaHR0cHM6Ly9scC5oaWxsc2RhbGUuZWR1L2RlcGFydG1lbnQtb2YtanVzdGljZS1zdXJ2ZXkvP3NjPTAxMDQwTjAyNDJMMEFET0RFRVMmdXRtX3NvdXJjZT1wcm9zcGVjdGluZyZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPWVtYWlsJnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj1kb2pzdXJ2ZXkmdXRtX2NvbnRlbnQ9U0FMX1BBLVJPTi0yMDI0MDQyN1cDc3BjQgpmJ9K7LGbgfBToUhRkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbVgEAAAAAA~~)** The **Declaration of Independence** argues that **the purpose of just government is to secure our natural rights** and that **just government is founded on the consent of the governed.** Yet today's ruling class regularly disregards the will of the American people, and our rights—to the freedoms of speech, assembly, and religion, to due process, to gun ownership, and more—are under constant attack. **You and I know that liberty in America is under serious threat. But as I travel around the country, I tell the audiences I speak to how we are engaging in the fight against this threat.** A vital part of our efforts in this fight—in which Hillsdale College is a leader—is **reaching** and **teaching** millions of citizens, with the TRUTH about America's great heritage of liberty. We are heavily invested in our educational outreach efforts through our **Project to Defend Liberty Nationwide by Reaching and Teaching Millions.** These efforts include:
* **Teaching bright and principled students** —on our campuses in Hillsdale, Michigan, and Washington, D.C.—who receive a rigorous, **classical liberal arts education, including** a required course on the Constitution

* **Distributing _Imprimis_** , America's leading digest of liberty, which is mailed to more than 6.4 million homes and businesses ten times per year; previous issues include “The Politicization of the Department of Justice” by Harmeet K. Dhillon

* **Producing and promoting free online courses** for any citizen who wishes to learn, on topics such as the Constitution, American history, and free market economics

* **Providing a classical K-12 curriculum** with a solid grounding in American history, constitutional government, and economics to schools that educate thousands of students nationwide

After everything we've seen over the past few years, the need for Hillsdale's educational outreach efforts is undeniable. So please share your views by completing our **National Survey on the Department of Justice** and returning it to me as soon as possible. It will only take a few minutes of your time. Your completed survey will help us form the most effective strategy to **reach** and **teach** millions of Americans on behalf of liberty. As you might know, Hillsdale College is almost unique in American higher education in its refusal to accept EVEN ONE PENNY of government funding—not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans. **This independence frees the College from burdensome and corrupting government regulations. But it also means that our work depends entirely on the generous support of private citizens, like you, who understand the importance of education to liberty.** If you agree that we are now seeing an unprecedented assault on the American way of life, I hope you will partner with Hillsdale College by making a generous tax-deductible gift today. You can easily do so after completing the attached **National Survey on the Department of Justice** , which you can access at this secure link: **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/department-of-justice-survey/](http://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/V7SVGoRH9cNMs28c3vikvg~~/AARclAA~/RgRoD1V-P0SsaHR0cHM6Ly9scC5oaWxsc2RhbGUuZWR1L2RlcGFydG1lbnQtb2YtanVzdGljZS1zdXJ2ZXkvP3NjPTAxMDQwTjAyNDJMMEFET0RFRVMmdXRtX3NvdXJjZT1wcm9zcGVjdGluZyZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPWVtYWlsJnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj1kb2pzdXJ2ZXkmdXRtX2NvbnRlbnQ9U0FMX1BBLVJPTi0yMDI0MDQyN1cDc3BjQgpmJ9K7LGbgfBToUhRkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbVgEAAAAAA~~)** Thank you for your time and attention. I look forward to receiving your completed survey, and I sincerely appreciate your support of Hillsdale's educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty. Warm regards, Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844 |
---

Restore Our Nation
---
_PO Box 1177 Fort Collins, CO 80522_
_[**unsubscribe**](http://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/bxy2l96KioM-9FnM-MW0xg~~/AARclAA~/RgRoD1V-P0RpaHR0cHM6Ly9vcHRvdXQucmVzdG9yZS1vdXItbmF0aW9uLmNvbS91bnN1YnNjcmliZS8_Yj1SZXN0b3JlLU91ci1OYXRpb24tT2ZmZXJzJmU9ZHB3aWxsaXM2NyUyNTQwZ21haWwuY29tVwNzcGNCCmYn0rssZuB8FOhSFGRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tWAQAAAAA)_ | _[manage data preferences](http://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/BVxG1IJ4sGfIAB1szAF3rA~~/AARclAA~/RgRoD1V-P0QraHR0cHM6Ly9yZXN0b3JlLW91ci1uYXRpb24uY29tL3ByaXZhY3kuaHRtbFcDc3BjQgpmJ9K7LGbgfBToUhRkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbVgEAAAAAA~~)_

name: The Flyover
subject: Biden Job Approval Drops, the Summer Movie Lineup, and a Green Golden Retriever
body:
President Biden's 38.7% average job approval rating is the lowest rating by any president at this point in their first term since 1956, according to a new poll released by Gallup.

# SATURDAY, APRIL 27, 2024
---|---
**Happy Saturday**! On this date in April 1805, U.S. agent William Eaton led a small force of U.S. Marines and Berber mercenaries against the Tripolitan port city of Derna. They captured the town and gave birth to the phrase "[to the shores of Tripoli](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxsz7FuwyAUheGnMRsWuQZDBoYu2dK1o4XNJdwKGwtQLL995apj1_MPn87Xc3o6SrS9Pt2KtoU8uaXRGyfJQXOQk2TeBkTAgaG96ZsEuIFWLNp5xLuQsxuFMbPw6OcwDCgHs2hpUBlGFgRIIUELo0YlehjF_T4bJXVQEBbdSYGeWi79d6atRQzpzG8s_ZJXlmxsba_d8NHBo4PHcRx9pNpyOa_ewaNFqty7k9PG_8q1Zt4i8hpzwcpz4K3QnhOxYv1-UEpUx0t-rY7Sr9T-_f0TAAD__1EBWoA)," from the official song of the U.S. Marine Corps. As a young journalist, _The Editor_ had an opportunity to visit the Marine Corps Recruit Depot in San Diego and observe boot camp. ## Biden's Job Approval Lowest Since 1956
President Biden's 38.7% average job approval rating is the lowest by any president at this point in their first term since 1956, [according to a new Gallup poll](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxs0L1ytCAUxvGrgY4dPPLhFhRvY7dvm9JBPcjJIDhI3MndZ0yd-lc8z_w_XtPLU6K8_fc7uhbK5JdGF05KgBWgJsVXFxABe46us50C6MBqHp2Rc--HwfTK6GVYwlOBwmA7baGfzWo4OZCgpAIrB220fICRz-c8aGWDhrBYpiSu1Ep9fBbKLWJI3-XC-ljKzpOLrR0n6_8xGBmMLWKklG5jMMayY8b3yWD0606ZzlZ9o5IZjMpAr9UgZloxC38ctVw-idvzJvyF1W8oIp2tVFpEKm-x-ZS-DgYjr2493pQSneb-t-2efjd5-7POTwAAAP__20JmlA). The rating averaged polls during Biden's 13th quarter in office, which ran from January 20 to April 19. [By comparison,](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxskDEPmzAQRn-N2UDmbCAZGCpFbOnaEV3MAdceNjVH0vz7KlW7dX1P-qT3fbuPd2ThuHzFjXqd04hB-UmjL6ErwY--mPqZCMgV1Ndd7QFq6Jpi7UPoHjVZQPtwNdrrfPG2blo3-5auk8OCe7DgrYfOXpq2sRW09np9XBrfzQ3MoTPe0sSacvU9cdSVZnmnJ-UqpK2QflXdD-O-GBgMDJFeR7WgyLl_vIFhTyIGhtZ7aMDA8OCJYlk7XcufJ2alXOK-5_REKfFJGRcqJb3o0HLlQ1PmgCLvCo_9l3HDqdt4pDMHMu6GQlkNtB-40cTnZtyNNmT5C0OKSlGNu20pk3D88U_gtiMv0bjb8Y4TB1ROscj9tL9YhI_20718pv506n9f_x0AAP__ZUWHDg) Biden's 38.7% is lower than Trump's 46.8% and Obama's 45.9%. Eisenhower's 73.2% in 1956 topped the list. Out of all 314 presidential quarters measured in Gallup's records, Biden's recent mark ranks 277th. Four other presidents had a rating below 50% in their 13th quarter; Obama was the only one to win reelection.
## U.S. Birth Rate Hits Record Low
A new report from the CDC revealed that the general fertility rate in the U.S. fell by 3% from 2022, reaching a historic low. [See the full report here.](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxskLGO6yAURL8GuiC4hkAKite4y2u3RARfbFbYWIBs7d-vHKXcaqSjkeZovp7u6VNO2_zfr2h7LM6Hng508gb6BtJJOtmICDhQtEILCSBAK7pYI8QQ0YOJxry0US8NQfuHAD4pFXCgyQIHySVobtRdcQZ3_ni8jJI6KohBE8lxSr1U9l3S1heM-accWFkoK8126X1vZPhHYCQwnufJwhTYXA4C4xaWRmDcK7ZWS1k_yL2Bq5jRN7wal8InuALFlr7Saqf9TDmndr8c5tWn_N7sfz7wGwAA___g2FrE) Birth rates declined overall for women ages 20-39 years, but especially for women ages 20-24. That group reached a record low of 55.4%. Rates were unchanged for females aged 40-49. The report also indicated that [births declined for all ethnicities](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxs0LGOszAQBOCngc7ILGsMhYu_ocvfXokMXgefTBwtm6B7-xOpr5lipvk0X7f55lNOj_t_v5OTWGa_SnrTjAqsApyxDi4SAXU1uda2CNCCNfXmFsKw4qpxiHZAY0MfW9ON4xIWGLsO6-RAA2oEqwfTG91Ar8dxGQzaaCCutkJNIUnh5rukh2wU8095Ezdr2evsNpHnUXX_KpgqmM7zbJheQnxc-9UUzqGC6XV8Qi2JZTsUkzB5UT4KsXr6R6A9rYrYqzuXUzZ1sZRGBaaCqWYXnmfKOR39JbrvPuWPQP784zcAAP__fX1gdw) except Native Hawaiian and Pacific Islander women. Black and Native American women experienced the largest birth declines, by 4% and 5%, respectively.

On this date in April 1805, U.S. agent William Eaton led a small force of U.S. Marines and Berber mercenaries against the Tripolitan port city of Derna. They captured the town and gave birth to the phrase "," from the official song of the U.S. Marine Corps. As a young journalist, The Editor had an opportunity to visit the Marine Corps Recruit Depot in San Diego and observe boot camp. Our sponsor this weekend is Check them out today! | Biden's Job Approval Lowest Since 1956 President Biden's 38.7% average job approval rating is the lowest by any president at this point in their first term since 1956, . The rating averaged polls during Biden's 13th quarter in office, which ran from January 20 to April 19. Biden's 38.7% is lower than Trump's 46.8% and Obama's 45.9%. Eisenhower's 73.2% in 1956 topped the list. Out of all 314 presidential quarters measured in Gallup's records, Biden's recent mark ranks 277th. Four other presidents had a rating below 50% in their 13th quarter; Obama was the only one to win reelection. U.S. Birth Rate Hits Record Low A new report from the CDC revealed that the general fertility rate in the U.S. fell by 3% from 2022, reaching a historic low. Birth rates declined overall for women ages 20-39 years, but especially for women ages 20-24. That group reached a record low of 55.4%. Rates were unchanged for females aged 40-49. The report also indicated that except Native Hawaiian and Pacific Islander women. Black and Native American women experienced the largest birth declines, by 4% and 5%, respectively. body:
Bogus criminal charges... This is a travesty of justice.

Bogus criminal charges... This is a travesty of justice.
| [](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zlkd0eh287lol5u7libogo1ci026rs36j40rhmc8_rp22sh2s8i6ep31c9h6coj6c9h2bs)
---
Friend,
---
This letter I’ve written to you comes entirely from the heart...
---
I knew full well the price I could one day pay for defending President Trump from one of the most vile witch hunts in American history.
---
_But the fight for justice is always worth it.__
---
Now, I find myself in a battle for my own freedom and justice as Crooked Joe Biden’s accomplices seek to destroy me...
---
**Wall Street Journal: “Trump Advisers, Including Giuliani and Meadows, Indicted in Arizona”**
---
It wasn’t enough for the Biden Regime to have its FBI raid my home, wrongfully arrest me, take my mugshot, or push me to the point of bankruptcy... _**They have now indicted me before a Grand Jury**_
---
But despite all of these vicious attacks, despite the Fake News calling me “a dead man walking,” I’m still standing strong – _thanks to unbelievably kind souls like YOU who have given me the resources and support I need to stay free, and ensure that justice prevails for ALL Americans._
---
_Times are tough in Crooked Joe’s America, so if you can’t afford it, please take care of yourself. But, if you can, any contribution you can make will be greatly appreciated to fight this INDICTMENT._
---
[**Please make a contribution to my legal defense trust – the Rudy Giuliani Freedom Fund – to help me fight for my freedom and justice as the Deep State tries to JAIL me for the rest of my life.**](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zklqikt55q7toqs3us1cmkqsl54mjla4m7ugk81g_rp22sh2s8i6ep31c9h6coj6c9h2bs)

clean_body: Bogus criminal charges... This is a travesty of justice. Bogus criminal charges... This is a travesty of justice. | Friend, This letter I’ve written to you comes entirely from the heart... I knew full well the price I could one day pay for defending President Trump from one of the most vile witch hunts in American history. But the fight for justice is always worth it. Now, I find myself in a battle for my own freedom and justice as Crooked Joe Biden’s accomplices seek to destroy me... Wall Street Journal: “Trump Advisers, Including Giuliani and Meadows, Indicted in Arizona” It wasn’t enough for the Biden Regime to have its FBI raid my home, wrongfully arrest me, take my mugshot, or push me to the point of bankruptcy... They have now indicted me before a Grand Jury But despite all of these vicious attacks, despite the Fake News calling me “a dead man walking,” I’m still standing strong – thanks to unbelievably kind souls like YOU who have given me the resources and support I need to stay free, and ensure that justice prevails for ALL Americans. Times are tough in Crooked Joe’s America, so if you can’t afford it, please take care of yourself. But, if you can, any contribution you can make will be greatly appreciated to fight this INDICTMENT. Thank you and God bless you, Rudy Giuliani Rudy Giuliani Freedom Fund Paid for by Rudy Giuliani Freedom Fund Legal Defense Trust Trump Train News PO Box 461 Fort Collins, CO 80522 |

She knows our community inside and out. She understands the challenges families here face every single day, and she’ll work with whoever she can to deliver the results Virginians are counting on. This is the message Briana shares with voters on the campaign trail every single day. And it’s resonating – new volunteers, supporters, and voters are joining our campaign every single day!

**But in a district this competitive – and with millions of dollars of out-of-state money already pouring in – Briana needs your help to reach more voters.**

name: Young Kim -- R-CA
subject: I won’t waste your time
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Young Kim for Congress
body:
I JUST became the official Republican nominee in one of the most competitive elections in the country.

| |
---
| | | | [](http://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/cto9mlsBxKYyT4J7d-Iz5Q~~/AARclAA~ "Young Kim U.S. Congress")
---

Hey! This is Republican Young Kim from here in Southern California.

_I won't waste your time. I respect you too much. So I am kindly asking you for just ten bucks - that's it._
---
| | | [EXPRESS DONATE JUST TEN BUCKS](http://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/dxB39tBI_IPEGQp24Ny0-Q~~/AARclAA~~~ "EXPRESS DONATE JUST TEN BUCKS")
---
I JUST became the official Republican nominee in one of the most competitive elections in the country. My opponent was JUST officially declared, and radicals like Gavin Newsom, Nancy Pelosi, and the ENTIRE Democrat machine in California are already gunning for my seat.

I am fully dependent on small-dollar donors to fund my campaign against them. The ONLY WAY I can keep fighting for lower taxes, a secure border, and keeping the American Dream alive for our children and grandchildren is with your support. **It 's because of loyal grassroots supporters like you that I can keep my campaign afloat. **

So I have no choice but to come to you for much-needed support. Please donate just ten bucks to help keep my seat in Washington.

I would be so grateful for your support.

Thanks,
Young Kim

As an immigrant and Conservative woman, this isn't the first time I have been subjected to the Democrats' attacks. That's why I need your help. This is not the first and certainly won't be the last time the Left comes after us.

name: Kristi Noem
subject: Can I sign a copy of my new memoir for you, Friend?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the NRCC and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
body:
There's only 100 signed books left

|
---
| | | | [](http://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/VyBtdvwi2rRuvHi5l92idg~~/AARclAA~~~)
---

Hey there Friend, Governor Kristi Noem here!

"We don't complain about things, Kristi. We fix them." These words from my father have guided me throughout my life from the ranch of my youth to the South Dakota Governor's Residence.

And in my new memoir No Going Back, I share stories about the chaos and function in DC, and the lessons I learned in South Dakota on how to fix them. Because America needs commonsense practical solutions, not more complaining from our leaders.

**So I 'd like to offer you an exclusive signed copy today. BUT I only have 100 left! [YOU CAN CLAIM YOUR SIGNED COPY HERE >>>](http://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/VyBtdvwi2rRuvHi5l92idg~~/AARclAA~~~ "YOU CAN CLAIM YOUR SIGNED COPY HERE >>>")**

---
| [](http://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/VyBtdvwi2rRuvHi5l92idg~~/AARclAA~~~)

_**No Going Back**_**by Kristi Noem**
---
| | | [CLAIM YOUR SIGNED COPY](http://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/VyBtdvwi2rRuvHi5l92idg~~/AARclAA~~~ "Generic Button")
---

This memoir is the perfect read for everyone who cares about the future of America.

Because if we are going to get America back on track, we must return to the values of grit and hard work that my youth and father instilled in me.

**BUT DON 'T DELAY **- there are only 100 signed copies left. Plus, your contribution today will fuel our efforts to take back the House and restore Conservative leadership in Washington.

Thank you for your support!

| [](http://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/VyBtdvwi2rRuvHi5l92idg~~/AARclAA~~~)
---

Kristi Noem
Governor of South Dakota

name: Hillsdale College via Reclaiming American Freedom
subject: Justice, weaponized
body:
Please particpate in this survey on the Department of Justice.

This sponsored message from Reclaiming American Freedom is on behalf of Hillsdale College

[](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=bdd7b2c0567d4ab38b2ca09c27a96608&_e=qzvEGSXbzQEfn6sxxI3mpUWLbB7t1bwLTSZI4gc06tJfUIQk6EKwuz8m-jQSR_SHLqdDsZu-dS1BgAaeDZOJYUxmIjI56bh-TFjCnHUVHA-nZeerJ8GBTEsiZCw19NXW212wWIZmVyws-563kPi0ISnXld-SZVBPI7IEAFfTgnxsyLNgj0qBAq1U_9q1DDaufNQ8txLMfVu7U7yKNND39-VjEhWmk3e-W5W2vaQ3ZPu0w9crydcTI4Zw3Kklt5RSFYCWxQdBlsEjUSpJrU3rpY47llMv7KEoPoDD1dj3giSFYpAPQyrSFaEzCbu8VC4HIUnsEigBBBroCv6otRCdJYmMVVOmNjPvOtUFDdZNZY2SKyyis4lIOJiQr91y6yhJGa7r2c-cfrjq0jRYGx_Ypg%3D%3D) Dear Fellow American, Before you move on to your next email--I would appreciate it if you would take a few moments to participate in Hillsdale College's **National Survey on the Department of Justice.** The survey will only take a few moments of your time, and its subject affects your liberty and the very survival of the rule of law in America. **The current administration's weaponization of the Department of Justice is unprecedented in American history.** Instead of protecting your God-given constitutional rights, the administration uses the Department of Justice to attack its political opponents... ...as well as Christians, parents, and anyone who dares to stand up for our constitutional liberties. At the same time, with the help of the media it... Covers up a two-tiered justice system that violates your constitutional rights
Hides the corruption of the ruling class
Attacks those with traditional viewpoints **That's why I'm asking you to take the Hillsdale College National Survey on the Department of Justice.** By completing this survey, you will help us more clearly understand the views of mainstream Americans like you on this critical issue. Your responses will help Hillsdale strengthen its nationwide educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty--including the importance of the rule of law and checks and balances, which the American Founders saw as essential safeguards against corruption. Friend, you can complete the National Survey on the Department of Justice by using the link below: **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/department-of-justice-survey/](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=bdd7b2c0567d4ab38b2ca09c27a96608&_e=qzvEGSXbzQEfn6sxxI3mpUWLbB7t1bwLTSZI4gc06tJfUIQk6EKwuz8m-jQSR_SHLqdDsZu-dS1BgAaeDZOJYUxmIjI56bh-TFjCnHUVHA-nZeerJ8GBTEsiZCw19NXW212wWIZmVyws-563kPi0ISnXld-SZVBPI7IEAFfTgnxsyLNgj0qBAq1U_9q1DDaufNQ8txLMfVu7U7yKNND39-VjEhWmk3e-W5W2vaQ3ZPu0w9crydcTI4Zw3Kklt5RSutQcdiZbC69tlzm74WArL18115Ex9avnnRIIQrGG4KfE585M3evG3OnEfeEUYFZVU30WyP0b9NsSG7Ic1HGeh7Ojg6Izn_uJlHLiRis8N9YzyuVCUC0-uJUzm1_qs8nkS-OUzcQvNwb8p009P7B1dw%3D%3D)** The **Declaration of Independence** argues that **the purpose of just government is to secure our natural rights** and that **just government is founded on the consent of the governed.** Yet today's ruling class regularly disregards the will of the American people, and our rights--to the freedoms of speech, assembly, and religion, to due process, to gun ownership, and more--are under constant attack. **You and I know that liberty in America is under serious threat. But as I travel around the country, I tell the audiences I speak to how we are engaging in the fight against this threat.** A vital part of our efforts in this fight--in which Hillsdale College is a leader--is **reaching** and **teaching** millions of citizens, with the TRUTH about America's great heritage of liberty. We are heavily invested in our educational outreach efforts through our **Project to Defend Liberty Nationwide by Reaching and Teaching Millions.** These efforts include: **Teaching bright and principled students** --on our campuses in Hillsdale, Michigan, and Washington, D.C.--who receive a rigorous, **classical liberal arts education, including** a required course on the Constitution
**Distributing _Imprimis_** , America's leading digest of liberty, which is mailed to more than 6.4 million homes and businesses ten times per year; previous issues include "The Politicization of the Department of Justice" by Harmeet K. Dhillon
**Producing and promoting free online courses** for any citizen who wishes to learn, on topics such as the Constitution, American history, and free market economics
**Providing a classical K-12 curriculum** with a solid grounding in American history, constitutional government, and economics to schools that educate thousands of students nationwide After everything we've seen over the past few years, the need for Hillsdale's educational outreach efforts is undeniable. So please share your views by completing our **National Survey on the Department of Justice** and returning it to me as soon as possible. It will only take a few minutes of your time. Your completed survey will help us form the most effective strategy to **reach** and **teach** millions of Americans on behalf of liberty. As you might know, Hillsdale College is almost unique in American higher education in its refusal to accept EVEN ONE PENNY of government funding--not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans. **This independence frees the College from burdensome and corrupting government regulations. But it also means that our work depends entirely on the generous support of private citizens, like you, who understand the importance of education to liberty.** If you agree that we are now seeing an unprecedented assault on the American way of life, I hope you will partner with Hillsdale College by making a generous tax-deductible gift today.
