name: Hillsdale College via Conservative Liberty Wire
subject: Justice, weaponized
body:
Please particpate in this survey on the Department of Justice.

This sponsored message from Conservative Liberty Wire is on behalf of Hillsdale College

[](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=9491e9ef9c7845e6b5794070496bcea9&_e=9VR8kiK8UdyS107SZl1m1njTAMwCUN7TUig2LNLUSZpIgxu5-y6GdVXqdGoevwlwzVqIuSHocebZnEpw8W2DzQb-mO9ETuJIdmav2jTycgxPB4IFf8l0nSlo8GnHumFZR8YGhWWjntVpaGvaFB2xgF6OEnw6InKlNjK7DD465_w_uwTXmSN6B1QNFrbe2u8yLVNhGFkDrMjzOjuKGOEZCRFCz6SfWRew5LLx5u4NxskVtJzLinMlFp47ikkzT82YLhuUvTVsZQTYRGeQcssHszS-hmorxhysvXxiONay1sUYXRL4RvF_xfJcLZnsug-eQzPKqEiek17hyWB1BG8qK9sET0Ss39M_E4hUyn9G-QoOwTQ23I4BLjU5pdbFTCrKesYSG8tkLQ-VBfwzZiLezA%3D%3D) Dear Fellow American, Before you move on to your next email--I would appreciate it if you would take a few moments to participate in Hillsdale College's **National Survey on the Department of Justice.** The survey will only take a few moments of your time, and its subject affects your liberty and the very survival of the rule of law in America. **The current administration's weaponization of the Department of Justice is unprecedented in American history.** Instead of protecting your God-given constitutional rights, the administration uses the Department of Justice to attack its political opponents... ...as well as Christians, parents, and anyone who dares to stand up for our constitutional liberties. At the same time, with the help of the media it... Covers up a two-tiered justice system that violates your constitutional rights
Hides the corruption of the ruling class
Attacks those with traditional viewpoints **That's why I'm asking you to take the Hillsdale College National Survey on the Department of Justice.** By completing this survey, you will help us more clearly understand the views of mainstream Americans like you on this critical issue. Your responses will help Hillsdale strengthen its nationwide educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty--including the importance of the rule of law and checks and balances, which the American Founders saw as essential safeguards against corruption. Friend, you can complete the National Survey on the Department of Justice by using the link below: **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/department-of-justice-survey/](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=9491e9ef9c7845e6b5794070496bcea9&_e=9VR8kiK8UdyS107SZl1m1njTAMwCUN7TUig2LNLUSZpIgxu5-y6GdVXqdGoevwlwzVqIuSHocebZnEpw8W2DzQb-mO9ETuJIdmav2jTycgxPB4IFf8l0nSlo8GnHumFZR8YGhWWjntVpaGvaFB2xgF6OEnw6InKlNjK7DD465_w_uwTXmSN6B1QNFrbe2u8yLVNhGFkDrMjzOjuKGOEZCRFCz6SfWRew5LLx5u4NxskVtJzLinMlFp47ikkzT82Y7w-0RsXgoEurl8Y896kKEvGlAaDvpBFwHiPaXrEofFx4aCSd4_oJ8_9R9XtF7j3l7zsxabfUuSRvUplYNT_l2jixMXE703aJBfeehwE5cVhyksUIw53fHdVHMLVTlo_yOocnftdYh6r6dE0FJ1XK-w%3D%3D)** The **Declaration of Independence** argues that **the purpose of just government is to secure our natural rights** and that **just government is founded on the consent of the governed.** Yet today's ruling class regularly disregards the will of the American people, and our rights--to the freedoms of speech, assembly, and religion, to due process, to gun ownership, and more--are under constant attack. **You and I know that liberty in America is under serious threat. But as I travel around the country, I tell the audiences I speak to how we are engaging in the fight against this threat.** A vital part of our efforts in this fight--in which Hillsdale College is a leader--is **reaching** and **teaching** millions of citizens, with the TRUTH about America's great heritage of liberty. We are heavily invested in our educational outreach efforts through our **Project to Defend Liberty Nationwide by Reaching and Teaching Millions.** These efforts include: **Teaching bright and principled students** --on our campuses in Hillsdale, Michigan, and Washington, D.C.--who receive a rigorous, **classical liberal arts education, including** a required course on the Constitution
**Distributing _Imprimis_** , America's leading digest of liberty, which is mailed to more than 6.4 million homes and businesses ten times per year; previous issues include "The Politicization of the Department of Justice" by Harmeet K. Dhillon
**Producing and promoting free online courses** for any citizen who wishes to learn, on topics such as the Constitution, American history, and free market economics
**Providing a classical K-12 curriculum** with a solid grounding in American history, constitutional government, and economics to schools that educate thousands of students nationwide After everything we've seen over the past few years, the need for Hillsdale's educational outreach efforts is undeniable. So please share your views by completing our **National Survey on the Department of Justice** and returning it to me as soon as possible. It will only take a few minutes of your time. Your completed survey will help us form the most effective strategy to **reach** and **teach** millions of Americans on behalf of liberty. As you might know, Hillsdale College is almost unique in American higher education in its refusal to accept EVEN ONE PENNY of government funding--not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans. **This independence frees the College from burdensome and corrupting government regulations. But it also means that our work depends entirely on the generous support of private citizens, like you, who understand the importance of education to liberty.** If you agree that we are now seeing an unprecedented assault on the American way of life, I hope you will partner with Hillsdale College by making a generous tax-deductible gift today. You can easily do so after completing the attached **National Survey on the Department of Justice** , which you can access at this secure link: **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/department-of-justice-survey/](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=9491e9ef9c7845e6b5794070496bcea9&_e=9VR8kiK8UdyS107SZl1m1njTAMwCUN7TUig2LNLUSZpIgxu5-y6GdVXqdGoevwlwzVqIuSHocebZnEpw8W2DzQb-mO9ETuJIdmav2jTycgxPB4IFf8l0nSlo8GnHumFZR8YGhWWjntVpaGvaFB2xgF6OEnw6InKlNjK7DD465_w_uwTXmSN6B1QNFrbe2u8yLVNhGFkDrMjzOjuKGOEZCRFCz6SfWRew5LLx5u4NxskVtJzLinMlFp47ikkzT82Yn0SGnycXandnCEyZgcAEMPlXLbAN3iqUS3Iz_KWWYstuunOg6vnzsAciaIXJZVCLa8CYzQSEF3sD4bd_6O1qGr4fsyFw_m3qzaMnSNOt4xnebv_F1Sek5tgAmM6OFcRmZgFbL6gxpSSCpDNskbBYMA%3D%3D)** Thank you for your time and attention. I look forward to receiving your completed survey, and I sincerely appreciate your support of Hillsdale's educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty. Warm regards, Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844 |
---

Conservative Liberty Wire
---
_PO Box 1188 Fort Collins, CO 80522_
[](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_s=9491e9ef9c7845e6b5794070496bcea9&_t=tgyX5rALMLfuRMF0P_N5D_KH1ce66NybLiJgKDU4S1bGGx9Dtts1uFqd4Oyt1daFr-emxKDm6zE3z_zApR-6Se04kwW0PPT7l0zLt7DRxNoojo-8aRvpDW0Ho0QAcKLU5Qhe0cEwhTSVECpACsFG3kAcN45m9XmHELK-axmwp3U%3D)

| Dear Peter,
The fate of our nation hangs in the balance. If Democrats retain control of the Senate, President Trump's second term agenda will be blocked. We have got to win the Senate. To do that, we need a candidate with a record of winning against the odds. That candidate is Jonathan Emord. Jonathan is a fighter, with a 38 year record of battling against the federal government for our rights. He not only fights, he wins. Winning not just once but over and over again against the administrative state, saving countless lives and jobs. He has the know how and proven skill not only to defeat Kaine but also to help ensure President Trump's agenda gets through Congress.
Early voting starts May 3. Our entire campaign hinges on the decision you make now, in response to this single email. Can we count on you?
---
| | | [DONATE TODAY](https://z8p5gcfbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001OxH9OAV_9-yFgrhjeomdOAurHMbDFSKApsTUgakLr5gfWV9W0UWrQpEV8MHqAuXzMyTtOTGqfern15CMUTM9PoRe2Lmopvhxu5miXcr4UXn3S70uUyWVmVW0HWhraNPAmyU_njX9JDctD5G291jt6QvMl9-O9u6E_z_djmEGUJ2cUVN7byFnnbP04VYYkrQyWwqIk5GNpj3Czgux4Ur7hk0VBl72pe8SDnBEYLoBPZDpO_Vb_anEpQ==&c=hw-2crJL02e9vnugOZIo0B0sGnkRPdUZtkdSW_PAY2PKhGSCwcTb4w==&ch=gkczr_Wsuai09PMON3IyYt9zojyFWuzKzozrUmm824k-FFFwYaRjpQ==)
---
|
If we reach voters across Virginia with our message, we win. When voters learn of Jonathan's extraordinary background and detailed plans to secure the borders, restore the rule of law, eliminate the two-tiered system of justice, end inflation, end woke indoctrination in our schools and military, cut regulation and taxes, and rebuild America's military, they come to realize that he is our best hope to save our constitutional republic and ensure protection of individual liberty.
We need your financial support now more than ever. We must roll out our media campaign to win this primary. To do that, we need to raise $85,000 by the end of April. Voting starts May 3. Can we count on you? Donate $50, $75, $100, $200, $300, $500 or more to help us reach our end of the month goal. Together, we can save Virginia and save America.
Thank you!

### Get to know Jonathan Emord

For the past 38 years, Jonathan Emord has litigated against the federal bureaucracy, winning repeatedly. He is a leading constitutional law and litigation expert and the author of five critically acclaimed books.
It's time to end transitioning of youth; stop the assault on girls and women's sports, locker rooms, and bathrooms; eliminate woke indoctrination in schools and the military; ensure equal justice under law; secure our borders; roll back excessive government spending and cut taxes; reduce the size and scope of the government; and liberate free enterprise.

clean_body: Donate Now! | | | | | == | | | Dear Peter, The fate of our nation hangs in the balance. If Democrats retain control of the Senate, President Trump's second term agenda will be blocked. We have got to win the Senate. To do that, we need a candidate with a record of winning against the odds. That candidate is Jonathan Emord. Jonathan is a fighter, with a 38 year record of battling against the federal government for our rights. He not only fights, he wins. Winning not just once but over and over again against the administrative state, saving countless lives and jobs. He has the know how and proven skill not only to defeat Kaine but also to help ensure President Trump's agenda gets through Congress. Early voting starts May 3. Our entire campaign hinges on the decision you make now, in response to this single email. Can we count on you? | | | == | If we reach voters across Virginia with our message, we win. When voters learn of Jonathan's extraordinary background and detailed plans to secure the borders, restore the rule of law, eliminate the two-tiered system of justice, end inflation, end woke indoctrination in our schools and military, cut regulation and taxes, and rebuild America's military, they come to realize that he is our best hope to save our constitutional republic and ensure protection of individual liberty. We need your financial support now more than ever. We must roll out our media campaign to win this primary. To do that, we need to raise $85,000 by the end of April. Voting starts May 3. Can we count on you? Donate $50, $75, $100, $200, $300, $500 or more to help us reach our end of the month goal. Together, we can save Virginia and save America. Thank you! Team Emord | | == | == | == | == | | $1,000 | | == | == | Get to know Jonathan Emord For the past 38 years, Jonathan Emord has litigated against the federal bureaucracy, winning repeatedly. He is a leading constitutional law and litigation expert and the author of five critically acclaimed books. It's time to end transitioning of youth; stop the assault on girls and women's sports, locker rooms, and bathrooms; eliminate woke indoctrination in schools and the military; ensure equal justice under law; secure our borders; roll back excessive government spending and cut taxes; reduce the size and scope of the government; and liberate free enterprise. | == | == | == | == | == | == == == == == == == | == | == | | | | | | | Paid for by Emord for Senate Inc | 7151 Richmond Road, Suite 202, Williamsburg, VA 23188 | | | Sent by mailto:info@emordforva.com powered by

body:
[https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/NGP/NGP12/1/92793/images/Untitled%20design.png]
Good morning, Friends. We're facing a critical fundraising deadline with only four days left to our end-of-the-month goal. I'll be completely transparent with the numbers: we are just $5,730 behind pace.
There are 101 days until the primary election, and we must fund critical programs...
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/altext [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/altext]
If you're able and haven't contributed recently, I could use you this morning.
CONTRIBUTE [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/altext]
Friends,
With just four months to go, these are our primary expenses beyond staff and infrastructure, and I need your help funding them:
*
Door-to-door
outreach
*
Mailers
and
literature
*
Hand-written
postcards
*
Yard
signs
If we don't hit our goal, we have to cut back. And we can't afford to cut back. To win, to truly win, we need to go tit for tat against Rep. Jack Bergman.
My campaign has more in-district funding than any candidate in the race. It's primarily from hardworking people, but because of corporate PACs, dark money, and ultra-wealthy donors, unfortunately, I have to ask we step up even more this year.
Friends, I'm currently on the campaign trail speaking at dinners, getting our message to the press, having lunches at senior centers, hosting meet and greets and serving pancakes to the community with our labor unions.
This demanding schedule leaves me with little time to focus on fundraising (h ence the early 5 a.m. e-mail). But, t o sustain our unprecedented momentum, I need you in my corner.
If you can pitch in $5, $50, or $500 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/altext] , every dollar makes a difference. I am beyond grateful.
-Bob
Bob Lorinser
Candidate for US Congress
Northern Michigan / Uppper Peninsula
Democrat, MI01
CONTRIBUTE [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/altext]
[https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/NGP/NGP12/1/92793/images/dbsignature.png]
Or, send a check to
Friends of Dr. Bob
PO Box 936
Marquette, MI 49855
United States
PAID FOR BY FRIENDS OF DR. BOB

| Peter
---
| I'm reaching out today with a sense of urgency and a heart full of gratitude. In just 48 hours, our grassroots network has rallied to raise over $5,000. It's a clear signal of the strength and passion that drives our cause. Now, as we stand on the cusp of a pivotal moment, I am hopeful that I can count on your continued support. [We're almost there—we need just $1,674 more to reach our goal before tomorrow night, enabling us to open a new office in Memphis.](https://l5vsmw.fg98.fdske.com/ec/gAAAAABmLNTgUAhTPHYyTkqwp-kdZQLwodMti9YzeNgHOy1V48WYfdNIhpBuqNvjQE1x7SjAaxQJBKud0PBJGGQy1Yg3iF03O2YKuuhZce_6VA5bugVQ8-8V_ZFlh7wVzQI-Gw7rLRMt6eUDLX37i9Ig1brLXn8_SzCYtFFcU8-9pkK6UjUUWmvPa7NfNz8T9JXHrkSglUee0suYtKWPCUPXuTH4V0JcXWtkyAaADURk8jYLBr0wJbGk9h1xxqj7fnwBRV_8lfB2xAUrxX9SCOPyCwU0w9Jo6D9IFAGkAtVQn8-g_rKP29CES9md0Up5EV5Gy5cVK8ZsDg4luZyGkQzX0orI0SWzNlN3WYhtDN-YpW_sYvTGwswPLOSP2PRanPjq8oZBWty-) This office will be more than just a space—it will be a hub of hope and action, a place where we can gather to plan and execute strategies that reach every voter and make every voice heard. If you haven't yet contributed towards this specific goal, would you consider doing so now? Your support at this moment would mean a great deal to me and to our mission. [If you've already contributed and this message has reached you in error, please know how deeply I appreciate your commitment. Our team is fundamentally grassroots, and it is every dollar from people like you that empowers us to forge ahead.](https://l5vsmw.fg98.fdske.com/ec/gAAAAABmLNTgcdeyq-II1f-ZM8-34lmIhGD1A2Pm7C5SF1vdJxvtwtcrLZYvGczC1XQlo-4QrbFnFnN5xec7nb2Pyk0icCBN6AkKdCwIOx3A6qAIhpRSGvnvLtEdfeeQ_lwSfOLYY76xggRCsGffrOBZYUFF95P8SD4Mq0RyddUvGoA_5LYUOxrE0nINmAUe9uYHVOHCY4-3HO3psy5w9JYJEp5re166qmDAc8u73wnxNRwthwBEbA1QzYCx22y7K-tt9ULBJ8bs19SKcKmV0eYoWJP8Vu8G_SghVA_Gv2lc64lahCZ4BvJ40uUfr33QQ-Ht4w3rNa22ypf95-rL8Y4uyVkzG5cT9xCJe9DKR1RDUb2LbcWb7_reD0f4M3whuMKNpNPWmYV4) Throughout my travels across Tennessee for environmental justice, I've seen the tightrope many families walk between stability and uncertainty. I've met people all over this great state who share your concerns about labor, the environment, infrastructure, healthcare, education, taxes, trade, and social justice. This work has shown me that the issues we face are interconnected and that our responses must be as well. At this pivotal moment, a greater movement calls us to action. Who better to rise to this challenge than a Black single mother from Memphis, who has lived these realities? [So today, I am asking for your help to close the gap and meet tonight's goal. Whether it's $27, $50, or perhaps the full $1,674 if you're able—it all counts. You can make your contribution here: ](https://l5vsmw.fg98.fdske.com/ec/gAAAAABmLNTgxTpuzfx0Pc-YZkx7Cwr_7aiSpPf-V9OlcxDgeKSE3oY1r8NrECILXpxZwvgdCSeWkTpfREpB6NcovXH5b4qV384SiEBa_Snb9PV8uQwIAQ308oR_FdjxZdJ7aLhL0YmojaxSyRbk0_nM8AO9Wpuu4LWEyE0krt3238mBe_eyKv1cS9A3E7onbRXjN9YdiGkPdL7vD5WlfEJWAV5hsud9fA29h6yZQr9hwitY5uVrT6CawD7ilcX57N89PPbXAA6PDqKF6lBEeFAIqhRI_9O_076RhZ7MGoowngAM4H80yrxsfrW9aM_oOyk1DyTsFSeFzNPfWSnBfz2eZh9QE_wD8zMzm6FunuKzamCR2_T35z-XpXFEqUt0eU1UCYOfp5so)

name: Kellyanne Conway
subject: I was talking to Mike Pompeo about your survey results, Friend
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the NRSC
body:
You are the kind of American we want on our side for the General Election

[](http://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/woJjiPEVRUdH8olvEd9efw~~/AARclAA~~~)

Friend - Kellyanne Conway here.

I read your Voter Verification results and I must say that I'm impressed with your answers. You are the kind of American we want on our side for the General Election in November.

I was talking to Mike Pompeo about your survey results, and he was hoping you could complete his National Security Survey.

He said that you were the kind of Patriot he was looking for. So, I'm reaching out on his behalf.

**[Friend - could you please complete this National Security Survey for Mike Pompeo? Your Unique Link: nationalsecuritysurvey](http://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/woJjiPEVRUdH8olvEd9efw~~/AARclAA~~~)**

Thank you,

Kellyanne Conway

**[COMPLETE THE SURVEY >>](http://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/woJjiPEVRUdH8olvEd9efw~~/AARclAA~~~)**

subject: Our future looks grim if he wins

body:
Contrary to popular belief, this race is in reach

---
| | | | |
---
| |
Batter up!

Fname - Professional Baseball Superstar Steve Garvey is running against Shifty Adam Schiff in California. With your help, Steve Garvey & Republicans can STRIKE OUT Adam Schiff and END his political career.

_It 's not out of reach either - they are in a STATISTICAL TIE!_

Look - Adam Schiff & his cronies give a grim outlook on the future of our Country. Here are their radical policies that will fundamentally change our country FOR THE WORSE:
* ABOLISH the Electoral College
* STACK the Supreme Court
* DISMANTLE our energy sector
* END the filibuster

This isn't only dangerous - it's PURE INSANITY. Steve Garvey & Republicans need to HIT IT OUT OF THE PARK if we want any shot at overcoming this.

My first thought was what!? My second thought was that I should send you a message. [**Before I get into the nitty-gritty of it, will you chip in a split donation ahead of our deadline? Your donation will fuel my grassroots campaign and help ensure we have the resources to win in November.**](https://default.salsalabs.org/T28e408ef-249e-4908-a416-6f9c979f5a4b/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)

| Even if it’s just the spare change from your dresser, donations of any amount go a long way in a campaign like ours. I don’t take orders from super PACs or special interests, and I’m damn proud of it. I take my cues from the hardworking folks of Montana, and that’ll never change. But since we rely entirely on your support, fundraising can be a big undertaking. **I need your help to stop Mitch McConnell and his wealthy friends from buying this election wholesale, so please:** [**Rush a split donation of any amount between our campaign and Blue Amp Action so we can meet our goal and compete with the GOP money machine:**](https://default.salsalabs.org/T03486970-8a89-4e9e-9537-d32dbb920efb/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)

| | | About BlueAmp Action: We cannot sugarcoat the current situation. Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. Over the past decade it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. **And savvy grassroots activists like you know, just like we do, that we can’t stop watching the people we help elect:_ after the elections, we have to keep organizing support for the policies we like and pushing back against the ones we don’t._** **__When the public tunes out between elections and the only people our elected officials hear from are the paid lobbyists of wealthy corporations, our government stops being accountable to the needs of ordinary families.__** **Democracy never sleeps, and neither can we.** So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! Please follow Cliff Schecter on Twitter @cliffschecter, or subscribe to The Takedown with Cliff Schecter on YouTube, to keep up to date with this battle for the heart and soul of our country. — _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/T78e0c81c-0e81-43f0-82d9-278db9e84551/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._

name: Justice Democrats
subject: A permanent ceasefire, Green New Deal, Medicare for All…
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JUSTICE DEMOCRATS
body:
[1]Justice Democrats

Peter,

Justice Democrats and a coalition of progressive groups are currently
racing against the clock to raise $100,000 for the Squad before April
ends. [ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/140221?c0=jdem-pts-email-jd-2.48vO86&refcode=em20240427-34506&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&amount=5&t=1001&akid=34506%2E1203867%2ElJyjHc ]Before we ask if you can pitch in, we want to talk about what
exactly the Squad is fighting for and what’s at stake in this year’s
elections.

The Squad represents the multiracial, multi-generational, multi-faith
solidarity of everyday people coming together across this country and
across the world who are demanding a ceasefire, who refuse to stay silent
in the face of genocide, and who are fighting with everything they’ve got
for a world where we can all live with dignity and thrive.

They are unapologetically the most progressive voices in Congress and
tirelessly advocate for the people. From pushing for the Green New Deal to
supporting striking workers to leading the call for a lasting ceasefire,
the Squad’s shown that they will always prioritize people over profit,
peace over war, and our planet over corporate extraction.

They’ve successfully pushed the party to embrace a more progressive
vision, and their voices are sorely needed. To further build the bloc so
that we can expand on all the good work the Squad has already accomplished
means protecting these progressive incumbents from the corporate and
right-wing cash being spent against them.

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/140221?c0=jdem-pts-email-jd-2.48vO86&refcode=em20240427-34506&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&amount=5&t=1002&akid=34506%2E1203867%2ElJyjHc ]Peter, can
you split a donation to Cori Bush, Jamaal Bowman, Ilhan Omar, Rashida
Tlaib, and Justice Democrats right now to help us re-elect them?

Imagine what our communities, country, and world would be like if our
government stopped funding forever wars and prioritizing corporate
profits, and instead invested in us, the people.

Imagine what life would be like with:

* A permanent ceasefire in Gaza and an end to unconditional military
funding to Israel.
* A Green New Deal to address the climate crisis, end our reliance on
fossil fuels, and provide millions of good-paying, green jobs.
* A single-payer health care system through Medicare for All.
* A living minimum wage that would provide enough financial stability
for people to afford the cost of living without having to work
multiple jobs.
* Safe and abundant affordable housing.
* Student debt forgiveness.
* Real criminal justice reform and an end to mass incarceration.
* A ban on deadly assault weapons and other reforms to end the gun
violence epidemic.
* Well-funded, high-quality public education for all.
* The federal right to abortion and bodily autonomy no matter what state
you live in.
* Safe, clean, and efficient public transit.

That, and much more, is what every single member of the Squad is fighting
for.

They’re some of the few leaders in Congress rejecting the status quo and
leading the fight for these long overdue policies, which is why we can’t
afford to lose a single one of them to AIPAC’s right-wing megadonor-funded
attacks this election year.

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/140221?c0=jdem-pts-email-jd-2.48vO86&refcode=em20240427-34506&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&amount=5&t=1003&akid=34506%2E1203867%2ElJyjHc ]The Squad and Justice Democrats are fueled by small-dollar, grassroots
donations from people like you. If you can afford to, please consider
splitting a contribution to help us raise $100,000 for our priority races
before Tuesday’s midnight deadline.

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/140221?c0=jdem-pts-email-jd-2.48vO86&refcode=em20240427-34506&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&amount=5&t=1022&akid=34506%2E1203867%2ElJyjHc ]Contribute $5

We can’t afford to lose their courage and leadership in Congress in a time
like this. Thanks for anything you can give to fuel our work to protect
the Squad.

In solidarity,

Justice Democrats

Contribute to Justice Democrats: https://secure.actblue.com/donate/justicedemocrats?refcode=em20240427-34506-footer&t=1023&refcode2=34506_1203867_lJyjHc&akid=34506%2E1203867%2ElJyjHc

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way for us to reach you about opportunities to get involved. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, click here to unsubscribe: https://go.justicedemocrats.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=1024&akid=34506%2E1203867%2ElJyjHc

PAID FOR BY JUSTICE DEMOCRATS. Not authorized by any candidate or candidate’s committee.
Justice Democrats
1390 Columbia Ave #261
Lancaster PA 17603
Email us: us@justicedemocrats.com

The Squad represents the multiracial, multi-generational, multi-faith solidarity of everyday people coming together across this country and across the world who are demanding a ceasefire, who refuse to stay silent in the face of genocide, and who are fighting with everything they’ve got for a world where we can all live with dignity and thrive. They are unapologetically the most progressive voices in Congress and tirelessly advocate for the people. From pushing for the Green New Deal to supporting striking workers to leading the call for a lasting ceasefire, the Squad’s shown that they will always prioritize people over profit, peace over war, and our planet over corporate extraction. They’ve successfully pushed the party to embrace a more progressive vision, and their voices are sorely needed. To further build the bloc so that we can expand on all the good work the Squad has already accomplished means protecting these progressive incumbents from the corporate and right-wing cash being spent against them. [ ]Peter, can you split a donation to Cori Bush, Jamaal Bowman, Ilhan Omar, Rashida Tlaib, and Justice Democrats right now to help us re-elect them? Imagine what our communities, country, and world would be like if our government stopped funding forever wars and prioritizing corporate profits, and instead invested in us, the people. Imagine what life would be like with: A permanent ceasefire in Gaza and an end to unconditional military funding to Israel. A Green New Deal to address the climate crisis, end our reliance on fossil fuels, and provide millions of good-paying, green jobs. A single-payer health care system through Medicare for All. A living minimum wage that would provide enough financial stability for people to afford the cost of living without having to work multiple jobs. Safe and abundant affordable housing. Student debt forgiveness. Real criminal justice reform and an end to mass incarceration. A ban on deadly assault weapons and other reforms to end the gun violence epidemic. Well-funded, high-quality public education for all. The federal right to abortion and bodily autonomy no matter what state you live in. * Safe, clean, and efficient public transit. That, and much more, is what every single member of the Squad is fighting for. They’re some of the few leaders in Congress rejecting the status quo and leading the fight for these long overdue policies, which is why we can’t afford to lose a single one of them to AIPAC’s right-wing megadonor-funded attacks this election year. [ ]The Squad and Justice Democrats are fueled by small-dollar, grassroots donations from people like you. If you can afford to, please consider splitting a contribution to help us raise $100,000 for our priority races before Tuesday’s midnight deadline. [ ]Contribute $5 We can’t afford to lose their courage and leadership in Congress in a time like this. Thanks for anything you can give to fuel our work to protect the Squad. In solidarity, Justice Democrats Contribute to Justice Democrats:

name: Douglas Carswell
subject: School Choice for Me, but Not for Thee? – Update from Mississippi’s Leading Think Tank
body:
| | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/mspolicy/successsequence-11572333?e=5703353baa)
---
| |
---
| Dear Friend,

**Ever wondered why there has been so little progress towards school choice in Mississippi? **

In a recent radio interview, Mississippi state Senator David Blount was asked by Paul Gallo if he supported school choice. Senator Blount, who is Vice Chairman of the Senate Education Committee, made it clear he was against school choice.

**Blount criticized “taking taxpayer money and giving it to private schools.”**
---
| [ ](https://mspolicy.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=60d4052c66b6745831ccdf7c8&id=923f1c25de&e=5703353baa)
---
_Senator Blount Attacks School Choice_
| **Except, it seems as if Senator Blount might have sent his own kids to private school. **

Corey DeAngelis, a school choice campaigner who we recently hosted in Jackson, picked up on Senator Blount’s comments, tweeting that Senator Blount sent his own kids to private school.
---
|
---
| **If true, it means that Senator Blount’s position is to deny to other families in Hinds County, the district he represents, the school choice opportunities he had. **

**It’s never right to criticise a politician over where they send their child to school.** We should support the right of every parent to seek the best for their kids. In fact, it is great when parents, including state Senators, have those opportunities. But those opportunities should be available for everyone.

**Senator Blount makes it sound as though tax dollars belong to school boards. Tax dollars belong to the taxpayer.** Tax dollars are there to provide children with an education.

**Why not allow Mississippi families to allocate their portion of education tax dollars to a school that best meets their needs?** This is what now happens in a growing number of US states. Arkansas, Alabama, Georgia and – hopefully – Louisiana now all allow families to allocate their share of state education tax dollars to a school of their choice.

**The idea that tax dollars must only be spent on public education providers is nonsense.** Public dollars get spent at private institutions when it comes to Head Start, Pell grants, and Social Security. **If we adopted Senator Blount’s logic, we would force low-income families to spend their food stamps at government grocery stores. **

Senator Blount seemed stung by the points that Corey DeAngelis made, responding with the following:
---
|
---
| **Is saying that you were a Jackson Public School parent for 12 years quite the same as saying that you never sent your kids to private school? **

Corey DeAngelis didn’t seem to think so, insisting that Senator Blount also sent his kids to a private school:

---
|
---
| **Now are you starting to see why Mississippi has made so little progress towards school choice?**

**In a rock solidly conservative state, we somehow manage to end up with a Vice Chairman of the Senate Education Committee, David Blount, adamantly against school choice.** Why? How does someone so opposed to the conservative position on education get appointed to that position?

Seeing how Senator Blount responded to Corey, it strikes that perhaps those opposed to school choice just aren’t that accustomed to having to defend their opposition to change? They need to get accustomed.

**Momentum for school choice in our state is only going to grow.** Mississippi will soon be surrounded by states that allow families control over their education tax dollars. School choice is THE flagship policy that unites every wing of the conservative movement.

In this exchange between Senator Blount and Corey DeAngelis, we see the battle lines of the future being drawn. **In the coming months, it will take a very brave, or very foolish, lawmaker to oppose school choice if it turns out that they themselves sent their kids to private school.**

Have a wonderful weekend!

---
| [Forward this email to a friend!](https://mspolicy.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=60d4052c66b6745831ccdf7c8&id=41507ad976&e=5703353baa "Forward this email to a friend!")
---
| |
---
Warm regards,

Douglas Carswell
President & CEO
---
|
---
| | _ _
You are receiving this email because you opted in via our website.

**Our mailing address is:**
Mississippi Center for Public Policy520 George StJackson, MS 39202-3013
[Add us to your address book](https://mspolicy.us18.list-manage.com/vcard?u=60d4052c66b6745831ccdf7c8&id=2f68021ebd)

Want to change how you receive these emails?
You can [update your preferences](https://mcpp-c58f.mailchimpsites.com/manage/preferences?u=60d4052c66b6745831ccdf7c8&id=2f68021ebd&e=5703353baa&c=c68e48b40e) or [unsubscribe from this list](https://mspolicy.us18.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=60d4052c66b6745831ccdf7c8&id=2f68021ebd&t=b&e=5703353baa&c=c68e48b40e).

They have now indicted me before a Grand Jury But despite all of these vicious attacks, despite the Fake News calling me "a dead man walking," I'm still standing strong - thanks to unbelievably kind souls like YOU who have given me the resources and support I need to stay free, and ensure that justice prevails for ALL Americans. Times are tough in Crooked Joe 's America, so if you can't afford it, please take care of yourself. But, if you can, any contribution you can make will be greatly appreciated to fight this INDICTMENT. Thank you and God bless you, Rudy Giuliani Rudy Giuliani Freedom Fund Paid for by Rudy Giuliani Freedom Fund Legal Defense Trust Defend the Constitution PO Box 1188 Fort Collins, CO 80522 | _

Fellow American,

Pennsylvania could be home to the MOST IMPORTANT Senate race in the entire country this year, and Mark Levin is taking notice.

Conservatives like Levin know that if we want ANY SHOT at defeating the Washington Swamp, we MUST support outsider candidate Dave McCormick against career politician Bob Casey.

**["You know, I like Dave McCormick... He's fantastic. He's really got the ability to win that seat."](http://links.primaryupdate.com/u/click?_t=e3c9a4cac7f248a39c2a3d920479a441&_m=034d3ce99e9e48c7b15767ec70459052&_e=_Be4cLgGKAnNG_nqKcriuir186s-8O5N5p80PNMP7W2CUvfx5vPA6P_-rgR-f0a_keg2qD7DsTLYXz1lbV_Hg4vfHdnGPpoPthH_ki3yYmffbfyR7cwecRPW461m69IbHNdzavvEv0ERZjanfTV4lrZFMAQZ3ULbZjoHaZkOq5ypAwArH7HeNtim4YrE37pn2UUzzmhkVlLmmBzRImvCpXvR69YSC5JnJ7wWPpvrT2LNftak6cJTBpFwTQNnRDsFW3fstGBiQ1ib7lxaqU0ET1WYW_g_NJx-JmMrepU5hx3ON09fdJ9yU72i2kWxKRStYIjkwXl_KLA9m-rByJH8qT0XVBNbHKcJfQZcluFMrMUfgOMNGwFoe6gy0ymn0xIZ8NA-2TKNNl8PQmbCyukqFLvXsTbysrGmu2GVkaO5ce2W-WEWzzFcxSil4BPAAcCzswyFR1qlitoEm0VHtyxKWQ%3D%3D)**

clean_body: About the most important race in the country Fellow American, Pennsylvania could be home to the MOST IMPORTANT Senate race in the entire country this year, and Mark Levin is taking notice. Conservatives like Levin know that if we want ANY SHOT at defeating the Washington Swamp, we MUST support outsider candidate Dave McCormick against career politician Bob Casey. Control of the United States Senate for DECADES to come could LITERALLY come down to who wins this race. 99% of people will ignore this email - will you be the 1% that steps up and supports Dave McCormick? Dear Peter,
As Robert F. Kennedy, Jr.'s campaign continues to reshape American politics, _we're on the brink of an important FEC deadline_ and need your immediate support to reach our ambitious $4 million goal by April 30th.
[Time is running out, and we still need to raise $1.5 million to demonstrate our strength and viability.](https://www.kennedy24.com/donate?e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=ambitious_goal_4_27_24_rs_nd1&n=4)
The Kennedy/Shanahan ticket represents a crucial departure from the corrupt, two-party system that has embroiled America in endless regime-change wars, undermined medical freedom, and devastated the middle class.
If ever there was a time in the last 200 years that an Independent candidate can win the presidency, now is the time. For the first time in modern history, Independents outnumber Democrats and Republicans by a wide margin. Polls show the majority of Independents are for Bobby. And the young people 18 to 34 favor RFK Jr by 38% to Biden’s 32% and Trump’s 27%.
[](https://www.kennedy24.com/donate?e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=ambitious_goal_4_27_24_rs_nd1&n=5)
The momentum behind our campaign is undeniable. We are not just participants in this election; we are leaders, _driven by the support of people like you_ who believe in our cause and in Bobby’s vision for America.
[We are poised to make history, but we cannot cross this threshold without your help.](https://www.kennedy24.com/donate?e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=ambitious_goal_4_27_24_rs_nd1&n=6)

Kennedy, Jr.'s campaign continues to reshape American politics, we're on the brink of an important FEC deadline and need your immediate support to reach our ambitious $4 million goal by April 30th. The Kennedy/Shanahan ticket represents a crucial departure from the corrupt, two-party system that has embroiled America in endless regime-change wars, undermined medical freedom, and devastated the middle class. If ever there was a time in the last 200 years that an Independent candidate can win the presidency, now is the time. For the first time in modern history, Independents outnumber Democrats and Republicans by a wide margin. Polls show the majority of Independents are for Bobby. And the young people 18 to 34 favor RFK Jr by 38% to Biden’s 32% and Trump’s 27%. The momentum behind our campaign is undeniable. We are not just participants in this election; we are leaders, driven by the support of people like you who believe in our cause and in Bobby’s vision for America. Your contribution today is more than a donation—it's a stand against the political establishment and helps secure a place on the ballot in every state. Every dollar you contribute underscores the power of our campaign and moves us one step closer toward transformative change. Thank you for your unwavering support and for being a part of this pivotal movement. Team Kennedy P.S. Every contribution brings us closer to our goal. Friend,

Presently, 1.6 million American children are
enrolled in Catholic schools. Yet, these vital institutions face
an uncertain future because some states prevent parents from
directing education tax dollars to their children's school.

That's a big reason why nearly 100 Catholic schools
close their doors each year.

Catholic education is at a crossroads - and it's
imperative we rally together to ensure its survival.

ADD YOUR NAME: KEEP CATHOLIC SCHOOLS OPEN

This isn't just about losing a cherished American
tradition. It's about depriving our most vulnerable communities
of essential educational options.

In many instances, these schools represent the ONLY
lifeline for families in neighborhoods plagued by underperforming
public schools.

Friend, we believe passionately that these families
deserve the freedom to choose, which is why we're staunch
advocates for school choice. Do you agree?

ABSOLUTELY - PROTECT CATHOLIC SCHOOLS

Thank you,

Rebekah Bydlak

Friend, it's Debbie Mucarsel-Powell. In case you haven't heard, I'm the Democrat running to defeat Rick Scott in Florida. I'm also an immigrant from Ecuador, a gun safety advocate, a former Congresswoman, and a proud mom.
**I'm about to ask you to make a donation to help me hit my $800,000 end-of-month fundraising goal — our biggest goal yet!****([If you're ready to give now ahead of this critical deadline, you can click here.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/83811973/469606139/849749119?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk1136-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDYvMS8xMDc1MjUiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNGI2OTRhNzEtOTAwNC1lZjExLTk2ZjMtN2MxZTUyMWIwN2Y5IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=_GDDqS0cVM-TI-vaxTmJB8bGzIQflK7EkNVKd_RI8j0=)) **But first, let me explain why I'm asking and what's at stake:
* Rick Scott is one of the most dangerous senators in Washington. He wrote the plan to ****raise taxes** on working families and end Medicare and Social Security. **And he's supported a nationwide**ban on abortions.**
* Rick Scott only won this seat by 0.12% last time around — and he had to shell out $64 MILLION of his own money to do it.** Now, a recent poll shows our race is already statistically tied.**
* Election experts are saying that if I win,**Democrats will be virtually guaranteed to maintain our Senate majority.** If not, we could easily lose control.

I know that we can win in Florida, but I'm counting on your help to compete with Scott's massive personal fortune. [So please, will you donate before my biggest end-of-month deadline of the election year so far to defeat Scott's dangerous agenda, defend our Senate majority, and flip Florida blue?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/83811975/469606142/849749119?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk1136-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDYvMS8xMDc1MjUiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNGI2OTRhNzEtOTAwNC1lZjExLTk2ZjMtN2MxZTUyMWIwN2Y5IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=_GDDqS0cVM-TI-vaxTmJB8bGzIQflK7EkNVKd_RI8j0=)

It’s our **FIRST** end-of-month deadline of the quarter!

I’m not going to lie, this season has been tough so far.

With people spending more time outside, they’re spending less time reading these emails, which means our fundraising is taking a dip.

_And this is all happening as Tim Kaine and the radical Left are sending out-of-state socialists to attack me!_

Right now, I need your help more than ever.

Unlike Tim Kaine, I’m not a career politician. That means I don’t answer to ANYONE but the people of Virginia - but it also means I can’t count on million-dollar political insider donors like he can.

This campaign will truly be won at the grassroots level, and your contributions, especially during our end-of-month pushes, make a real difference.

**[Right now is OUR moment, Peter. I’m not asking for a lot - just a few dollars is MAJOR for our movement. body:
# [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/83814477/469612723/18334046?refcode=UTS_FR_90DO_240427_1_1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzg5NDc2IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImY4Yzc1ZjIyLTk4MDQtZWYxMS05NmYzLTdjMWU1MjFiMDdmOSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=PdAffijNa7O6MID5OHM6M2a_lc2ae4Zf3d_nI8QGSg8=)

**I’m officially the most vulnerable woman in the Senate. Now, Republicans are zeroing in on Nevada as the one seat they need to win Senate control in November. Because if we lose Nevada, the entire Senate _will_ flip red.**
I’ve won tough races before, but this is shaping up to be the closest race I’ve ever faced. GOP megadonors like the Koch network are already pouring millions into this race to defeat me, and I can’t fight back alone. That’s why I’m reaching out for your urgent help as I face a major fundraising gap.

clean_body: = Listen, our chances of defending the Senate just dropped dramatically. I’m officially the most vulnerable woman in the Senate. Now, Republicans are zeroing in on Nevada as the one seat they need to win Senate control in November. Because if we lose Nevada, the entire Senate will flip red. I’ve won tough races before, but this is shaping up to be the closest race I’ve ever faced. GOP megadonors like the Koch network are already pouring millions into this race to defeat me, and I can’t fight back alone. That’s why I’m reaching out for your urgent help as I face a major fundraising gap. We just ran the numbers, and it looks like I need to raise at least $30,000 by midnight to have the resources to keep this campaign on track, pull ahead in the polls, and defend this seat – but right now, we're way short. = If you've stored your info with ActBlue Express, we'll process your contribution instantly: = = = = = = Thank you for doing your part to help defend Nevada and the Senate. – Jacky Rosen | | Paid for by Upset The Setup PAC (www.upsetsetup.org) Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. 600 Pennsylvania Ave. SE #15180, Washington, DC 20003 Upset The Setup is working everyday to elect young, diverse, progressive Democrats to critical local offices so we can build up our communities, increase opportunity, and eliminate poverty. Hey there Friend, Governor Kristi Noem here!

"We don't complain about things, Kristi. We fix them." These words from my father have guided me throughout my life from the ranch of my youth to the South Dakota Governor's Residence.

And in my new memoir No Going Back, I share stories about the chaos and function in DC, and the lessons I learned in South Dakota on how to fix them. Because America needs commonsense practical solutions, not more complaining from our leaders.

**So I 'd like to offer you an exclusive signed copy today. BUT I only have 100 left! name: HillHarper.com
subject: Making sure you didn’t miss your chance to endorse Hill, Peter! ⏰
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY HILL HARPER FOR MICHIGAN
body:
We’re closing this round of endorsements at midnight!
# [](https://act.hillharper.com/go/421?t=1&akid=1195%2E62735%2EVxaZzI)
Hey, Peter!
We’re quickly forwarding our email from the other day so you **don’t miss your chance to endorse Hill Harper for U.S. Senate in Michigan.** We’re closing this round of endorsements at midnight, so the clock is ticking — and we want you to sign on!
Endorsing Hill is a free and easy way to boost his momentum heading into the final 100 days before the primary, and the best part? _It only takes 30 seconds to endorse!_ **[So please, take a moment to add your name to Hill’s growing list of community endorsements and build the grassroots momentum he needs to win>>>](https://act.hillharper.com/survey/em_HHR_PET_EndorsementPetition_041624?source=em_HHR_FR_EOM4_042724&t=2&akid=1195%2E62735%2EVxaZzI)**
**[ENDORSE HILL HARPER](https://act.hillharper.com/survey/em_HHR_PET_EndorsementPetition_041624?source=em_HHR_FR_EOM4_042724&t=3&akid=1195%2E62735%2EVxaZzI)**
Thanks for endorsing Hill!
\- Team Harper
**Begin forwarded message:**

\---------- Forwarded message ---------
From: HillHarper.com [(info@e.hillharper.com)](https://act.hillharper.com/survey/em_HHR_PET_EndorsementPetition_041624?source=em_HHR_FR_EOM4_042724&t=4&akid=1195%2E62735%2EVxaZzI)
Date: Apr 16, 2024
Subject: Will you endorse Hill Harper for Senate?
> Peter —
> Whether you’re a single parent, a nurse, a teacher, a construction worker, or a business owner, **you’re not getting the representation you deserve in Washington.**
> When our politicians are delivering for special interests — instead of everyday people — it’s clear we need a full system overhaul. That means electing new leaders who aren’t afraid to upend the status quo to finally get money out of politics, break the gridlock in Congress, and make our government work for _us_ again.
> **That’s why Hill Harper is running to represent Michigan in the U.S. Senate and why we’re asking you to[take 30 seconds to join Hill’s growing list of community endorsers today >>>](https://act.hillharper.com/survey/em_HHR_PET_EndorsementPetition_041624?source=em_HHR_FR_EOM4_042724&t=5&akid=1195%2E62735%2EVxaZzI)**
> **[ENDORSE HILL HARPER](https://act.hillharper.com/survey/em_HHR_PET_EndorsementPetition_041624?source=em_HHR_FR_EOM4_042724&t=6&akid=1195%2E62735%2EVxaZzI)**
> This isn't just about one election; it's about creating a sustainable future where our policies reflect the voices of those who are too often overlooked by the political establishment. **That’s why Hill is running on concrete solutions that will move our communities forward:**
> * ✅ He’ll fight for **universal healthcare** , so _everyone_ has access to the care they need
> * ✅ He’ll help **pass the PRO Act and strengthen workers’** collective bargaining rights
> * ✅ He’ll work to **enshrine abortion access** into federal law
> * ✅ He’ll vote to **overturn the Senate filibuster** and finally pave the way for progress
> * ✅ He’s committed to overturning _Citizens United_ and getting **dark money out of our political system**
>

> So by lending your name, you’re doing more than just supporting Hill’s Senate campaign — you’re fueling a movement towards a government that works for the _people_ again.
> **[Please, endorse Hill Harper for Senate today and fuel our campaign’s momentum in the home stretch! With almost 100 days left until the primary, Hill needs _every ounce of your support_ right now >>>](https://act.hillharper.com/survey/em_HHR_PET_EndorsementPetition_041624?source=em_HHR_FR_EOM4_042724&t=7&akid=1195%2E62735%2EVxaZzI)**
> **[ENDORSE HILL HARPER](https://act.hillharper.com/survey/em_HHR_PET_EndorsementPetition_041624?source=em_HHR_FR_EOM4_042724&t=8&akid=1195%2E62735%2EVxaZzI)**
> Together, we can show the world that in Michigan, we’re ready for leadership that stands by its people — _always_. Thank you for endorsing Hill!
> \- Team Harper
* * *
**[DONATE »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/bax_hh_email?refcode=bax_hh_emailfooter&t=9&refcode2=1195_62735_VxaZzI&akid=1195%2E62735%2EVxaZzI)**
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a critical way we communicate with grassroots supporters like you. However, if you would like to change your subscription preferences, here are some options:

clean_body: We’re closing this round of endorsements at midnight! Hey, Peter! We’re quickly forwarding our email from the other day so you don’t miss your chance to endorse Hill Harper for U.S. Senate in Michigan. We’re closing this round of endorsements at midnight, so the clock is ticking — and we want you to sign on! Endorsing Hill is a free and easy way to boost his momentum heading into the final 100 days before the primary, and the best part? It only takes 30 seconds to endorse! Thanks for endorsing Hill! \- Team Harper Begin forwarded message: \---------- Forwarded message --------- From: HillHarper.com Date: Apr 16, 2024 Subject: Will you endorse Hill Harper for Senate? Peter — Whether you’re a single parent, a nurse, a teacher, a construction worker, or a business owner, you’re not getting the representation you deserve in Washington. When our politicians are delivering for special interests — instead of everyday people — it’s clear we need a full system overhaul. That means electing new leaders who aren’t afraid to upend the status quo to finally get money out of politics, break the gridlock in Congress, and make our government work for us again. That’s why Hill Harper is running to represent Michigan in the U.S. Senate and why we’re asking you to This isn't just about one election; it's about creating a sustainable future where our policies reflect the voices of those who are too often overlooked by the political establishment. That’s why Hill is running on concrete solutions that will move our communities forward: ✅ He’ll fight for universal healthcare , so everyone has access to the care they need ✅ He’ll help pass the PRO Act and strengthen workers’ collective bargaining rights ✅ He’ll work to enshrine abortion access into federal law ✅ He’ll vote to overturn the Senate filibuster and finally pave the way for progress ✅ He’s committed to overturning Citizens United and getting dark money out of our political system So by lending your name, you’re doing more than just supporting Hill’s Senate campaign — you’re fueling a movement towards a government that works for the people again. Together, we can show the world that in Michigan, we’re ready for leadership that stands by its people — always. Thank you for endorsing Hill! \- Team Harper

Right now, polls show me locked _neck and neck_ with Mitch McConnell's handpicked GOP challenger. And with dark money groups like the Koch network and shady MAGA billionaires already spending big in Nevada to flip this seat, I just can't afford to miss important goals like this.

| [ ](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/66375?t=6&akid=13967%2E878179%2E7RzDxg) Jamie Raskin is a HERO! He’s one of the TOP Democrats fighting to end the MAGA mob’s impeachment scheme — and it's working!

[**The GOP is hell-bent on SILENCING Raskin, so we need a SURGE of support from folks like you to show we have his back! HURRY: ADD YOUR NAME BY MIDNIGHT to thank Rep. Jamie Raskin »**](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/66375?t=7&akid=13967%2E878179%2E7RzDxg) | [YOUR ONLY CHANCE TO SIGN: CHIP IN $3 TO ADD YOUR NAME NOW »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/66375?t=8&akid=13967%2E878179%2E7RzDxg)
---
TO: Rep. Jamie Raskin
FROM: A proud Democrat
Subject: You’re a hero! **_To Rep. Jamie Raskin — thank you for being one of the top defenders of our democracy!_**

We owe _so much_ of our Democratic success this year to you.

You were a crucial figure in averting the disastrous government shutdown (twice!). You called out the GOP for electing extremist Speaker Mike Johnson.

**And now, you’re fighting tooth and nail to quash the baseless Biden impeachment scheme — even in the face of vile MAGA attacks.**

[**I know Republicans are using every dirty trick in the book to SILENCE you — So today, I’m fighting back and chipping in $3 to the Voter Protection Project to elect more amazing Democrats like you who will flip the House and save our democracy! »**](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/66375?t=9&akid=13967%2E878179%2E7RzDxg) | [Donate $3 to sign now »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/66375?t=10&akid=13967%2E878179%2E7RzDxg)
---
**_X A proud Democrat_**
| | Paid for by VPP
(www.protectvoting.org)
Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. 401 2nd Ave. S, Ste. 303, Seattle, WA 98104

The Voter Protection Project is on an important mission: To end partisan gerrymandering and voter suppression by electing candidates at the state and federal levels that are forceful advocates for voting rights. Our enfranchisement agenda includes working to ensure that every state has automatic voter registration and online voter registration, convenient early voting, and independent redistricting commissions to ensure politicians are not able to draw their own maps.

Please, consider making a [one-time contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/121?t=1&akid=13967%2E878179%2E7RzDxg). **Or, to make the most powerful lasting impact and help us oust Republicans up and down the ballot who attack our right to vote, make a[monthly sustaining contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/122?t=2&akid=13967%2E878179%2E7RzDxg).**

[Click here](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/fewer-emails/?t=3&akid=13967%2E878179%2E7RzDxg) to request fewer emails. Click here to [unsubscribe](https://act.protectvoting.org/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=11&akid=13967%2E878179%2E7RzDxg). | | [Please: Pitch In Once A Month To Protect Voting Rights »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/123?t=4&akid=13967%2E878179%2E7RzDxg)

name: Jim Carris
subject: When terrorism is at your door.
body:
You never think you'll be a victim until you are. | | | [Click here to unsubscribe.](https://links.iterable.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=eabcbfee26e64f899fc6ede1594bd42c&_s=8cfef66ecaea4bb396d5825e1740cd66&_t=XlioVhnDCjKkpRWR3JFwuHJ-v8uy7VrHiBsvCfDBO646PQErbgLhJGuyZVBDjVAKZPqGQzwQEKZ_JztJRQxoZDRPr4vo0hrCzrpN-al8a3s%3D)

| | You never know just how scary a terrorist situation can be until you are in one. I lived through a terrorist hijacking as a child. My whole family was aboard TWA flight 840 when it was hijacked mid-flight from Rome to Athens in 1969. The terrorist hijackers of the Palestinian group PFLP, landed the plane in Syria and thanks to God's grace my family escaped before the nose of the plane was blown up by the hijackers. The 12 crew and 95 passengers were lucky that day. Seeing news of the attacks on October 7th brought back many of those awful memories, and my heart is still heavy when I think about the families in Israel who lost their loved ones.
It's time to stand with our ally in the Middle East and fight back against terrorism. I refuse to wait until terrorism arrives at our front door; we need to be strong NOW. Now is **NOT** the time to cast off our allies. If we show weakness now, we will only embolden Iran and other bad actors. We need leaders who will stand strong against terrorism, not cower in its presence. **[Will you help me stand against terrorism and support my campaign with a donation of $20 today?](https://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=eabcbfee26e64f899fc6ede1594bd42c&_m=8cfef66ecaea4bb396d5825e1740cd66&_e=VfB7EWGkUaMgUj21ycp-ti-WUGxeMTvpVVUrxBI1PJ5TIdw_xIWb1w6nZ3fWsfbpkz6b7LOMTUnMMahIjW7UYlIKR-H62NpFOSnJVsbrtDOsxrEMXexZWrxm-jTfRiQwXl0XdkAuszQuDVWlrJN12mYXiY7dmzhUPVewTzYoD4aQR_t5EzlW5xAH4u6dqvUheKvAkBrkv2lVQOpkbYp5AfrQQaBcEd6P1y1GeLBo3aJCFsRkZVZfauQ1gMHBuPICilyB4t9JN9iWEqZSudK2TA%3D%3D)**
---

I lived through a terrorist hijacking as a child. My whole family was aboard TWA flight 840 when it was hijacked mid-flight from Rome to Athens in 1969. The terrorist hijackers of the Palestinian group PFLP, landed the plane in Syria and thanks to God's grace my family escaped before the nose of the plane was blown up by the hijackers. The 12 crew and 95 passengers were lucky that day. Seeing news of the attacks on October 7th brought back many of those awful memories, and my heart is still heavy when I think about the families in Israel who lost their loved ones. It's time to stand with our ally in the Middle East and fight back against terrorism. I refuse to wait until terrorism arrives at our front door; we need to be strong NOW. Now is NOT the time to cast off our allies. If we show weakness now, we will only embolden Iran and other bad actors. name: Jamie Raskin
subject: re: Angela Alsobrooks for Senate!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Alsobrooks for Senate
body:
[ https://act.angelaalsobrooks.com/go/20187?t=1009&amount=25&akid=1489%2E52803%2E31Y--I ][IMG]

Peter, up until this point, I’ve not been actively involved in
the 2024 campaign for Maryland’s soon-to-be-open seat in the U.S. Senate.

I’ve been busy this year debunking the GOP’s fraudulent “impeachment
inquiry” against President Biden and campaigning for strong Democrats all
over America.

But with former Republican Governor Larry Hogan entering the race, it’s an
all-hands-on-deck moment right here in Maryland because we must defend
this seat to maintain our narrow majority in the Senate. Hogan would just
be another brick-in-the-wall for Donald Trump and the MAGA forces that
rule what used to be Abe Lincoln’s party.

That’s why I’m coming out for Angela Alsobrooks,
Peter, and proudly endorsing her
campaign to be the next United States Senator from Maryland.

[ https://act.angelaalsobrooks.com/go/20187?t=1010&amount=25&akid=1489%2E52803%2E31Y--I ]Will you join me in super-charging Angela Alsobrooks’ Senate campaign
by making a grassroots donation right away?

[ https://act.angelaalsobrooks.com/go/20187?t=1011&amount=25&akid=1489%2E52803%2E31Y--I ]Donate

There are plenty of reasons why Angela is the clear choice to represent
Maryland in the Senate, but here are two big ones in my mind:

1) Angela is a passionate advocate for Maryland. Like outgoing Senator Ben
Cardin, she has worked her way up in our politics by solving people’s
problems, expanding educational opportunity for our kids, protecting the
rights of women and enforcing the law against lawbreakers—people like
Donald Trump.

2) She is the person we need on the Senate floor defending women’s
reproductive freedom and the voting rights of the people against the MAGA
party.

[ https://act.angelaalsobrooks.com/go/20187?t=1012&amount=25&akid=1489%2E52803%2E31Y--I ]Angela’s running hard all over our beautiful state for the U.S. Senate,
but she can’t do it alone. Can I count on you to help out by sending in
$25 toward her campaign right away?

If you’ve saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your
donation will go through immediately.

[ https://act.angelaalsobrooks.com/go/20187?t=1013&express_lane=true&amount=25&akid=1489%2E52803%2E31Y--I ]Chip in $25 [ https://act.angelaalsobrooks.com/go/20187?t=1014&express_lane=true&amount=50&akid=1489%2E52803%2E31Y--I ]Chip in $50

Thanks for taking the time to read this,
Peter. Your support is critical
in the weeks ahead.

—Jamie Raskin

Folks, Donald Trump just officially endorsed my extremist Republican opponent, Lt. Governor Mark Robinson. [**Chip in now to help DASS PAC and me fight back against the far-right in North Carolina.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/83819774/469628429/1667963535?refcode=em-4.27.24-all-a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTkxNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1MjdiNzg2Yi05ZTA0LWVmMTEtOTZmMy03YzFlNTIxYjA3ZjkiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=-jNMvCdILBt5YC2SMlFa8Npbi8embvNm8DL3JU7TZmw=) This comes as no surprise. Mark Robinson is one of the most extreme statewide elected Republicans in the country. He’s pushing for a total ban on abortion – with _**no exceptions**_ for rape, incest, or for the life of the mother. He’s called educators “wicked people” and “liars.” And he’s touted dangerous conspiracies, claiming the moon landing might be fake and calling a victim of the Parkland shooting a “paid actor.” **North Carolinians deserve a very different future for our state than the one my opponent sees, folks** As North Carolina’s next governor, I will fight to protect and restore reproductive freedoms and secure our democracy from those who seek to undermine it. I will work to bring down the cost of living for North Carolina’s families. I will push for more school funding so that today’s students are prepared to succeed. [**Friend, I’ll work for a brighter future, where nobody is left behind. That is a fundamentally different vision than Mark Robinson and Donald Trump’s. ## **Unlocking the Power of IV3**
---
### _**A Comprehensive Look at Our Crowdsource Research Platform - and an Invitation to Participate**_
In this edition of our weekly newsletter, we’re going to delve a bit deeper into the exciting capabilities of our crowdsource research platform, IV3. IV3 (Independent Voter Verification and Validation) stands as a testament of our commitment to empower citizens with the information they need to support election integrity at the local level.
With a base of over 211 million registered voter addresses, IV3 is not just a database; it's a dynamic tool that automates and enhances our understanding of voter rolls across the country.
Here's an overview of some key features and upcoming enhancements that make IV3 an invaluable asset.
#### **1\. Tracking Permanent Moves**
One of IV3’s standout features is its ability to identify individuals who have reported permanent relocations. This functionality is crucial for maintaining accurate and current voter rolls. When a voter indicates to the USPS that they have permanently moved their residence, IV3 compares that information to the current voter registry and flags discrepancies for challenge. This reduces the chance of fraud of malfeasance and ensures compliance with local and federal election laws.
#### **2\. Addressing Nonstandard Addresses**
IV3 excels in handling nonstandard addresses, which include commercial properties, vacant lots, or addresses deemed invalid. This feature is particularly important as it helps citizens raise the records to the attention of election officials, weeding out registrations that may not correspond to valid residential properties. By identifying and rectifying these anomalies, IV3 ensures that every registered address is legitimate and capable of receiving mail, further solidifying the integrity of the voter database.
#### **3\. Analyzing Anomalous Residency Patterns**
IV3 records can be sorted to help highlight addresses where unusually high numbers of voters are registered. This feature is crucial for identifying potential inaccuracies or fraudulent activity within voter registrations. By flagging these anomalies, IV3 allows for timely investigation and resolution, ensuring that each registration is legitimate and verifiable.
#### **4\. Geocoding for Precision**
All addresses within the IV3 system are geocoded. This means that each address is precisely mapped according to latitude and longitude, enhancing the accuracy of the data and enabling detailed geographic visualization.
The IV3 platform is more than just a database—it is a powerful tool in the effort to maintain clean voter rolls. Its ability to automate complex analyses and provide real-time insights into voter data integrity is transforming how citizens can engage in maintaining election accuracy.
#### **What Are You Waiting For? Join in and Help Thousands of Volunteers Review Millions of Records for County-Based Challenges**
If you’re already registered for the IV3 project, stay tuned for more updates and training opportunities coming next week! [If you aren’t, you can register right here, right now.](https://link.mail.beehiiv.com/ss/c/u001.Grs4UHqmlwZE0ZbdGcvXvPSiSxAM8dkEYgVZMDRIe8G7uOT6Z1vXtHgtsBsm5GChWLnJJNb-yfigquPL8I6sxrqDUoZGXwob-PdXJ4b1iwPCMR5pWQalmt4FdKdFRE4MLgXAm-1vFUSrzAIEPseCcmDUe5rja8P3y-SiBJzd9a0NcXWmRMkVGEiJUPx6EUUA_y1aoENXmjk3tXoE2NXw4jFb4l_FJ0loJM5n2KUs68w/45v/zSu6swwURMa2yZx5qQAOpA/h2/h001.8p8FZpbdxDYdUCZ2n9vOjhwVUZQ7j41gXUnPR8QRSDE)

## **Introducing New Call-to-Action Support on The 611 Project Page!**
|
---
We’re thrilled to announce a new direct engagement function on _The 611 Project_ page that helps you directly contact lawmakers and local decision makers on critical election issues. This new feature is designed to make it easier than ever to voice your support for pivotal initiatives aimed at reforming our immigration and election laws.
**If you are concerned about non-citizen voting - is it possible, how’d we get here, what can we do about it - then this is a project you’ll want to check out.**
Join us in making a difference! You can either visit _[The 611 Project](https://link.mail.beehiiv.com/ss/c/u001.bYZLwP2tKNW52PF5H5Fs6XnSdcrSmzbZQfStcjy751i-Ux7pGZZnGS3_QkKO6_ELjC5yHL05Cxwb3cle8YQ6yKtVkcypgOA0jUcNT7veafcBt32r4VXADhckHug6UWEKhYIR7sg19nlnmZvzM5_hca6nyvw2qrZCR8lbCFmjN7R-stGDCjyz9t6s-HnhYIHcj-_2BiwGmNCbbhyXeBiRELC-KeGgRA0my3QRoYWnD2s/45v/zSu6swwURMa2yZx5qQAOpA/h4/h001.Ew11dfXzLAzsgFlGKZSzb1qD1QNprhTP3ADoCxvE-d4)_ page on our website and click the “Contact Your Representatives Now” button or simply [click here to go directly to this new feature](https://link.mail.beehiiv.com/ss/c/u001.UJcOIEsxQ3qr5lEWJDDC4ma-u0yrK84NLu6cyH-mtGHrX_U-xnG1aC9KBfRrHHnymeKs03Qe-w_z9WyX6Vp4I9BOZLOVTiNsClUualsgXG_pOoKWnE_LGE8Dv8W1kqqr_AB33yHIAwP8oaFF_4tIZM4purcWG0FaF6i6ByqjIvKuI_IPr_2c8UqvTRijhFsu-txVUtKQflyamQzmsd0c-7JqzNeTzzySY71fsm86ZHmeO40izdQtZPX2ho2t5_ElILgQFhoTf1gZ1lf8_xU7Dw/45v/zSu6swwURMa2yZx5qQAOpA/h5/h001.pozIdWPvRF7_7YFILZ1CkgrKyuZ3kbhRdp3fR1W3jIs) and start making your voice heard on issues that will impact election integrity.

True the Vote President Catherine Engelbrecht’s most recent op-ed,__[**_Durbin pushes voting rights for illegal aliens without public consent_**](https://link.mail.beehiiv.com/ss/c/u001.UJcOIEsxQ3qr5lEWJDDC4lfz8jxspQixmtEC91TDE6GHnkqaGSOe8P_7OsbpoS43BeF2pTo5CMZkq-ymDnjySmWwN505POag2DTLAErPEUrW3e7cHtUPJuAghQV82gbj9cEDhSgVXtSb6Pwd-8apZ5k-ws_x30wbz34cnADtbsQbTCoSz2t53AX1eBDAUEvsXf-e3B9PeDsoHVx4sD-ovY9Vz2iEBBzKMwjifbjCz8SMvpxIh9Yp2plKT15sNiJMLMflJm36G6NvT-Jy88qd_W73Gud-KZkS6ffD656SKn9aHtmpjPE5lkh1cvqy3StzZcIGyR_U6ViidySJ8VLAlw/45v/zSu6swwURMa2yZx5qQAOpA/h6/h001.3hAOTaoOWdvbHt050bRZhRJfZR7ndDfs0dy7d3DzxWc) _,_ was published this week in _The Blaze_ :
_It’s time for choosing — and when it comes to noncitizen voting, Congress is not waiting until November. American voters better get into the game before the tables are irrevocably turned against us._
_Senator Dick Durbin (D-Ill.) and his fellow Senate Democrats recently sent a_ _[letter to Joe Biden demanding](https://link.mail.beehiiv.com/ss/c/u001.UJcOIEsxQ3qr5lEWJDDC4oHLhdIpKBO4G3PHJpRIri5D_B6DXz29N7JKxEZTofYFzQa4FPY2VuxlyOqrsK8PLHrBIukRlQLns112ebVI5hhvuCTWItLZe6izK-JxrP97ZGI7NHRAR2zG7XcCWdjjWjz7iKMS7-N2ODpqP5UO8YCDwXAGItIGi4Rn9zODSTyZIMuOtK4wDczNuG42jVz8ylDeD6Ec8kRKc1L3TUakh568k5RpH8fXcqqGD3rFMNj6ufjbQyitZqhgHRsVcYUW_jJ5m_XlNsVKNl0qPhZjKbtE64P-wiORO2a5EemWbNkvuVCBIz_7YQ068at2NI0E0mOh55xTtTBryT7ozGfvMzRqNlF8Nnv8hMV2XKgy1R9bDYlKwcqpwB1LubWsT6QUMBbY9exZybii_QerrEXeLSk/45v/zSu6swwURMa2yZx5qQAOpA/h7/h001.GaBouHyy_-I67DDicTa0HyMAuNNbyHAj-4C54Mk1UP4)_ _a quick path to legal status for the more than 10 million illegal aliens who have entered the United States since 2021._
_Durbin is no fringe character. He is the majority whip, the second-highest-ranking Democrat in the Senate, and a 27-year incumbent from a deep blue state. Undefeatable in Illinois, he’s rumored to be ready to retire. Democrats are looking for a suitable Marxist to replace him. So Durbin has nothing to lose by planting the far-left flag for his party. With this letter, Durbin is laying out the party line on immigration heading into November 2024._
_Do I have your attention?_
_States have already been denied access to federal migrant tracking databases, thereby preventing comprehensive voter registration citizenship checks._
_We are already registering millions of new arrivals for federal social service programs, which have voter registration attached by mandate of the National Voter Registration Act. Those who say the threat of noncitizen voting is unfounded either aren’t paying attention or are simply lying._
_Could Durbin’s missive lead to an executive order granting amnesty and citizenship status? Absolutely._
_Read_ _[Durbin’s list of demands for yourself](https://link.mail.beehiiv.com/ss/c/u001.UJcOIEsxQ3qr5lEWJDDC4oHLhdIpKBO4G3PHJpRIri5D_B6DXz29N7JKxEZTofYFzQa4FPY2VuxlyOqrsK8PLHrBIukRlQLns112ebVI5hhvuCTWItLZe6izK-JxrP97ZGI7NHRAR2zG7XcCWdjjWjz7iKMS7-N2ODpqP5UO8YCDwXAGItIGi4Rn9zODSTyZIMuOtK4wDczNuG42jVz8ylDeD6Ec8kRKc1L3TUakh568k5RpH8fXcqqGD3rFMNj6ufjbQyitZqhgHRsVcYUW_jJ5m_XlNsVKNl0qPhZjKbtE64P-wiORO2a5EemWbNkvuVCBIz_7YQ068at2NI0E0mOh55xTtTBryT7ozGfvMzRqNlF8Nnv8hMV2XKgy1R9bDYlKwcqpwB1LubWsT6QUMBbY9exZybii_QerrEXeLSk/45v/zSu6swwURMa2yZx5qQAOpA/h8/h001.8hN7Gl-M3zLJ-7yyOpE-LDFqW6zO7rCDTH6keY1q0Jg)_ _. He demands the millions who came here illegally be granted a quick path to legal status, and he wants U.S. taxpayers pay for it. He demands full citizenship rights, which would include the right to vote. He demands that America change forever, without citizens ever having a vote or even a say about it._
_With a president and Senate already in alignment, a fractured House hanging by a one-vote majority, the border situation growing worse by the day, and a federal government aiding and abetting the lawlessness, the stakes are too high for American voters to stay silent._
_It’s time to start making a few demands of our own. Demand answers. Demand to know whether your senators and representatives agree with Durbin on the extreme demand that we grant quick legal status to over 10 million illegal immigrants. Demand that they state their position publicly. Demand that states be given access to federal data that will allow for efficient citizenship verification. This can all be done before the November election, but there is no time to waste._
_Election integrity is not an issue in 2024; it is the issue. Engage. Speak out. Demand leadership._
_Save the vote, save America._

# **Election News Round Up**
**Supreme Court Denies Bid to Expand No-Excuse Mail-In Ballots in Texas -** _The U.S. Supreme Court has declined to hear a legal challenge to a Texas law that requires voters under the age of 65 to provide justification to vote by mail, meaning that the Democrat-aligned attempt to sharply expand “no-excuse” mail-in ballots in the Lone Star state has failed, with implications for other states... **Statement from Kurt Olson, Attorney for Kari Lake following the SCOTUS decision:**
_We are obviously disappointed that the U.S. Supreme Court decided not to review the decisions of the Arizona district court and the Ninth Circuit, and order that our challenge to the 2022 election procedures be heard on the merits. Although the Supreme Court grants review in less than 1 percent of cases presented on petition, we believe we presented a case that called out to be reviewed, if the American People are to regain confidence in elections._
_What made our case unusual was that it was after the Ninth Circuit affirmed the dismissal that we learned that the Arizona defendants falsely represented to the lower courts that Maricopa County complied with state law in several respects. Contrary to their representations to the lower courts, Maricopa County did not use software certified by the U.S. Election Assistance Commission (“EAC”), and that Maricopa County failed to conduct pre-election “logic and accuracy” testing on all its 400-plus vote center tabulators in accordance with Arizona law. In fact, Maricopa County has been using and continues to use software that has been secretly altered with respect to how ballots are read and tabulated. Since Maricopa County contains 62 percent of Arizona voters, what happens there dominates state-wide elections._
_In addition, evidence has come to light showing that, in the 2020 election, Dominion Voting Systems, Inc., left the master cryptographic encryption keys unprotected on the election databases and in plain text on its systems used in at least five states -- including Arizona. Doing so violated basic cyber security practices, Federal Information Processing Standards (“FIPS”), and EAC certification. With these cryptographic keys, anyone with access to these systems can manipulate election results without detection once they bypass the basic Windows log-in (easily done in less than five minutes with instructions available on the internet). Arizona election officials have yet to respond in court to these recent discoveries, continually trying to avoid any review of their actions._
_The American people deserve facts, transparency, and truth in how elections are conducted in this Country. The Kari Lake and Mark Finchem case was dismissed based on a purported lack of standing to assert an injury. Therefore, the courts, even now, have not ruled on the merits of our case. We will continue to raise these issues especially in light of the upcoming 2024 election._
— Lake v. Fontes, U.S. Supreme Court, No. 23-1021
**Dark Money Group Backed By Foreign Billionaire Has Dumped $100 Million Into State Ballot Initiatives: The Wyss-backed Sixteen Thirty Fund has funneled nearly $34 million into Michigan since 2017 to, in part, ‘rewrite the state’s election laws...** ’ _- A Swiss billionaire whose personal goal is to “(re)interpret the American Constitution in the light of progressive politics” has donated hundreds of millions of dollars to a left-wing group that is dumping millions into state ballot initiatives, a new report from Americans for Public Trust (APT) revealed._
_Hansjörg Wyss, through his Berger Action Fund, has donated $243 million to the Sixteen Thirty Fund, which “uses its war chest ... to support massive get-out-the-vote drives, issue advocacy campaigns bolstering President Biden’s agenda, liberal pet projects from abortion to immigration, and attack ads against Republican lawmakers,” according to_[ APT](https://link.mail.beehiiv.com/ss/c/u001.Grs4UHqmlwZE0ZbdGcvXvAxvoIObNtBzTR-jxVyeYaLqChnz2LWuj2sJpWPkvkZJ3raRu4qq9-HkUl4rEDMpZBhlOGjDVwHuocct40nWOp4skUXZXrK1xXLM9WkeRPBaeWCBGXQXnmrrnsymtWu6Q7eUqgMLSzaM7P2qxf-IHl37Y1OjQoYLYFeQEAeROOjUa--_YO4qU7y7pful-WIOpdguICN4Rhi9XgLBJHfyXMIlT6mBs5D5to212E2Uil9Y039WKs9kJgcFRfwPtJOXhSs1p-XetD5oUcC7LaotltS3wG9WXSeds5JHL49UsV_6/45v/zSu6swwURMa2yZx5qQAOpA/h14/h001.XyhLuzJNadTpMD9sQbLJkJDTqw7xfmxuu5yZvaWs2Kw) _._
_The group also pours resources into state ballot initiatives — to the tune of $97,593,151 over the past decade, according to the report. The cash infusions are “often concentrated in battleground presidential states such as Arizona, Michigan, and Ohio or states with competitive U.S. Senate races like Colorado, Missouri, and Nevada.” The lion’s share of that funding has gone to Michigan, Ohio, Colorado, Nebraska, Missouri, and Nevada, but the Sixteen Thirty Fund also targets ballot initiatives in solid red states like Arkansas, North Dakota, and South Dakota._
