clean_body: Commit today to work in your local elections in 2024. | | | April 27, 2024 | | | Unlocking the Power of IV3 A Comprehensive Look at Our Crowdsource Research Platform - and an Invitation to Participate In this edition of our weekly newsletter, we’re going to delve a bit deeper into the exciting capabilities of our crowdsource research platform, IV3. IV3 (Independent Voter Verification and Validation) stands as a testament of our commitment to empower citizens with the information they need to support election integrity at the local level. With a base of over 211 million registered voter addresses, IV3 is not just a database; it's a dynamic tool that automates and enhances our understanding of voter rolls across the country. Here's an overview of some key features and upcoming enhancements that make IV3 an invaluable asset. 1\. Tracking Permanent Moves One of IV3’s standout features is its ability to identify individuals who have reported permanent relocations. This functionality is crucial for maintaining accurate and current voter rolls. When a voter indicates to the USPS that they have permanently moved their residence, IV3 compares that information to the current voter registry and flags discrepancies for challenge. This reduces the chance of fraud of malfeasance and ensures compliance with local and federal election laws. 2\. Addressing Nonstandard Addresses IV3 excels in handling nonstandard addresses, which include commercial properties, vacant lots, or addresses deemed invalid. This feature is particularly important as it helps citizens raise the records to the attention of election officials, weeding out registrations that may not correspond to valid residential properties. By identifying and rectifying these anomalies, IV3 ensures that every registered address is legitimate and capable of receiving mail, further solidifying the integrity of the voter database. 3\. Analyzing Anomalous Residency Patterns IV3 records can be sorted to help highlight addresses where unusually high numbers of voters are registered. This feature is crucial for identifying potential inaccuracies or fraudulent activity within voter registrations. By flagging these anomalies, IV3 allows for timely investigation and resolution, ensuring that each registration is legitimate and verifiable. 4\. Geocoding for Precision All addresses within the IV3 system are geocoded. This means that each address is precisely mapped according to latitude and longitude, enhancing the accuracy of the data and enabling detailed geographic visualization. The IV3 platform is more than just a database—it is a powerful tool in the effort to maintain clean voter rolls. Its ability to automate complex analyses and provide real-time insights into voter data integrity is transforming how citizens can engage in maintaining election accuracy. What Are You Waiting For? Join in and Help Thousands of Volunteers Review Millions of Records for County-Based Challenges If you’re already registered for the IV3 project, stay tuned for more updates and training opportunities coming next week! | | Introducing New Call-to-Action Support on The 611 Project Page! | We’re thrilled to announce a new direct engagement function on The 611 Project page that helps you directly contact lawmakers and local decision makers on critical election issues. This new feature is designed to make it easier than ever to voice your support for pivotal initiatives aimed at reforming our immigration and election laws. If you are concerned about non-citizen voting - is it possible, how’d we get here, what can we do about it - then this is a project you’ll want to check out. Join us in making a difference! You can either visit page on our website and click the “Contact Your Representatives Now” button or simply and start making your voice heard on issues that will impact election integrity. | | True the Vote President Catherine Engelbrecht’s most recent op-ed, , was published this week in The Blaze : It’s time for choosing — and when it comes to noncitizen voting, Congress is not waiting until November. American voters better get into the game before the tables are irrevocably turned against us. Senator Dick Durbin (D-Ill.) and his fellow Senate Democrats recently sent a a quick path to legal status for the more than 10 million illegal aliens who have entered the United States since 2021. Durbin is no fringe character. He is the majority whip, the second-highest-ranking Democrat in the Senate, and a 27-year incumbent from a deep blue state. Undefeatable in Illinois, he’s rumored to be ready to retire. Democrats are looking for a suitable Marxist to replace him. So Durbin has nothing to lose by planting the far-left flag for his party. With this letter, Durbin is laying out the party line on immigration heading into November 2024. Do I have your attention? States have already been denied access to federal migrant tracking databases, thereby preventing comprehensive voter registration citizenship checks. We are already registering millions of new arrivals for federal social service programs, which have voter registration attached by mandate of the National Voter Registration Act. Those who say the threat of noncitizen voting is unfounded either aren’t paying attention or are simply lying. Could Durbin’s missive lead to an executive order granting amnesty and citizenship status? Absolutely. Read . He demands the millions who came here illegally be granted a quick path to legal status, and he wants U.S. taxpayers pay for it. He demands full citizenship rights, which would include the right to vote. He demands that America change forever, without citizens ever having a vote or even a say about it. With a president and Senate already in alignment, a fractured House hanging by a one-vote majority, the border situation growing worse by the day, and a federal government aiding and abetting the lawlessness, the stakes are too high for American voters to stay silent. It’s time to start making a few demands of our own. Demand answers. Demand to know whether your senators and representatives agree with Durbin on the extreme demand that we grant quick legal status to over 10 million illegal immigrants. Demand that they state their position publicly. Demand that states be given access to federal data that will allow for efficient citizenship verification. This can all be done before the November election, but there is no time to waste. Election integrity is not an issue in 2024; it is the issue. Engage. Speak out. Demand leadership. Save the vote, save America. | Election News Round Up Supreme Court Denies Bid to Expand No-Excuse Mail-In Ballots in Texas - The U.S. Supreme Court has declined to hear a legal challenge to a Texas law that requires voters under the age of 65 to provide justification to vote by mail, meaning that the Democrat-aligned attempt to sharply expand “no-excuse” mail-in ballots in the Lone Star state has failed, with implications for other states... The Supreme Court’s refusal to hear the appeal means that the Texas law stays in place, delivering a win to election integrity advocates that no-excuse mail-in voting is prone to fraud and makes elections less secure... Supreme Court declines to hear Kari Lake voting machine lawsuit -The Supreme Court declined Monday to take up a case brought by Republicans Kari Lake and the use of voting machines in Arizona elections, the latest blow to the duo of GOP candidates who have seen their lawsuit rejected several times... Statement from Kurt Olson, Attorney for Kari Lake following the SCOTUS decision: We are obviously disappointed that the U.S. Supreme Court decided not to review the decisions of the Arizona district court and the Ninth Circuit, and order that our challenge to the 2022 election procedures be heard on the merits. Although the Supreme Court grants review in less than 1 percent of cases presented on petition, we believe we presented a case that called out to be reviewed, if the American People are to regain confidence in elections. What made our case unusual was that it was after the Ninth Circuit affirmed the dismissal that we learned that the Arizona defendants falsely represented to the lower courts that Maricopa County complied with state law in several respects. Contrary to their representations to the lower courts, Maricopa County did not use software certified by the U.S. Election Assistance Commission (“EAC”), and that Maricopa County failed to conduct pre-election “logic and accuracy” testing on all its 400-plus vote center tabulators in accordance with Arizona law. In fact, Maricopa County has been using and continues to use software that has been secretly altered with respect to how ballots are read and tabulated. Since Maricopa County contains 62 percent of Arizona voters, what happens there dominates state-wide elections. In addition, evidence has come to light showing that, in the 2020 election, Dominion Voting Systems, Inc., left the master cryptographic encryption keys unprotected on the election databases and in plain text on its systems used in at least five states -- including Arizona. Doing so violated basic cyber security practices, Federal Information Processing Standards (“FIPS”), and EAC certification. With these cryptographic keys, anyone with access to these systems can manipulate election results without detection once they bypass the basic Windows log-in (easily done in less than five minutes with instructions available on the internet). Arizona election officials have yet to respond in court to these recent discoveries, continually trying to avoid any review of their actions. The American people deserve facts, transparency, and truth in how elections are conducted in this Country. The Kari Lake and Mark Finchem case was dismissed based on a purported lack of standing to assert an injury. Therefore, the courts, even now, have not ruled on the merits of our case. We will continue to raise these issues especially in light of the upcoming 2024 election. — Lake v. Fontes, U.S. Supreme Court, No. 23-1021 Dark Money Group Backed By Foreign Billionaire Has Dumped $100 Million Into State Ballot Initiatives: The Wyss-backed Sixteen Thirty Fund has funneled nearly $34 million into Michigan since 2017 to, in part, ‘rewrite the state’s election laws... ’ - A Swiss billionaire whose personal goal is to “(re)interpret the American Constitution in the light of progressive politics” has donated hundreds of millions of dollars to a left-wing group that is dumping millions into state ballot initiatives, a new report from Americans for Public Trust (APT) revealed. Hansjörg Wyss, through his Berger Action Fund, has donated $243 million to the Sixteen Thirty Fund, which “uses its war chest ... to support massive get-out-the-vote drives, issue advocacy campaigns bolstering President Biden’s agenda, liberal pet projects from abortion to immigration, and attack ads against Republican lawmakers,” according to . The group also pours resources into state ballot initiatives — to the tune of $97,593,151 over the past decade, according to the report. The cash infusions are “often concentrated in battleground presidential states such as Arizona, Michigan, and Ohio or states with competitive U.S. Senate races like Colorado, Missouri, and Nevada.” The lion’s share of that funding has gone to Michigan, Ohio, Colorado, Nebraska, Missouri, and Nevada, but the Sixteen Thirty Fund also targets ballot initiatives in solid red states like Arkansas, North Dakota, and South Dakota. The Sixteen Thirty Fund has dumped nearly $34 million into Michigan — a state former President Donald Trump won in 2016 — since 2017 to, in part, “rewrite the state’s election laws,” according to the report. In Nevada, the group “was the number one donor to a ballot issue that implemented automatic voter registration” in 2018... More than 10 percent of the world 's population goes to the polls as ONE BILLION set to vote in six-week Indian election- On April 18, India began to head to the polls in an election that is expected to take as long as six weeks. Voters began queuing at polling stations in the first 21 states to hold ballots, which stretch from the Himalayan mountains to the tropical Andaman Islands. Nearly 970 million voters – more than 10 percent of the world 's population – will elect 543 members to the lower house of parliament over staggered rounds of voting... | | | Wear Your Support On Your Sleeve | | Lastly, if you would, please consider supporting our work! We’re all in this together! | We’ll be back next week with more news and updates. Until then.... Ever onward- The True the Vote Team | | | | | | | ---|---|---|---|---|--- | | Update your email preferences or unsubscribe (C) 2024 True the Vote PO Box 3109 #19128 Houston, Texas 77253-3109, United States of America

Peter, our April end-of-month deadline is around the corner, and we have plenty of work to do before it arrives.
**First:** After Pennsylvania’s primary election on Tuesday, it became official: It’s Bob Casey vs. David McCormick in the general election, and we have to keep Bob fighting for working families across the Commonwealth and the Nation.
**Then:** We kicked things into high gear, because McCormick’s massive wealth means he can self-fund this race to the tune of millions — and that’s before his Wall Street billionaire backers step in.
**Now:** Our campaign is setting a goal of **$200,000 by midnight on Tuesday, April 30th** to continue fueling our efforts. Individual supporters such as yourself help us organize, hire staff, run advertisements, open new offices, and push forward to Election Day.
**[November is closer than we think, and our end-of-month deadline is in just a few days. Will you chip in $5 or whatever you can in order to help us meet our goal?](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/casey-em-20240427-1?refcode=em20240427-1&refcode2=2828_552475_UOyjJA&akid=2828%2E552475%2EUOyjJA)**
Thank you for all of your support. We can’t do this without you.
— Team Casey

name: Joe Biden
subject: Whether you give $1 or $100 to our campaign, you’remaking a real difference.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Biden for President
body:
Earlier this month, Donald Trump was down in Florida raising money from a bunch of hedge fund billionaires who want him to cut Social Security and Medicare and give them tax cuts. | | |
---
**Earlier this month, Donald Trump was down in Florida raising money from a bunch of hedge fund billionaires who want him to cut Social Security and Medicare and give them tax cuts. So, I figured there was no better time to send you an email about exactly who is funding our campaign than now.** Over 1.6 million grassroots donors have contributed to my campaign so far. And, the last quarter alone, grassroots supporters helped this campaign raise over $187 million. That’s incredible, Peter. **I’ve always said this campaign is Scranton versus Palm Beach, but these numbers really show that.** Our campaign is a grassroots movement made up of nurses and teachers. Meanwhile, Donald Trump is collecting checks from a couple of billionaires who are looking for a tax cut. Real people like you who know the stakes of this election are rolling your sleeves up to pitch in what you can. And, whether you give $1 or $100 to our campaign, you’re making a real difference. **And that is exactly why I need you to get involved today. If you’ve been waiting on the sidelines for the right moment to contribute to this campaign, now is the time.[Lots and lots of grassroots donors are already chipping in to our campaign. And they are counting on you to do the same so we can defeat Donald Trump and his billionaire backers come Election Day. clean_body: Earlier this month, Donald Trump was down in Florida raising money from a bunch of hedge fund billionaires who want him to cut Social Security and Medicare and give them tax cuts. | | | Earlier this month, Donald Trump was down in Florida raising money from a bunch of hedge fund billionaires who want him to cut Social Security and Medicare and give them tax cuts. So, I figured there was no better time to send you an email about exactly who is funding our campaign than now. Over 1.6 million grassroots donors have contributed to my campaign so far. And, the last quarter alone, grassroots supporters helped this campaign raise over $187 million. That’s incredible, Peter. I’ve always said this campaign is Scranton versus Palm Beach, but these numbers really show that. Our campaign is a grassroots movement made up of nurses and teachers. Meanwhile, Donald Trump is collecting checks from a couple of billionaires who are looking for a tax cut. Real people like you who know the stakes of this election are rolling your sleeves up to pitch in what you can. And, whether you give $1 or $100 to our campaign, you’re making a real difference. And that is exactly why I need you to get involved today. If you’ve been waiting on the sidelines for the right moment to contribute to this campaign, now is the time. | If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | | | | | Simply put: Our campaign is in a strong position heading into the general election because of your support. But we cannot lose our momentum now. Our campaign is putting up ads on television and online, opening hundreds of field offices across the country in critical states and districts, and Kamala and I are crisscrossing the country -- all in an effort to get our message out. And we have to keep it up to win come November. Last quarter, more than 1.1 million donors contributed to my campaign. And 310,000 made their first donation ever. [https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/NGP/NGP31/1/94275/images/DAV-Logo_2.png]
Hi it’s Don Davis,
[https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/NGP/NGP31/1/94275/images/Action%20Shot.png]
I'm traveling across the District and talking to as many folks as possible to deliver for eastern North Carolina families. The Cook Political Report has rated NC-01 as a Toss-up in North Carolina’s only competitive race. Protecting this seat will be challenging. You can count on me to fight for every single vote. But I cannot win this race alone. It will take all of us. We’re building a different coalition of those who believe we must put commonsense above divisive politics. Our campaign relies on grassroots supporters to provide the resources we need to win, and this race is one of the most competitive races in the country. | | Fellow American, It's official. We are through game one of the double header. The voters have spoken, and they chose me to be the Republican candidate for Senate in California. That means you and I will have just eight months to build a 58-county, grassroots campaign capable of defeating Adam Schiff - with his _ActBlue_ allies and the war chest he's assembled during the two decades he spent in Washington, D.C. **[That why I'm humbly asking you to rush and emergency $35 contribution to my campaign today.](http://links.gopmembership.com/u/click?_t=e3c9a4cac7f248a39c2a3d920479a441&_m=046e1653375444bea9b0cb050fd46763&_e=6yqQPZA_LZLb_zUDiI_Dc57InEUJ1wj_mWXura_RLGL3oE9cGSoBe8IIu345jchr_OnZ6KJ7SlLhZzVnp_V7nFInT6dKNFQsitnhGpXBvYVOjOBUutKZW20oWzkqdrWn5FywCX1YaOpvCx62ONUfFfng9PK3_Y5xzwa_SzDoWEbdkYPf5Xl1cGLjiYpKi6v44-rGOtbnavC6Rz_xXjOiw81bUM0WhwBZJ7gMTyhp0MpKa0gv9ikjktClt8TZzjJUETPODjHB7hHgJ3oxgDl6tm9-ayP0KhO7rYWX6HjmUdgMcvVeaCVQfqPgVDZ2GNmPVMKJFxDeChmqZN04-RmNiiTX9RthDeqxh8z-d2XwY3XHmWYYq_nx9wiU-wjTErVHOwPqErdTxH1JakbyO1RaZw%3D%3D)** There's no time to lose. With every day that goes by, you and I are getting more and more reminders why it's so important we win this election. The reality is present-day America is starting to look a lot like 1970s America. You remember what it was like: ► Not only were gas prices sky high, Carter's rationing meant we could only buy gas on even or odd days depending on our license plate numbers. Remember? ► Eleven Israeli athletes were slaughtered at the Olympic Village in Munich by terrorists. Remember? ► Fifty-two Americans were held hostage for 444 days by terrorists in Iran. Remember?? Democrat policies had brought America to its knees. And now, as Yogi Berra used to say, **_"It's deja vu all over again."_** Joe Biden, Adam Schiff and the rest of the Democrats don't care one bit that Americans are having a hard time. I'd go even further to say they welcome the misery so they can keep folks down and dependent. You and I _must_ win this race. **[That's why I'm humbly asking you to rush your $35 donation to my campaign today to defeat Adam Schiff in November.](http://links.gopmembership.com/u/click?_t=e3c9a4cac7f248a39c2a3d920479a441&_m=046e1653375444bea9b0cb050fd46763&_e=6yqQPZA_LZLb_zUDiI_Dc57InEUJ1wj_mWXura_RLGL3oE9cGSoBe8IIu345jchr_OnZ6KJ7SlLhZzVnp_V7nFInT6dKNFQsitnhGpXBvYVOjOBUutKZW20oWzkqdrWn5FywCX1YaOpvCx62ONUfFfng9PK3_Y5xzwa_SzDoWEbdkYPf5Xl1cGLjiYpKi6v44-rGOtbnavC6Rz_xXjOiw81bUM0WhwBZJ7gMTyhp0MrbNPRnMI7WfKi6gtAo2HufKjBQRDVpOGydH9urwgkHlVgP4sHyuXLAhyeiMOVXNkSVF7ZkRfewFG2MXooqqac4aitbF8cQArF8KjMhcujL_NfUuCBjiin3cxWONlKRk9rfwJkWkz1NqllL6Vgg9aq7SdMU93KiHbibgS4hTFZFNA%3D%3D)**

name: GIFFORDS PAC
subject: 🚨 BREAKING: The gun safety movement outraised the gun lobby 🚨
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Giffords PAC; not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
body:
The NRA is rapidly losing their ability to compete with the movement we have built together.
#

When GIFFORDS was founded 11 years ago, a headline like this from a publication that supports the gun lobby’s “guns everywhere” agenda was something we could only imagine in our wildest dreams:
[](https://go.giffords.org/go/14457?c0=giffords-em-apr24.Y_Rik7&refcode=em240427-1-30&t=1&akid=8009%2E3935704%2EU2Rjd5)
The NRA’s long-standing corruption has **finally** caught up to them, and they are rapidly losing their ability to compete with the gun safety movement we have built together.
But we haven’t won the fight to end gun violence yet, and the gun lobby won’t go down without a fight. As the NRA loses influence, more extreme organizations backed by gun manufacturers—like the National Shooting Sports Foundation—are gearing up to become the gun lobby’s political force. Their agenda is just as insidious as the NRA’s, and they are ramping up their spending to try and tear down our movement for gun safety.
**We can’t let this happen.**
Over the past 11 years, we’ve changed hearts, minds, and laws. But we’re not finished with our work yet. Not until everyone in our nation can live freely without the fear of gun violence in their communities.
[**Our momentum is stronger than ever, and after such a strong fundraising performance in March, we can’t slow down now. Will you please make a contribution of $3 or any amount you can afford to GIFFORDS PAC so we can defeat the gun lobby once and for all?**](https://go.giffords.org/go/14457?c0=giffords-em-apr24.Y_Rik7&refcode=em240427-1-30&t=2&akid=8009%2E3935704%2EU2Rjd5)
_If you 've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your contribution instantly:_
| | **[CONTRIBUTE $3](https://go.giffords.org/go/17015?c0=giffords-em-apr24.0rFmWB&amount=3&refcode=em240427-1-30&t=3&akid=8009%2E3935704%2EU2Rjd5)**
---
****
| **[CONTRIBUTE MORE](https://go.giffords.org/go/17015?c0=giffords-em-apr24.0rFmWB&refcode=em240427-1-30&t=4&akid=8009%2E3935704%2EU2Rjd5)**
---
****
Onward,
The team at GIFFORDS PAC

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com . We try to send only the most important information and opportunities to participate via email, but click [here](https://go.giffords.org/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=5&akid=8009%2E3935704%2EU2Rjd5) if you'd like to unsubscribe. Giffords PAC was started to support elected officials who step up to fight the gun violence epidemic. Thank you for standing with Gabby and the Giffords team.

name: Rashida Tlaib
subject: Our country’s anti-war movement is growing, with students at campuses around the country demanding their colleges divest from genocide.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rashida Tlaib for Congress
body:
The right to protest is essential to democracy | | | [](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.X6XUC7u8ppFLNtMO_55SZlNseb7gEYIOhm_EWnhzEOZKmTtnV3k2h4V2x_O3H7rdW2az5rgktBwzxQ8Ml9Wgkmv85qW-UsBonL4KRa0bcNqdICU6T3NBDdNIZG7w7wEWylvJaYl9PypmU0z7JW8xEzEzvM6gZqPBhUAgG6I8oYX3Z4oynGqlVW8L7Tk4s9CQp4OX7pBpU0pp0hjtWaL8SuBvyPmM9A5wLWU9LfoFR6ZeDgEoHpHFiabcKUfSEXHnS5Lo8IdLa6t9Z08J79Q_0iFzVRSl01dfV6vRbYEjFUHCY-qMVVkBuH8aab7g8QbBYjicnXnxTqDOsgeKNH0RuADJrXf8Go48G1BJwHUdjOmJyUBOMTAVeqsPlA1KrVu5M0hQK-JiIwC7d5-wHOkXoE7NDBA_Kgo4J0Y7gmhHoBWIe4TDWewSuyWFXg3Jj1HBrXoo2H5ghkArKeuQ7wuEUh04p1KppKw6MpfDNl_d6vSpyPcKBaKtV-glmWrPWKfdNrYi1aBMRtLYzCHLk7kkxT8Tjnptpcire3LqSiWYkQU/45v/Ri2H19CaQuOg0hfrMzRb8A/h0/h001.qEq7q_uYxtGmSwMYNzUtNCViFAtSfBSaQDJuJL05-rk)
---
Friend, Our government continues to send billions to Israel’s military with no conditions on upholding human rights. Each day we hear and see new atrocities from this U.S.-backed genocide on the Palestinian people, such as mass graves at multiple Gaza hospitals. In response, our grassroots anti-war movement is growing, with students around the country setting up tents on their campuses to demand their colleges divest from Israel’s genocide and occupation. I joined students at the University of Michigan’s Gaza solidarity encampment this week: _Photo credit: Adam J. Dewey_ As a Jewish student at Columbia University said: “There are no universities left in Gaza so we chose to reclaim our university for the people of Palestine.” This week is Passover, the Jewish holiday of liberation. Exchanging foods like matzah and matzo ball soup within multifaith and multi-racial encampments, Jewish students and faculty have held seders on campuses across the country. **The right to protest is essential to democracy, and it’s a fundamental constitutional right as part of our free speech protections in the First Amendment.** In many states, university leaders are calling in police and even state troopers in riot gear to violently disrupt these peaceful protests, including tear-gassing, tasing, and brutally beating students. Some universities are banning student protestors from campus, locking them out of their dorms and leaving them homeless. **This repression and retaliation that students are facing for exercising their constitutional right to protest genocide is appaling.** Now, some state legislators are trying to pass bills to silence students’ voices. Last week, the House of Representatives passed a bill trying to take away the non-profit status of pro-Palestinian organizations, which could further threaten our First Amendment rights to protest and free speech. And just this week, the U.S. Supreme Court chose to leave in place a judge’s decision that jeopardizes the right to organize protests in Texas, Louisiana, and Mississippi. **I will continue to work to protect the right to protest, as well other rights and liberties across our country and the world.** _Photo credit: Adam J. Dewey_ __ I’ve tried to stop our government from continuing to abuse the Foreign Intelligence Surveillance Act to surveil and spy on Americans in violation of our civil liberties, disproportionately targeting Black and brown communities. Unfortunately this passed the House with bipartisan support last week. **I won’t stay silent during attacks on our democracy. I will always speak truth to power, and hold our government accountable for violating civil rights and human rights.** Tonight, President Biden and members of his administration will dine and joke with U.S. journalists during the White House Correspondents’ Dinner. Palestinian journalists in Gaza have asked their U.S. colleagues to boycott the dinner “as an act of solidarity with us — your fellow journalists — as well as with the millions of Palestinians currently being starved in Gaza due to the Biden administration’s continued political, financial, and military backing of Israel and cut-off of funding for life-saving humanitarian aid.” Israel’s government has regularly murdered Palestinian journalists for exposing the truth, such as Shireen Abu Akleh. Since last October, over 125 journalists in Gaza have been systematically targeted and killed. Others have been jailed and tortured by Israeli forces. Earlier this month I had the chance to recognize Motaz Azaiza, a Palestinian journalist who has bravely used his platform to document the ongoing genocide in Gaza and the lives of the innocent people who have been killed. We presented him with a Congressional Record to honor his work telling Palestinians’ stories, and I told him that our existence as Palestinians is resistance. **May we continue growing the movement to demand human rights and freedom for Palestinians and for all people.** In solidarity, Rashida [DONATE NOW](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfqtjzbjFBpR7JpBHI31l9kbTssL2iCd_LDl88OA1cO_uPZTh_4qb-dDV4KslVIGGFBvuyyaFVqhBAt39x-ueL4ETixkrokMRagJduoaIQcazkdCbSCvu5ojkJbTeHPEa_7nBZqMD0NlZcadbOjvJa86cm_GX0AVIw5gM8QjIkBUYy48pnzUNWAq41ZeA_pmwHPkK5lU4LxX1u33JtxabxlO1orfqf6snUrr5xzotzca2mX0j4NSOc8bINJ0bwGJUrY44rF3qc4hV-cgtB7H50UuUg957-9muVOcvwSEAtn2CF2CNX9FWa-EP7ZtKyRwljfhx7E6Dfcv_-LuqMoNo9pSMMBvh_2_u-hmAFcDyFwBNm1SKuSrNgAN-XDK_ZAYpHGHsVMwWeYBmgh7wkCHG_fpP0TgMsEAzR4AmxkPZXtBaNEcSFkFu7x4zRDoaDI4vUBWCgd13IjgQiW4MDyWC5DUvY-9TfhMy3SaEnQn0Su3YPmAZzv6WE0OVc5O8GJilVD-V575Dl4VY_p29-w0gLYhLh9qPFM9O_9JaaR--LyKCustpR_5uh4OQV0miNR5vszeowafo5sZxjhYOTDPABP_jpgqV_LCQl3lqvnyGcmv90w/45v/Ri2H19CaQuOg0hfrMzRb8A/h1/h001.m-dAFIEU3XgJJNHqpm8I3UbZm1OVnuJ35QhQULw_YoY)

clean_body: The right to protest is essential to democracy | | | Friend, Our government continues to send billions to Israel’s military with no conditions on upholding human rights. Each day we hear and see new atrocities from this U.S.-backed genocide on the Palestinian people, such as mass graves at multiple Gaza hospitals. In response, our grassroots anti-war movement is growing, with students around the country setting up tents on their campuses to demand their colleges divest from Israel’s genocide and occupation. I joined students at the University of Michigan’s Gaza solidarity encampment this week: Photo credit: Adam J. Dewey As a Jewish student at Columbia University said: “There are no universities left in Gaza so we chose to reclaim our university for the people of Palestine.” This week is Passover, the Jewish holiday of liberation. Exchanging foods like matzah and matzo ball soup within multifaith and multi-racial encampments, Jewish students and faculty have held seders on campuses across the country. The right to protest is essential to democracy, and it’s a fundamental constitutional right as part of our free speech protections in the First Amendment. In many states, university leaders are calling in police and even state troopers in riot gear to violently disrupt these peaceful protests, including tear-gassing, tasing, and brutally beating students. Some universities are banning student protestors from campus, locking them out of their dorms and leaving them homeless. This repression and retaliation that students are facing for exercising their constitutional right to protest genocide is appaling. Now, some state legislators are trying to pass bills to silence students’ voices. Last week, the House of Representatives passed a bill trying to take away the non-profit status of pro-Palestinian organizations, which could further threaten our First Amendment rights to protest and free speech. And just this week, the U.S. Supreme Court chose to leave in place a judge’s decision that jeopardizes the right to organize protests in Texas, Louisiana, and Mississippi. I will continue to work to protect the right to protest, as well other rights and liberties across our country and the world. Photo credit: Adam J. Dewey I’ve tried to stop our government from continuing to abuse the Foreign Intelligence Surveillance Act to surveil and spy on Americans in violation of our civil liberties, disproportionately targeting Black and brown communities. Unfortunately this passed the House with bipartisan support last week. I won’t stay silent during attacks on our democracy. I will always speak truth to power, and hold our government accountable for violating civil rights and human rights. Tonight, President Biden and members of his administration will dine and joke with U.S. journalists during the White House Correspondents’ Dinner. Palestinian journalists in Gaza have asked their U.S. colleagues to boycott the dinner “as an act of solidarity with us — your fellow journalists — as well as with the millions of Palestinians currently being starved in Gaza due to the Biden administration’s continued political, financial, and military backing of Israel and cut-off of funding for life-saving humanitarian aid.” Israel’s government has regularly murdered Palestinian journalists for exposing the truth, such as Shireen Abu Akleh. Since last October, over 125 journalists in Gaza have been systematically targeted and killed. Others have been jailed and tortured by Israeli forces. Earlier this month I had the chance to recognize Motaz Azaiza, a Palestinian journalist who has bravely used his platform to document the ongoing genocide in Gaza and the lives of the innocent people who have been killed. We presented him with a Congressional Record to honor his work telling Palestinians’ stories, and I told him that our existence as Palestinians is resistance. May we continue growing the movement to demand human rights and freedom for Palestinians and for all people. In solidarity, Rashida Rashida Tlaib for Congress PO Box 32777 Detroit, MI 48232 | Paid for by Rashida Tlaib for Congress | | Sent via . name: The Editors at Broad + Liberty
subject: Guy Ciarrocchi: "Two Weeks to Flatten the Curve" and Other Lies ⚡🔔
body:
We were not allowed to object – now it’s imperative that we remember. | | | |
---
| | |
---
| _**Lies, damn lies, and two weeks to flatten the curve**_
---
| [ ](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=fa946ad038&e=b7b3eddce2)
---
|
* * *
---
|
#### We were not allowed to object – now it is imperative that we remember.
---
| Dive into this opinion piece by **Guy Ciarrocchi** as he reflects on the government-imposed lockdowns following the COVID-19 outbreak. This [most recent o](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=4a0ee22eb5&e=b7b3eddce2)[p-ed](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=d18d2d9303&e=b7b3eddce2) by Guy recalls the school closures, "essential" and "non-essential" worker designations, mandatory masking, executive orders leading to the shuttering of small business storefronts – and the desperate attempts by "experts" and the media to hide "disinformation."

---
| [Read More](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=04d032809a&e=b7b3eddce2 "Read More")
---
|
---
|
## Featured Clips:
---
| [ ](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=be79f49ce7&e=b7b3eddce2 ""This is a Rescue Mission," Education, & Early Voting Return Data | Voices of Reason Ep. 2")
---
Guy Ciarrocchi closes out a recent [_Voices of Reason_](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=76c77729c1&e=b7b3eddce2) roundtable by breaking down the steps legislators ought to take to ensure that money spent on public education leads to the desired, better outcomes for children and families.
|
---
|
## About Guy Ciarrocchi:
---
| |
---
As a common-sense conservative thought-leader, Guy’s writings provoke thought on important topics such as education, politics, culture and anti-Semitism. Guy draws on decades of experience from South Philly to the Philadelphia suburbs to Pittsburgh, from Harrisburg to Washington, DC, having served at the highest levels of government, as a candidate and strategist, as well as Chamber CEO. Guy has been listening, observing and guiding his readers for years.
---
|
---
|
## This is how we change YOUR local media...
---
| We at [_Broad + Liberty_](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=16b70c3f1f&e=b7b3eddce2) are proud to present Guy’s writings, providing readers across our region, state and beyond, with insightful, original investigative reports, and thought-leadership, on education, crime, business and government.

Follow Guy on social media [@PaSuburbsGuy](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=2e0da6f766&e=b7b3eddce2). And, read more columns at [w](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=a941986f37&e=b7b3eddce2)[ww.broadandliberty.com](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=90f1c6a9f1&e=b7b3eddce2) — updated daily and as news breaks.

**_Broad + Liberty_ is growing, and with so much more work to be done.**

We are building a publication with cross-platform reach that is influencing policy outcomes, informing the leaders who serve us, and resonating in the hearts and minds of our readers, through news, editorials, and now multimedia content for those seeking straightforward perspectives grounded in reality.

_Broad + Liberty_ advocates for **political, cultural, and economic freedom** in local and regional discourse in Philadelphia and its environs: the suburban collar counties of Southeast Pennsylvania, South and Central New Jersey, and throughout the rest of PA.

**We couldn't do this without you – every dollar received is a spark that ignites change in our region and beyond.**

The work of _Broad + Liberty_ is essential in the movement for freedom – we are asking for your support to achieve our goals in the form of a [tax-deductible contribution](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=5c4da9a7a6&e=b7b3eddce2) of any amount.

Thank you for your consideration!

name: Bob Casey
subject: every step of the way
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Mark Kelly for Senate
body:
#

Hey everybody, it’s Mark Kelly. My friend Bob Casey is running for re-election to the Senate in 2024, and we’re working to support him. I hope you’ll read the message below from him, and [**consider splitting a donation between Bob's campaign and mine.**](https://act.markkelly.com/go/1389?c0=mek-em-casey.xo6YZe&refcode=em240427-1-30&t=1&akid=5749%2E6688874%2Ezi5Db7)
---

[](https://act.markkelly.com/go/1389?c0=mek-em-casey.xo6YZe&refcode=em240427-1-30&refcode2=5749.6688874.zi5Db7&t=2&akid=5749%2E6688874%2Ezi5Db7)
---
Friend,
With the primary now behind us, I wanted to take a moment to say thank you to you, team. Together, we have laid the groundwork for a victory in November. At every turn, the support of people just like you has allowed us to build a campaign that this team can and should be proud of.
[**Now that the general election is officially underway, we need to double down on our efforts. That’s why I’m personally asking if you’ll split $3 between my campaign and Mark Kelly to become a General Election Founding Donor.**](https://act.markkelly.com/go/1389?c0=mek-em-casey.xo6YZe&refcode=em240427-1-30&t=3&akid=5749%2E6688874%2Ezi5Db7)
**[Become a General Election Founding Donor](https://act.markkelly.com/go/1389?c0=mek-em-casey.xo6YZe&refcode=em240427-1-30&t=4&akid=5749%2E6688874%2Ezi5Db7)**
The real fight starts now, team. We’re up against a mega-millionaire hedge fund executive who has the backing and resources of the entire Republican party, including Donald Trump.
If I’m going to continue working to lower costs for working families, build a stronger economy that works for everyone, and ensure that our seniors and veterans have the benefits they've earned, I need you behind me **every step of the way.**
[**Please, if you can, split $3 between me and Mark Kelly to power our campaign from now until Election Day. The path to the Senate and the White House hinges on Pennsylvania, and we can’t afford to take our foot off the gas.**](https://act.markkelly.com/go/1389?c0=mek-em-casey.xo6YZe&refcode=em240427-1-30&t=5&akid=5749%2E6688874%2Ezi5Db7)

---

Bob Casey

name: Tim Sheehy
subject: California’s #1 favorite politician
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TIM SHEEHY FOR MONTANA<-
body:
->-> ( https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/38066?id=5968549.2563.1.baa2552d2ec6d37190e779ee181517a3 )<-<-

Fellow Conservative,

Hollywood funding Democrat candidates for Congress is a tale as old as the movie industry itself.

You and I both know how rare it is for a celebrity in Hollywood to support conservative candidates for federal office - it’s even more rare for them to offer their support publicly. But quite frankly, I couldn’t care less about winning the support of Hollywood actors, directors, or anyone involved with the entertainment industry.

\*\*My opponent, on the other hand, is actively soliciting their financial support.\*\*

I have received emails from actress Glenn Close on two occasions. In her fundraising appeals on behalf of Jon Tester’s campaign, she writes, _ \*\*“Jon Tester is running for reelection in Montana—it’s the most important race on the map. This election will determine the future of our country, and I can’t sit on the sidelines with stakes as high as these.”\*\* _

Please consider a contribution to my campaign today. \*\*We don't need a bought-and-paid-for Hollywood Senator representing American interests any longer. ( https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/38066?id=5968549.2564.1.4cdc24d0a1ce17a2dd090d69164bcef3 )\*\*

-> \*\*HELP ME DEFEAT HOLLYWOOD TESTER→\*\* ( https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/38066?id=5968549.2565.1.c67bcaef392be018f2a38876af24fcd9 )<-

\*\*

Is it the Hollywood, coastal California elite, or the people of Montana who sent him to Washington to be their voice? \*\*

With A-LIST Hollywood celebrities on his team, _ \*\*there is no telling the amount of resources Tester will be able to marshal over the next seven months.\*\* _

I appreciate your help with this matter.

-> \*\*CHIP IN $7→\*\* ( https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/38066?id=5968549.2566.1.a6d08a3b722c341b15b56a6cb9f793d8 )<-

For America's Future,

Tim Sheehy

Former Navy SEAL

Republican Candidate for U.S. Senate

->

\* \* \*

“

"I SERVED AS A NAVY SEAL, BUILT ONE OF THE LARGEST AERIAL FIREFIGHTING COMPANIES IN AMERICA CREATING OVER 200 MONTANA JOBS, AND STARTED A VETERAN-LED CATTLE RANCHING AND FEEDING OPERATION. WHETHER IT WAS IN WAR OR BUSINESS, I SEE PROBLEMS AND SOLVE THEM. AMERICA NEEDS CONSERVATIVE LEADERS WHO LOVE OUR COUNTRY. I'M RUNNING FOR THE U.S. SENATE BECAUSE OUR CAMPAIGN IS ABOUT SERVICE, DUTY, AND COUNTRY — NOT POLITICS AS USUAL."

clean_body: ->-> ( )<-<- Fellow Conservative, Hollywood funding Democrat candidates for Congress is a tale as old as the movie industry itself. You and I both know how rare it is for a celebrity in Hollywood to support conservative candidates for federal office - it’s even more rare for them to offer their support publicly. But quite frankly, I couldn’t care less about winning the support of Hollywood actors, directors, or anyone involved with the entertainment industry. \\My opponent, on the other hand, is actively soliciting their financial support.\\ I have received emails from actress Glenn Close on two occasions. In her fundraising appeals on behalf of Jon Tester’s campaign, she writes, \\“Jon Tester is running for reelection in Montana—it’s the most important race on the map. This election will determine the future of our country, and I can’t sit on the sidelines with stakes as high as these.”\\ Please consider a contribution to my campaign today. \\We don't need a bought-and-paid-for Hollywood Senator representing American interests any longer. ( )\\ -> \\HELP ME DEFEAT HOLLYWOOD TESTER→\\ ( )<- \\ Is it the Hollywood, coastal California elite, or the people of Montana who sent him to Washington to be their voice? \\ With A-LIST Hollywood celebrities on his team, \\there is no telling the amount of resources Tester will be able to marshal over the next seven months.\\ I appreciate your help with this matter. -> \\CHIP IN $7→\\ ( )<- For America's Future, Tim Sheehy Former Navy SEAL Republican Candidate for U.S. Senate -> \ \ \ “ "I SERVED AS A NAVY SEAL, BUILT ONE OF THE LARGEST AERIAL FIREFIGHTING COMPANIES IN AMERICA CREATING OVER 200 MONTANA JOBS, AND STARTED A VETERAN-LED CATTLE RANCHING AND FEEDING OPERATION. name: Nick Freitas
subject: We the People vs. Everybody

body:
One of my close friends needs your help...

https://secure.winred.com/hamilton-for-congress/freitas-apr-27-2024?utm_source=mc&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=20240427_Hamilton_VA07_FreitasApr27&utm_id=pc

Peter,

I’ll be blunt here – Cameron Hamilton is right on the brink of hitting his end-of-month goal.

And he urgently needs patriots like YOU to step up and help him cross the finish line.
<< HELP CAMERON HIT HIS APRIL GOAL! >> (https://secure.winred.com/hamilton-for-congress/freitas-apr-27-2024?utm_source=mc&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=20240427_Hamilton_VA07_FreitasApr27&utm_id=pc)

Cameron is a father, a Constitutionalist, and a former Navy SEAL who’s fighting to get to Congress so we can put America FIRST in our nation’s capital once again.

He’s been endorsed by true conservative fighters such as U.S. Senator Rand Paul, FL-13 Rep. Anna Paulina Luna, and KY-04 Rep. Thomas Massie.

But there’s no endorsement that’s more important for Cameron than the endorsement of We the People.

body:
I’m so grateful you opened this email.

| [](https://click.historyoftheday.com/u/click?_t=930f96a60371422687dbefcfca24c32b&_m=f4b8afe64bf146758f8592319ec6a548&_e=5vgjsqbSOY8ty2RNIkCe_x28hS6nbjtRBoZbvVwiTY9h4tCJ1OR-_XxCxijyEL3tSNXU8Rk5f2nDZBN0J40nYRsjLSIZQrTV9jxzGgCgQnw_ZAUUVdGPqydj8OvgNloQiM5FT2tB6DQkJJ82oF_to2qBrgYgY0lCbuLeiZrccYrPXhZPhJH_MeK001sdRE2sxRT1ETRkhquJvhW0xBdpCdIrnussht5ndOeCRO_RBS_NKl-9LU4xLxxJUB_JyL01JYPrFlxP5qVjAdtCliYMsn8vb56TPTYlDAsK4i6OoucUVkOotWbaZXlxmmrGAyjxnULr3kVm5A2uvdXF9HTpToEQShGeD0futQ7M21iuqflQgq8855sU4c_eduVihj1m7IC-IaqyFtoGST-h3BWihQ%3D%3D)
---
Fellow American,

I’m so incredibly grateful that you chose to open and read this email. Only about 30-40% of people open these emails - and with all the political emails being sent these days, I’m so happy you opened this one.

Unfortunately, in order to stay in touch with conservatives like you, I rely on emails, texts, mail, and phone calls.

**With that said, can you please do me the simple favor of reading this all the way to the end?** If you reach the end and still don’t think you can make a difference, then I want to thank you for your time.

With an average of 35% of supporters opening these messages, only 1% of supporters step up and donate. This makes it difficult for my campaign since I depend on Americans like you receiving this email to help me hit my fundraising goal.

I refuse to rely on Hollywood Elites and Dark Money for fundraising goals. I want our conservative values and fight to be fueled by those who believe in them the most - you and me.

**And you know what?** If everyone who opened this email donated just $1 - _**one singular dollar**_ \- we’d blow all of our goals out of the water.

| [**DONATE $1**](https://click.historyoftheday.com/u/click?_t=930f96a60371422687dbefcfca24c32b&_m=f4b8afe64bf146758f8592319ec6a548&_e=5vgjsqbSOY8ty2RNIkCe_x28hS6nbjtRBoZbvVwiTY9h4tCJ1OR-_XxCxijyEL3tSNXU8Rk5f2nDZBN0J40nYRsjLSIZQrTV9jxzGgCgQnw_ZAUUVdGPqydj8OvgNloQiM5FT2tB6DQkJJ82oF_to2qBrgYgY0lCbuLeiZrccYrPXhZPhJH_MeK001sdRE2sLqyUjYQ1f49p11bawuX1MlMegicFURXDLc1wsNzQCuY6zLKk-KEg4aTfSzlzsz-r01Vr-nE2P-9AWdPdFGDhBwIZ13nWS0xA1PkcyyutJvo6-f9mFdwwg4uSvkMCp4N5js7bgUnj5B9mn4mZYp3jaJYA1TuNz2w2cgr7FzTKd2w2GTIaYzMJASQWrAYtMIZI7v9tdhjoshSUpPREJ6uL4g%3D%3D)
---
[**CHIP IN ANYTHING**](https://click.historyoftheday.com/u/click?_t=930f96a60371422687dbefcfca24c32b&_m=f4b8afe64bf146758f8592319ec6a548&_e=5vgjsqbSOY8ty2RNIkCe_x28hS6nbjtRBoZbvVwiTY9h4tCJ1OR-_XxCxijyEL3tSNXU8Rk5f2nDZBN0J40nYRsjLSIZQrTV9jxzGgCgQnw_ZAUUVdGPqydj8OvgNloQiM5FT2tB6DQkJJ82oF_to2qBrgYgY0lCbuLeiZrccYrPXhZPhJH_MeK001sdRE2sLqyUjYQ1f49p11bawuX1MlMegicFURXDLc1wsNzQCuZPaTjX6s2rqI7EADn06bNCTBh03VAl_a6Uyo-ZMOE5nteh0ukcmwFkOTx6dnVQYF51zWFfEoPSk3EKL4iQFw_wyN2y-Bz3iz1W0ryXS1iBxq1ixxkZjHy3S0KmUl-lcv25un4kbBMopLRM8H7EgbvdSkpbSDiURrmlIG-cLQOV8A%3D%3D)
---

Growing up, hard-working Americans were able to buy homes and live in good and safe communities. Now, with inflation on the rise, it is becoming harder for Americans who make an honest living to be able to live comfortably and see the American dream come to life.

I want to restore America to a time when Americans could afford homes, groceries, cars, and living expenses. These essential costs are growing beyond what many Americans can afford. No one should have to choose between food and shelter.

**[Democrats rely on Hollywood and New York Elites who are billionaires - I rely on people like you, who can give $1, $3, $9, or even $20 to reach my goals.](https://click.historyoftheday.com/u/click?_t=930f96a60371422687dbefcfca24c32b&_m=f4b8afe64bf146758f8592319ec6a548&_e=5vgjsqbSOY8ty2RNIkCe_x28hS6nbjtRBoZbvVwiTY9h4tCJ1OR-_XxCxijyEL3tSNXU8Rk5f2nDZBN0J40nYRsjLSIZQrTV9jxzGgCgQnw_ZAUUVdGPqydj8OvgNloQiM5FT2tB6DQkJJ82oF_to2qBrgYgY0lCbuLeiZrccYrPXhZPhJH_MeK001sdRE2sxRT1ETRkhquJvhW0xBdpCdIrnussht5ndOeCRO_RBS-hL3V6XulI8hAnSJY4LVPKA6PwgNPeD1CIx-5EyIMaG9FC05Bhsnxkh-NEkGXe8SHmcm1LHHhdZwUnVxM-2fn14ffS-y_m_z9x3wylFk-DtTGnPdQZ1EfXNH8xKsdAtBwGnAR37kbuOuaYEoxCMoeYviPrtrXTqjHWj0UQFj24Kw%3D%3D)**

**I’m humbly asking if you could go above and beyond and donate the cost of a pack of gum - $1.**

[**CHIP IN THE PRICE OF A PACK OF GUM**](https://click.historyoftheday.com/u/click?_t=930f96a60371422687dbefcfca24c32b&_m=f4b8afe64bf146758f8592319ec6a548&_e=5vgjsqbSOY8ty2RNIkCe_x28hS6nbjtRBoZbvVwiTY9h4tCJ1OR-_XxCxijyEL3tSNXU8Rk5f2nDZBN0J40nYRsjLSIZQrTV9jxzGgCgQnw_ZAUUVdGPqydj8OvgNloQiM5FT2tB6DQkJJ82oF_to2qBrgYgY0lCbuLeiZrccYrPXhZPhJH_MeK001sdRE2sLqyUjYQ1f49p11bawuX1MlMegicFURXDLc1wsNzQCuYkwOOZ8w_yA6SSusic8x-Bz8-w8_lBjcdbU3RuYVO8pmzco-CpDvjWvZ9UfWdD7E48OtvM_PvsHKXWj4rIjrlBk9vNqTvhyFJNbLRwHR1S71ov3YLW44wYSsZg6lE0c2lHoNoazTCa49DdOTjjol6FUnJICNkOaud7bko5Er8aSg%3D%3D)
---

_The Left hopes I give up and stop sending you these emails.

They also hope you stop reading these emails.

It’d be their dream come true if we both gave up on our Conservative values._

_**I won’t give up on you, and I hope you won’t give up on me or our Conservative values.**_ I know most people will ignore this, but I need patriots like you to see what we’re fighting for. If you think you’re better off than you were 4 years ago, then I understand why you don’t want to donate today.

But if you’re like me, and believe we must get America back on track and make the American Dream possible again, please donate whatever you can before midnight.

[**DONATE TODAY**](https://click.historyoftheday.com/u/click?_t=930f96a60371422687dbefcfca24c32b&_m=f4b8afe64bf146758f8592319ec6a548&_e=5vgjsqbSOY8ty2RNIkCe_x28hS6nbjtRBoZbvVwiTY9h4tCJ1OR-_XxCxijyEL3tSNXU8Rk5f2nDZBN0J40nYRsjLSIZQrTV9jxzGgCgQnw_ZAUUVdGPqydj8OvgNloQiM5FT2tB6DQkJJ82oF_to2qBrgYgY0lCbuLeiZrccYrPXhZPhJH_MeK001sdRE2sLqyUjYQ1f49p11bawuX1MlMegicFURXDLc1wsNzQCubNBZsCJACjZUZEyRfvwPussmukG9-XIWmsp6Ur78NgbrohAk3_sF7hQj3d-9lb1a8D-6wA1n-FnYFFvdhmkI_4JieXRgxckVNX5mzsnaWrd_CwEAdDLBWWf6gv1H5fz_3pA8v357BVK-lrRRhP6dQ64l_V6HuU4zpMY4CAOSX44w%3D%3D)
---

_God Bless,

Riley_

| **RILEY MOORE: CONSERVATIVE FOR CONGRESS.**

* * *
Washington is all tied up in putting politics over principle.
It’s time to put a stop to it and start putting PRINCIPLES OVER POLITICS - starting with YOU!

[](https://click.historyoftheday.com/u/click?_t=930f96a60371422687dbefcfca24c32b&_m=f4b8afe64bf146758f8592319ec6a548&_e=5vgjsqbSOY8ty2RNIkCe_x28hS6nbjtRBoZbvVwiTY9h4tCJ1OR-_XxCxijyEL3tSNXU8Rk5f2nDZBN0J40nYRsjLSIZQrTV9jxzGgCgQnw_ZAUUVdGPqydj8OvgNloQiM5FT2tB6DQkJJ82oF_to2qBrgYgY0lCbuLeiZrccYrPXhZPhJH_MeK001sdRE2sL9sgG-EDuooAuQ7b5mN_Yxddq0NjswVLBqPWwksR83SfnpYCtqeDicYAnU3HD_bnSjkawlHYg-hnHLzRLn3Ku-XArREhXuZ4ZZKtBzQlrwGr5edqR29oZU0-lwYH5AYeIDz1EIB9sRoG4BLExLpiu_T1FKXDog_gE7TXHilVPg-wgewa5NLr0e44Mcfk_Pzx)

Peter — time's running out, and the stakes couldn’t be higher:
1. **The 2024 election is make-or-break for our nation, and President Biden must win!**

2. **That's because our freedoms, such as women's reproductive rights, voting rights, and LGBTQ+ rights are in jeopardy if Donald Trump takes back the White House.**

3. **Trump and his extremist allies even vowed revenge on their political enemies if they retake control in Washington in November. Their dangerous agenda is WRONG for our country.**

The only way we are going to help President Biden fight off the MAGA GOP’s momentum is if we meet our end-of-month deadline!
**[We still need 439 grassroots donors to step up before Tuesday night. body:
What you need to know, friend

| | | |
---
| | [](http://links.burchettforcongress.com/u/click?_t=feefb5ad83f24ba4b99ac997c1b47e86&_m=fad1fbc621c248b283f8df359c281b54&_e=InwbadL-0OIRkWJvLuW63sDeJ6GVys0GLIYqYBBbBoOf74SlIV1yjyikmh5wUlFVBKclEbwVnK5LE7T0-otMiJ-QlVhsQxXfin2ElBBMbzVA0LuPBGvDRGDkdvaxDE4KubH86a3m2PT9UNLrB47xWlBFnKdQItQvPJb8-BtOthfjqNHzXmkG7Z-qKAVHKwkahOIx2f4D5DCu5kRbE1JmpO9-FOYmJ5oHK5IGz-Ak8FS_J_p7LiFqTGgfcHcbOUwpsV9E4lr8gIU9QR0hO-favbTL2UFS7c_o36lCLwWfK-qBRdIRIm8J5fS6AKRIKQPJK5-aaibcezIE5GutQm3afQruW0zAjoNzF6m6wrnYX6s%3D)
---
| | Friend, I'm fired up about the [recent Boeing incidents](http://links.burchettforcongress.com/u/click?_t=feefb5ad83f24ba4b99ac997c1b47e86&_m=fad1fbc621c248b283f8df359c281b54&_e=InwbadL-0OIRkWJvLuW63pP1BGk9ic9-NHPrt10yL6hjoKuA83ZSk3B0FFyCPxGSkMjMMFwzcCHoVthLtPpJN19gUCucwtEj3ooMkNVMIAeCTnhAjxsUUNxdFLemo4gKQ-15D6OdVplPMiKStD6fYAXlopABJr0GIhyvCfWKa3nWppt9fc_LsMOXOLmN1Ck1J_eR4QjLoyd2he2LGmJJkQF-StmsF_BmC1YQXzrPa74Paud4uQBmvoJ2pu58sqLsTx7V0Q0wE4bh9LES-55-9coFkHLMTJ907UF4Kd_WqYCglbE3QpxzHcsVbMeEQgLH) and the lack of accountability we're seeing. I spoke out on Newsmax because I won't sit back while big corporations like Boeing dodge questions and avoid responsibility. I'm a motorhead, a gearhead, and a proud American who demands answers when it comes to our skies.
---
[](http://links.burchettforcongress.com/u/click?_t=feefb5ad83f24ba4b99ac997c1b47e86&_m=fad1fbc621c248b283f8df359c281b54&_e=InwbadL-0OIRkWJvLuW63s9VxkW_cFdsPPFJqFPm1XB6Ht6-7mNI9BMMkHUK2WHcsEMKGFyxvhiaIDBER7Wnq-LEmtoRk6fD7TaPLuodpPvkMy6v_MZJqy0mrA11xGlKISn7zNIjyFm4pOhlpAkzv70Jb_YdVgYBv9NCe_gN0pOb16gaZLWl1p2mFB_If8IAD7AhuKqNwugP1NuHUV0lJyknXQhGhg7ijfgemrmi3WU%3D)
---
[**Hold Boeing Accountable**](http://links.burchettforcongress.com/u/click?_t=feefb5ad83f24ba4b99ac997c1b47e86&_m=fad1fbc621c248b283f8df359c281b54&_e=InwbadL-0OIRkWJvLuW63sDeJ6GVys0GLIYqYBBbBoOf74SlIV1yjyikmh5wUlFVBKclEbwVnK5LE7T0-otMiJ-QlVhsQxXfin2ElBBMbzVA0LuPBGvDRGDkdvaxDE4KubH86a3m2PT9UNLrB47xWlBFnKdQItQvPJb8-BtOthfjqNHzXmkG7Z-qKAVHKwkahOIx2f4D5DCu5kRbE1JmpLLNesoeQDgbYCMBQ2ZH1YiI3uVm-A-ol84EWWme4m3fdyDii7_SPkRMlUPa94_-P6wAfJlvg6vCsM5x0J2Fjyi1hpi4YwfJljpkGEMDV9cmFIpzcBUy8ys-LDQB93_M_Scg-UNVKHto_2-xn56Skqc%3D)
---
When I hear about prosecutors hesitating to hold Boeing accountable, I see red. It's time to stop playing nice and start holding these big boys responsible for the [lives they put at risk](http://links.burchettforcongress.com/u/click?_t=feefb5ad83f24ba4b99ac997c1b47e86&_m=fad1fbc621c248b283f8df359c281b54&_e=InwbadL-0OIRkWJvLuW63stFxI-iKf5DkDeizzozbyZXIXajGnZh9uCEA6czJTS26zLcWSQlzVnL0pHl0yVSL3ETlCLJXGLmUd5jjfFsjaueS8AHr8SS5N7LMG0yx6-92hs5eQLLv93nSmBZRKhZrR9S1By5H82BBap8dZKT6B63zSafYWD9mfaNAY3ND2YbnMWCHdg0BKrRkuZ1nd7uqkRj0ngYQSBMn0mna01-amfiRT46R6BX-QghoBNj-lHkmFotEp1VYkeMNdK_x0_84WQ_CYA9dEaysc3NcrZoevXaxQBqeAQeXxBUYN7MA6Qn). I fly twice a week, just like many hard-working Americans. I shouldn't worry if a plane is safe because some corporate bigwig [cut corners](http://links.burchettforcongress.com/u/click?_t=feefb5ad83f24ba4b99ac997c1b47e86&_m=fad1fbc621c248b283f8df359c281b54&_e=InwbadL-0OIRkWJvLuW63qxXjFU5Alp_9kH-Ht2Sssx5KGzWg7DwWMJ2KJeGVGwlcw37U77oqMyTRn4FZWImcD-r6gHAcaHKMvYfd8R3b16vr-ik2f8RdoxOBQaUExJr9DxorTcJAxoT4YeJnRpWSuf-jZA6czlQuqeTxX3Yc25VCs7iR7uD61wDk04_NlUG5F_iIL2OXQWGuZ77xYKqL3orvMWkDg_NGDekGa70xL6BzenOduH64Sv8bbbsWJ51-CuwMZXcPlzvx_9ur2pyllGVKncNBiktcr5Fp9DOG4JyLM_GpBDLAiBzGZtBUWNl). I trust Chairman Comer to dig deep, but let's be real—talk is cheap in Washington. We need action, not just [hearings and promises](http://links.burchettforcongress.com/u/click?_t=feefb5ad83f24ba4b99ac997c1b47e86&_m=fad1fbc621c248b283f8df359c281b54&_e=InwbadL-0OIRkWJvLuW63q4UoCVuQfzDsBeFBv68-0fztj9JLFEcyMOFNnWzQGEYpSeyFkIIY3GqoA68sh1F0nw9PO4UUsKrRfN8aY-hZkBW89w9lLMdpYnvh2vMtnoxpPBjZtS9U2p2dW_kkGlNv0iU4Ou3rk321oD9TowoXufnpwTR3hkPGaqyqevK05w9PTRcBZoO_KRZ1rYxBMpPfalQq1lg-Xqjn_sr3aFqHUcSq4JMpUN2YSp3VAjzgOe7nyYIaw5IWlLm5tzBk2XY7rZTgkkCcUCeHnN0R3sByOldhlr1ZGeFSig60muowBjl). Boeing used to be a symbol of American pride. Now, it's a warning of greed. It's time to bring back that American spirit and ensure our skies are safe. Thanks for listening. Let's demand real change.

It's time to stop playing nice and start holding these big boys responsible for the . I fly twice a week, just like many hard-working Americans. I shouldn't worry if a plane is safe because some corporate bigwig . I trust Chairman Comer to dig deep, but let's be real—talk is cheap in Washington. We need action, not just . | Dear Family and Friends,
I heartily thank you for your support and faith in me.

As I shared in my concession speech and throughout the campaign, we must unite our Republican party.

Ryan Mackenzie and I have been on the same team spanning over twenty years. Whether it be G.W. Bush in 2000, the Corbett Administration, or the annual Lehigh Valley Young Republicans' Kickball Tournament, as shown above...we are committed to winning.

What's next?

We must bring the team together...our life depends on it.
Please volunteer, vote, and get everyone on the Republican ticket elected including Ryan Mackenzie!
God Bless You,

Our campaign has had some bad news these past few days, and we can't leave you in the dark about it. First, we caught a mix-up in our fundraising that overestimated the time we'd have to reach this month's projections. Second, Nancy Mace's team has gone on offense and is doubling down on their messaging and fundraising across the district. We need to keep up.
---
Now, we're in a full-on sprint to reach our end-of-month fundraising goal. Even with us firing on all cylinders to reach projections, we haven't seen the level of grassroots support that we usually do.
---
It's thanks to you that we've been able to scare the socks off of the GOP establishment. They're terrified that Michael B. Moore will win this seat. We know he has what it takes to defeat Nancy Mace, but he can’t win alone.
---

name: Ilhan Omar
subject: Student protests
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY ILHAN FOR CONGRESS
body:
Contrary to right-wing attacks, these students are joyfully protesting for peace and an end to the genocide taking place in Gaza, and history is going to be on their side.
# [](https://act.ilhanomar.com/go/35?t=1&akid=1097%2E791427%2EXBJFz3)

Friends,
What started out just a week ago with 70 students organizing themselves at Columbia University has now led to a nationwide, grassroots, student-led university movement for peace and an end to the genocide in Gaza.
In recent days I have had the honor of seeing the anti-war encampments at both the University of Minnesota and Columbia first-hand, and I'd like to take a moment today to say that in the face of violent threats, physical brutality, and immense opposition, I am in awe of the bravery and courage of these students and activists.
I am moved by their shared commitment toward standing in solidarity with the people of Palestine, pushing for an end to a genocide which has killed more than 34,000 Gazans, and fighting against an Israeli occupation and apartheid system which the United States helps fund to the tune of billions of dollars each year.
I also continue to be immensely proud of my daughter Isra, who — alongside dozens of her classmates — was arrested and charged with trespassing at Columbia this past week. Isra has always led with courage and compassion, and I'm not surprised in the slightest that she's actively organizing, pushing the institution she attends to be transparent in whether they are financially invested in the genocide in Gaza.
To this end, as a mother, a Congresswoman, and as a human being, it has been incredibly painful to see how our media, our president, and nearly every leader on both sides of the aisle has spent their time and energy condemning these brave acts of protest rather than seeking an end to this horrific war.
The fact is that young people have always been the leading force in our society pushing our government to do better — whether it be the Civil Rights movement, the LGBTQ+ movement, the labor movement, the environmental movement, or the fight to end the Vietnam War, young people have led the way.
**In this spirit, I firmly believe that these students and activists are on the right side of history in pushing our country to not remain complacent and complicit in the genocide in Gaza.**
I urge these students not to allow _anyone_ to tell them that standing up for what is right is wrong. I am certain that one day they will be celebrated in the history books because their cause is a just cause.
While universities and colleges across the country are turning their backs on the promise that higher education is rooted in the idea that students become strengthened as a better human being, as a just person in our society, as someone with a holistic understanding of the world, or as one who speaks truth to power — please, do not turn yourselves into what they want you to be.
There are many people out there trying to vilify and take away from the message of what these incredible young people are doing, not just on college campuses but in communities and neighborhoods nationwide.
Stepping up to change what you can't tolerate is why we as a country have the right to free speech, assembly, and petition enshrined in our Constitution, and the violent backlash from law enforcement, elected officials, and the media has been nothing short of a disgrace and an outrage.
That is why it is critical that our progressive movement continues to stand together in the face of these attacks, and it's why I'm asking you today:
[**Please add your name to my petition in solidarity with the anti-war student protesters and their efforts organizing against the genocide in Gaza at universities across the country. This is an important moment to stand with our movement.**](https://act.ilhanomar.com/signup/io-em-april24-su-protests/?source=em240427-1-t3&refcode2=1097.791427.XBJFz3&akid=1097%2E791427%2EXBJFz3)
**[ADD YOUR NAME](https://act.ilhanomar.com/signup/io-em-april24-su-protests/?source=em240427-1-t3&refcode2=1097.791427.XBJFz3&akid=1097%2E791427%2EXBJFz3)**
Thank you for reading, and thank you for adding your name in support today.
In solidarity,
Ilhan Omar

PAID FOR BY ILHAN FOR CONGRESS
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a very important way we communicate with supporters like you, but if you want to, you can **[unsubscribe here](https://act.ilhanomar.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?source=em-footer&t=2&akid=1097%2E791427%2EXBJFz3)**. You can also **[sign up to receive fewer emails](https://act.ilhanomar.com/signup/fewer-emails/?source=em-footer&t=3&akid=1097%2E791427%2EXBJFz3)**.
Submit this form to [**update your contact information**](https://act.ilhanomar.com/signup/update-contact-info/source=em-footer?t=4&akid=1097%2E791427%2EXBJFz3)
Ilhan is counting on our people-powered grassroots movement to fund this campaign. If you can, stand with us by **[making a contribution today](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/io-em-footer/?refcode=em-footer&t=5&refcode2=1097_791427_XBJFz3&akid=1097%2E791427%2EXBJFz3)**.
Ilhan for Congress
PO Box 33079
Washington D.C., 20033

That is why it is critical that our progressive movement continues to stand together in the face of these attacks, and it's why I'm asking you today: Thank you for reading, and thank you for adding your name in support today. In solidarity, Ilhan Omar PAID FOR BY ILHAN FOR CONGRESS

name: Tamie Wilson
subject: Jordan toes the Putin line
body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tamie-wilson-em-2024 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tamie-wilson-em-2024]
Over the weekend, the House voted to send Ukraine funding for a security package to help fight off the unjustified invasion ordered by Vladimir Putin.
Over 100 House Republicans, led by Marjorie Taylor Greene, voted against the Ukraine funding measure. Chief among them was one of Putin’s most reliable and talkative puppets: Jim Jordan.
It has already been exposed that Jordan was the architect of the failed impeachment effort of President Biden. Jordan hand-picked the man that the GOP chose as their star witness, Alexander Smirnov, whose complete and total lies were shown to be fabrications fed by Russian intelligence. Jordan eagerly accepted these lies with no evidence—happily doing Putin’s bidding if it served his and Trump’s interest.
This is why we say as often as possible that Jim Jordan is a threat to our national security and cannot be trusted in office. He has already endangered us, and he will do even more and worse if we allow him to return to Congress.
That’s why I am giving everything I have to this campaign. I am doing this for all of us, every American everywhere. The people of my district deserve a leader who will fight for them, and America needs us to run strong and win this crucial race.
Jordan will continue to abuse his power and put us all at risk if we don’t leave it all on the field in our work to defeat him. So I’m asking, as directly as possible: with so much at stake, can I count on you to stand with us and work to beat Jim Jordan in November for the good of the entire country? name: Wesley Bell (personal)
subject: Personally reaching out to this grassroots team
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY BELL FOR MISSOURI
body:
Peter — I wanted to personally reach out ahead of our end-of-month deadline.

In a moment, I'm going to ask you to consider chipping in $5, or whatever you can, to help me build a winning campaign ahead of Election Day. _But first, I want to share what this campaign means to me and how your support can make a real difference._

I've dedicated my life to finding real solutions to the challenges faced by everyday Missourians.

I’m the proud son of a police officer and county civil servant, who was raised right here in North St. Louis. Public service isn't just a career for me — **it's embedded in my DNA.**

Throughout my career, I have never been one for making false promises. While extremist House Republicans continue playing their divisive political games, I'm staying focused on bridging gaps and finding solutions for all.

**That’s why I decided to run for Congress.** I’m more ready than ever before to fight tooth and nail for the community I love — because St. Louisans deserve a representative who will put people above politics. But if we’re going to build a winning campaign ahead of November, it’s going to take all of us.

If you’re ready to bring real leadership back to MO-01, chip in $5, or whatever you can, to help me build a winning grassroots campaign before our crucial end-of-month fundraising deadline >> [**https://secure.actblue.com/donate/bell-q2-2024-email?refcode2=dpwillis67@gmail.com**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/83830089/469657046/1027042714?refcode=em24_240427_EOM2_fndd_gq_act___WB_ettx&utm_campaign=em24_240427_EOM2_fndd_gq_act___WB_ettx&utm_medium=email&refcode2=490b5ffe-aa04-ef11-96f3-7c1e521b07f9&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDYzODkiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNDkwYjVmZmUtYWEwNC1lZjExLTk2ZjMtN2MxZTUyMWIwN2Y5IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=jzNJn3NWQx9QB9zgN7EBZ6KvUgVf98fsrY_YoYzaMgE=)

Onward,

Wesley
_Sent from my iPhone_

| PAID FOR BY BELL FOR MISSOURI

name: Jon Tester
subject: Meet Fred and Christine.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Fight for Progress PAC and not authorized by any candidate or any candidate's committee
body:
I first ran for office to make sure our government was serving hardworking Americans like my grandparents.

| Hi Peter.

Here’s a photo of my grandparents, Arnfred and Christine, on their wedding day in 1905. That was a couple of years before they picked out a flat piece of grassland just outside Big Sandy to homestead.
---
[](https://click.everyaction.com/k/83830413/469657734/665036969?refcode=BLU_EM_FFP_2024-04-27_1&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNS8xLzc3NDA2IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjI5OGI5MjNhLWFiMDQtZWYxMS05NmYzLTdjMWU1MjFiMDdmOSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=XIJa_1TADMyO7uoOWijOsrMnLiz54w-Qj7SN7DDCzuk=)
That patch of loamy, alkaline clay-soil is the same one where I grew up; where Sharla and I raised our kids, and where we still farm the land to this day.

Things weren’t easy for Fred and Christine. They suffered devastating windstorms, bitter cold, fires, poisonous snakes—pretty much everything but locusts. They had a couple hundred acres to their name, a newly-built barn, a windmill, their healthy son and daughters (including Helen, my mom), strong muscles, and the powerful work ethic that built rural America.

I first ran for office to make sure our government was serving hardworking Americans like my grandparents. Folks like our teachers, farmers, and construction workers deserve a government that fights for them.

But the special interests trying to unseat me don’t care about that. Dark money groups are spending millions of dollars to misinform voters and replace me with a mouthpiece for their own agenda. They’ll do whatever it takes to elect their handpicked candidate because they don’t care about protecting our way of life—they’re just in it for power and influence.

**That’s not how I operate, and it’s why we’re running this campaign differently. I’m counting on grassroots folks like you chipping in what you can, when you can, to build a team strong enough to take on the mountains of cash these outside groups have earmarked to defeat me.**

[_**Can I count on you to split a contribution between my people-powered campaign and Fight for Progress? With the election season in full swing, we need to fight back now >>**_](https://click.everyaction.com/k/83830414/469657735/665036969?refcode=BLU_EM_FFP_2024-04-27_1&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNS8xLzc3NDA2IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjI5OGI5MjNhLWFiMDQtZWYxMS05NmYzLTdjMWU1MjFiMDdmOSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=XIJa_1TADMyO7uoOWijOsrMnLiz54w-Qj7SN7DDCzuk=)

name: Jon Tester
subject: I’m stressed, friend
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Debbie for Florida
body:
Do you have a second?
| | |
---
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/83830928/469659194/1318177582?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk1161-bu-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDYvMS8xMDc1MjUiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiN2Q0NjIwYjUtYWIwNC1lZjExLTk2ZjMtN2MxZTUyMWIwN2Y5IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=L8-l_x12BNG2WPPoyfxV8YsDk_G3D8dUy28ZTH_SQxo=)
It’s Jon Tester. Do you have a second to talk? I’m stressed. Meanwhile, my team tells me our fundraising took a massive nosedive while our opponents outspent us on the airwaves. If we don’t catch up on our fundraising soon, we’ll have to make some tough decisions about what to cut from our budget. **That could cost us the election.**
But here’s the good news: A generous group of donors saw how tight the polls are and decided to **match every single contribution to my campaign for the next 24 hours.**

Hey folks,
I know you probably have better things to do than read these emails, so I’ll keep this one short.
My team tells me that our grassroots fundraising has fallen off a cliff today. I get it—it’s the weekend, but this means bad news.
Can split a donation between my campaign and Seth Moulton to help us turn things around and reach our end-of-month fundraising goal? I wouldn’t ask if it wasn’t important, and I’ll never take your donations for granted. [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/moulton-tester]
I mean it: Your donations keep me focused on meeting with Montanans from every corner of the state and fighting for rural America in the Senate. Thank you.
—Jon

name: Lucas Kunce
subject: throwing out the rulebook
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Lucas Kunce for Missouri
body:
We’re building the boldest campaign in Missouri history
#
Hey Peter, it’s Lucas Kunce.
I wanted to take some time this morning to tell you a little more about the campaign we’re building to defeat Josh Hawley here in Missouri — and why it’s already the boldest grassroots movement our state has ever seen.
**So before I ask you to[chip in any amount toward our goal of raising $500,000 online before the end of April,](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/48855?refcode=em20240427-5379&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=5379%2E614464%2E63oWwz) will you please let me explain?**
**[ADD A DONATION NOW](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/48855?refcode=em20240427-5379&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=2&akid=5379%2E614464%2E63oWwz)**
For decades, lying politicians have let massive corporations strip our communities for parts — and Missouri has had a front row seat.
I can’t accept a status quo where politicians who take massive donations from Big Ag tell us it’s normal for billionaires in China and Brazil to buy up our farmland and put hard-working family farmers out of business. And I won’t stand for another twenty years of members of Congress who’ve never worn a uniform sacrificing American lives and tax dollars on forever wars, while refusing to invest into the everyday people who make our country strong.
Out-of-touch elites like Josh Hawley have spent decades wasting our money on tax breaks and subsidies for Wall Street, Big Pharma, Big Tech, and just about everything else that’s gutting our country.
They’re willing to lie, cheat, and steal from the American people to protect the corporate PACs and mega-donors who own their careers. And they’ll even raise their fist to look strong before they start running from threats to our democracy.
**We don’t need any more frauds in Congress.** That’s why I’m running for U.S. Senate. It’s why I’m not taking a single cent from corporate PACs. **[And it’s why today, I’m asking you to make your first donation of $10 or whatever you think is best toward our goal of raising $500,000 online before midnight this coming Tuesday, April 30. Can I count on you to help us hit our goal, defeat Josh Hawley, and take this seat back for working people?](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/48855?refcode=em20240427-5379&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=3&akid=5379%2E614464%2E63oWwz)**
If you've stored your info with ActBlue Express, we'll process your contribution instantly:
[Contribute $10](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/48856?refcode=em20240427-5379&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=10&t=4&akid=5379%2E614464%2E63oWwz) [Contribute $25](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/48856?refcode=em20240427-5379&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=25&t=5&akid=5379%2E614464%2E63oWwz) [Contribute $30](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/48856?refcode=em20240427-5379&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=30&t=6&akid=5379%2E614464%2E63oWwz) [Contribute $50](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/48856?refcode=em20240427-5379&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=50&t=7&akid=5379%2E614464%2E63oWwz) [Contribute $100](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/48856?refcode=em20240427-5379&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=100&t=8&akid=5379%2E614464%2E63oWwz) [Contribute $250](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/48856?refcode=em20240427-5379&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=250&t=9&akid=5379%2E614464%2E63oWwz) [Give another amount](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/48855?refcode=em20240427-5379&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=10&akid=5379%2E614464%2E63oWwz)

Our mission of taking power back for everyday people has earned our movement national media attention. And our commitment to running this campaign the right way, without a cent from corporate PACs, has given us the ability to run the boldest campaign in Missouri history — taking on corrupt political elites like Hawley without hesitation about some mega-donor being upset.
More than just fighting to codify protections for abortion access — **I’m running to end the filibuster so we can actually get it done.**
More than just banning insider trading among members of Congress and their families — **I’m running to put them in jail if they steal from us.**
More than just breaking up Big Pharma — **I’m running to prosecute the insulin cartels who are killing people.**
And more than just rejecting corporate PAC money — **I’m running to abolish corporate PACs altogether.**
This campaign is powered by the people because that’s exactly who I’ll work for in the U.S. Senate — I'll be accountable to real, everyday Americans, not some corporate executive or political machine. We’re throwing out their rulebook and building a grassroots movement to fundamentally change who has power in our country. **And I want you to join our team:**
**[So if you’re ready to help us take back power for everyday people in Missouri and across the country, please add a donation of $25, $10, or whatever you can toward our goal today.](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/48855?refcode=em20240427-5379&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=11&akid=5379%2E614464%2E63oWwz)**
**[ADD A DONATION NOW](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/48855?refcode=em20240427-5379&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=12&akid=5379%2E614464%2E63oWwz)**
For too long, our country’s corrupt politicians have bought their way into power and maintained a broken status quo. That cycle stops with our movement.
Thanks for being part of it,
Lucas Kunce
