clean_body: We’re building the boldest campaign in Missouri history Hey Peter, it’s Lucas Kunce. I wanted to take some time this morning to tell you a little more about the campaign we’re building to defeat Josh Hawley here in Missouri — and why it’s already the boldest grassroots movement our state has ever seen. So before I ask you to will you please let me explain? For decades, lying politicians have let massive corporations strip our communities for parts — and Missouri has had a front row seat. I can’t accept a status quo where politicians who take massive donations from Big Ag tell us it’s normal for billionaires in China and Brazil to buy up our farmland and put hard-working family farmers out of business. And I won’t stand for another twenty years of members of Congress who’ve never worn a uniform sacrificing American lives and tax dollars on forever wars, while refusing to invest into the everyday people who make our country strong. Out-of-touch elites like Josh Hawley have spent decades wasting our money on tax breaks and subsidies for Wall Street, Big Pharma, Big Tech, and just about everything else that’s gutting our country. They’re willing to lie, cheat, and steal from the American people to protect the corporate PACs and mega-donors who own their careers. And they’ll even raise their fist to look strong before they start running from threats to our democracy. We don’t need any more frauds in Congress. That’s why I’m running for U.S. Senate. name: brian lenney
subject: we couldn't be more different
body:
🤔 |
---
| | Real quick...

Last Thursday I joined others at a Nampa candidate forum.

Picture this: all the District 13 folks and some others were there, including my so-called "challenger."

But here's the kicker: while he was dishing out the same old boring political spiel, I came in hot with some real talk about where our state's at and what we need to do.

Check it out and see for yourself:

[Check it out here](https://votelenney.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=7ce84224f3cc6e52f7633cc60&id=cb0ae74d03&e=dea908e0fe "watch Lenney and other District 13 candidates answer forum questions")...

[](https://votelenney.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=7ce84224f3cc6e52f7633cc60&id=375f7379eb&e=dea908e0fe)

But wait, there's more!

I recently sat down to talk with Health Freedom Idaho about some hot-button topics, like public health districts, CPS, and of course, masks. The Idaho legislature was buzzing with activity this past session, and I've got the inside scoop.

If you're curious, you can [catch my interview with Health Freedom Idaho right here](https://votelenney.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=7ce84224f3cc6e52f7633cc60&id=9170ba0f6d&e=dea908e0fe "watch it")...

[](https://votelenney.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=7ce84224f3cc6e52f7633cc60&id=744405a6ea&e=dea908e0fe)

Cheers,

Brian

**P.S.**

While my challenger is out there slapping bumper stickers on his campaign and dishing out lies online and at your doorstep, I'm in the trenches, diving deep into the real issues facing Idaho. Protecting constitutional rights, ensuring fiscal responsibility and transparency, restoring quality education, and supporting and protecting families and children - these are the battles I'm fighting every single day.

See, here's the deal: he's gunning for that senator seat like it's a trophy on a shelf, but me? I'm in this to save Idaho, plain and simple. This isn't about titles, accolades, or head pats from the Governor (for me)... instead, for me, this is about the urgent need for real change in our state.

So, when you head to the polls, ask yourself: who's really here to roll up their sleeves and get things done?

The choice is crystal clear.

**P.P.S.**

If you're around Nampa on May 1st and don't mind cigar smoke, join us for "Cigars With Senators" (May 1st 7-9pm at the V-Cut Lounge in Nampa, Idaho). I'll be there with Senator Chris Trakel, Senator Tammy Nichols, and our future Canyon County Prosecutor Chris Boyd.

\---

1) To make sure you keep getting these emails, please add [blforidaho@gmail.com](mailto:blforidaho@gmail.com) to your address book or whitelist me.

2) Want to get off this list? [Unsubscribe from this list](https://votelenney.us5.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=7ce84224f3cc6e52f7633cc60&id=57cc6bf1b7&t=b&e=dea908e0fe&c=62adb9fa97).

3) My postal address: PO Box 3753, Nampa, ID 83653-3753

4) **Want to support the fight against the establishment hacks, phony conservatives, and progressive shills who want to turn Idaho into a progressive dumpster fire? >>> [Click here to contribute](https://votelenney.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=7ce84224f3cc6e52f7633cc60&id=a051f5e2d2&e=dea908e0fe "get in the fight")**

---

clean_body: | Hi there, = I know $3 may not sound like much — but there is power in every grassroots contribution, no matter how small. I’ve seen the power of this grassroots team at work before. Together, in 2020, we defeated Trump’s extremism, elected President Biden, and won back the Senate. Then, two years later, we held the Democratic Senate majority. And we did it with $3 contributions at a time. But Democrats are defending 23 seats this year, and Republicans only need to flip 2 of them to take back the majority. That’s why this time around, we need your $3 (or more, if you can spare it): = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | = = | = = | = = Thank you for being a part of this team! — Tina Paid for by Tina Smith for Minnesota Tina Smith for Minnesota PO Box 14362 St. Paul, MN 55114 United States | | Contributions or gifts to Tina Smith for Minnesota are not tax-deductible.

name: Mark Kelly
subject: This one will be close
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Gallego for Arizona
body:
With so much at stake you want to know you did everything you could to win. Looking back, the last thing you want is to feel is that you could have done more.
#

[](https://act.gallegoforarizona.com/go/1000?c0=ruben-em-apr24.p6MMmT&refcode=em240427-1-160&t=1&akid=2256%2E734936%2Eytb931)
Hey everybody, Mark Kelly here.
Look, I know a thing or two about close elections. I know how tough it is to win in Arizona. So, I think I can say this with a little authority: Arizona’s Senate race between Kari Lake and Ruben Gallego is going to be one of the closest and hardest fought elections in the entire country.
You all might remember what it felt like when we won the Senate back in 2020, and when we held the Senate in 2022. It’s incredible.
But we’ve known losses, too. I’m sure you remember what it felt like when Trump won back in 2016.
With so much at stake, when election day comes around you want to know you did everything you could to win. Looking back, the last thing you want is to feel that you could have done more.
It’s with that in mind that I am writing to you today. We’ve got a narrow pathway to victory in Arizona, and it’s going to take action from you to get it done.
I’m asking you to make your first online donation today.
[**Use this link and chip in $3 or whatever you can afford to give and support Ruben’s campaign for U.S. Senate. He’s got to raise considerable resources to take back this seat and help us hold the Senate. The only way he can do it is with your help.**](https://act.gallegoforarizona.com/go/1000?c0=ruben-em-apr24.p6MMmT&refcode=em240427-1-160&t=2&akid=2256%2E734936%2Eytb931)

name: Christine Goodwin
subject: Update from Christine Goodwin
body:
| It is time for proven leadership for Southern Oregon
---
[View online version](https://s0u37.mjt.lu/nl3/U8Um5St9yd0yrAOFCYpXMA?m=AVYAAD7hqK4AAchBzhoAAWtuvJMAAYCtdnwAndJyACYV_ABmLSBSJJ5BZwDWSMG4MSwL5QtCOgAasDI&b=a9a851e5&e=a7d8ae89&x=tfLWWkgYyQnikGdJV5PgPO7Do1p91l8ijm7Oi_gXjrQ)
---
| |
---
|
# **Campaign update from Team Goodwin**
---
The campaign to win Southern Oregon is in full swing. May 21st is just around the corner. I am visiting every community in Senate District 2. Hopefully you will be able to have a chance to visit with me at some point! Please find the to let me know what we need changed in Southern Oregon to help you or your neighbors lives. As you are probably aware, we have been under continuous attack from the Robinson's clan, John West, and people who are just hell bent on making sure nothing changes in Oregon for Republicans. My message of winning and bringing real change to Southern Oregon is a threat to the status quo. There is no threat just winning. I think with good representation, Southern Oregon can be a real diamond in Oregon. I hope you'll join the campaign! Donate, yard sign, have me to your neighborhood - and by golly VOTE. Don't let this campaign go by without casting your vote for Christine Goodwin for State Senate.
|
---
**Representative Goodwin Secures Long List of Endorsements** CANYONVILLE, Ore – Today, Representative Christine Goodwin (R-Canyonville), candidate for Senate District 2, released a lengthy list of endorsements of her campaign.“I’m thrilled that my message is resonating with so many trusted leaders, colleagues, industry professionals, and community members in and around Southern Oregon,” said Representative Goodwin. “Our community deserves a Senator who ensures Southern Oregon has a strong voice in Salem. My list of endorsements shows I am trusted to do exactly that.”
|
---
|
---
| [DONATE TODAY](https://s0u37.mjt.lu/lnk/AVYAAD7hqK4AAchBzhoAAWtuvJMAAYCtdnwAndJyACYV_ABmLSBSJJ5BZwDWSMG4MSwL5QtCOgAasDI/1/N1ud5JS7ufWvtUHKh2sCwA/aHR0cHM6Ly9zZWN1cmUud2lucmVkLmNvbS9nb29kd2luLWZvci1vcmVnb24vZG9uYXRlP3NjPXdpbnJlZC1kaXJlY3RvcnkmbW9uZXlfYm9tYj1mYWxzZSZyZWN1cnJpbmc9ZmFsc2U)

---
| We are launching our second TV ad today. We are trying to reach everyone in the primary about our conservative message with 'get er' done results. Oregon is not lost to Portland Democrats, there is hope. Winning takes an attitude, a desire and tons of work. I am ready to get to work on flipping Oregon back to red.
---
| [](https://s0u37.mjt.lu/lnk/AVYAAD7hqK4AAchBzhoAAWtuvJMAAYCtdnwAndJyACYV_ABmLSBSJJ5BZwDWSMG4MSwL5QtCOgAasDI/3/b_55h8qPNO8wb1YjZAoTvg/aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cueW91dHViZS5jb20vd2F0Y2g_dj1FaE1iYVZDTjNtTQ)
---
Here are the images of the different coffee meetings we are having throughout the District. I hope you can make it to one of them, I know your busy, if you want to drop a thought, send it to info@electgoodwin.com
| [](https://s0u37.mjt.lu/lnk/AVYAAD7hqK4AAchBzhoAAWtuvJMAAYCtdnwAndJyACYV_ABmLSBSJJ5BZwDWSMG4MSwL5QtCOgAasDI/4/iotq8UgGF9tngyK8-Te1MA/aHR0cDovL3d3dy5lbGVjdGdvb2R3aW4uY29t)

---
| I led the effort to protect girls sports from biological men competing against them. We must stand up to the hard left progressive wing of the Democrat party trying to divide our kids.
---
| [](https://s0u37.mjt.lu/lnk/AVYAAD7hqK4AAchBzhoAAWtuvJMAAYCtdnwAndJyACYV_ABmLSBSJJ5BZwDWSMG4MSwL5QtCOgAasDI/6/mC0ypFKEjHbCq9bYaOXHiA/aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cueW91dHViZS5jb20vd2F0Y2g_dj1nQzVoSjh5QVhWaw)

**We are heading to the Southern Border in Arizona on Monday to really learn how we can help secure the border, stop the flow of drugs to Oregon, and do our best to bring attention to this horrible Democrat policy of open borders! **
|

With extremism on the rise in the Republican Party,_it’s become harder to pass critical legislation for working families in Maryland and across the country._

All we see from the House Republican majority is chaos and dysfunction. We know what's at stake in this election. I need partners in Congress to help bring common-sense solutions back to Washington, DC.

name: Hillary Scholten
subject: For our sisters, daughters, nieces, granddaughters…
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Scholten for Congress
body:
As extremism rages around the country, the most vulnerable among us are at continued risk of losing our rights.

| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/83833617/469666123/873009390?refcode=BLU_EM_HSC_2024-04-27_1&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NTY0MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkOTE0NjI1ZC1hZjA0LWVmMTEtOTZmMy03YzFlNTIxYjA3ZjkiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=SVRvVB0V2jCD3MGZ-TiG3LwLbfDL8eQz5QuxEm2_5ug=)
---
| There is so much to focus on right now–extremist Republican rhetoric, Trump on trial, and our democracy in peril. But, for me, every day, at the top of my mind is the plight of women and girls.

As extremism rages around the country, the most vulnerable among us are at continued risk of losing our rights.

That’s women. The women who were the last to get the right to vote, the women who have yet to realize equal rights under the law, the women who make cents on the dollar, the women and girls who every day lose another state where they can get the healthcare they need.

I’m the first woman and mother in history to represent West Michigan in Congress, and I can tell you that being the first is not easy. The battle I’m waging, the stereotypes I’m breaking, and the strength of will and character I must possess every day to do this job test me to the fullest. Women still only make up less than a quarter of the United States Congress, though we are 50% of the population. In the entire HISTORY of the House, over 11,000 individuals have served, but fewer than 500 have ever been women. I’m changing that, not only for West Michigan but for women and girls all over our country.

I currently have four different men running against me who openly oppose allowing women to make their own healthcare decisions. Four. They are so mad that there’s a woman representing this seat now.

[_**My re-election will determine the majority in the House. We have to hold my seat in order to retake it. I can’t do it alone.**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/83833618/469666125/1364887459?refcode=BLU_EM_HSC_2024-04-27_1&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NTY0MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkOTE0NjI1ZC1hZjA0LWVmMTEtOTZmMy03YzFlNTIxYjA3ZjkiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=SVRvVB0V2jCD3MGZ-TiG3LwLbfDL8eQz5QuxEm2_5ug=)
---
| [CONTRIBUTE ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/83833619/469666126/1364887459?refcode=BLU_EM_HSC_2024-04-27_1&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NTY0MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkOTE0NjI1ZC1hZjA0LWVmMTEtOTZmMy03YzFlNTIxYjA3ZjkiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=SVRvVB0V2jCD3MGZ-TiG3LwLbfDL8eQz5QuxEm2_5ug=)

clean_body: As extremism rages around the country, the most vulnerable among us are at continued risk of losing our rights. | = | There is so much to focus on right now–extremist Republican rhetoric, Trump on trial, and our democracy in peril. But, for me, every day, at the top of my mind is the plight of women and girls. As extremism rages around the country, the most vulnerable among us are at continued risk of losing our rights. That’s women. The women who were the last to get the right to vote, the women who have yet to realize equal rights under the law, the women who make cents on the dollar, the women and girls who every day lose another state where they can get the healthcare they need. I’m the first woman and mother in history to represent West Michigan in Congress, and I can tell you that being the first is not easy. The battle I’m waging, the stereotypes I’m breaking, and the strength of will and character I must possess every day to do this job test me to the fullest. Women still only make up less than a quarter of the United States Congress, though we are 50% of the population. In the entire HISTORY of the House, over 11,000 individuals have served, but fewer than 500 have ever been women. I’m changing that, not only for West Michigan but for women and girls all over our country. I currently have four different men running against me who openly oppose allowing women to make their own healthcare decisions. Four. They are so mad that there’s a woman representing this seat now. = | = Grateful, Hillary * | | = Paid for by Scholten for Congress Hillary Scholten for Congress PO Box 6233 Grand Rapids, MI 49510 United States | = If you would like to receive fewer emails, . To stop receiving all email communications, please

Team, Donald Trump has spent most of his time lately sitting in a courtroom. Since legal trials can often move at a snail’s pace, I’m sure he has _plenty_ of time to think. I’m not going to pretend I know _exactly_ what’s on his mind, but it wouldn’t be a bad guess to assume that he thinks about the 2024 election in court quite a bit — and, by extension, Michigan, considering how badly he wants to win this state. Donald Trump _hates_ what we’ve done in Michigan. From expanding reproductive freedom to putting hardworking Michiganders first, our success stands directly against everything he values.
And it drives him _crazy_ that he’ll have to win a state that supports abortion rights and voted for Team Biden-Harris in 2020 to win in November.
There’s no question that we can expect him to launch even more attacks against my record to distract voters from the truth. **I’m counting on you to help me respond.**
My team is looking to raise $20,000 ahead of our April fundraising deadline so voters know the truth about what we’ve done _for_ Michigan and the dangerous things Trump wants to _do_ to Michigan if he wins.
If that sounds like a lot of money, that’s because it is. But trust me, we wouldn’t set a goal like this if we didn’t think we could reach it.

body:

name: Abigail Spanberger
subject: Virginia is at a crossroads
disclaimer_text: Paid for by No Dem Left Behind PAC
body:
| | | | | | [ ](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/spanberger-ndlb?refcode=founding)
---
|
## Abigail Spanberger
---
| | |
---
| | | |
## No Dem Left Behind
---
| friend, Let me put the bottom line upfront: I am running for Governor, and I need your support! [**_Will you split a contribution between my campaign and No Dem Left Behind today?_**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/spanberger-ndlb?refcode=founding) Now, let me tell you why: Years ago, I swore my first oath to our Constitution. I enthusiastically embarked upon a journey and a career of public service — first in law enforcement and then at CIA. I worked at home and abroad to keep our country safe and protect the country I love. When my husband Adam and I moved our three daughters home to Virginia – just miles from where we had grown up – I thought my days of public service had come to a close. But after the 2016 election, our country was at a crossroads, and I envisioned what it could be if we flipped Virginia’s 7th District and made clear that the people of our district deserved stronger representation. I worked hard, we built an extraordinary team driven by purpose and principle, and in 2018, our district elected a Democrat – me – for the first time since 1968. I have served proudly through some extraordinarily consequential moments in our history, and I have endeavored to do right by my constituents every day. I am proud of the work I have done, the laws I have passed, and the difference I have made. And now, our Commonwealth is at another crossroads – do we continue moving backward with attacks on our rights, our kids’ education, and our communities’ sense of security — or do we move forward on a path of progress? Last week, Virginia’s elections showed that Virginians want to move forward, but we need a new Governor to be driving that progress. I am running for Governor, because I know what I will bring to the job – a deep and abiding love for our Commonwealth, a relentless work ethic, and a focus on bringing people together to solve the real challenges facing Virginians.
[**_It is a long road to the 2025 Governor’s election, but will you join me now as a Founding Donor and support my campaign and No Dem Left Behind with a contribution? I am working to build a strong foundation of support, and I need your help._**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/spanberger-ndlb?refcode=founding)
---
| If you’ve saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:

name: Team Fetterman
subject: Not good
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Fetterman for PA
body:
We need to steadily raise funds each and every month to make sure John’s in a position to win when Election Day comes.
#
Hey Derek —
Reaching out b/c we’re coming up on a big fundraising deadline and we’re tracking behind on our goal. Not good. Hoping you can help!
Any campaign worth its salt has a detailed finance plan broken down into quarterly and monthly goals. **Our April deadline is on Tuesday and we still need to raise $30,000 before then.**
[**Can you pitch in $5 or any amount that works for you before the deadline to help us reach this goal?**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-email-20240427-1?refcode=em20240427-1&amount=5&refcode2=8951_434096_rncv-8&akid=8951%2E434096%2Erncv-8)
**Campaigns are a marathon, not a sprint**. Things might heat up a little bit toward the end, but we need to steadily raise funds each and every month to make sure Democrats are in a position to win when Election Day comes.
Grassroots supporters like you are a crucial part of reaching our goals, and we’re leaning on you *big* time to help us reach this one.
[**Please Derek, pitch in $5 or anything you can today. It’ll help more than you know!**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-email-20240427-1?refcode=em20240427-1&amount=5&refcode2=8951_434096_rncv-8&akid=8951%2E434096%2Erncv-8)
**[Donate »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-email-20240427-1?amount=5&refcode=em20240427-8951&refcode2=8951_434096_rncv-8&akid=8951%2E434096%2Erncv-8)**
Thanks,
Team Fetterman

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-emails?refcode=em20240427-8951-footer&t=1&refcode2=8951_434096_rncv-8&akid=8951%2E434096%2Erncv-8)**
---
[](https://www.facebook.com/JohnFettermanPA/) | [](https://twitter.com/johnfetterman) | [](https://www.instagram.com/johnfetterman/)
Email us: info@johnfetterman.com
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, so thank you for reading to the end. Small donors like you keep us going. To contribute via check, please address to Fetterman for PA, PO Box 6061, Pittsburgh PA 15211.
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.johnfetterman.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/)
* [Update My Personal Information](https://act.johnfetterman.com/sign/personal_info/?t=2&akid=8951%2E434096%2Erncv-8)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.johnfetterman.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=3&akid=8951%2E434096%2Erncv-8)

name: News Team @ Our Revolution
subject: Teaming up with Jayapal, Omar, Bowman to Defend and Grow Progressive Power in 2024
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Our Revolution click here to unsubscribe
body:
[ stdin# ][IMG]

INSIDER NEWS FROM THE FRONTLINES OF THE POLITICAL REVOLUTION

--------------------------------------------------------------------------

HEADLINES: Protecting & Expanding Progressive Power in Congress |
Endorsements: Pramila Jayapal, Ilhan Omar, Jamaal Bowman, Susheela
Jayapal, Lateefah Simon | VICTORY! Summer Lee Beats Big Money | Vote for
Peace in Maryland 5/2 | & MORE!

★ ★ ★

★ ★ ★

This week, Our Revolution held a special [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/16975?t=1011&akid=5874%2E5885482%2EbbcPN9 ]2024 Progressive Power Town
Hall with US Reps. Pramila Jayapal, Jamaal Bowman and Ilhan Omar, as well
as candidates Susheela Jayapal (OR-3) and Lateefah Simon (CA-12).

The event kicked off our strategic campaign to Protect and Expand
Progressive Power in Congress, rallying to elect - and re-elect - strong
voices for peace and justice on Capitol Hill — many of whom are being
targeted by dark money groups.

“Progressives are sounding the alarm against...a torrent of spending against
leftist candidates who are holding the Biden administration to task for
its unilateral support of Israel and its war on Gaza,” [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/16976?t=1012&akid=5874%2E5885482%2EbbcPN9 ]Politico
reported on the town hall.

★ ★ ★

Our Revolution is proud to stand with Pramila Jayapal as she organizes to
defend and grow the Congressional Progressive Caucus she chairs and runs
for re-election herself.

“The reality is that we need to protect progressives in Congress like me,
Ilhan, and Jamaal, who are under attack by Republican mega donors who are
coming into our districts, recruiting people to run against us, and
pouring enormous amounts of money into these races,” Pramila said.

AIPAC has pledged to spend $100 million against progressives this year
alone, she said, “because they’re afraid of our power, because we have
stood up for peace and economic justice, because we have challenged the
status quo and fought corporate power and proudly stood for an immediate
and permanent ceasefire in Gaza.”

“We can’t sit back and wait to see how it all plays out,” Pramila
continued. “That is not what Our Revolution is all about. They might have
billionaire mega donors, but we have the people, and people power is how
we’re going to win these elections.”

★ ★ ★

Our Revolution is once again endorsing Ilhan Omar for re-election because
we need her voice representing our movement and Minnesota’s 5th District
in Congress.

Ilhan has taken a lot of heat from the far right for standing on the right
side of history and she will have our movement on her side through her
primary on Aug. 13th and beyond.

“Every policy that the Progressive Caucus champions polls at 60% or above.
If the people’s house was not beholden to special interests, all of these
great policies would be implemented and we would have an incredibly great,
progressive country that takes care of everyone,” Ilhan told us Monday.

“We know they’re going to spend a lot of money, but we are moving in
strength not weakness,” she continued. “We are going to continue to move
policies rooted in radical love and advocate for the politics of love
because our communities deserve that.”

★ ★ ★

Our Revolution is all-in to re-elect Jamaal Bowman to the U.S. Congress to
serve New York’s 16th District. He has been one of our most dauntless
voices for racial justice in the U.S. House, and we are rallying to make
sure progressives turn out to vote for him on June 25th!

Besides his support of a ceasefire in Gaza, Bowman said anti-black racism
is also a factor in why big money is targeting his re-election bid. “This
is a majority-minority district, where we have been doing grassroots
organizing with young people and progressives since we got into office,”
he told us.

Up to a quarter of AIPAC’s $100 million could be spent against Bowman, and
there will be Trump donor money on top of it. But when Jamaal joined our
virtual town hall this week, he said, “That’s OK, because Our Revolution
has my back.”

★ ★ ★

Not only are we on a mission to Defend Progressive Power, but we also have
some great opportunities to GROW Progressive Power by electing new allies
to Congress this year!

You already know that Our Revolution is endorsing Susheela Jayapal for
Congress in Oregon’s 3rd District - and so is Bernie Sanders! - and our
movement got to know her better at our Town Hall event on Monday.

Yes, she is the sister of Pramila, and nearly choked up speaking of the
influence she has made on her journey into politics — and the sacrifice
their parents made to give them both a shot at the American Dream.

As a lawyer, nonprofit leader, and county commissioner, Susheela has seen
that dream fall short for many. When this blue seat opened up for the
first time in 30 years, she knew she had to run to make it as progressive
as possible.

“I am the only candidate to publicly reject corporate PAC money, clearly
support Medicare for All and public social housing, and to clearly and
consistently call for a ceasefire in Gaza,” Susheela told us. “I first
called for a ceasefire in November, and I have come under considerable
fire for that stance. My opponents have said that’s not an issue that
matters to our voters.”

★ ★ ★

Our Revolution has been in Lateefah Simon’s corner since she announced her
run to replace retiring Congresswoman Barbara Lee in California’s 12th
District.

Lateefah has the endorsement of Rep. Lee, and she beat out 9 opponents to
win her primary on a message of healthcare, worker rights, and housing.

“These are local issues, but the federal government has an opportunity to
bring back resources to the ground in our communities. The old party line
isn’t working anymore,” Lateefah told us Monday. “We don’t need to be
scared of folks who are on the other side of our politics because we have
been here before.

“I believe in the idea of true peace, dignity, wholeness, and equality.
We’re going to get there. My glasses aren’t rose colored, I understand how
far we have to go,” she continued. “The cavalry really is not coming. It
is us with our dreams, our hopes, and our tactical experience that’s going
to move the House.”

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/16898?t=1013&akid=5874%2E5885482%2EbbcPN9 ]Donate any amount to our 2024 Progressive Power Fund to make sure we
can mobilize our grassroots activists to get out the vote in each of these
key races!

★ ★ ★

VICTORY!

Congrats to U.S. Rep. Summer Lee! Summer is the first pro-Ceasefire member
of Congress to face a serious big money-powered challenger this election
cycle — and she just won her primary by a landslide with the grassroots at
her back!

Summer Lee’s overwhelming victory on Tuesday shows that we CAN stand up
for Peace in Gaza and defeat the Big Money attacks that come our way.

Our Revolution is proud to stand with Summer, and we’re READY to take on
the same forces to re-elect Jamaal Bowman, Ilhan Omar, Pramila Jayapal,
Cori Bush, and all of our Peace champions in Congress!

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/16898?t=1014&akid=5874%2E5885482%2EbbcPN9 ]Help Our Revolution fund our phone bank and texting force to elect more
great progressives like this across the country in 2024!

★ ★ ★

★ ★ ★

Our Revolution stands in solidarity with student protesters who are
organizing to demand a Ceasefire in Gaza and an end to U.S. funding of the
killing of Palestinian civilians and children.

We also applaud the 37 progressive champions including Barbara Lee, Ilhan
Omar, Ro Khanna, and Pramila Jayapal who voted against providing more
unconditional funding for Netyanahu’s war regime.

This marks the first time that this many Democrats voted against weapons
and funding to Israel’s military.

"The role for outside groups, like the young people who are protesting and
Our Revolution is to be out on the streets, because that gives people like
Bernie and AOC the standing to advocate on the inside,” Our Revolution
Executive Director Joseph Geevarghese told [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/16977?t=1015&akid=5874%2E5885482%2EbbcPN9 ]The Hill this week.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/16978?t=1016&akid=5874%2E5885482%2EbbcPN9 ]Add your name: Stop sending U.S. weapons to Israel. Peace Now!

★ ★ ★

Our Revolution has been at the vanguard of the “Vote Uncommitted” movement
- we’re using the ballot box to pressure the Biden Administration to end
its unconditional support for Netyanahu’s brutal war in Gaza.

To date, we’ve helped organize 600,000 protest votes for Peace in the
Democratic primaries — including critical swing states like MI WI and MN.

The next front in the fight will be the Maryland primary on May 14th.
Right now, Our Revolution is mobilizing our 137,000 members in Maryland to
vote “uncommitted” to send a message to President Biden: Change course and
call for an immediate and permanent ceasefire in Gaza.

“Progressive Democrats in Maryland will not stand by idly as the White
House uses American taxpayer dollars to fund Netanyahu’s horrific bombing
campaign,” Our Revolution Executive Director Joseph Geevarghese told
[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/16896?t=1017&akid=5874%2E5885482%2EbbcPN9 ]Maryland Matters.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/16333?t=1018&akid=5874%2E5885482%2EbbcPN9 ]DONATE NOW to help us keep up the momentum and Get Out the Uncommitted
Vote! Every dollar you give allows us to communicate with a Maryland voter
3x about our pro-Peace movement.

★ ★ ★

If you live in Maryland, join Our Revolution and our coalition for our
“Vote Uncommitted” rally on Thursday, May 2nd to kickoff early voting and
mobilize protest votes for Peace!

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/16980?t=1019&akid=5874%2E5885482%2EbbcPN9 ]Sign up here to RSVP to join us in person!

★ ★ ★

★ ★ ★

Our coalition of progressive organizations around the country are
mobilizing to advocate for a party platform that will serve young, working
class, and progressives — key voting blocs in this election year!

Our Revolution is mobilizing to send progressive delegates to the
Democratic National Convention in Chicago this August to push priorities
like Peace in Gaza, desperately needed campaign finance reform, taxing
billionaires like Elon Musk, fighting climate change, reducing the power
of superdelegates and so much more.

The core of our message: President Biden and the entire Democratic Party
must listen to progressives if they want to actually energize and motivate
voters to defeat Trump in November.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/16981?t=1020&akid=5874%2E5885482%2EbbcPN9 ]Donate today to help us make noise at the DNC and ensure the Party
embraces our progressive priorities before the election!

★ ★ ★

★ ★ ★

Our movement worked hard to elect the largest Congressional Progressive
Caucus in history. Now, we must defend these seats against rightwing
lobbyists like AIPAC, set to spend $100 million trying to unseat some of
our strongest voices for Peace in Congress.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/16898?t=1021&akid=5874%2E5885482%2EbbcPN9 ]Chip in to our 2024 Progressive Power Fund to help us out-organize big
money and re-elect our top progressive allies in Congress.

★ ★ ★

As the country’s largest grassroots-funded progressive political action
group, Our Revolution relies on our members to power our work. In 2024, we
must defend our top progressive leaders and elect new ones to join the
fight against the far right and corporate extremists trying to hijack our
democracy.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/16333?t=1022&akid=5874%2E5885482%2EbbcPN9 ]Sign up TODAY with a $10 monthly donation and you’ll get our 2024
sticker pack. For $27 a month, you’ll also get a handy tote bag. And, for
$50 a month, we’ll send you both plus the official Our Revolution T-shirt!

★ ★ ★

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/13011?refcode=revreport&amount=&t=1023&akid=5874%2E5885482%2EbbcPN9 ][IMG]

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/13011?refcode=revreport&amount=&t=1024&akid=5874%2E5885482%2EbbcPN9 ]WHEN WE ORGANIZE, WE WIN!

clean_body: [ stdin# ][IMG] INSIDER NEWS FROM THE FRONTLINES OF THE POLITICAL REVOLUTION HEADLINES: Protecting & Expanding Progressive Power in Congress | Endorsements: Pramila Jayapal, Ilhan Omar, Jamaal Bowman, Susheela Jayapal, Lateefah Simon | VICTORY! Summer Lee Beats Big Money | Vote for Peace in Maryland 5/2 | & MORE! ★ ★ ★ ★ ★ ★ This week, Our Revolution held a special [ ]2024 Progressive Power Town Hall with US Reps. Pramila Jayapal, Jamaal Bowman and Ilhan Omar, as well as candidates Susheela Jayapal (OR-3) and Lateefah Simon (CA-12). The event kicked off our strategic campaign to Protect and Expand Progressive Power in Congress, rallying to elect - and re-elect - strong voices for peace and justice on Capitol Hill — many of whom are being targeted by dark money groups. “Progressives are sounding the alarm against...a torrent of spending against leftist candidates who are holding the Biden administration to task for its unilateral support of Israel and its war on Gaza,” [ ]Politico reported on the town hall. ★ ★ ★ Our Revolution is proud to stand with Pramila Jayapal as she organizes to defend and grow the Congressional Progressive Caucus she chairs and runs for re-election herself. “The reality is that we need to protect progressives in Congress like me, Ilhan, and Jamaal, who are under attack by Republican mega donors who are coming into our districts, recruiting people to run against us, and pouring enormous amounts of money into these races,” Pramila said. AIPAC has pledged to spend $100 million against progressives this year alone, she said, “because they’re afraid of our power, because we have stood up for peace and economic justice, because we have challenged the status quo and fought corporate power and proudly stood for an immediate and permanent ceasefire in Gaza.” “We can’t sit back and wait to see how it all plays out,” Pramila continued. “That is not what Our Revolution is all about. They might have billionaire mega donors, but we have the people, and people power is how we’re going to win these elections.” ★ ★ ★ Our Revolution is once again endorsing Ilhan Omar for re-election because we need her voice representing our movement and Minnesota’s 5th District in Congress. Ilhan has taken a lot of heat from the far right for standing on the right side of history and she will have our movement on her side through her primary on Aug. 13th and beyond. “Every policy that the Progressive Caucus champions polls at 60% or above. If the people’s house was not beholden to special interests, all of these great policies would be implemented and we would have an incredibly great, progressive country that takes care of everyone,” Ilhan told us Monday. “We know they’re going to spend a lot of money, but we are moving in strength not weakness,” she continued. “We are going to continue to move policies rooted in radical love and advocate for the politics of love because our communities deserve that.” ★ ★ ★ Our Revolution is all-in to re-elect Jamaal Bowman to the U.S. Congress to serve New York’s 16th District. He has been one of our most dauntless voices for racial justice in the U.S. House, and we are rallying to make sure progressives turn out to vote for him on June 25th! Besides his support of a ceasefire in Gaza, Bowman said anti-black racism is also a factor in why big money is targeting his re-election bid. “This is a majority-minority district, where we have been doing grassroots organizing with young people and progressives since we got into office,” he told us. Up to a quarter of AIPAC’s $100 million could be spent against Bowman, and there will be Trump donor money on top of it. But when Jamaal joined our virtual town hall this week, he said, “That’s OK, because Our Revolution has my back.” ★ ★ ★ Not only are we on a mission to Defend Progressive Power, but we also have some great opportunities to GROW Progressive Power by electing new allies to Congress this year! You already know that Our Revolution is endorsing Susheela Jayapal for Congress in Oregon’s 3rd District - and so is Bernie Sanders! - and our movement got to know her better at our Town Hall event on Monday. Yes, she is the sister of Pramila, and nearly choked up speaking of the influence she has made on her journey into politics — and the sacrifice their parents made to give them both a shot at the American Dream. As a lawyer, nonprofit leader, and county commissioner, Susheela has seen that dream fall short for many. When this blue seat opened up for the first time in 30 years, she knew she had to run to make it as progressive as possible. “I am the only candidate to publicly reject corporate PAC money, clearly support Medicare for All and public social housing, and to clearly and consistently call for a ceasefire in Gaza,” Susheela told us. “I first called for a ceasefire in November, and I have come under considerable fire for that stance. My opponents have said that’s not an issue that matters to our voters.” ★ ★ ★ Our Revolution has been in Lateefah Simon’s corner since she announced her run to replace retiring Congresswoman Barbara Lee in California’s 12th District. Lateefah has the endorsement of Rep. Lee, and she beat out 9 opponents to win her primary on a message of healthcare, worker rights, and housing. “These are local issues, but the federal government has an opportunity to bring back resources to the ground in our communities. The old party line isn’t working anymore,” Lateefah told us Monday. “We don’t need to be scared of folks who are on the other side of our politics because we have been here before. “I believe in the idea of true peace, dignity, wholeness, and equality. We’re going to get there. My glasses aren’t rose colored, I understand how far we have to go,” she continued. “The cavalry really is not coming. It is us with our dreams, our hopes, and our tactical experience that’s going to move the House.” [ ]Donate any amount to our 2024 Progressive Power Fund to make sure we can mobilize our grassroots activists to get out the vote in each of these key races! ★ ★ ★ VICTORY! Congrats to U.S. Rep. Summer Lee! Summer is the first pro-Ceasefire member of Congress to face a serious big money-powered challenger this election cycle — and she just won her primary by a landslide with the grassroots at her back! Summer Lee’s overwhelming victory on Tuesday shows that we CAN stand up for Peace in Gaza and defeat the Big Money attacks that come our way. Our Revolution is proud to stand with Summer, and we’re READY to take on the same forces to re-elect Jamaal Bowman, Ilhan Omar, Pramila Jayapal, Cori Bush, and all of our Peace champions in Congress! [ ]Help Our Revolution fund our phone bank and texting force to elect more great progressives like this across the country in 2024! ★ ★ ★ ★ ★ ★ Our Revolution stands in solidarity with student protesters who are organizing to demand a Ceasefire in Gaza and an end to U.S. funding of the killing of Palestinian civilians and children. We also applaud the 37 progressive champions including Barbara Lee, Ilhan Omar, Ro Khanna, and Pramila Jayapal who voted against providing more unconditional funding for Netyanahu’s war regime. This marks the first time that this many Democrats voted against weapons and funding to Israel’s military. "The role for outside groups, like the young people who are protesting and Our Revolution is to be out on the streets, because that gives people like Bernie and AOC the standing to advocate on the inside,” Our Revolution Executive Director Joseph Geevarghese told [ ]The Hill this week. [ ]Add your name: Stop sending U.S. weapons to Israel. Peace Now! ★ ★ ★ Our Revolution has been at the vanguard of the “Vote Uncommitted” movement - we’re using the ballot box to pressure the Biden Administration to end its unconditional support for Netyanahu’s brutal war in Gaza. To date, we’ve helped organize 600,000 protest votes for Peace in the Democratic primaries — including critical swing states like MI WI and MN. The next front in the fight will be the Maryland primary on May 14th. Right now, Our Revolution is mobilizing our 137,000 members in Maryland to vote “uncommitted” to send a message to President Biden: Change course and call for an immediate and permanent ceasefire in Gaza. “Progressive Democrats in Maryland will not stand by idly as the White House uses American taxpayer dollars to fund Netanyahu’s horrific bombing campaign,” Our Revolution Executive Director Joseph Geevarghese told [ ]Maryland Matters. [ ]DONATE NOW to help us keep up the momentum and Get Out the Uncommitted Vote! Every dollar you give allows us to communicate with a Maryland voter 3x about our pro-Peace movement. ★ ★ ★ If you live in Maryland, join Our Revolution and our coalition for our “Vote Uncommitted” rally on Thursday, May 2nd to kickoff early voting and mobilize protest votes for Peace! [ ]Sign up here to RSVP to join us in person! ★ ★ ★ ★ ★ ★ Our coalition of progressive organizations around the country are mobilizing to advocate for a party platform that will serve young, working class, and progressives — key voting blocs in this election year! Our Revolution is mobilizing to send progressive delegates to the Democratic National Convention in Chicago this August to push priorities like Peace in Gaza, desperately needed campaign finance reform, taxing billionaires like Elon Musk, fighting climate change, reducing the power of superdelegates and so much more. The core of our message: President Biden and the entire Democratic Party must listen to progressives if they want to actually energize and motivate voters to defeat Trump in November. [ ]Donate today to help us make noise at the DNC and ensure the Party embraces our progressive priorities before the election! ★ ★ ★ ★ ★ ★ Our movement worked hard to elect the largest Congressional Progressive Caucus in history. Now, we must defend these seats against rightwing lobbyists like AIPAC, set to spend $100 million trying to unseat some of our strongest voices for Peace in Congress. [ ]Chip in to our 2024 Progressive Power Fund to help us out-organize big money and re-elect our top progressive allies in Congress. ★ ★ ★ As the country’s largest grassroots-funded progressive political action group, Our Revolution relies on our members to power our work. In 2024, we must defend our top progressive leaders and elect new ones to join the fight against the far right and corporate extremists trying to hijack our democracy. [ ]Sign up TODAY with a $10 monthly donation and you’ll get our 2024 sticker pack. For $27 a month, you’ll also get a handy tote bag. And, for $50 a month, we’ll send you both plus the official Our Revolution T-shirt! ★ ★ ★ [ ][IMG] [ ]WHEN WE ORGANIZE, WE WIN! ★ ★ ★ [ ]Facebook | [ ]Twitter | [ ]Instagram | [ ]Youtube | [ ]Website | [ ]Sign Up [ ]Our membership swag Our Revolution is the largest entirely grassroots funded progressive group in America. name: David Hogg
subject: Can I give you a call, Peter?
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY LEADERS WE DESERVE, LEADERSWEDESERVE
body:
I’d like to give some of our donors a call so I can personally thank them.
# [](https://act.leaderswedeserve.com/go/852?refcode=em20240427-1&t=1&akid=617%2E587540%2EOGKlHU)
Peter,
_I’m so proud_ of all that we’ve accomplished here at Leaders We Deserve — from electing Nadarius Clark, who killed the bill that would have armed teachers in Virginia, to endorsing a slate of candidates across the country for the 2024 cycle.
**I’d like to give some of our donors a call soon to talk about our priorities this year and tell you how much your support is impacting our work in this election.**
[**If you contribute $5 or ANY AMOUNT, even $1, you’ll have the chance to get a personal thank you call from me. Can we count on your support to reach our $25,000 end-of-month fundraising goal by the April 30 deadline, Peter?**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/lwd-em-20240427-1?refcode=em20240427-1&amount=5&refcode2=617_587540_OGKlHU&akid=617%2E587540%2EOGKlHU)
[](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/lwd-em-20240427-1?refcode=em20240427-1&amount=5&refcode2=617_587540_OGKlHU&akid=617%2E587540%2EOGKlHU)
For the past few weeks, we’ve been on the road supporting some of our endorsed candidates. It’s honestly one of my favorite parts of the work we’re doing together. I love the opportunity to work directly with our candidates, meet their volunteers and help them get organized, and knock on doors to meet voters in their districts.
On top of that, we are providing a sorely needed support system for these small campaigns, many of which do not have large budgets for ads and digital strategy. We provide our expertise to ensure our candidates are running effective races and getting in front of the voters they’ll need to reach in order to win these fights.
**Peter, I’m not exaggerating when I say that we can’t do any of these things without the support of this grassroots team.** Your donations are the fuel for our work electing the next generation of leaders. **You are literally funding the future!**
[**I’m excited to give some of our grassroots supporters a phone call after the April deadline so I can personally thank them. It’s easy to get your name on the list — just donate any amount before the April 30 deadline and I might call you!**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/lwd-em-20240427-1?refcode=em20240427-1&amount=5&refcode2=617_587540_OGKlHU&akid=617%2E587540%2EOGKlHU)
**[Donate $5 »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/lwd-em-20240427-1?amount=5&refcode=em20240427-1-617&refcode2=617_587540_OGKlHU&akid=617%2E587540%2EOGKlHU)**
Thanks for your support — and hope to talk soon!
David
* * *
**[Donate »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/lwd-em-footer?refcode=em20240427-1&t=2&refcode2=617_587540_OGKlHU&akid=617%2E587540%2EOGKlHU)**

clean_body: I’d like to give some of our donors a call so I can personally thank them. Peter, I’m so proud of all that we’ve accomplished here at Leaders We Deserve — from electing Nadarius Clark, who killed the bill that would have armed teachers in Virginia, to endorsing a slate of candidates across the country for the 2024 cycle. I’d like to give some of our donors a call soon to talk about our priorities this year and tell you how much your support is impacting our work in this election. For the past few weeks, we’ve been on the road supporting some of our endorsed candidates. It’s honestly one of my favorite parts of the work we’re doing together. I love the opportunity to work directly with our candidates, meet their volunteers and help them get organized, and knock on doors to meet voters in their districts. On top of that, we are providing a sorely needed support system for these small campaigns, many of which do not have large budgets for ads and digital strategy. We provide our expertise to ensure our candidates are running effective races and getting in front of the voters they’ll need to reach in order to win these fights. Peter, I’m not exaggerating when I say that we can’t do any of these things without the support of this grassroots team. Your donations are the fuel for our work electing the next generation of leaders. You are literally funding the future! Thanks for your support — and hope to talk soon! David

body:
| | |
---
| | Friend, The race for Texas is tighter than ever. Senator Ted Cruz, a steadfast champion of conservative economic principles, is locked in a neck-and-neck battle with Colin Allred.

**The Left is pouring unprecedented funds into Texas, aiming to tip the scales in Allred 's favor, but we must ensure their efforts fail.**

---
[**HELP US DO IT**](http://links.thegopreport.com/u/click?_t=e3c9a4cac7f248a39c2a3d920479a441&_m=ce408e293832483288759f27adc406e8&_e=RZB0g0693L3msRQpBzYn9X4lJZ446W63a648t2FJFZTlAo_X62x5nMss-boki6D-GZfoxwruhFmywbzsH2sDpaf7UIf2C4ZH8KngmwpU9UPo4fZ-BI6Ubc5Up2FX8dncI-xp_KqFFBGuaHd3gVtWUrez9anALyrw6Z3MaUgcpdkvGZTRXChP9HZehuSHytmSCtAzfDABbmz0nW5n_86qFpx44ZZDORv7LCOzve909fG4rWC6_o6AYKqK0OKt2BUxUOKXLJ-3inH87jBS1tHOXng1h1lYG7y-4fWxUw1dY4Hd0sIGDQ5aR4r7mIJvvFw9w-_zkHiUxbol2NIt4tyL67OdceE6ZBrFnDzi9HjRkMH_RUZbsBBvqiy58EHwUKB_9lINUsL6ee8IFqaLgx9tvxqUE5gMAiMgLtUI4WZuRPFU-l4fNgBmafJvIJb22BRb)
---
We cannot underestimate the impact this race will have on our economic future. It's not merely about winning a seat; it's about securing an economy that fosters growth, values entrepreneurship, and upholds fiscal responsibility.
_**Ted Cruz: A Proven Record**_
---
[](http://links.thegopreport.com/u/click?_t=e3c9a4cac7f248a39c2a3d920479a441&_m=ce408e293832483288759f27adc406e8&_e=RZB0g0693L3msRQpBzYn9X4lJZ446W63a648t2FJFZTlAo_X62x5nMss-boki6D-GZfoxwruhFmywbzsH2sDpaf7UIf2C4ZH8KngmwpU9UPo4fZ-BI6Ubc5Up2FX8dncI-xp_KqFFBGuaHd3gVtWUrez9anALyrw6Z3MaUgcpdkvGZTRXChP9HZehuSHytmSCtAzfDABbmz0nW5n_86qFpx44ZZDORv7LCOzve909fG4rWC6_o6AYKqK0OKt2BUxUOKXLJ-3inH87jBS1tHOXiWv3zy0vHrlvTZdMUk3CglCo1yacRs2Ek1q5Zdls4X3tl7cHTkpOKIxfotprzKoTThiRtTTVcH1IyUjVPcM4FhFwk328JhQj_AxnlJEBesv9-QygKvWLKjhpriTwF50iNHpywEQEYSSQI6ymBz__fAPmH5BjojfzfKN_Ay3_I3J)
---
Senator Cruz has long been a bulwark against irresponsible spending and overregulation. With his eye firmly on the horizon, his re-election promises to:

✅**Safeguard our tax cuts** , ensuring you keep more of your hard-earned money.
✅ **Champion small businesses** , reducing bureaucratic hurdles that stifle innovation.
**✅ Stand firm on free-market policies that drive prosperity for every American.**
---
[**SUPPORT TED CRUZ**](http://links.thegopreport.com/u/click?_t=e3c9a4cac7f248a39c2a3d920479a441&_m=ce408e293832483288759f27adc406e8&_e=RZB0g0693L3msRQpBzYn9X4lJZ446W63a648t2FJFZTlAo_X62x5nMss-boki6D-GZfoxwruhFmywbzsH2sDpaf7UIf2C4ZH8KngmwpU9UPo4fZ-BI6Ubc5Up2FX8dncI-xp_KqFFBGuaHd3gVtWUrez9anALyrw6Z3MaUgcpdkvGZTRXChP9HZehuSHytmSCtAzfDABbmz0nW5n_86qFpx44ZZDORv7LCOzve909fG4rWC6_o6AYKqK0OKt2BUxUOKXLJ-3inH87jBS1tHOXvK0s8VJLhmFiVJcl4U5w3U4cuxKsK6jL5PxUCoXlUOfwJJ4sleaIuq-LMIdCF1Besogf2w1KrYIfdNI-kIuZXElBceZzNfW_WrMgfDTc1ilOWs15aDuBSFvMXU9_VB6D_hsTVw7DviaoGB91qL6dX_x4P2gwKBzJ4UA4wOrKtHD)
---
Ted Cruz is a long-time Conservative leader in the Senate and has upheld our shared values for many years.

**He is a Senator Conservative Americans simply can 't afford to lose. If we want to take back control of the Senate, we can only do it by holding the line in Texas.**

**The urgency to act is now.** Your donation can bolster Senator Cruz's campaign, providing the resources needed to combat the financial onslaught from the Left.

clean_body: | | | | | Friend, The race for Texas is tighter than ever. Senator Ted Cruz, a steadfast champion of conservative economic principles, is locked in a neck-and-neck battle with Colin Allred. The Left is pouring unprecedented funds into Texas, aiming to tip the scales in Allred 's favor, but we must ensure their efforts fail. We cannot underestimate the impact this race will have on our economic future. It's not merely about winning a seat; it's about securing an economy that fosters growth, values entrepreneurship, and upholds fiscal responsibility. Ted Cruz: A Proven Record Senator Cruz has long been a bulwark against irresponsible spending and overregulation. With his eye firmly on the horizon, his re-election promises to: ✅Safeguard our tax cuts , ensuring you keep more of your hard-earned money. ✅ Champion small businesses , reducing bureaucratic hurdles that stifle innovation. ✅ Stand firm on free-market policies that drive prosperity for every American. Ted Cruz is a long-time Conservative leader in the Senate and has upheld our shared values for many years. He is a Senator Conservative Americans simply can 't afford to lose. If we want to take back control of the Senate, we can only do it by holding the line in Texas. The urgency to act is now. Your donation can bolster Senator Cruz's campaign, providing the resources needed to combat the financial onslaught from the Left. Fellow patriot,

The Democrats have drastically stepped up their online fundraising in key House and Senate races, **and we're in danger of being overwhelmed.**

It's clear their left-wing donor base is _as motivated as ever_ to stop conservatives from regaining Congress and the White House.

We're falling behind, _**and we MUST step it up**_ if we're going to restore America First leadership to secure our borders, keep us safe, lower inflation, and defend our freedoms & values.

**My request today is a simple one:** [**I'm asking everyone reading this to chip in _just $5_ to help conservatives flip this seat in Ohio and take back the Senate majority.**](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=8d9df239bc4c418096f1b09e20fd45ac&_e=0boAAjrMD32ZqOvMScRNL9gy1NqUW44JrUtixKnnnPkMQkK9Hps8e3EXIOSgt8dmGSraS1aiVIl3bIFnfu2ZC7nlLvHr87h6fYKkyOdweaERAPQR0u-xblijsPwvoaAyflqfcCt7kSuc3XMNbWqboracv9eHeTbzFKNouaKO6kO9VHA_b3O3R6rPvLuReYyoqXPk1CsZ1mmvNrqjV_CNrBs9vziHa0RDU7zLsXp4v-BPolB_gV7pWVXuyumynfLfoUGNrPC3q5FrLGoNQBFDieUi2ExeO0KkmSdQlKnGiP2usO779foqJLjo-1EkJDjM1OVvkvCzzM0rkn2DGJ-YHEJl3WScTaOcxZttuuDzQzysNGJcAAEx1AMmDyswmILiX3x3RlZN3gP-Y-18lPsj5Q%3D%3D)

[**Just $5**](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=8d9df239bc4c418096f1b09e20fd45ac&_e=0boAAjrMD32ZqOvMScRNL9gy1NqUW44JrUtixKnnnPkMQkK9Hps8e3EXIOSgt8dmGSraS1aiVIl3bIFnfu2ZC7nlLvHr87h6fYKkyOdweaERAPQR0u-xblijsPwvoaAyflqfcCt7kSuc3XMNbWqboracv9eHeTbzFKNouaKO6kO9VHA_b3O3R6rPvLuReYyoqXPk1CsZ1mmvNrqjV_CNrBs9vziHa0RDU7zLsXp4v-BPolB_gV7pWVXuyumynfLfoDa6Pl0q0EZ_FjGlbYcOWu2Vetvh0VDtF6eeS9BH9yAeyrZB-og_MYJCQf4yGSQv2rQhwdKzJSJ1z6JO2uYf57YgYQYdE5hkpqFArr6ivSOYw-I7QV4w4dcNyhu47tcjAML3wSqsNofJ0hWb2hG-hA%3D%3D) - there's a lot at stake, and this is all I am asking today.

Bernie Moreno
GOP Nominee for Senate, Ohio

**Meet Bernie Moreno:** | [](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=8d9df239bc4c418096f1b09e20fd45ac&_e=0boAAjrMD32ZqOvMScRNL9gy1NqUW44JrUtixKnnnPkMQkK9Hps8e3EXIOSgt8dmGSraS1aiVIl3bIFnfu2ZC7nlLvHr87h6fYKkyOdweaERAPQR0u-xblijsPwvoaAyflqfcCt7kSuc3XMNbWqboracv9eHeTbzFKNouaKO6kO9VHA_b3O3R6rPvLuReYyoqXPk1CsZ1mmvNrqjV_CNrBs9vziHa0RDU7zLsXp4v-BPolB_gV7pWVXuyumynfLfpmTfDwxCvNbwF6plwvI18a95e3nnk70BSStevq10RAK4qDcw88un88JwI3ymH1fcpfTdtffjjJ543hjF6fN6gPTJaJElPpRowd0HtLCixn-nvUFTUOhISWpec6zwUHrNnNKE-loNkp2OXl1plaKynQ%3D%3D) Bernie Moreno fights for the American Dream because he’s lived it. Bernie was born in Bogota, Colombia. At age five, his American Dream began when he moved to the United States with his family. Bernie became an American citizen at age 18.

Through his relentless work ethic and untamable entrepreneurial spirit, he turned the first car dealership that he purchased in 2005 into one of the largest dealership groups in America.

In 2016, Bernie recognized the value and transformational potential of blockchain technology, before it received mainstream attention, and moved much of his volunteer time and investment dollars into the space. In 2018 he co-founded ChampTitles, which grew to be quite successful as Bernie served as Chairman of the Board.

After a long, successful career, Bernie sold most of his business to begin focusing on his calling: protecting the American dream for another generation.

Solving our country’s problems requires common sense. In Washington, Bernie will fight to shrink government, protect our freedoms, stop the Chinese Communist party from taking our data and land, and always put America First.

Ohioans are done with politicians who talk a big game and do nothing. Bernie wants to go to D.C. to get work done – just like he always has.

clean_body: We're falling behind, and we MUST step it up if we're going to restore America First leadership to secure our borders, keep us safe, lower inflation, and defend our freedoms & values. | Fellow patriot, The Democrats have drastically stepped up their online fundraising in key House and Senate races, and we're in danger of being overwhelmed. It's clear their left-wing donor base is as motivated as ever to stop conservatives from regaining Congress and the White House. We're falling behind, and we MUST step it up if we're going to restore America First leadership to secure our borders, keep us safe, lower inflation, and defend our freedoms & values. My request today is a simple one: If you, fellow patriot , along with everyone else here can do just that today, it would significantly impact our ability to broaden our reach and get passed the Democrats' messaging blockade. - there's a lot at stake, and this is all I am asking today. Thank you, Bernie Moreno GOP Nominee for Senate, Ohio Meet Bernie Moreno: | Bernie Moreno fights for the American Dream because he’s lived it. Bernie was born in Bogota, Colombia. At age five, his American Dream began when he moved to the United States with his family. Bernie became an American citizen at age 18. Through his relentless work ethic and untamable entrepreneurial spirit, he turned the first car dealership that he purchased in 2005 into one of the largest dealership groups in America. In 2016, Bernie recognized the value and transformational potential of blockchain technology, before it received mainstream attention, and moved much of his volunteer time and investment dollars into the space. In 2018 he co-founded ChampTitles, which grew to be quite successful as Bernie served as Chairman of the Board. After a long, successful career, Bernie sold most of his business to begin focusing on his calling: protecting the American dream for another generation. Solving our country’s problems requires common sense. In Washington, Bernie will fight to shrink government, protect our freedoms, stop the Chinese Communist party from taking our data and land, and always put America First. Ohioans are done with politicians who talk a big game and do nothing. Bernie wants to go to D.C. to get work done – just like he always has. FOLLOW BERNIE ON SOCIAL MEDIA | | Paid for by Bernie Moreno for Senate Don't want to receive any more of our emails? We hate to see you go: .

**I 'm Mayra Flores, the America First Hispanic woman running in the biggest race in the nation.**

After we made history and flipped a blue seat red for the first time in 100 years, the Democrats threw the kitchen sink at me, **and I had to concede my race. ** | **Democrat Vicente Gonzalez holds back Republican surge, returns 34th Congressional District to Democratic control.**

Everyone expected me to just walk away - _but I 'm not someone who ever, ever gives up._

I'm taking a leap of faith here and have thrown my name on the ballot once again.

The Democrats overpowered us in this race before - _and now all indicators are pointing toward this election being a complete toss-up._

My stomach is in knots - **the Democrats have already raised an astonishing $30 MILLION, and Biden just raised $80 million bucks**(I know, I can't believe anyone would give him money either...but they do).

**That 's why I'm humbly asking for your help: _[Will you step up and chip in just a few bucks in the next hour to help us counter this massive Left-wing onslaught?](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=fe614a2f003849ffb0720c99104d48ae&_e=hnJze3XhbZX4h5DtbGU-U9XETDtR3rk8sUWvGOCA7AFvfkC_3oG2KCyiu_w5CglSzzUfVF5vUwo6Knt2moMMiF-Mp9luIovgLuRrifoARNqsHPh316C40mvla1omlvg1inJ9nUFsogj5CHs6H8cj5X3q2r4seqvy2yXb5BH42EnyLdNVbe040VSD0_cvgszteeOC56HFgRMDOkghTYTrGZpt7YAvoGKvr1f3unAjjPy2p1gQ7dJL_UwcdUuEBbx82yYHFZvovS3YBUOnQjAh_Z8EC9vPEmpHL1fW3kxs9KHAf6VOXzlsE5gbcdYZUPfKbZaVS67PgzKvoQLWhV_XLqqYD68TcgnTMEbSFtYns7rmhqgt9xiwKofSz-27T-gYvPni-NeMnyzz52Y9pMpJfwwIp1FxjI8z58HYj4W8WrVNzjJ6LOIRRtwwEpEYeAGn "Will you step up and chip in just a few bucks in the next hour to help us counter this massive Left-wing onslaught?")_**

I'll just tell you: I'm afraid to see what happens if this email doesn't work.

**The Democrats & the media hacks are terrified of me - that's because as a young Hispanic female, I obliterate every woke narrative they push. So, they will truly do anything to destroy me.**

The Democrats know that if they lose the Hispanic vote, it's over for them. _Forever._

name: Beto O'Rourke
subject: We need everybody in this fight with us.
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY POWERED BY PEOPLE
body:
[1]Powered By People

When you look at the extremism in our country today — the abortion bans,
the book bans, the voter suppression laws, the attacks on immigrants and
LGBTQ+ Americans — you can’t help but feel like we’re moving backwards in
time.

As Americans who’ve had the fortune of living in the greatest democracy in
human history, it can be easy to take progress for granted. To forget that
no victory is ever final. To forget that we are always becoming a
democracy, and that the fight never ends.

My hope is that we look at the backsliding we’re seeing today and
collectively decide to choose action over despair. That we accept the
responsibility of not only voting in every election, but of putting in the
work to make sure every eligible American does the same.

That’s why we started Powered by People four years ago — to bring Texans
together toward the common goal of registering and organizing the voters
we need to elect good, moral leaders who will keep us on the path toward
freedom and democracy.

Ask any one of our volunteers and they’ll admit that the work can be
exhausting, daunting, even brutal. But they know that if we don’t do the
work now, if we lose the fight to Trump and Trumpism, this might be
America’s last free and fair election.

We need everybody in this fight with us. No matter where you live in
Texas, or even if you live out of state, you have a place on this team:

* If you’re a Texas resident, you can help us register voters in person
by becoming a Volunteer Deputy Registrar. [ https://act.betoorourke.com/go/63424?t=1001&akid=239569%2E444211%2E7Zbt3j ]Sign up here for a short,
virtual training, and then we’ll connect you with volunteer
opportunities in your area.

* If you live out of state, you can join our Texting Team to help us
organize Texas voters and volunteers. [ https://act.betoorourke.com/signup/texting-team/?source=em20240427&t=1002&akid=239569%2E444211%2E7Zbt3j ]Sign up here, and then we’ll
follow up with instructions on how to join one of our upcoming text
banks.

* [ https://act.betoorourke.com/go/63425?refcode=ema20240427-239569&t=1003&akid=239569%2E444211%2E7Zbt3j ]Otherwise, I hope you’ll make a contribution to help us keep up the
fight. Every dollar you donate goes toward registering and turning out
voters across Texas.

We can’t do this without you. I hope you will continue to volunteer and
continue to contribute to keep this work going. It’s going to take all of
us.

— Beto

PAID FOR BY POWERED BY PEOPLE
clean_body: [1]Powered By People When you look at the extremism in our country today — the abortion bans, the book bans, the voter suppression laws, the attacks on immigrants and LGBTQ+ Americans — you can’t help but feel like we’re moving backwards in time. As Americans who’ve had the fortune of living in the greatest democracy in human history, it can be easy to take progress for granted. To forget that no victory is ever final. To forget that we are always becoming a democracy, and that the fight never ends. My hope is that we look at the backsliding we’re seeing today and collectively decide to choose action over despair. That we accept the responsibility of not only voting in every election, but of putting in the work to make sure every eligible American does the same. That’s why we started Powered by People four years ago — to bring Texans together toward the common goal of registering and organizing the voters we need to elect good, moral leaders who will keep us on the path toward freedom and democracy. Ask any one of our volunteers and they’ll admit that the work can be exhausting, daunting, even brutal. But they know that if we don’t do the work now, if we lose the fight to Trump and Trumpism, this might be America’s last free and fair election. We need everybody in this fight with us. No matter where you live in Texas, or even if you live out of state, you have a place on this team: If you’re a Texas resident, you can help us register voters in person by becoming a Volunteer Deputy Registrar. [ ]Sign up here for a short, virtual training, and then we’ll connect you with volunteer opportunities in your area. If you live out of state, you can join our Texting Team to help us organize Texas voters and volunteers. [ ]Sign up here, and then we’ll follow up with instructions on how to join one of our upcoming text banks. * [ ]Otherwise, I hope you’ll make a contribution to help us keep up the fight. Every dollar you donate goes toward registering and turning out voters across Texas. We can’t do this without you. I hope you will continue to volunteer and continue to contribute to keep this work going. It’s going to take all of us. — Beto

But on this campaign, we do things differently. A big part of our budget for everything from TV ads to office space comes from folks just giving what they can when they read emails just like this from Andrea and members of our team. **In fact, we ran the numbers, and the average contribution to our campaign off of emails over the last month has been just $37.46.** That’s what it means to run a grassroots campaign. And the truth is, this is one of the most competitive races in the country, and one of the most important for determining whether Democrats succeed in retaking the House. **$37.46 is the average donation we get from folks who read these emails and choose to make a contribution —[ _but honestly, any amount you can give, no matter how small, will meaningfully improve our odds of re-electing Andrea, keeping this seat in Democratic hands, and retaking the House of Representatives._](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/83839677/469680455/-554069173?refcode=email_042624_Average&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85Mzg4OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxMWQwZTIzNS1iNjA0LWVmMTEtOTZmMy03YzFlNTIxYjA3ZjkiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=6iUNKfYJK2jp6eaXbrDwN_KJbFWp5sk5g6vQeaUInl8=)**

subject: More than a year since we launched our campaign.

body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/oneyearsincelaunch?refcode=X_042724_oneyearanniversary [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/oneyearsincelaunch?refcode=X_042724_oneyearanniversary]
Hi Peter,
We can’t believe it, but we recently marked our one-year anniversary since we launched our campaign for Arizona’s 3rd Congressional District. Time indeed does fly when you are having fun! But here’s the catch: that means Election Day is closer than ever! With only a few months to go, will you pitch in $20 and join our coalition to win? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/oneyearsincelaunch?refcode=X_042724_oneyearanniversary&amount=20]
We launched our campaign with a simple yet powerful message: There is no problem too big we can’t solve by organizing and working together.
From helping defeat Russell Pearce and SB 1070, the notorious ‘show me your papers law,’ ousting Joe Arpaio from office, and flipping Arizona blue in 2020 and 2022 to keeping MAGA extremists out of power, we have proven time and time again that when we come together as a coalition, we can accomplish anything.
We wish we could say it’s all downhill from here, but it’s only going to get harder. That’s why we were hoping you could contribute $20 or whatever you can afford to fuel our campaign through November: [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/oneyearsincelaunch?refcode=X_042724_oneyearanniversary&amount=20]
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/oneyearsincelaunch?refcode=X_042724_oneyearanniversary [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/oneyearsincelaunch?refcode=X_042724_oneyearanniversary]
Check out our launch video!
We know Arizona is facing some big challenges: our housing prices are out of control, our reproductive freedoms are under attack, our democracy is in jeopardy, the super-wealthy continue to rig the system against our working families, and we desperately need comprehensive immigration reform.
That’s why we’re supporting Raquel Terán for Congress: to tackle these challenges head-on. To get there, we’re going to need you on board. Contribute $20 or whatever you can to celebrate our one-year anniversary and double down on the hard work we have ahead >> [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/oneyearsincelaunch?refcode=X_042724_oneyearanniversary&amount=20]
Todos con las manos en la masa,
Team Terán
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/oneyearsincelaunch?refcode=X_042724_oneyearanniversary [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/oneyearsincelaunch?refcode=X_042724_oneyearanniversary] Raquel Terán is running to represent Arizona's 3rd Congressional District as the first Latina congresswoman from Arizona.
For nearly 20 years, she's been fighting for higher wages for workers, healthcare for all, and better schools for our children.
She's helped build broad and diverse coalitions that have beaten Republicans like Donald Trump, Joe Arpaio, and Kari Lake.
Now she's ready to take the fight to Congress, but we'll need your support to win. Chip in today! [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/oneyearsincelaunch?refcode=X_042724_oneyearanniversary]

# FROM THE DESK OF ALAN DERSHOWITZ
---
| | Dear Peter, In over sixty years in the legal profession, I've experienced first hand the impact of both good journalism and bad journalism — mostly the latter — and just how important and rare it is to get things right.

**In today's media landscape there are far too many publications that get things wrong.** Many are more concerned with the political implications of a story than the basic facts.

**The New York Sun is different.** It's a paper that places principle over politics and people over party.

Its in-depth coverage of the legal challenges faced by President Trump serve as a case in point.

When I defended President Trump during his first impeachment, I faced an avalanche of criticism, but few papers made sufficient effort to fully appreciate the significance of the legal arguments.

The Sun's deeply knowledgeable leadership, including its editor Seth Lipsky and associate editor A.R. Hoffman are themselves students of the Constitution. It shows in their coverage, which I find to be first rate.

It will be no secret to you that I don't agree with everything that can be found in the Sun's pages, but I can say with confidence that its re-emergence is among the most important recent developments in American journalism.

I've been impressed by the Sun's growth so far, but I know it faces an uphill battle, one that I have pledged to join.

**The Sun's success will be a gift to the American people and to the cause of truth.** But to succeed, we need you to join us. I highly encourage you to join the Sun today.

Every person matters in this effort.

Don't wait. The battle to restore American journalism starts now.
---

subject: A Personal Message from Bobby & Updated Events!

body:
Why didn’t I choose a political insider to be my VP?

|

| | | [](https://www.kennedy24.com/donate?e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=weekly_newsletter_4_26_24_a4&n=1)

Upcoming Events: Join Us for a Memorable Experience!
[Long Island, New York](https://www.kennedy24.com/long-island-ny-voter-rally?e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=weekly_newsletter_4_26_24_a4&n=2) \- Sunday, April 28th at 1:30 PM
Join Robert F. Kennedy Jr. for a voter rally at Villa Lombardi’s and take part in history to collect more than 45,000 signatures in six weeks, something no other independent candidate has achieved within that time span.
[Melville, New York](https://www.kennedy24.com/melville-reception?e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=weekly_newsletter_4_26_24_a4&n=3) \- Sunday, April 28th at 6:30 PM
Be a part of an exclusive evening that will spark inspiration and bolster Robert's presidential bid. This is your moment to join a visionary leader—don't let it pass by. You simply must be there!
[Boston, Massachusetts](https://www.kennedy24.com/boston-reception?e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=weekly_newsletter_4_26_24_a4&n=4) \- Monday, April 29th at 6:30 PM
We’re proud to host a special event at the Park Plaza Hotel, where RFK Jr. first announced his historic candidacy nearly one year ago. Joining Bobby will be Cheryl Hines along with Jenny McCarthy and Donnie Wahlberg.
[Nashville, Tennessee](https://www.kennedy24.com/country-and-comedy-nashville?e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=weekly_newsletter_4_26_24_a4&n=5) \- Wednesday, May 15th at 7:00 PM
Our third “Night of Laughter with RFK Jr.” will include Nicole Shanahan and feature comic legends Rob Schneider and Jim Breuer along with musical performances by Kayley Biship, John Carter Cash, and Ana Christina Cash.
[Castle Rock, Colorado](https://www.kennedy24.com/castlerock-reception?e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=weekly_newsletter_4_26_24_a4&n=6) \- Saturday May 18th at 6:30 PM
Join us for an intimate reception with Robert F. Kennedy, Jr. in the serene setting of Castle Rock, CO, where you'll enjoy an evening of engaging conversation, delightful hors d'oeuvres, and cocktails.
[Aurora, Colorado](https://www.kennedy24.com/denver-co-voter-rally?e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=weekly_newsletter_4_26_24_a4&n=7) \- Sunday May 19th at 3:00 PM
Catch RFK Jr. in Denver on May 19th for a dynamic rally at The Hangar at Stanley Marketplace. He'll share his vision to rebuild the middle class and curtail corporate power, aiming for a spot on ballots nationwide.
[Santa Monica, California](https://www.kennedy24.com/santa-monica-reception?e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=weekly_newsletter_4_26_24_a4&n=8) \- Sunday, June 2nd at 6:00 PM
Join us for an exclusive reception with Robert F. Kennedy Jr. and Cheryl Hines at a private venue in beautiful Santa Monica. Enjoy an evening of hors d’oeuvres, cocktails, a fireside chat, and a unique photo opportunity.
[Edmonds, Washington](https://www.kennedy24.com/edmonds-reception?e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=weekly_newsletter_4_26_24_a4&n=9) \- Sunday, June 9th at 4:00 PM
Experience an evening of elegance with Robert F. Kennedy, Jr. at a stunning waterfront venue. This exclusive fundraiser offers a fireside chat, a Q&A session, and gourmet hors d'oeuvres and cocktails.
* * *
[](https://www.kennedy24.com/ziplining-sweepstakes?e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=weekly_newsletter_4_26_24_a4&n=10)
* * *
RFK Jr.: Together We Bring America Back To The People
Why didn’t I choose a political insider to be my VP?
_Because those insiders are the architects of our current crises_ : a staggering $34 trillion national debt, a rampant chronic disease epidemic, pervasive corporate dominance over our key industries, and numerous other challenges.
My running mate, Nicole Shanahan, is a brilliant and incisive thinker whose fresh perspective and expertise embody the transformative leadership America so desperately needs today.
Nicole and I are committed to fundamentally reshaping the way our government operates, to return it to its rightful owners: you, the American people.
**But to implement our vision of genuine change, we need your support.**
[Every donation means we’re one step closer to dismantling the status quo and reclaiming a government that truly serves its citizens.](https://www.kennedy24.com/donate?e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=weekly_newsletter_4_26_24_a4&n=11)
