clean_body: Why didn’t I choose a political insider to be my VP? | | | | | Upcoming Events: Join Us for a Memorable Experience! \- Sunday, April 28th at 1:30 PM Join Robert F. Kennedy Jr. for a voter rally at Villa Lombardi’s and take part in history to collect more than 45,000 signatures in six weeks, something no other independent candidate has achieved within that time span. \- Sunday, April 28th at 6:30 PM Be a part of an exclusive evening that will spark inspiration and bolster Robert's presidential bid. This is your moment to join a visionary leader—don't let it pass by. You simply must be there! \- Monday, April 29th at 6:30 PM We’re proud to host a special event at the Park Plaza Hotel, where RFK Jr. first announced his historic candidacy nearly one year ago. Joining Bobby will be Cheryl Hines along with Jenny McCarthy and Donnie Wahlberg. \- Wednesday, May 15th at 7:00 PM Our third “Night of Laughter with RFK Jr.” will include Nicole Shanahan and feature comic legends Rob Schneider and Jim Breuer along with musical performances by Kayley Biship, John Carter Cash, and Ana Christina Cash. \- Saturday May 18th at 6:30 PM Join us for an intimate reception with Robert F. Kennedy, Jr. in the serene setting of Castle Rock, CO, where you'll enjoy an evening of engaging conversation, delightful hors d'oeuvres, and cocktails. \- Sunday May 19th at 3:00 PM Catch RFK Jr. in Denver on May 19th for a dynamic rally at The Hangar at Stanley Marketplace. He'll share his vision to rebuild the middle class and curtail corporate power, aiming for a spot on ballots nationwide. \- Sunday, June 2nd at 6:00 PM Join us for an exclusive reception with Robert F. Kennedy Jr. and Cheryl Hines at a private venue in beautiful Santa Monica. Enjoy an evening of hors d’oeuvres, cocktails, a fireside chat, and a unique photo opportunity. \- Sunday, June 9th at 4:00 PM Experience an evening of elegance with Robert F. Kennedy, Jr. at a stunning waterfront venue. This exclusive fundraiser offers a fireside chat, a Q&A session, and gourmet hors d'oeuvres and cocktails. RFK Jr.: Together We Bring America Back To The People Why didn’t I choose a political insider to be my VP? Because those insiders are the architects of our current crises : a staggering $34 trillion national debt, a rampant chronic disease epidemic, pervasive corporate dominance over our key industries, and numerous other challenges. My running mate, Nicole Shanahan, is a brilliant and incisive thinker whose fresh perspective and expertise embody the transformative leadership America so desperately needs today. Nicole and I are committed to fundamentally reshaping the way our government operates, to return it to its rightful owners: you, the American people. But to implement our vision of genuine change, we need your support. | | Discover our latest , suitable for any occasion. Delve into the unique appeal of limited edition items that reflect the essence of this historic campaign. Immerse yourself in the spirit of change and progress, and join a movement that holds the power to shape the future. Thank you for your continued support. Every dollar you give moves us one step closer to the White House. | * | to put a Kennedy back in the White House — Elect Robert F. Kennedy, Jr. as President to unite America in 2024! Make sure to join us on Social Media to help spread our campaign's message and put Robert F. Kennedy, Jr. in the White House! | | PAID FOR BY TEAM KENNEDY Would you like help donating? name: Phil Lyman
subject: You know me from this
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Lyman for Utah
body:
But this is how my community knows me.
|
---

Fellow Patriot,

**_You know me from ..._**

[ ](http://links.gopmembership.com/u/click?_t=e3c9a4cac7f248a39c2a3d920479a441&_m=77eb6fb159e34d1fb1871cd24e809bdc&_e=eBL4RgJnJJCdQoVeWvZUPDYp02qwIdbfkcBrkUmAukChep6vsn0rjE3WpDZIKLFWC814VuDiq7ApRBVg42yB_5HwqEdXir2JXv0A_FsFGQFjyI48CoPzR6B704AswDBftK3TRPqNedOhAlTWTrZwD2uHaDsqPCXaVmV4n2ZgV464f7fc1fpcEGwnK_9h-DugLvAn9Fjpmnh3wBCE9psVc5qUG85sj9uvCicbgPc61k2oW6kBrBC5f4I4sQOfXxyJVDJKstb60zYwUAWNrDcSIeHxSDnDlr31LZNHOroBMvk-lNYoWBmVOYz-ZY7uB5sHO7v9Eb8UGzatkRMcPDQsNlYR38DXSvZObszovrt5kzqo8OVlDheTTl-1A7tFNmA7)
**_... When President Trump pardoned me after the Federal Government abused its power and attacked me for standing up for Utah._**

But this is how my community knows me...

[ ](http://links.gopmembership.com/u/click?_t=e3c9a4cac7f248a39c2a3d920479a441&_m=77eb6fb159e34d1fb1871cd24e809bdc&_e=eBL4RgJnJJCdQoVeWvZUPDYp02qwIdbfkcBrkUmAukChep6vsn0rjE3WpDZIKLFWC814VuDiq7ApRBVg42yB_5HwqEdXir2JXv0A_FsFGQFjyI48CoPzR6B704AswDBftK3TRPqNedOhAlTWTrZwD2uHaDsqPCXaVmV4n2ZgV464f7fc1fpcEGwnK_9h-DugLvAn9Fjpmnh3wBCE9psVc5qUG85sj9uvCicbgPc61k01IBE3hYLwK2jO9NqkjArjfVqLN90qoxIVGhNPfeqsys2j1wQjbKjcr8QMr3_R-jOoEi9ghm5vcBiXt836Q4n2Ds3S4yOr-2zselEcf-jXhWph_4Ljc3oPIG2wChL1pV9bhJtXm2HD75tTXiDwp9RE)
I'm Phil Lyman, a fifth-generation Utahn who's been well-known throughout my community as a fearless leader who stands up to the Deep State. I'm also a loving husband, caring dad and grandpa, a member of the Utah State Legislature, and a CPA.

**[I'm humbly asking for your support now.](http://links.gopmembership.com/u/click?_t=e3c9a4cac7f248a39c2a3d920479a441&_m=77eb6fb159e34d1fb1871cd24e809bdc&_e=eBL4RgJnJJCdQoVeWvZUPDYp02qwIdbfkcBrkUmAukChep6vsn0rjE3WpDZIKLFWC814VuDiq7ApRBVg42yB_5HwqEdXir2JXv0A_FsFGQFjyI48CoPzR6B704AswDBftK3TRPqNedOhAlTWTrZwD2uHaDsqPCXaVmV4n2ZgV464f7fc1fpcEGwnK_9h-DugLvAn9Fjpmnh3wBCE9psVc5qUG85sj9uvCicbgPc61k0ta8jm4C_VXFIX_PB8IwzP2yqCJOy1Jq_fWWRDHK2VLHZwE-t5OSjnK0xboIIJfs5xaUVliGj-suVU5CbEdg8PAb1sI2ONwKWNhy2BawDVMjBaCZbDovpSoi06q_KR4HfSxPAOf1k75W421yNvXRaG)**

_President Trump pardoned me for a reason_ - America needs more patriots who are willing to stand up to the Deep State for what is right.

**That 's why I'm running for governor - because Utah's current governor would rather make a toast to our surrender with President Biden than fight to bring conservative values back to our great state. **

As Governor, I will not surrender to the woke mob, and I will defy the implementation of "progressive" policies and agreements that are designed to appear as though they are making Utah better.

I have the resume for success, I have the guts to fight, and I have the right intentions. All I need now is your support.

**[Will you chip in $10 or more to my campaign?](http://links.gopmembership.com/u/click?_t=e3c9a4cac7f248a39c2a3d920479a441&_m=77eb6fb159e34d1fb1871cd24e809bdc&_e=eBL4RgJnJJCdQoVeWvZUPDYp02qwIdbfkcBrkUmAukChep6vsn0rjE3WpDZIKLFWC814VuDiq7ApRBVg42yB_5HwqEdXir2JXv0A_FsFGQFjyI48CoPzR6B704AswDBftK3TRPqNedOhAlTWTrZwD2uHaDsqPCXaVmV4n2ZgV464f7fc1fpcEGwnK_9h-DugLvAn9Fjpmnh3wBCE9psVc5qUG85sj9uvCicbgPc61k0Gcr1CPA0ICeobFbUCijYgc1cdWuq8R5HKCGQ-S61kP2w8yEolZ_DOtv8LPxerk-9W7G0I3wkrpgurHyxkiP4p3k2YDEzN-U-elNmVxpzeTatgQbRD0aNCcEIn5ADlXeTWEPXCKGDLTnrbmoExXWzm)**

[](http://links.gopmembership.com/u/click?_t=e3c9a4cac7f248a39c2a3d920479a441&_m=77eb6fb159e34d1fb1871cd24e809bdc&_e=eBL4RgJnJJCdQoVeWvZUPDYp02qwIdbfkcBrkUmAukChep6vsn0rjE3WpDZIKLFWC814VuDiq7ApRBVg42yB_5HwqEdXir2JXv0A_FsFGQFjyI48CoPzR6B704AswDBftK3TRPqNedOhAlTWTrZwD2uHaDsqPCXaVmV4n2ZgV464f7fc1fpcEGwnK_9h-DugLvAn9Fjpmnh3wBCE9psVc5qUG85sj9uvCicbgPc61k32RNBCRn-QOTnNL5l1Iy02f4BCE6oD2-w9dqWl2_QnldvsZe_b8w05n1eQyyfw9gchxC6te74QniSAIV6_LXAte3YdIRJwrt-wNMI7wRgr9MwMOQCx0rPnnctNJohEj7kDty8uKmjrcicuEQZWz-wr)

Phil Lyman

| **Elizabeth Warren refuses to back down in the fight to protect our democracy:** []() We’re launching another URGENT ad campaign to abolish the Electoral College and protect our Democracy.

[**Listen, we need $3,941 by midnight on Monday to make our first payment on the next round of ads. If we can’t keep our ads running, the Electoral College will hand the GOP another Trump presidency! Chip in $7 now »**](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/42574?t=7&akid=21326%2E4449941%2EKng3Oq) | [Please, CHIP IN $7 TO FUND OUR ADS AND SUPPORT OUR WORK »](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/42574?t=8&akid=21326%2E4449941%2EKng3Oq)
---
Look, Elizabeth Warren is 100% right — **_every vote does matter!_**

The Electoral College has handed Republicans the presidency TWO times since 1988 despite the fact that they’ve only won the popular vote ONCE since then.

The Electoral College is a scam that makes YOUR vote worth less – _it’s SO UNFAIR and COMPLETELY undemocratic!!_

**That’s why we’re rushing to raise $3,941 to make our next ad payment by midnight on Monday and keep our ads running!**
[**Please, our proven effective ads are the best way to spread the word about the dangers of the Electoral College. Please, chip in $7 now to help fund our ads and support our work »**](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/42574?t=9&akid=21326%2E4449941%2EKng3Oq)

name: Team Morse
subject: To our supporters:
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jessica Morse for Congress
body:
Folks from every generation, every walk of life coming together to elect Jessica!

| | [](http://go.sparkpostmail1.com/f/a/JUMYVNl6Jc1syDft9QT9kw~~/AAUS1gA~~) It makes us so proud to see so many of our volunteers out in huge numbers across the district! We’re hosting canvass launches every weekend, and they’re bringing together Gen Z to retirees and everyone in between to support Jessica. It’s because they know what’s at stake in this election, not just for us, but for the country. As one of the most important swing districts in California, we have a real opportunity to flip a red district 💙 **BLUE 💙 **and chip away at the GOP’s control of the House of Representatives. **And we have a chance to push out an anti-abortion extremist and elect Jessica, who pledges to vote to enshrine**** _Roe v. Wade_****as the law of the land permanently.** But to win, we’ll need more than just volunteers. Our campaign is growing every day, and we need to make sure we have the resources to execute our campaign plan, from running ads to buying signs, and everything in between, our campaign is funded directly by YOU. [**So, with just four days left in April and $3,392 left to raise, can we count on you to chip in whatever you can?**](http://go.sparkpostmail1.com/f/a/C6zNpsWFWPITWw7FUZlyEQ~~/AAUS1gA~~) | | [DONATE $10 »](http://go.sparkpostmail1.com/f/a/iXdIgsnjRSiXV-jHBGPAig~~/AAUS1gA~~)

It’s because they know what’s at stake in this election, not just for us, but for the country. As one of the most important swing districts in California, we have a real opportunity to flip a red district 💙 BLUE 💙 and chip away at the GOP’s control of the House of Representatives. And we have a chance to push out an anti-abortion extremist and elect Jessica, who pledges to vote to enshrine Roe v. Wadeas the law of the land permanently. But to win, we’ll need more than just volunteers. Our campaign is growing every day, and we need to make sure we have the resources to execute our campaign plan, from running ads to buying signs, and everything in between, our campaign is funded directly by YOU. ~ | | ~ ~ ~ ~ Thank you so much!! — Team Morse | | | ~~ ---|---|--- Email is one of the most important ways we communicate with our supporters, but if you'd like, you can opt to get just the most important~! _ | Paid for by Jessica Morse for Congress. Jessica Morse for Congress1079 Sunrise AveSuite B 275Roseville, CA 95661United States "Website"

name: Kirsten Gillibrand
subject: We can win again in 2024.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Gillibrand for Senate
body:
big change starts small
| | |
---
Look, big change starts small.
That's a lesson that my grandmother, Polly Noonan, first taught me decades ago. Well before most women had any political power, my grandmother organized women into a political force in Albany.
By the time I was in elementary school, I was tagging along with her to all kinds of Democratic campaign headquarters, rallies and events. She remains one of my biggest role models — and I carry her wisdom with me to this day. **She taught me that my voice matters, that women’s voices matter and that grassroots activism matters. And she showed me how campaigns are won by the people who put in the work like the volunteers knocking doors, stuffing envelopes, turning out the vote and donating what they can, when they can.**
For decades, first by my grandmother's side and then as a public servant myself, I've seen how those small grassroots actions all add up to victory on Election Day. That's how Democrats defeated the odds in 2022 to defend and even expand our Senate majority. And that's why I know that we can win again in 2024.
With Democrats defending 23 seats, the odds are certainly stacked against us. And after the 2022 red wave in New York, Republicans here are already targeting my seat for defeat. **But when people like you get off the sidelines and chip in even just $3, eventually we'll build a grassroots movement capable of defeating even the GOP's wealthiest megadonors.**
**[So please, will you chip in $3 or $25 or whatever you can spare today to help save our Senate majority by building a grassroots movement one grassroots gift at a time? I refuse to accept money from corporate PACs, so these grassroots donations are truly critical to my campaign.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/83842886/469688081/-1789327584?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk4993-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTkvMS83MjcyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxZDI0NDE1Yy1iYTA0LWVmMTEtOTZmMy03YzFlNTIxYjA3ZjkiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=P8Rfl8-lNAzQWTPaApq__7_EGRLhok3UUQ7TjRg3arA=)**

Kirsten

* * *
| [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/83842928/469688198/1575385346?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk4993-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTkvMS83MjcyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxZDI0NDE1Yy1iYTA0LWVmMTEtOTZmMy03YzFlNTIxYjA3ZjkiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=P8Rfl8-lNAzQWTPaApq__7_EGRLhok3UUQ7TjRg3arA=) A note from Kirsten: Friend, I can’t thank you enough for standing by my side in the critical fights ahead of us. As Democrats face our toughest Senate map in decades, I need your help more than ever. While Republicans only have to defend 10 seats in 2024, Democrats have to defend 23 — and if the GOP flips just two of them, it will deliver Senate control back to Mitch McConnell. Now, experts at FiveThirtyEight are saying that the GOP has a clear path to the majority. As right-wing special interests gear up to pour millions into flipping the Senate, we need to fight back right now. But I refuse to take a single cent from corporate PACs, which means I’m relying on your grassroots support. [**So please, chip in to help defend our narrow Democratic Senate majority.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/83842934/469688209/1575385346?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk4993-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTkvMS83MjcyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxZDI0NDE1Yy1iYTA0LWVmMTEtOTZmMy03YzFlNTIxYjA3ZjkiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=P8Rfl8-lNAzQWTPaApq__7_EGRLhok3UUQ7TjRg3arA=) And if you’d like to become a core member of my team and receive exclusive texts from my campaign, [**text JOIN to 60708.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/83842944/469688218/1575385346?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk4993-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTkvMS83MjcyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxZDI0NDE1Yy1iYTA0LWVmMTEtOTZmMy03YzFlNTIxYjA3ZjkiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=P8Rfl8-lNAzQWTPaApq__7_EGRLhok3UUQ7TjRg3arA=) Thank you, Kirsten Gillibrand

* * *

[](https://an.collectivepac.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfqtMtM9o7MpfQTM1SqECAoa9PnuvrCzoBy5DfIGWsplANbnjpBAv4hJoqiZg5D3GXPprL6WkD_BaNRU-DO81I8uLhNM_SBB1_hZyITMMekJg7apTHC7EgZF2jmIQ-mbXEpnTtabvEHwv4pfDA5GG86JFY656CWsRxTCseTlD7SW32rpD29eB3-bsh8HEZsXBXnK6BFLHmk1fNO-c1bAmnDD4h99LsToRm3x4dXTLudnbsTWAS0Djt9Rl2ZZU2CrOFAoBZs3bNRm2eB9yndItusWWf8p7IO2jIwumdKaaN9LUjlcNJ2e-kkZnOMvfcWjGA8SOJF4YVKFN4V02q_Jy-zn1ZssmOwn1FTj5Ean7-Kz74iLqUt80kJcKTNTw02YLLxSdo-XwCDjLRSDXMzVxdcJZJGl0VlRhP_W60leQ-sA9tQ/45v/Vf8WPXOJT-aHc4oXjVZkEA/h4/h001.Gj4EyH8KCJGuZHELaRO8LOo1xilgTvWvneT8tCnh0Rk) The Collective PAC is strategically focused on creating a truly equitable democracy where our nation’s local, state and federal governments have diverse and talented elected leadership and Black people are fully represented in positions of power to create the policies necessary to progress our communities forward. | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/83843432/469689332/1636625507?refcode=em-header&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDM1MzYiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMGU4MDA4N2EtYmIwNC1lZjExLTk2ZjMtN2MxZTUyMWIwN2Y5IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=hAr-gKkNxiIT5sxWZFOTx-dkJQBrO9dH11m9iamNbXk=) Friend, California and the country are facing many unique challenges -- from the dismantling of abortion rights, to the housing affordability crisis, to right-wing attacks on our democracy. I’m running to tackle these issues head-on, and I’m proud that so many are joining our campaign. Having a Democratic majority in Congress next year will make all the difference in being able to deliver results on these issues. **And I can’t think of many people who I trust to help get things done more than my friend Rudy Salas.** Rudy is running for Congress in CA-22 -- a critical Central Valley district that could decide whether or not Democrats win the majority in November. _Rudy’s race will be one of the most competitive House contests in the entire country, and he needs our support to get across the finish line._ [**Ahead of our end-of-month fundraising deadline, would you split a donation between myself and Rudy Salas? I’ve worked with Rudy for years in the Assembly, and I know he will fight to lower prescription drug prices, protect social security and medicare, defend the Affordable Care Act, and restore the protections of _Roe v. Wade._
But as his race heats up, he’s going to need our support against the super PAC spending we know is headed his way.
[**Democrats need FOUR seats to flip the House and deliver for our most vulnerable. I know Rudy has what it takes to be the race that swings the balance. clean_body: | = Friend, California and the country are facing many unique challenges -- from the dismantling of abortion rights, to the housing affordability crisis, to right-wing attacks on our democracy. I’m running to tackle these issues head-on, and I’m proud that so many are joining our campaign. Having a Democratic majority in Congress next year will make all the difference in being able to deliver results on these issues. And I can’t think of many people who I trust to help get things done more than my friend Rudy Salas. Rudy is running for Congress in CA-22 -- a critical Central Valley district that could decide whether or not Democrats win the majority in November. Rudy’s race will be one of the most competitive House contests in the entire country, and he needs our support to get across the finish line. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your split donation to Laura Friedman and Rudy Salas will go through immediately: | **= | = ---|--- = | = = | = I’ve worked with Rudy for years in the Assembly, and I know he will fight to lower prescription drug prices, protect social security and medicare, defend the Affordable Care Act, and restore the protections of Roe v. Wade. But as his race heats up, he’s going to need our support against the super PAC spending we know is headed his way. = Thank you, Laura =** | | Paid for by Laura Friedman for Congress Laura's campaign doesn't take a dime from corporate PACs and completely relies on grassroots supporters like you! To chip in to Laura's campaign = To learn more about Laura's progressive record of supporting our working families, please visit: We'd hate to see you go, but you can click here if you'd like to . I refuse to accept that feeling of helplessness.

| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/83843747/469689991/-1503676179?refcode=BLU_EM_HFFC_2024-04-27_1&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjQvMS8xMDA1NzQiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMTVjM2FhZTUtYmIwNC1lZjExLTk2ZjMtN2MxZTUyMWIwN2Y5IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=ke128dRI61yCrncMkmlq8btujG9lgbdYp02ZP2Wz3oo=)
---
| Peter,

A few months ago, I received a text from my sons’ university informing me they were in lockdown because there was an active shooter on the grounds.

_Sadly, it wasn’t the first time I had received this text._ The layers of emotions hit you all at once: panic, fear, and then the absolute sense of helplessness—that there is nothing you can do to protect them as you once could when they are thousands of miles away or even if they are just a mile away.

For too long, throughout our country, too many of our children have to experience school lockdowns, and too many of us have lost a loved one to gun violence.

As a mother, I refuse to accept that feeling of helplessness. As a leader, I refuse to accept inaction from policymakers when it comes to preventing gun violence. Our children deserve more from us.

_**That’s why I couldn’t be more honored to be recently named a Moms Demand Action Gun Sense Candidate, making me the only gun sense candidate in the race for Washington’s 6th Congressional District.**_
---
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/83843748/469689992/-1503676179?refcode=BLU_EM_HFFC_2024-04-27_1&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjQvMS8xMDA1NzQiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMTVjM2FhZTUtYmIwNC1lZjExLTk2ZjMtN2MxZTUyMWIwN2Y5IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=ke128dRI61yCrncMkmlq8btujG9lgbdYp02ZP2Wz3oo=)
In Congress, I will work to strengthen background checks and fund community violence prevention programs. As a mom, I know that we don’t have to choose between responsible gun ownership and keeping our communities safe.

_**[With our critical end-of-month goal coming up on Tuesday, can I count on you to chip in $5 or whatever you can afford? clean_body: Honored and grateful | Friend, I am honored and grateful to have the complete and total endorsement of President Trump. It is officially convention day, and we have to ride the momentum to win. President Trump needs MAGA reinforcements in the US Senate and that is what I hope to bring. I am fighting to defeat the establishment and drain the swamp. I jumped into this race to defeat the RINO Mitt Romney. We need leadership in the US Senate that will put America First and support Trump’s agenda. As your next US Senator, I promise to Create Jobs, Stop Inflation, Grow the Economy, and Secure the Border. With a MAGA Senate majority, we will Unleash American Energy, Support our Military/Vets, and Protect our always-under-siege Second Amendment. Again, thank you, President Trump, for the endorsement. I look forward to winning in November and working alongside you to Make America Great AGAIN. | Let’s do this. Trent Staggs Paid for by Trent Staggs for Utah Copyright (C) 2024 Trent Staggs for Utah, All rights reserved.

Fellow patriot,

The Democrats have drastically stepped up their online fundraising in key House and Senate races, **and we're in danger of being overwhelmed.**

It's clear their left-wing donor base is _as motivated as ever_ to stop conservatives from regaining Congress and the White House.

We're falling behind, _**and we MUST step it up**_ if we're going to restore America First leadership to secure our borders, keep us safe, lower inflation, and defend our freedoms & values.

**My request today is a simple one:** [**I'm asking everyone reading this to chip in _just $5_ to help conservatives flip this seat in Ohio and take back the Senate majority.**](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=767270531de64d4cb7da6e089e158207&_e=5z7KWA7aCfcGSLBVMzBxc3M2JjPiSKjCSozQ_Fr1uRKh7BibKApBnaJpF8DAasnY05AtGjIpciBb1eHwdhuQDI36k_itu4No6acpWek5SkcIThb_RVTljGIbmTWUBNvw1TXqxlwSyGKsBK7OBQJI3wqiJAkXKso1jA8mdaTw7WrAWtfd385DgFFp4L-DAEHCb1h9g36JhngVQkQ8f11wXzIA8uWEpfSStX7EYbsdmBdZPdQ2JjyJ4Xv71WLEo0DoEBHjXfSIBAp1DTgVC__tl9PPv-p0Uz40jCrIZZ7-UdwEtU5AyY4YoZx0UbHdjDgZPDvo8uBNESFlKkney_PVsbfBBRANpV7vBuIy5CIs8gr1yA4Ky-boXaKKVmbmXtnflxh2_4yrgDovWjVETjSNHA%3D%3D)

[**Just $5**](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=767270531de64d4cb7da6e089e158207&_e=5z7KWA7aCfcGSLBVMzBxc3M2JjPiSKjCSozQ_Fr1uRKh7BibKApBnaJpF8DAasnY05AtGjIpciBb1eHwdhuQDI36k_itu4No6acpWek5SkcIThb_RVTljGIbmTWUBNvw1TXqxlwSyGKsBK7OBQJI3wqiJAkXKso1jA8mdaTw7WrAWtfd385DgFFp4L-DAEHCb1h9g36JhngVQkQ8f11wXzIA8uWEpfSStX7EYbsdmBdZPdQ2JjyJ4Xv71WLEo0DolNklJ7sXuWWoF9dUiTOm2XrX9ccNEOV8szsROfq9vGz6XwXZpVkZOuXGXzvm1RFJsIGHKXY66wrPRdxJu8J32LjgLqdjWzWsEuOCEyI3Od6PU854t3x1n-t9bEtM7kuIgQKY96r-nZAqcb0XrgTtiQ%3D%3D) - there's a lot at stake, and this is all I am asking today.

Bernie Moreno
GOP Nominee for Senate, Ohio

**Meet Bernie Moreno:** | [](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=767270531de64d4cb7da6e089e158207&_e=5z7KWA7aCfcGSLBVMzBxc3M2JjPiSKjCSozQ_Fr1uRKh7BibKApBnaJpF8DAasnY05AtGjIpciBb1eHwdhuQDI36k_itu4No6acpWek5SkcIThb_RVTljGIbmTWUBNvw1TXqxlwSyGKsBK7OBQJI3wqiJAkXKso1jA8mdaTw7WrAWtfd385DgFFp4L-DAEHCb1h9g36JhngVQkQ8f11wXzIA8uWEpfSStX7EYbsdmBdZPdQ2JjyJ4Xv71WLEo0DoQtbFoupeMeZuslTIoWr7I3F3zCvUprKTGtPZ0zznonm4AQ0rKalPTJXLZSHAldhl1x1_cdnh3esWsW3ge156aTGU7zGDBL_6OveL92zZ9uh8frIFHXazh6Chw3DsPYGHX2scRN-8bmR5m8ZvZ5Fwuw%3D%3D) Bernie Moreno fights for the American Dream because he’s lived it. Bernie was born in Bogota, Colombia. At age five, his American Dream began when he moved to the United States with his family. Bernie became an American citizen at age 18.

Through his relentless work ethic and untamable entrepreneurial spirit, he turned the first car dealership that he purchased in 2005 into one of the largest dealership groups in America.

In 2016, Bernie recognized the value and transformational potential of blockchain technology, before it received mainstream attention, and moved much of his volunteer time and investment dollars into the space. In 2018 he co-founded ChampTitles, which grew to be quite successful as Bernie served as Chairman of the Board.

After a long, successful career, Bernie sold most of his business to begin focusing on his calling: protecting the American dream for another generation.

Solving our country’s problems requires common sense. In Washington, Bernie will fight to shrink government, protect our freedoms, stop the Chinese Communist party from taking our data and land, and always put America First.

Ohioans are done with politicians who talk a big game and do nothing. Bernie wants to go to D.C. to get work done – just like he always has.

[ ** Join Bernie ➞ **](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=767270531de64d4cb7da6e089e158207&_e=5z7KWA7aCfcGSLBVMzBxc3M2JjPiSKjCSozQ_Fr1uRKh7BibKApBnaJpF8DAasnY05AtGjIpciBb1eHwdhuQDI36k_itu4No6acpWek5SkcIThb_RVTljGIbmTWUBNvw1TXqxlwSyGKsBK7OBQJI3wqiJAkXKso1jA8mdaTw7WrAWtfd385DgFFp4L-DAEHCb1h9g36JhngVQkQ8f11wXzIA8uWEpfSStX7EYbsdmBdZPdQ2JjyJ4Xv71WLEo0DoFTu5dNV-N44EJF465IArLXUe4ixV0lbYbeJ5mR2J6M26Dm3Q9lEvhO8UY-jSkIQaT2uIDzeSOi-7rnD1KA7pAO-CPEEm6D1h0fmHVFujRqXMX8hd8sMNcw_7bl7G3KfzqgsqxHonnzc16JLiAeLcAA%3D%3D)

It's clear their left-wing donor base is as motivated as ever to stop conservatives from regaining Congress and the White House. We're falling behind, and we MUST step it up if we're going to restore America First leadership to secure our borders, keep us safe, lower inflation, and defend our freedoms & values. My request today is a simple one: If you, fellow patriot , along with everyone else here can do just that today, it would significantly impact our ability to broaden our reach and get passed the Democrats' messaging blockade. - there's a lot at stake, and this is all I am asking today. Thank you, Bernie Moreno GOP Nominee for Senate, Ohio Meet Bernie Moreno: | Bernie Moreno fights for the American Dream because he’s lived it. Bernie was born in Bogota, Colombia. At age five, his American Dream began when he moved to the United States with his family. Bernie became an American citizen at age 18. Through his relentless work ethic and untamable entrepreneurial spirit, he turned the first car dealership that he purchased in 2005 into one of the largest dealership groups in America. In 2016, Bernie recognized the value and transformational potential of blockchain technology, before it received mainstream attention, and moved much of his volunteer time and investment dollars into the space. In 2018 he co-founded ChampTitles, which grew to be quite successful as Bernie served as Chairman of the Board. After a long, successful career, Bernie sold most of his business to begin focusing on his calling: protecting the American dream for another generation. Solving our country’s problems requires common sense. In Washington, Bernie will fight to shrink government, protect our freedoms, stop the Chinese Communist party from taking our data and land, and always put America First. Ohioans are done with politicians who talk a big game and do nothing. Bernie wants to go to D.C. to get work done – just like he always has. FOLLOW BERNIE ON SOCIAL MEDIA | | Paid for by Bernie Moreno for Senate Don't want to receive any more of our emails? We hate to see you go: .

I’m sorry for reaching out again, Peter, but I needed to make sure you saw this.

Powerful and corrupt men just can’t seem to get out of the headlines, and they’re doing everything they can to take me down and silence me.
I said it once and I’ll say it again –******I will _never_ bow, I will _never_ break, and I will _never_ be bullied by the bad actors.** And I’ve only continued to uphold that vow in my fight for the vulnerable and voiceless.

**But here’s the thing: It doesn’t matter which office they once held or how much money they have behind them, I will not be paralyzed by fear.**

I knew that standing up to these people and groups was going to earn me enemies. I knew that after decades of elected officials turning a blind eye, my mission would put a target on my back. But I also knew that New York’s working families deserved a champion – and I would do it all a thousand times over.

But I’m nowhere near done fighting for the voiceless and vulnerable, _especially_ now that these powerful and corrupt actors have shown their true colors. These men think they can rattle me and scare me off my path, but the truth is, they have only reaffirmed why I went into this work in the first place.

clean_body: I’m sorry for reaching out again, Peter, but I needed to make sure you saw this. Powerful and corrupt men just can’t seem to get out of the headlines, and they’re doing everything they can to take me down and silence me. I said it once and I’ll say it again –****I will never bow, I will never break, and I will never be bullied by the bad actors. And I’ve only continued to uphold that vow in my fight for the vulnerable and voiceless. But my battle is far from over, Peter, and I’m going to need all the help I can get from fearless fighters like you to continue taking down these powerful men.= Thank you for standing by me, Letitia James \---------- Forwarded message ---------- From: Letitia James Date: Thu, Feb 22, 2024 Subject: Guess who’s in the headlines again | | | = Once again, powerful and corrupt men have taken over the headlines, Peter. But I’m not surprised. Ever since I took my oath as your attorney general and swore to do everything in my power to finally bring the most corrupt actors to justice, they have worked tirelessly to take me down. But here’s the thing: It doesn’t matter which office they once held or how much money they have behind them, I will not be paralyzed by fear. = | | = For the last four years, I’ve stayed true to my mission of holding the shady forces who have ruled our nation for generations accountable. I knew that standing up to these people and groups was going to earn me enemies. I knew that after decades of elected officials turning a blind eye, my mission would put a target on my back. But I also knew that New York’s working families deserved a champion – and I would do it all a thousand times over. But I’m nowhere near done fighting for the voiceless and vulnerable, especially now that these powerful and corrupt actors have shown their true colors. These men think they can rattle me and scare me off my path, but the truth is, they have only reaffirmed why I went into this work in the first place. But, Peter, I can only continue to fight for New York with YOUR support.That's why I’m counting on this inspiring grassroots team to help me continue this critical work of holding the corrupt and powerful accountable. So please: = If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | = | | = | | = | | = Thank you for fighting with me for justice. Letitia | With so many tough and crucial fights ahead, I am counting on people like you to fuel my fight for justice, progress, and true equality. Will you make a monthly donation to make sure I can continue using the full power of the Attorney General's office to make a difference for everyday people and families? | = | This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. body:
Heyyyy Peter, it’s John.[**
**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/casey-em-20240427-2?refcode=em20240427-2&recurring=1&refcode2=2832_552475_B02tFK&akid=2832%2E552475%2EB02tFK)
With the PA primary in the rearview mirror, we’re *officially* in the 2024 general election between my friend Bob Casey and Connecticut mega-millionaire Dave McCormick. **It’s one of the most important races in the country.**[**
**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/casey-em-20240427-2?refcode=em20240427-2&recurring=1&refcode2=2832_552475_B02tFK&akid=2832%2E552475%2EB02tFK)
[**Before I get into it, can you make a contribution to Bob’s campaign so he can start the election off strong? PA will make or break control of the Senate this year — so we’re counting on you. 🙏**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/casey-em-20240427-2?recurring=1&refcode=em20240427-2&refcode2=2832_552475_B02tFK&akid=2832%2E552475%2EB02tFK)
**[Donate ››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/casey-em-20240427-2?refcode=em20240427-2&recurring=1&refcode2=2832_552475_B02tFK&akid=2832%2E552475%2EB02tFK)**
Pennsylvania is a battleground this year + every year — **and the GOP knows it.** They’re already throwing everything they’ve got into their effort to flip our Commonwealth red. 😨
This is going to be a *seriously* tough race. I know from our campaign in 2022 that Bob is going to need a strong team to stand up to McCormick’s mega-million$ and win.
If we’re going to keep the Senate blue 🔵, we need to have Bob’s back right now.
[**We made history in 2022 — let’s do it again in 2024. Chip in any amount right away to keep Bob in the Senate.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/casey-em-20240427-2?recurring=1&refcode=em20240427-2&refcode2=2832_552475_B02tFK&akid=2832%2E552475%2EB02tFK)

name: COURIER
subject: The New York Times v. Joe Biden
body:
NYT parrots right-wing talking points and takes it easy on Trump in the name of “both sides” coverage.

[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/83846217/469695259/2130526953?refcode=emwrapper&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDc4NzgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNTVhYjAxMTctYzAwNC1lZjExLTk2ZjMtN2MxZTUyMWIwN2Y5IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=zTpvgrzLy7T9GJlbH9QoT2b_-JNO9wG2Fp9_1Lv9aO8=&emci=4eab0117-c004-ef11-96f3-7c1e521b07f9&emdi=55ab0117-c004-ef11-96f3-7c1e521b07f9&ceid=14016711)
Peter,
_The New York Times_ is widely regarded as one of the most respected newspapers in America. But as 2024 election coverage ramps up, some, including the Biden campaign, are questioning whether the newspaper has a pro-Trump bias.
Recently, _Politico_ reported that _The Times_ has a “singular obsession” with President Biden, and their biased reporting “often blurs the asymmetries between former President Donald Trump and Biden.”
They’re not the first ones to notice it. Remember this headline from _Salon_?
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/83846219/469695261/-593472309?refcode=20240427-EM-BidenNYT&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDc4NzgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNTVhYjAxMTctYzAwNC1lZjExLTk2ZjMtN2MxZTUyMWIwN2Y5IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=zTpvgrzLy7T9GJlbH9QoT2b_-JNO9wG2Fp9_1Lv9aO8=)
[**Before we go further, if you support our mission to hold mainstream news organizations accountable and publish factual coverage in our ten battleground states across the country, will you chip in $15 here?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/83846221/469695262/-593472309?refcode=20240427-EM-BidenNYT&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDc4NzgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNTVhYjAxMTctYzAwNC1lZjExLTk2ZjMtN2MxZTUyMWIwN2Y5IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=zTpvgrzLy7T9GJlbH9QoT2b_-JNO9wG2Fp9_1Lv9aO8=)
_New York Times'_ critics may be on to something. Just take a look at the front page they gave Trump last year after pleading not guilty on charges that he was reckless with classified documents and government secrets:
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/83846224/469695263/-593472309?refcode=20240427-EM-BidenNYT&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDc4NzgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNTVhYjAxMTctYzAwNC1lZjExLTk2ZjMtN2MxZTUyMWIwN2Y5IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=zTpvgrzLy7T9GJlbH9QoT2b_-JNO9wG2Fp9_1Lv9aO8=)
**While _The Times_ was giving Trump the hero treatment he longs for, they legitimized the debunked right-wing conspiracy theories about Hunter Biden.** They’ve also taken jabs at Biden’s age – even though Trump is only three years younger.
At COURIER, we believe _The New York Times_ and other mainstream media outlets have a responsibility to tell the truth in their coverage. Relying on an outdated “both sides” model of coverage that prioritizes profits and the “horse race” over what’s right for our democracy leads to coverage just like this, where an autocrat like Trump is normalized to a massive audience.
We’re unafraid to tell the truth about Donald Trump and the danger he poses to our democracy. Our innovative model takes that fearless journalism and publishes it in the online spaces where right-wing propaganda thrives.

clean_body: NYT parrots right-wing talking points and takes it easy on Trump in the name of “both sides” coverage. Peter, The New York Times is widely regarded as one of the most respected newspapers in America. But as 2024 election coverage ramps up, some, including the Biden campaign, are questioning whether the newspaper has a pro-Trump bias. Recently, Politico reported that The Times has a “singular obsession” with President Biden, and their biased reporting “often blurs the asymmetries between former President Donald Trump and Biden.” They’re not the first ones to notice it. Remember this headline from Salon? = = New York Times' critics may be on to something. Just take a look at the front page they gave Trump last year after pleading not guilty on charges that he was reckless with classified documents and government secrets: = While The Times was giving Trump the hero treatment he longs for, they legitimized the debunked right-wing conspiracy theories about Hunter Biden. They’ve also taken jabs at Biden’s age – even though Trump is only three years younger. At COURIER, we believe The New York Times and other mainstream media outlets have a responsibility to tell the truth in their coverage. Relying on an outdated “both sides” model of coverage that prioritizes profits and the “horse race” over what’s right for our democracy leads to coverage just like this, where an autocrat like Trump is normalized to a massive audience. We’re unafraid to tell the truth about Donald Trump and the danger he poses to our democracy. Our innovative model takes that fearless journalism and publishes it in the online spaces where right-wing propaganda thrives. = Express Donate: If you've stored your info with ActBlue Express, we'll process your contribution instantly: | = | = | = | = ---|---|---|--- Thank you so much, The COURIER team Email us: mailto:info@couriernewsroom.com

So we can’t let up in fighting back. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: = | = = | = = | = Thanks for being one of this movement’s most loyal supporters . — All On The Line is the grassroots advocacy campaign supported by the National Redistricting Action Fund. My fellow Americans:

**This is Vivek Ramaswamy.** I hoped to email you on a lighter note but I didn't have another choice with everything happening right now.

The unholy alliance between Joe Biden, the corrupt Deep State, the DC Swamp, the Liberal Media, and the Radical Left Democrats is a national disgrace.

Luckily, we have a plan to stop these radicals who: ")**_

**- Desecrated** Easter Sunday with wokeism

And the list goes on and on and on! Never before in the history of the world has a truly great country fallen so far from grace in such a short time. If the Radical Left Democrats somehow win control of the White House, the Senate, and the House... America will be lost forever.

_I know this to be true. You know it too._ But when everything is on the line, moments like this separate the strong from the weak. And make no mistake - the future of our country hangs in the balance.

_**[That's why I'm partnering with Majority Leader Steve Scalise for the FIRST TIME. Together, we’re rallying the STRONGEST American Patriots from across the country and building the biggest surge of grassroots support this country has ever seen. ")**_

If you consider yourself a strong American Patriot - like the two of us do - I'm personally asking for your full commitment right here and right now.

The resources we collect today will help build the largest GOP voter turnout operation in history, deploy an army of volunteers in swing districts, run hard-hitting ads in battleground states, harvest ballots where it's legal, and help make this the most secure election EVER.

**THAT** is how Conservatives will win in a landslide...

**THAT** is how we save our country as we know it...

If that’s you, we need your help for the sake of the country. It’s the only way we win. So what do you say? Can we count on you? ")**_

Vivek Ramaswamy

name: Tony Evers
subject: We can’t afford to fall short
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Tony for Wisconsin
body:
Derek,

Extreme Republicans will stop at nothing to
abuse their power for the sake of petty, partisan politics. In Wisconsin
last month, they fired 8 more highly qualified public servants who I
appointed to serve on the boards, commissions and councils of the state
government with flimsy reasoning to back their actions.

Meanwhile, Donald Trump and the billionaire donors behind his campaign
have plans to mass fire nonpartisan experts across the federal government
and replace them with MAGA loyalists who will do his bidding.

It’s clear they have one goal, to attack and undermine our democracy. If
Trump is elected, we could see a national abortion ban, the "termination"
of the Constitution (his words), and much more. We can’t let this happen.

In November, democracy is on the ballot, and with Wisconsin tied in the
polls, I need your help.

subject: Ozempic WARNING
body:

* * *

| *|MC_PREVIEW_TEXT|* | |
---
| | Hi,

I'm medical scientist Clint Winters!
If you are using Ozempic, know someone who does or is considering... **you need to read this to the very bottom. **
_**This is GREED in the purest form **_
Ozempic is taking the world by storm for it's ability to lower blood sugar and help with weight loss.
_But, it's expensive and comes with terrible side effects._
Which leads me to this **BOMBSHELL**

body:
|
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/83848064/469699141/-1414337131?refcode=em-header&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDYwODgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiOTc0ODZkMjEtYzIwNC1lZjExLTk2ZjMtN2MxZTUyMWIwN2Y5IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=gSuZkjRkAK4ui6XuqgRDzG6fpqNI6XYx0_XpJDNKBpE=)
Hi there,

Today, I want to share why I’m so motivated to defeat MAGA David Schweikert and flip AZ-01 – and the House majority – blue. **[Before I get into it, our April fundraising deadline is on Tuesday and I need a surge of support to meet this goal. Please consider chipping in $3.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/83848065/469699142/-1414337131?refcode=em-4.27.24-all-a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDYwODgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiOTc0ODZkMjEtYzIwNC1lZjExLTk2ZjMtN2MxZTUyMWIwN2Y5IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=gSuZkjRkAK4ui6XuqgRDzG6fpqNI6XYx0_XpJDNKBpE=)**

My story is one-of-a-kind, but it also is the story of so many Americans.

I’m a proud first-generation American and the daughter of immigrants. My parents fled Fidel Castro’s communist Cuba in order to give me and my siblings a better life. They sacrificed everything so we could live the American Dream.

I put myself through college and started my career as a broadcast journalist. I moved here in 1988 to take a job at Channel 12 and Arizona quickly became my home.

Never in a million years did I think I would be running for elected office. But with the rise of Trumpism, the attacks on our democracy, and the overturning of _Roe v. Wade_ – I knew I couldn’t stand by and do nothing.

It’s heartbreaking to see our country – where my parents found a new life after fleeing from a dictator – could fall to the extremism we’re watching unfold today.

We have a real opportunity to rid our community of one of the worst extremists in Congress. Schweikert is a Trump puppet – disregarding the needs of AZ-01 by voting (six times!) for the Life at Conception Act, voting to decertify the 2020 election results, the list goes on.

**We need a fearless, ethical community leader. That’s why I’m running for this seat, and that’s why we’re facing so many attacks from Schweikert and national Republicans. They know I’m the strongest candidate to unseat him once and for all.**

**[If you’re with me, will you chip in $3 or any amount toward our April fundraising goal today? Your support directly impacts our ability to gain momentum in this race and beat Schweikert.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/83848066/469699143/-1414337131?refcode=em-4.27.24-all-a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDYwODgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiOTc0ODZkMjEtYzIwNC1lZjExLTk2ZjMtN2MxZTUyMWIwN2Y5IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=gSuZkjRkAK4ui6XuqgRDzG6fpqNI6XYx0_XpJDNKBpE=)**

clean_body: | = Hi there, Today, I want to share why I’m so motivated to defeat MAGA David Schweikert and flip AZ-01 – and the House majority – blue. = My story is one-of-a-kind, but it also is the story of so many Americans. I’m a proud first-generation American and the daughter of immigrants. My parents fled Fidel Castro’s communist Cuba in order to give me and my siblings a better life. They sacrificed everything so we could live the American Dream. I put myself through college and started my career as a broadcast journalist. I moved here in 1988 to take a job at Channel 12 and Arizona quickly became my home. Never in a million years did I think I would be running for elected office. But with the rise of Trumpism, the attacks on our democracy, and the overturning of Roe v. Wade – I knew I couldn’t stand by and do nothing. It’s heartbreaking to see our country – where my parents found a new life after fleeing from a dictator – could fall to the extremism we’re watching unfold today. We have a real opportunity to rid our community of one of the worst extremists in Congress. Schweikert is a Trump puppet – disregarding the needs of AZ-01 by voting (six times!) for the Life at Conception Act, voting to decertify the 2020 election results, the list goes on. We need a fearless, ethical community leader. That’s why I’m running for this seat, and that’s why we’re facing so many attacks from Schweikert and national Republicans. They know I’m the strongest candidate to unseat him once and for all. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | **= | = ---|--- = | = = | =** Thank you, Marlene | Marlene's campaign to flip AZ-01 is being built from the ground up with grassroots support! = To learn more about Marlene and how she's fighting for Arizona families, please visit: We'd hate to see you go, but you can click here if you'd like to . There's no way around it: Democrats _must_ pick up a seat this November to hold on to the Senate majority — and political experts agree that our best shot is by defeating GOP extremist, Sen. Rick Scott, in Florida.

**Debbie Mucarsel-Powell (D): 45%

This is incredible momentum! But last time around, Rick Scott spent $64 million of his own fortune to buy this Senate seat by just over 10,000 votes.

name: Jasmyn Jordan
subject: The Left can’t handle a black conservative
body:
Help students like me hear the truth... | | | _Please see a special message from our sponsor. If you would like to unsubscribe, visit this[link](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_s=f2302f7c3d0d4e13b5b479dfa91beded&_t=PH4PhPof9a7pAuT6Ihb3wwjjrV8RjB4I6PhEo_MDW-ZiqqxEvwOGvzK_bUwq5yHgTk_frcfMsR_ZG99LZT2_cBmhN9AWo0sCweEdAk0NZiM%3D)_
---
[](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=f2302f7c3d0d4e13b5b479dfa91beded&_e=4vrrEJHdHGMWH4gKgX86hvYoRrO87ro1dGk7Gm_NfWXIWz6_TTYEF0VxlRXjxaWhhtBiEqTK7yDoKWThWSUJOTPvxMEWEFQrRnCNpoUQqjjgxB8QPrDAP0B5MqLf-K077DCtxY6NOBszjRRyWJzR8uL-SeifLQkcy1bXRp3Zi-5AXiwgsc_dJhGpk5Zw5CFNxjNaT9sr95KmBisetShdKGc7PAWOPAn7UV4Y5dAua2RrLAbugHgqLt2vohWrlhKWEyWEywuV2l82RFZYmme1rqjqXr_o7dS5Je1mEXkYcuejPNoUMM1-hO8jU2gepWUfHGdlS8QbbwLhiHzlrafEX-_53To1_j_raRoRvW28-j5Y4OEZB9KafuM7ou4Difpr)
Fellow Patriot,

I wanted to take a moment to share something that worries me about our society.

Too many black students despise America.

Too many black students despise white people.

And many people believe that all black students should think the same way.

My name is **Jasmyn Jordan** , and I'm a student at the University of Iowa. As a young black woman, I was told that I needed to "conform" to the identity that the Left created for me.

White liberals and radical African Americans wanted me to promote Critical Race Theory and speak out about my "oppression."

But my parents didn't raise me to be a victim. My dad is a hard-working, patriotic American truck driver who listens to conservative talk radio. Often, my parents reminded me that in America we can all have our own opinions thanks to freedom of speech.

At the University of Iowa, I chose to become a committed conservative student through Young America's Foundation (YAF), the nation's leading youth outreach organization. I decided more students at the University of Iowa need to be warned about Critical Race Theory and instead hear your conservative ideas!

_The backlash from the campus Left was almost immediate._

The campus Left attacked me, calling me a "token," a bigot, a Nazi, and even a white supremacist.

Even today, they don't like seeing that there is a black female conservative who is actively participating and leading in Young America's Foundation.

But my parents raised me to have courage, so **[I proudly began to share your ideas with my fellow students through YAF](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=f2302f7c3d0d4e13b5b479dfa91beded&_e=4vrrEJHdHGMWH4gKgX86hvYoRrO87ro1dGk7Gm_NfWXIWz6_TTYEF0VxlRXjxaWhhtBiEqTK7yDoKWThWSUJOTPvxMEWEFQrRnCNpoUQqjjgxB8QPrDAP0B5MqLf-K077DCtxY6NOBszjRRyWJzR8uL-SeifLQkcy1bXRp3Zi-5AXiwgsc_dJhGpk5Zw5CFNxjNaT9sr95KmBisetShdKHxC17cJ3rll29JdP__gbqiQXZwVOafKsRIAZT_9lvxtvQB6bcXa53gfc6fS_vnXwYiuYosDSpIqrQ8mQwWiLVyZ0rPQD3OKKb_FzSacA9--TnrkupS74xVuSLBkcJ_wfVM5pqdXevLxP5r7gYNFPIj1hVoLMRHZ4_Tib9sS-gaL)**. My fellow conservative students and I took the lead to host YAF speakers on campus, including **Matt Walsh** , Lt. Col. **Allen West** , **Vince Everett Ellison** , award-winning swimmer **Paula Scanlan** , and others.

We were determined to share your conservative ideas with as many students as possible at the University of Iowa.

I even testified before the U.S. House Judiciary Committee about the personal attacks I faced for defending free speech on campus. And I have now been appointed as the new national chairwoman for Young Americans for Freedom to oversee the largest coast-to-coast network of young conservatives! [](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=f2302f7c3d0d4e13b5b479dfa91beded&_e=4vrrEJHdHGMWH4gKgX86hvYoRrO87ro1dGk7Gm_NfWXIWz6_TTYEF0VxlRXjxaWhhtBiEqTK7yDoKWThWSUJOTPvxMEWEFQrRnCNpoUQqjjgxB8QPrDAP0B5MqLf-K077DCtxY6NOBszjRRyWJzR8uL-SeifLQkcy1bXRp3Zi-5AXiwgsc_dJhGpk5Zw5CFNxjNaT9sr95KmBisetShdKCzlXdn0O0ZVpf0k_1P6P6V8V3y8UXEQrOVP7dWy7vm-_3isitbo-1VIxpnU4iXGG84Ph-W5D2-NNPxIqwkrYpj6qGhKz8mPQZfkvXqaBhh7gg6QsWF8Uxph3n_OU4ExqjwmCr7UuPz-cbx3aX33FzzWHcnKhYj4o43OD-eHb41L) More young people, especially young African Americans, need to hear that America is not "racist" and instead be inspired by your conservative values!

That's why each day I do everything I can to warn my fellow students of the dangers of Critical Race Theory and share your values with my peers at the University of Iowa.

And it's why I'm so passionate about Young America's Foundation-the most effective youth outreach organization recruiting the largest audiences of young people into the Conservative Movement.

Without YAF, none of my conservative activism would have been possible.

**But we can 't keep recruiting students at the University of Iowa or on college campuses nationwide without your help.** There are thousands of African-American students at the University of Iowa who need to hear the dangers and immorality of Critical Race Theory. You can help educate new, young audiences!

Specifically, we need 50 passionate conservatives to step forward before midnight with a gift of $50, so Young America's Foundation can inspire thousands more students on campuses nationwide with the truth about the values that make us great.

According to one poll, only 36% of young people ages 18 to 24 are proud of being American. But your gift right now will help change that. It changed it for me, and I know it will change it for students like me who only hear about how bad their country is instead of why they should be proud of it.

Here's where you can securely make your gift to Young America's Foundation to inspire and recruit young americans to save our country: [**https://secure.yaf.org/inspire-and-recruit-young-americans**](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=f2302f7c3d0d4e13b5b479dfa91beded&_e=4vrrEJHdHGMWH4gKgX86hvYoRrO87ro1dGk7Gm_NfWXIWz6_TTYEF0VxlRXjxaWhhtBiEqTK7yDoKWThWSUJOTPvxMEWEFQrRnCNpoUQqjjgxB8QPrDAP0B5MqLf-K077DCtxY6NOBszjRRyWJzR8uL-SeifLQkcy1bXRp3Zi-5AXiwgsc_dJhGpk5Zw5CFNxjNaT9sr95KmBisetShdKN9C3LH3CXv4ADSNemr1BRyGI_tDXWe96pgfqFyvbYuNNRVXdpWd1xWDeg4ZD1oC88fbKY-uoZASf-FqTyk77hCZ-hrmtljm3c9cRWpqDtn2L3hkvL6sb_xgePoKhwPraBf-CQ9uhJFD94NZ28-nEhvEbeXfyJJdwDMbrcRc4p_6)

I'm so grateful you are standing with us to pass on your ideas to future generations. Together we will reach more young people with the values that make America exceptional.

Gratefully,

Jasmyn Jordan
**Chairwoman, Young Americans for Freedom**
**Chairwoman, University of Iowa YAF**
* * *

---
_**Young America 's Foundation**
11480 Commerce Park Drive Suite 600
Reston, VA 20191-1556

800.USA.1776_ [Unsubscribe from messages sponsored by Young America's Foundation.](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_s=f2302f7c3d0d4e13b5b479dfa91beded&_t=PH4PhPof9a7pAuT6Ihb3wwjjrV8RjB4I6PhEo_MDW-ZiqqxEvwOGvzK_bUwq5yHgTk_frcfMsR_ZG99LZT2_cOZIW-fT05OCy5RojvgQ72b8aQ38HFlG_0ocvD73xl_5sfVefh3S55LxQnx945Oa01lW0fPCLg_H7r2FLIPzC6o%3D)

[Unsubscribe from all communications](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_s=f2302f7c3d0d4e13b5b479dfa91beded&_t=PH4PhPof9a7pAuT6Ihb3wwjjrV8RjB4I6PhEo_MDW-ZiqqxEvwOGvzK_bUwq5yHgTk_frcfMsR_ZG99LZT2_cBmhN9AWo0sCweEdAk0NZiM%3D).

That's why each day I do everything I can to warn my fellow students of the dangers of Critical Race Theory and share your values with my peers at the University of Iowa. And it's why I'm so passionate about Young America's Foundation-the most effective youth outreach organization recruiting the largest audiences of young people into the Conservative Movement. Without YAF, none of my conservative activism would have been possible. But we can 't keep recruiting students at the University of Iowa or on college campuses nationwide without your help. There are thousands of African-American students at the University of Iowa who need to hear the dangers and immorality of Critical Race Theory. You can help educate new, young audiences! Specifically, we need 50 passionate conservatives to step forward before midnight with a gift of $50, so Young America's Foundation can inspire thousands more students on campuses nationwide with the truth about the values that make us great. According to one poll, only 36% of young people ages 18 to 24 are proud of being American. But your gift right now will help change that. It changed it for me, and I know it will change it for students like me who only hear about how bad their country is instead of why they should be proud of it. Here's where you can securely make your gift to Young America's Foundation to inspire and recruit young americans to save our country: I'm so grateful you are standing with us to pass on your ideas to future generations. Together we will reach more young people with the values that make America exceptional. Gratefully, Jasmyn Jordan Chairwoman, Young Americans for Freedom Chairwoman, University of Iowa YAF Young America 's Foundation** 11480 Commerce Park Drive Suite 600 Reston, VA 20191-1556 800.USA.1776 .

clean_body: Don’t just wait for someone else to donate. | 👉 Marsha Blackburn has over EIGHT MILLION DOLLARS in her campaign coffers to defeat us. 👉 Gloria doesn’t accept campaign contributions from corporate PACs, unlike our far-right opponent. Instead, she relies on contributions of whatever folks can afford — averaging $33 — to power this movement. 👉 But for every thousand people who read this email, only two will donate. If you’re waiting to donate because you assume someone else will step up — don’t. Gloria is counting on YOU to be one of the two in a thousand people to put your money into delivering change for Tennessee. Especially right now. We’re just three days away from our April fundraising goal and still short of our $150,000 target. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | = | = ---|--- = | = = | = Let's do this, Team Gloria | = Gloria Johnson is running for the U.S. Senate because Tennesseans deserve leaders who care. For too long, elected officials like Marsha Blackburn have done absolutely nothing to make Tennesseans’ lives better. The only interests they’ve cared about are special interests. The only people they’ve championed are their donors. Gloria will advocate for real solutions to protect our communities from gun violence, make health care more affordable and accessible for all of us, secure access to the ballot box, and defend reproductive rights. | = = Follow along: | | ---|---|--- Paid for by Gloria for Tennessee Contributions or gifts to Gloria for Tennessee are not tax deductible. Friend, I have breaking news to share with you... We at America First Legal have just filed an **absolutely momentous** lawsuit in Maricopa County, Arizona against their elections officials for repeatedly and egregiously violating the State of Arizona's election administration laws. The election interference and systematic election law violations we allege in Arizona are appalling, bone-chilling, and have the most serious consequences for every American. We all know what's going on. _That 's why we are taking action to expose and punish those responsible!_ [_**DONATE NOW TO SUPPORT OUR EFFORTS >>** _](http://links.fighttheswamp.com/u/click?_t=e3c9a4cac7f248a39c2a3d920479a441&_m=a028812718724827bbbcd2b9f08293ac&_e=6jJxi-0VUtjo_qggI8V402ipL1zPWGs57pISJbZeQQMh6oTs9mSyueTjdafg1e97YlIivDlyfSkokXHKdKaVs81FIlRsbpEVp2RiSheo5hN5VjmvPB65ebYUnzxSFwJqkNVMPtncudODrLSuBc-J-Z03aou_lhSHPyPfdENiEo6m5e8SmAdhZd00fqshDHvJJD8wUgxpbNdvvMujMDAibpWRxwlWKbmVh9cArbow6lXyTSRtKr4ep0u6jHt3pfPD-5qr_GFjF2S6KWzMvnASM6gIt4PpUkGftU0D3L6LuWDuJiAbUwD8WmZYLQ0flCzeUgq9eBADpYed_a7Rb5P-vudBBDePJU5ansMlKFOFrPKwr03kjdlGBzT4hbSHfBmYKsDXYqjFr-bv6LfevLx3V8DwdaBiUCSYezL2d0Dl1ewdnttYn8Sxph-5dgP4SIMf) **We strongly allege numerous serious violations and criminal activity, including:** **#1 -** _Maricopa County refuses to maintain the mandatory chain of custody for ballots.**In 2022, these failures resulted in a discrepancy of over 25,000 votes - larger than the margin of victory in the state governor's race**_ **#2 -** _**Maricopa County ignores mandatory reconciliation procedures to track each ballot printed or issued to a voter.** The law requires tracking and reconciling ballots cast and voters checked in to stop fraud, but the Defendants do not perform any reconciliation procedures at all_ **#3 -** _Arizona law requires ballot drop boxes to be staffed by at least two election officials positioned close enough to view each person who deposits ballots into it.**Maintaining an unstaffed drop box is a felony. However, Maricopa County maintains unstaffed, unsupervised ballot drop boxes, facilitating illegal ballot harvesting**_ For many years now, the Maricopa County Board of Supervisors and the County Recorder have consistently failed to lawfully administer elections. We believe these individuals are fully aware of their election law violations. **Make no mistake:** Our lawsuit has been filed to prevent the November 5, 2024, election from being tainted with the same mistakes and maladministration that occurred during the 2020 and 2022 elections and to prevent election interference from occurring. _Thank you for your support of our mission and historic legal actions here!_ [_**_PLEASE RUSH SUPPORT HERE_ >>**_](http://links.fighttheswamp.com/u/click?_t=e3c9a4cac7f248a39c2a3d920479a441&_m=a028812718724827bbbcd2b9f08293ac&_e=6jJxi-0VUtjo_qggI8V402ipL1zPWGs57pISJbZeQQMh6oTs9mSyueTjdafg1e97YlIivDlyfSkokXHKdKaVs81FIlRsbpEVp2RiSheo5hN5VjmvPB65ebYUnzxSFwJqkNVMPtncudODrLSuBc-J-Z03aou_lhSHPyPfdENiEo6m5e8SmAdhZd00fqshDHvJJD8wUgxpbNdvvMujMDAibpWRxwlWKbmVh9cArbow6lXyTSRtKr4ep0u6jHt3pfPD-5qr_GFjF2S6KWzMvnASM6gIt4PpUkGftU0D3L6LuWDYPcKTjhHbVLKZRJPRd2Wz2xKkpSV9Gy1OurdUfJ9QTD5dySbPm4pO62JXxF9pzSTUl4-w22kSgyuqnmN-Ghd_7Jh_rbGteCjwQ0zkjmwwwfkOD3c8AkvuOaNA-CGKpPtKI3Tm2mkoMnEg2dS9piBy)_** **_ Stephen Miller _President, America First Legal _

clean_body: | | Friend, I have breaking news to share with you... We at America First Legal have just filed an absolutely momentous lawsuit in Maricopa County, Arizona against their elections officials for repeatedly and egregiously violating the State of Arizona's election administration laws. The election interference and systematic election law violations we allege in Arizona are appalling, bone-chilling, and have the most serious consequences for every American. We all know what's going on. That 's why we are taking action to expose and punish those responsible! We strongly allege numerous serious violations and criminal activity, including: #1 - Maricopa County refuses to maintain the mandatory chain of custody for ballots.In 2022, these failures resulted in a discrepancy of over 25,000 votes - larger than the margin of victory in the state governor's race #2 - Maricopa County ignores mandatory reconciliation procedures to track each ballot printed or issued to a voter. The law requires tracking and reconciling ballots cast and voters checked in to stop fraud, but the Defendants do not perform any reconciliation procedures at all #3 - Arizona law requires ballot drop boxes to be staffed by at least two election officials positioned close enough to view each person who deposits ballots into it.Maintaining an unstaffed drop box is a felony. However, Maricopa County maintains unstaffed, unsupervised ballot drop boxes, facilitating illegal ballot harvesting For many years now, the Maricopa County Board of Supervisors and the County Recorder have consistently failed to lawfully administer elections. We believe these individuals are fully aware of their election law violations. Make no mistake: Our lawsuit has been filed to prevent the November 5, 2024, election from being tainted with the same mistakes and maladministration that occurred during the 2020 and 2022 elections and to prevent election interference from occurring. Thank you for your support of our mission and historic legal actions here! Stephen Miller President, America First Legal | | America First Legal Foundation is an IRS-approved section 501(c)(3) public charity.
