name: Alsobrooks HQ
subject: Here's Your Latest Team Alsobrooks Newsletter!
body:
Greetings #TeamAlsobrooks!

The past week of the campaign has been amazing. As we get closer and
closer to election day, our people-powered movement grows stronger and
stronger. As our team travels across the State, we continue to be amazed
by the outpouring of support. Thank you to everyone who came out this week
to support our campaign!

🚨NEW AD ALERT🚨

This race will be determined by the many, not the money. Our grassroots
movement is ready to fight for every Marylander and defeat Larry Hogan in
the fall. Check out our new ad [ https://act.angelaalsobrooks.com/go/20588?t=1001&akid=1501%2E52803%2EmalOV- ]here. Now let’s get to work!

[ https://act.angelaalsobrooks.com/go/20588?t=1002&akid=1501%2E52803%2EmalOV- ][IMG]

In Baltimore, Angela had the opportunity to share with folks across the
State how she plans to go farther for every single Marylander. Angela is
the only candidate who has never wavered on the issue of protecting
reproductive rights. The difference could not be more clear on who can
keep Maryland’s Senate seat blue and who will protect reproductive
healthcare. You can [ https://act.angelaalsobrooks.com/go/20589?t=1003&akid=1501%2E52803%2EmalOV- ]watch the entire debate here.

[ https://act.angelaalsobrooks.com/go/20589?t=1004&akid=1501%2E52803%2EmalOV- ][IMG]

We were proud to attend the Planned Parenthood Spring Gala to honor Dr.
Sharon Camp for her work in protecting access to contraception.

Reproductive rights are on the line this November, and we're proud to be
the only candidate in the race to stand with women in Maryland and across
the country to fight for our rights.

[ https://act.angelaalsobrooks.com/go/20578?t=1036&amount=25&akid=1501%2E52803%2EmalOV- ][IMG]

There was great energy in Silver Spring on Wednesday evening. With less
than twenty days left in the race, we’re gonna need Lottie, Dottie, and
everybody talking to their friends and family and making sure they have a
plan to vote. Let’s win this! Thank you to Senator Chris Van Hollen,
Councilman Will Jawando, State Senator Will Smith, former MD Dems Party
Chair Susie Turnbull, Delegate Jheanelle Wilkins, State Senator Jeff
Waldstreicher, and Delegate Jared Solomon for your support!

[ https://act.angelaalsobrooks.com/go/20578?t=1044&amount=25&akid=1501%2E52803%2EmalOV- ][IMG]

100 Black Men of Prince George’s County does so much to uplift and mentor
our community’s young people. Angela was honored to give the welcoming
remarks for their annual Gala. Thank you so much to Walter Kirkland for
inviting us to join, and it was good to see our friend, Senator Malcolm
Augustine.

[ https://act.angelaalsobrooks.com/go/20578?t=1045&amount=25&akid=1501%2E52803%2EmalOV- ][IMG]

We had a wonderful time at the AFRO Tea Luncheon. It was great to connect
with so many Marylanders and see all these super bad women gather to
uplift each other!

[ https://act.angelaalsobrooks.com/go/20578?t=1046&amount=25&akid=1501%2E52803%2EmalOV- ][IMG]

Thank you to Baltimore County Executive Johnny Olszewski, Former County
Executive Don Mohler, State Senator Shelly Hettleman, Delegate Scott
Phillips, Delegate Catherine Forbes, Delegate Nick Allen, Baltimore County
Councilmember Pat Young and all the folks who came out in Baltimore County
for one of our stops on our All in for Angela Tour. We were proud to stand
with so many supporters who know that Angela will fight for every
Marylander once we get to Capitol Hill!

[ https://act.angelaalsobrooks.com/go/20578?t=1047&amount=25&akid=1501%2E52803%2EmalOV- ][IMG]

Great to be back in Columbia for the Howard County Democratic Party Gala.
The work they do to elect Democrats up and down the ballot is essential to
preserving our democracy. It’s always a pleasure to get to chat with folks
about what we’re gonna get done in the Senate.

[ https://act.angelaalsobrooks.com/go/20578?t=1048&amount=25&akid=1501%2E52803%2EmalOV- ][IMG]

[ https://act.angelaalsobrooks.com/go/20578?t=1049&amount=25&akid=1501%2E52803%2EmalOV- ][IMG]

Thank you to those who came out to join County Executive Steuart Pittman
and Angela in Anne Arundel County for another great stop on our All in for
Angela tour. Together we can fight to create opportunity and first chances
for every Maryland community.

[ https://act.angelaalsobrooks.com/go/20578?t=1050&amount=25&akid=1501%2E52803%2EmalOV- ][IMG]

Great seeing our friends and neighbors at the Prince George’s Route 202
Coalition monthly meeting. Keeping our community informed and engaged
keeps our community strong!

[ https://act.angelaalsobrooks.com/go/20578?t=1051&amount=25&akid=1501%2E52803%2EmalOV- ][IMG]

We had an excellent time meeting with seniors at The Lodge at Marlton in
Upper Marlboro. When she’s in the Senate, Angela will never vote to raise
the retirement age or cut a penny from retirement benefits.

[ https://act.angelaalsobrooks.com/go/20578?t=1037&amount=25&akid=1501%2E52803%2EmalOV- ][IMG]

[ https://act.angelaalsobrooks.com/go/20578?t=1038&amount=25&akid=1501%2E52803%2EmalOV- ][IMG]

We had a great time visiting with seniors at the Vistas in Upper Marlboro.
Marylanders in their golden years deserve a Senator who will fight like
everything to lower the cost of prescription drugs and to protect Social
Security.

[ https://act.angelaalsobrooks.com/go/20578?t=1039&amount=25&akid=1501%2E52803%2EmalOV- ][IMG]

Thanks to our friend Gwen McCall for bringing together a great group in
Bowie to hear about our plans for the U.S. Senate. Together, we’ll go
farther and do better.

[ https://act.angelaalsobrooks.com/go/20578?t=1040&amount=25&akid=1501%2E52803%2EmalOV- ][IMG]

What a great stop in Silver Spring at Kefa Cafe, the oldest coffee shop in
the city. We had a great time enjoying a cup of joe and discussing our
plans to leverage federal funds to help support businesses and expand
access to capital with business owner Lene Tsegaye.

[ https://act.angelaalsobrooks.com/go/20578?t=1041&amount=25&akid=1501%2E52803%2EmalOV- ][IMG]

We had a fantastic discussion at Shegar Spring Cafe, an Ethiopian
restaurant in Silver Spring. Our cultural diversity is one of the things
that makes Maryland a great state to live in. It was great to meet with
Elias Woldu, and other leaders from the community.

[ https://act.angelaalsobrooks.com/go/20578?t=1042&amount=25&akid=1501%2E52803%2EmalOV- ][IMG]

IN THE NEWS

[ https://act.angelaalsobrooks.com/go/20940?t=1005&akid=1501%2E52803%2EmalOV- ]Endorsement Announcement: Former Maryland Attorney General and
Lieutenant Governor Joseph Curran

[ https://act.angelaalsobrooks.com/go/20941?t=1006&akid=1501%2E52803%2EmalOV- ]Endorsement Announcement: State Senator Jim Rosapepe

[ https://act.angelaalsobrooks.com/go/20942?t=1007&akid=1501%2E52803%2EmalOV- ]Endorsement Announcement: From Oakland to Ocean City we are proud to
have the endorsements of Councilmember Joseph Solomon, Fmr State Senator
Delores Kelley, Councilmember Christopher Vigilott, Council President
D’Shawn Doughty, and State Attorney Richard Gibson.

[ https://act.angelaalsobrooks.com/go/20943?t=1008&akid=1501%2E52803%2EmalOV- ]Endorsement Announcement: AFRO – The Black Media Authority

Fox31: [ https://act.angelaalsobrooks.com/go/20944?t=1009&akid=1501%2E52803%2EmalOV- ]Washington Post editorial board endorses Alsobrooks in Maryland
Senate primary
“The Post editorial board cited Alsobrooks’s track record on public safety
and her work on state- and local-specific issues, like the FBI
headquarters move to Maryland, in issuing its endorsement of her.”

The 19th: [ https://act.angelaalsobrooks.com/go/20945?t=1010&akid=1501%2E52803%2EmalOV- ]Angela Alsobrooks wants you to know she really gets it
“Alsobrooks’ candidacy is also meaningful for Maryland’s congressional
delegation, which right now is made up only of men; the state has never
elected a person of color to the Senate. In Alsobrooks, the Senate would
gain the voice of a mother a decade younger than the Senate average, and a
local government official who won’t be among the roughly-two thirds of
senators who are millionaires.”

Just the News: [ https://act.angelaalsobrooks.com/go/20946?t=1011&akid=1501%2E52803%2EmalOV- ]Alsobrooks earns endorsement from Washington Post in
Maryland Senate primary
“Prince George's County Executive on Thursday received the endorsement of
the Washington Post's editorial board as she vies for the Democratic
Senate nomination in Maryland.”

Three-e-60.com: Breaking: [ https://act.angelaalsobrooks.com/go/20947?t=1012&akid=1501%2E52803%2EmalOV- ]The Washington Post Endorses Angela
Alsobrooks in Maryland’s Democratic Senate Primary
The first Black woman ever to serve as Prince George’s county executive,
Ms. Alsobrooks, 53, possesses a down-to-earth personal perspective and
ample seasoning as a public official.

The Baltimore Banner: [ https://act.angelaalsobrooks.com/go/20948?t=1013&akid=1501%2E52803%2EmalOV- ]US Senate candidates Trone, Alsobrooks face off
in first – and only? – TV debate
“Alsobrooks also hit Trone on contributions he’s made personally and
through his business to Republican politicians who oppose abortion access,
such as Gov. Greg Abbott and Attorney General Ken Paxton of Texas.”

Daily Kos: [ https://act.angelaalsobrooks.com/go/20949?t=1014&akid=1501%2E52803%2EmalOV- ]Morning Digest: A major endorsement could shake up
Maryland’s Senate primary
“In a Thursday editorial backing her for the Democratic nod, the Post
praised Alsobrooks' record in office and noted she ‘would bring valuable
diversity to the Senate' as 'the first Black woman elected statewide in
Maryland.’”

CBS9: [ https://act.angelaalsobrooks.com/go/20950?t=1015&akid=1501%2E52803%2EmalOV- ]Maryland Senate forum held in Baltimore for two democratic
nominees
“Senate race between Congressman David Trone and Prince George's County
Executive Angela Alsobrooks”

Fox45: [ https://act.angelaalsobrooks.com/go/20951?t=1016&akid=1501%2E52803%2EmalOV- ]Hogan takes centerstage as Democratic rivals clash in
high-stakes Maryland Senate race
“‘After $45 million to defeat me, we are in a statistical tie in this
race,’ Alsobrooks said. ‘At the end of it, people will decide this race,
not money.’”

Maryland Matters: [ https://act.angelaalsobrooks.com/go/20952?t=1017&akid=1501%2E52803%2EmalOV- ]Political notes: Moore and Alsobrooks, together
again; endorsements and elbows in CD-6, GOP dinner guest, personnel news
“Moore is scheduled to headline a star-studded fundraiser for Alsobrooks
in Baltimore on the evening of April 30...The other scheduled speakers are
U.S. Reps. Kweisi Mfume (D-7th), Jamie Raskin (D-8th) and John Sarbanes
(D-3rd) and state Comptroller Brooke Lierman (D). The fundraiser also has
a sizable list of hosts, including Baltimore-area business executives,
political leaders, attorneys, medical professionals and philanthropists.”

The BayNet: [ https://act.angelaalsobrooks.com/go/20953?t=1018&akid=1501%2E52803%2EmalOV- ]Senate Debate Recap, New Endorsements Unveiled
“One of Alsobrooks’ biggest points was that she supports campaign finance
reform and that ‘money can’t buy you love, and it can’t buy you Maryland’”

WEAA889: [ https://act.angelaalsobrooks.com/go/20954?t=1019&akid=1501%2E52803%2EmalOV- ]The MSU Spokesman sits down with Angela Alsobrooks, candidate
for US Senate
“Prince George County Executive Angela Alsobrooks is running for the
Democratic nomination to replace Cardin. Her principal challenger in the
Senate race is Rep. David Trone (D-6th). Alsobrooks, 53, is serving in her
second term as executive after eight years as State’s Attorney in Prince
George’s County.”

GET INVOLVED

We have 3 weeks left to win this race! Vote-by-mail ballots have already
dropped. Early vote starts in less than a week. Now is the time to lock-in
and step up. Find ways to take action below:

* NEW Make Calls from Home: [ https://act.angelaalsobrooks.com/go/17083?t=1020&akid=1501%2E52803%2EmalOV- ]Sign up HERE
* [ https://act.angelaalsobrooks.com/go/19835?t=1021&akid=1501%2E52803%2EmalOV- ]Get Out the Vote in Anne Arundel!
* [ https://act.angelaalsobrooks.com/go/17085?t=1022&akid=1501%2E52803%2EmalOV- ]Get Out the Vote in Baltimore City!
* [ https://act.angelaalsobrooks.com/go/19836?t=1023&akid=1501%2E52803%2EmalOV- ]Get Out the Vote in Baltimore County!
* [ https://act.angelaalsobrooks.com/go/19837?t=1024&akid=1501%2E52803%2EmalOV- ]Get Out the Vote in Frederick!
* [ https://act.angelaalsobrooks.com/go/19838?t=1025&akid=1501%2E52803%2EmalOV- ]Get Out the Vote in Howard!
* [ https://act.angelaalsobrooks.com/go/17086?t=1026&akid=1501%2E52803%2EmalOV- ]Get Out the Vote in Montgomery!
* [ https://act.angelaalsobrooks.com/go/17087?t=1027&akid=1501%2E52803%2EmalOV- ]Get Out the Vote in Prince George’s!
* [ https://act.angelaalsobrooks.com/go/19839?t=1028&akid=1501%2E52803%2EmalOV- ]Get Out the Vote from DC!

We need to make sure we’re covering the polls for early vote! We are close
to hitting our recruitment goal for this week, but we still need at least
27 more shifts. Sign up to work the polls at
[ http://act.angelaalsobrooks.com/go/15324?t=1029&akid=1501%2E52803%2EmalOV- ]angelaalsobrooks.com/earlyvote.

Mark your calendars — [ http://act.angelaalsobrooks.com/go/15406?t=1030&akid=1501%2E52803%2EmalOV- ]we need all hands on deck April 27th & 28th, May
4th & 5th, and May 11th through 14th to Get Out The Vote! We need everyone
who can come out to an office to knock on doors and make calls. We can’t
leave any vote behind, so make sure you mark your calendars and sign up
TODAY!

[ https://alsobrooks.actionkit.com/signup/volunteer-form?t=1031&akid=1501%2E52803%2EmalOV- ]Volunteer

[ http://act.angelaalsobrooks.com/go/12166?t=1032&akid=1501%2E52803%2EmalOV- ]Find Events Near You

[ https://act.angelaalsobrooks.com/go/20578?t=1043&amount=25&akid=1501%2E52803%2EmalOV- ]Donate

SOCIALS

While we'll keep sending emails to keep you updated, the best way to keep
up with Angela is on our social media channels. Follow us on Twitter,
Facebook, and Instagram to follow along with us on the campaign trail!

[ https://act.angelaalsobrooks.com/go/8814?t=1033&akid=1501%2E52803%2EmalOV- ]Facebook

[ https://act.angelaalsobrooks.com/go/8815?t=1034&akid=1501%2E52803%2EmalOV- ]Twitter

[ https://act.angelaalsobrooks.com/go/8816?t=1035&akid=1501%2E52803%2EmalOV- ]Instagram

Sincerely,

Team Alsobrooks

You can unsubscribe from this mailing list at any time:
http://act.angelaalsobrooks.com/cms/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?akid=1501%2E52803%2EmalOV-

It was great to meet with Elias Woldu, and other leaders from the community. [ - ][IMG] IN THE NEWS [ - ]Endorsement Announcement: Former Maryland Attorney General and Lieutenant Governor Joseph Curran [ - ]Endorsement Announcement: State Senator Jim Rosapepe [ - ]Endorsement Announcement: From Oakland to Ocean City we are proud to have the endorsements of Councilmember Joseph Solomon, Fmr State Senator Delores Kelley, Councilmember Christopher Vigilott, Council President D’Shawn Doughty, and State Attorney Richard Gibson. [ - ]Endorsement Announcement: AFRO – The Black Media Authority Fox31: [ - ]Washington Post editorial board endorses Alsobrooks in Maryland Senate primary “The Post editorial board cited Alsobrooks’s track record on public safety and her work on state- and local-specific issues, like the FBI headquarters move to Maryland, in issuing its endorsement of her.” The 19th: [ - ]Angela Alsobrooks wants you to know she really gets it “Alsobrooks’ candidacy is also meaningful for Maryland’s congressional delegation, which right now is made up only of men; the state has never elected a person of color to the Senate. In Alsobrooks, the Senate would gain the voice of a mother a decade younger than the Senate average, and a local government official who won’t be among the roughly-two thirds of senators who are millionaires.” Just the News: [ - ]Alsobrooks earns endorsement from Washington Post in Maryland Senate primary “Prince George's County Executive on Thursday received the endorsement of the Washington Post's editorial board as she vies for the Democratic Senate nomination in Maryland.” Three-e-60.com: Breaking: [ - ]The Washington Post Endorses Angela Alsobrooks in Maryland’s Democratic Senate Primary The first Black woman ever to serve as Prince George’s county executive, Ms. Alsobrooks, 53, possesses a down-to-earth personal perspective and ample seasoning as a public official. The Baltimore Banner: [ - ]US Senate candidates Trone, Alsobrooks face off in first – and only? – TV debate “Alsobrooks also hit Trone on contributions he’s made personally and through his business to Republican politicians who oppose abortion access, such as Gov. Greg Abbott and Attorney General Ken Paxton of Texas.” Daily Kos: [ - ]Morning Digest: A major endorsement could shake up Maryland’s Senate primary “In a Thursday editorial backing her for the Democratic nod, the Post praised Alsobrooks' record in office and noted she ‘would bring valuable diversity to the Senate' as 'the first Black woman elected statewide in Maryland.’” CBS9: [ - ]Maryland Senate forum held in Baltimore for two democratic nominees “Senate race between Congressman David Trone and Prince George's County Executive Angela Alsobrooks” Fox45: [ - ]Hogan takes centerstage as Democratic rivals clash in high-stakes Maryland Senate race “‘After $45 million to defeat me, we are in a statistical tie in this race,’ Alsobrooks said. ‘At the end of it, people will decide this race, not money.’” Maryland Matters: [ - ]Political notes: Moore and Alsobrooks, together again; endorsements and elbows in CD-6, GOP dinner guest, personnel news “Moore is scheduled to headline a star-studded fundraiser for Alsobrooks in Baltimore on the evening of April 30...The other scheduled speakers are U.S. Reps. Kweisi Mfume (D-7th), Jamie Raskin (D-8th) and John Sarbanes (D-3rd) and state Comptroller Brooke Lierman (D). The fundraiser also has a sizable list of hosts, including Baltimore-area business executives, political leaders, attorneys, medical professionals and philanthropists.” The BayNet: [ - ]Senate Debate Recap, New Endorsements Unveiled “One of Alsobrooks’ biggest points was that she supports campaign finance reform and that ‘money can’t buy you love, and it can’t buy you Maryland’” WEAA889: [ - ]The MSU Spokesman sits down with Angela Alsobrooks, candidate for US Senate “Prince George County Executive Angela Alsobrooks is running for the Democratic nomination to replace Cardin. Her principal challenger in the Senate race is Rep. David Trone (D-6th). Alsobrooks, 53, is serving in her second term as executive after eight years as State’s Attorney in Prince George’s County.” GET INVOLVED We have 3 weeks left to win this race! Vote-by-mail ballots have already dropped. Early vote starts in less than a week. Now is the time to lock-in and step up. Find ways to take action below: NEW Make Calls from Home: [ - ]Sign up HERE [ - ]Get Out the Vote in Anne Arundel! [ - ]Get Out the Vote in Baltimore City! [ - ]Get Out the Vote in Baltimore County! [ - ]Get Out the Vote in Frederick! [ - ]Get Out the Vote in Howard! [ - ]Get Out the Vote in Montgomery! [ - ]Get Out the Vote in Prince George’s! * [ - ]Get Out the Vote from DC! We need to make sure we’re covering the polls for early vote! We are close to hitting our recruitment goal for this week, but we still need at least 27 more shifts. Sign up to work the polls at [ - ]angelaalsobrooks.com/earlyvote. Mark your calendars — [ - ]we need all hands on deck April 27th & 28th, May 4th & 5th, and May 11th through 14th to Get Out The Vote! We need everyone who can come out to an office to knock on doors and make calls. We can’t leave any vote behind, so make sure you mark your calendars and sign up TODAY! [ - ]Volunteer [ - ]Find Events Near You [ - ]Donate SOCIALS While we'll keep sending emails to keep you updated, the best way to keep up with Angela is on our social media channels. Follow us on Twitter, Facebook, and Instagram to follow along with us on the campaign trail! [ - ]Facebook [ - ]Twitter [ - ]Instagram Sincerely, Team Alsobrooks You can unsubscribe from this mailing list at any time: -

name: Team UTS
subject: pummeled (re: Joe Biden)
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Upset The Setup PAC
body:
Listen, our chances of defending the Senate just dropped dramatically.

I’m officially the most vulnerable woman in the Senate. Now, Republicans are zeroing in on Nevada as the one seat they need to win Senate control in November. Because if we lose Nevada, the entire Senate will flip red.

I’ve won tough races before, but this is shaping up to be the closest race I’ve ever faced. GOP megadonors like the Koch network are already pouring millions into this race to defeat me, and I can’t fight back alone. That’s why I’m reaching out for your urgent help as I face a major fundraising gap.

We just ran the numbers, and it looks like I need to raise at least $30,000 by midnight to have the resources to keep this campaign on track, pull ahead in the polls, and defend this seat – but right now, we're way short.

Please, can you pitch in $3 or more to split between me and Upset the Setup right now to help us turn this around before it's too late? Every dollar will go a long way toward making sure we win in Nevada and defend the Senate for Democrats. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/uts_email_2024_rosen?amount=3]

If you've stored your info with ActBlue Express, we'll process your contribution instantly:

Thank you for doing your part to help defend Nevada and the Senate.

Friend,

This is Dalia Al-Aqidi. I’m running for Minnesotas’s 5th Congressional District against Ilhan Omar, and I’m here to tell you it’s time to eliminate the “squad” once and for all.

America needs to wake up. The radical left “squad” is gaining traction in the House of Representatives. Initially composed of four women, including Ilhan Omar, they have since added new members in hopes of increasing their influence on the Democratic Party and Congress as a whole.

For several years now, this group has infiltrated Washington with anti-American, Marxist, communist, anti-Semitic, and pro-Hamas rhetoric. They do not care about the interests of their constituents and want to fundamentally change our country for the worse!

It is critical we shut this down in November.

I am offering you an exclusive opportunity...

****400% MATCH** ON **ALL DONATIONS** UNTIL**MIDNIGHT****
****HELP DALIA STOP THE SQUAD****

name: Rebecca Hardy
subject: Vaccine Choice is on the Ballot!
body:
| |

| [View in browser](https://click.mlsend.com/link/c/YT0yNDY3NjY3NTY4MDAxODE2NzU3JmM9dTNzNCZlPTAmYj0xMzEzMzMxNzQyJmQ9dDlsNnQ4dA==.L4UFbXt1uxvS4VMlAEd-VxX_QW0NVS6-wcxHSorWph4)

| Peter,
With all the buzz around state and federal elections, many tend to overlook the upcoming municipal and Primary runoff races. **Early voting for local elections started this past Monday and the runoffs are in late May**! TFVC believes that it is absolutely vital to stay diligent when selecting candidates who have made the commitment to protecting your medical liberty, even when doing so may be unpopular. **We’ve all witnessed firsthand what can happen during declared emergencies or disasters**. People get scared, and government entities from the federal to local levels begin enacting drastic medical requirements, like mask mandates and vaccine passports, to make it look like they have the situation under control.**

That’s why TFVC exists** \- without a voice to advocate for vaccine choice and informed consent, governmental health organizations would have full sway over your medical decisions. **By influencing policy and providing quality educational resources, we are able to mobilize support for the medical liberty movement**! **But we need your support to make sure our lawmakers don’t repeat the mistakes of the past**. The municipal elections that run through May 4 and the Primary runoff races on May 28 are where we must take a stand and educate voters about medical liberty champions! Your monthly contribution of [$86, $45, $24, or just $10](https://click.mlsend.com/link/c/YT0yNDY3NjY3NTY4MDAxODE2NzU3JmM9dTNzNCZlPTAmYj0xMzEzMzMxNzQzJmQ9bDlmOGU2Zw==.jkApxj0Yvr85LyqK44yX8rRNTozZh7YytanPC95ZHNM) will help TFVC continue our work for the remainder of the 2024 election cycle!****

The only way we can advance informed consent and vaccine choice in Texas is by ensuring our lawmakers believe in the same freedoms we do, so [make a monthly contribution today](https://click.mlsend.com/link/c/YT0yNDY3NjY3NTY4MDAxODE2NzU3JmM9dTNzNCZlPTAmYj0xMzEzMzMxNzQ0JmQ9eDlsMG4yYg==.ZcuDh2oI0tR3SZyteAowxOTnVDlJtttpRxeVSLQoQgY)!

---
| |
---
| | [Give NOW!](https://click.mlsend.com/link/c/YT0yNDY3NjY3NTY4MDAxODE2NzU3JmM9dTNzNCZlPTAmYj0xMzEzMzMxNzQ2JmQ9ZzVmN3g4eQ==.SN85XJcaa__VNz-vQW-AsMIurebunlSKwMiQRf4xZfg)
---
---
| | | **All Texans should be able to make their own vaccine decisions without pressure from employers or the government**. [Your monthly support](https://click.mlsend.com/link/c/YT0yNDY3NjY3NTY4MDAxODE2NzU3JmM9dTNzNCZlPTAmYj0xMzEzMzMxNzQ3JmQ9aDBzMmozcw==.wSNY6Wy1hBA7ixb5HuJfIPfpZZidIviBl6c-LotKRUg) gives us the resources we need to continue to spread awareness for the cause! We appreciate your help in growing the vaccine choice movement.

---
| Gratefully,
---
| Rebecca Hardy

President, TFVC

But we need your support to make sure our lawmakers don’t repeat the mistakes of the past. The municipal elections that run through May 4 and the Primary runoff races on May 28 are where we must take a stand and educate voters about medical liberty champions! Your monthly contribution of will help TFVC continue our work for the remainder of the 2024 election cycle!** The only way we can advance informed consent and vaccine choice in Texas is by ensuring our lawmakers believe in the same freedoms we do, so ! | | | | | | | All Texans should be able to make their own vaccine decisions without pressure from employers or the government**. gives us the resources we need to continue to spread awareness for the cause! We appreciate your help in growing the vaccine choice movement. | | | | | | Gratefully, | Rebecca Hardy President, TFVC | | | P.S. TFVC is ready to bring the fight for medical liberty to the polls - will you join us with a | | | | | | | Texans for Vaccine Choice | | 1540 Keller Parkway, Ste 108, #166, Keller TX 76248 United States | | | | | ---|---|---|---|--- You received this email because you signed up on our website or made a purchase from us.

After my GOP opponent just set a new fundraising record to flip this seat red and deliver the Senate back to the Republican Party, the only way I can fight back is with your support. I know it may not sound like much, but it’s grassroots supporters like you giving $5 or $10 at a time who are going to make the critical difference in this battleground race – not billionaire megadonors or dark money groups. That’s why it’s so important we all do our part. [View in Web Browser](https://email.email.america1stwarroom.com/c/eJw8kM1u6yAQhZ9mvIsFwxjbCxb3NiKVIlXqqsoSA05ooXawU5S3r5Km3c7Pdz4dk-YYxquC9j8gnoJbABHEP0A8H0rKl_e03232pcubs3xJzW2LT4C4Xmf_d_qg1D6ZEG_Tdls5JUbHqPKKt5yQZN901UmRcUgNN0PXyGE0khnfSeGot6Jp0LoqKGRIjLDlPTHB6n7oybGB48AJvRBA7J5Tm-RzsIYvazE5T1Oq7ZSqqE7rOi93MQ2oS57qz4uN_rL8vNkpAeqHMqD-AtROH17Lh1zlMwh9b0Fs33bFjOV6nKus3FxCjGGRLRA7_mK-AwAA__-O-WDB)

# **Have you ever experienced true, gnawing hunger?**
In our modern world with all its abundance and options, most people haven't. They’re used to having long-term food security bolstered by supply chains, fast food, delivery apps, and chain restaurants. Some have never even missed a meal. But what if they had to? What if disaster were to strike tomorrow, leaving thousands of Americans without access to food? Most couldn't go even a few days without food, let alone a week. They lack the resources, know-how, and preparation to be able to feed themselves or their families. Sadly, many would go hungry. Some might even starve. Would you? Don't wait to find out.

Don't be like the unprepared, who rely on delicate systems to feed them. They aren't ready for what's coming next and are even less prepared to do the hard work to find food after a crisis.

[The time to start preparing is now.](https://email.email.america1stwarroom.com/c/eJw8kMGO2yAURb_meWcLHsQkCy-mdd3FqO1IXYy6sjDghI5fYDCWlb-vbLnZnnu4F9AUJz8-GlBfAPHm7QyIIF4A8fPPSmn5S6_fy9f1nMrP-iedthS_AmJ-RPdUj5bKkfbTRlVb2EaMlsnCNVxxibK-nM7FrXE4cKM5cn5Ww2i5RsVro4yq60G4mhW-QYaSSVT8Iplg1WW4SMsGjgOX6IQAyfadSpNL3mg-51WnFAJVJlAxNbec47xfrAPs6BF1Tj7keYlxemwOYBf11c2A3Ryd8Xoqwzi6BKIDrJdM_RyWZByI9oXedTqgtyBauX6cWBjHg5GzfiEQ7a_f1Tcq397ej8CEe3b3DKJtnT1YdmlTmSxRldsr_7uaovbXO4j2x0e-9s-ufp_vW2f7fj9VpMbG1U-Tn2sFkl33jzCB_gUAAP__VKWNng) When groceries are picked over, looted, or permanently closed, they will be scrounging around for scraps while you enjoy the fruits of your labor. They will be left trying to forage or hunt for the first time—competing with thousands of others—while you enjoy your stockpile. As the old saying goes, “an ounce of prevention is worth a pound of cure.” Those who prepare are setting themselves up for success, no matter what comes next. They will be ready to put food on the table for themselves and their families during times of famine, conflict, supply chain disruptions, and more. [](https://email.email.america1stwarroom.com/c/eJw8kMGO2yAURb_meWcLHsQkCy-mdd3FqO1IXYy6sjDghI5fYDCWlb-vbLnZnnu4F9AUJz8-GlBfAPHm7QyIIF4A8fPPSmn5S6_fy9f1nMrP-iedthS_AmJ-RPdUj5bKkfbTRlVb2EaMlsnCNVxxibK-nM7FrXE4cKM5cn5Ww2i5RsVro4yq60G4mhW-QYaSSVT8Iplg1WW4SMsGjgOX6IQAyfadSpNL3mg-51WnFAJVJlAxNbec47xfrAPs6BF1Tj7keYlxemwOYBf11c2A3Ryd8Xoqwzi6BKIDrJdM_RyWZByI9oXedTqgtyBauX6cWBjHg5GzfiEQ7a_f1Tcq397ej8CEe3b3DKJtnT1YdmlTmSxRldsr_7uaovbXO4j2x0e-9s-ufp_vW2f7fj9VpMbG1U-Tn2sFkl33jzCB_gUAAP__VKWNng) There is no better time to get ready for what's coming next. [**My Patriot Supply**](https://email.email.america1stwarroom.com/c/eJw8kMGO2yAURb_meWcLHsQkCy-mdd3FqO1IXYy6sjDghI5fYDCWlb-vbLnZnnu4F9AUJz8-GlBfAPHm7QyIIF4A8fPPSmn5S6_fy9f1nMrP-iedthS_AmJ-RPdUj5bKkfbTRlVb2EaMlsnCNVxxibK-nM7FrXE4cKM5cn5Ww2i5RsVro4yq60G4mhW-QYaSSVT8Iplg1WW4SMsGjgOX6IQAyfadSpNL3mg-51WnFAJVJlAxNbec47xfrAPs6BF1Tj7keYlxemwOYBf11c2A3Ryd8Xoqwzi6BKIDrJdM_RyWZByI9oXedTqgtyBauX6cWBjHg5GzfiEQ7a_f1Tcq397ej8CEe3b3DKJtnT1YdmlTmSxRldsr_7uaovbXO4j2x0e-9s-ufp_vW2f7fj9VpMbG1U-Tn2sFkl33jzCB_gUAAP__VKWNng) is here to ensure that you, and _millions_ of other families, are prepared for the worst. **My Patriot Supply** are the experts in emergency preparedness. They have streamlined and perfected the path to securing your peace of mind with readiness essentials.
## With the [**4-Week Emergency Food Supply**](https://email.email.america1stwarroom.com/c/eJw8kMGO2yAURb_meWcLHsQkCy-mdd3FqO1IXYy6sjDghI5fYDCWlb-vbLnZnnu4F9AUJz8-GlBfAPHm7QyIIF4A8fPPSmn5S6_fy9f1nMrP-iedthS_AmJ-RPdUj5bKkfbTRlVb2EaMlsnCNVxxibK-nM7FrXE4cKM5cn5Ww2i5RsVro4yq60G4mhW-QYaSSVT8Iplg1WW4SMsGjgOX6IQAyfadSpNL3mg-51WnFAJVJlAxNbec47xfrAPs6BF1Tj7keYlxemwOYBf11c2A3Ryd8Xoqwzi6BKIDrJdM_RyWZByI9oXedTqgtyBauX6cWBjHg5GzfiEQ7a_f1Tcq397ej8CEe3b3DKJtnT1YdmlTmSxRldsr_7uaovbXO4j2x0e-9s-ufp_vW2f7fj9VpMbG1U-Tn2sFkl33jzCB_gUAAP__VKWNng) from **My Patriot Supply,** setting up for survival becomes a matter of a single, effortless step.
Even better? For a limited time, this essential food stash is yours for **$50 OFF!** If you're ready to start getting serious about your stockpile, this is the ideal building block. With a whole _month_ of delicious, easy-to-prepare food on hand, you'll be ready to face power outages, evacuations, economic challenges, and more. But this is just the beginning... Once you start taking preparation seriously, you'll be ready to set up a serious stockpile that will last you for months. You'll sleep better at night knowing your family is ready to hold out for the long haul—and it all will have started with this one kit. Whether you're an experienced survivalist or just starting on the road to total readiness, this 4-Week Emergency Food Supply is your plan to fight food insecurity. It's designed to last, offering peace of mind for up to 25 years, ready whenever and wherever you need it. In emergencies, calories are crucial. You need at least 2,000 to make it through each day, and this kit delivers that _and then some_. With options for breakfast, lunch, dinner, and drinks, meal monotony won't be a problem. Instead, you'll find delicious, easy-to-prepare meals to get you through any crisis. [](https://email.email.america1stwarroom.com/c/eJw8kMGO2yAURb_meWcLHsQkCy-mdd3FqO1IXYy6sjDghI5fYDCWlb-vbLnZnnu4F9AUJz8-GlBfAPHm7QyIIF4A8fPPSmn5S6_fy9f1nMrP-iedthS_AmJ-RPdUj5bKkfbTRlVb2EaMlsnCNVxxibK-nM7FrXE4cKM5cn5Ww2i5RsVro4yq60G4mhW-QYaSSVT8Iplg1WW4SMsGjgOX6IQAyfadSpNL3mg-51WnFAJVJlAxNbec47xfrAPs6BF1Tj7keYlxemwOYBf11c2A3Ryd8Xoqwzi6BKIDrJdM_RyWZByI9oXedTqgtyBauX6cWBjHg5GzfiEQ7a_f1Tcq397ej8CEe3b3DKJtnT1YdmlTmSxRldsr_7uaovbXO4j2x0e-9s-ufp_vW2f7fj9VpMbG1U-Tn2sFkl33jzCB_gUAAP__VKWNng) Just boil water, add it to the meal mix, and let it simmer for a few minutes. The result? Flavors that defy your expectations of emergency food. Far from your typical "disaster diet," these meals are so delightful that many of our customers dig in _immediately_ without waiting for an emergency to strike. In your kit, you can expect to enjoy comforting, morale-boosting favorites like mac and cheese, mashed potatoes, buttermilk pancakes, and more! The inevitability of another crisis is clear, the question is just "when?" That's why keeping a dependable stockpile of emergency food now is your smartest move. Just stock up and set it aside until it's needed. Yes, it really is that simple. Don't gamble with your survival. Complete this essential first step today, and rest easier knowing that, come what may, your family will have what they need during difficult times. Facing an uncertain future doesn't have to be a solo journey. **My Patriot Supply** has got your back, helping you get ready for whatever challenges might come your way. It doesn't matter what kind of danger or where it's coming from—they're here to get you prepared for _anything._ It's time to take this crucial step. Click the button below and secure a 4-Week Emergency Food Kit for **$50 OFF** per kit! Get one for **EVERY** member of your family. But don't wait! This rare deal ends **SOON.** [_Click here_](https://email.email.america1stwarroom.com/c/eJw8kMGO2yAURb_meWcLHsQkCy-mdd3FqO1IXYy6sjDghI5fYDCWlb-vbLnZnnu4F9AUJz8-GlBfAPHm7QyIIF4A8fPPSmn5S6_fy9f1nMrP-iedthS_AmJ-RPdUj5bKkfbTRlVb2EaMlsnCNVxxibK-nM7FrXE4cKM5cn5Ww2i5RsVro4yq60G4mhW-QYaSSVT8Iplg1WW4SMsGjgOX6IQAyfadSpNL3mg-51WnFAJVJlAxNbec47xfrAPs6BF1Tj7keYlxemwOYBf11c2A3Ryd8Xoqwzi6BKIDrJdM_RyWZByI9oXedTqgtyBauX6cWBjHg5GzfiEQ7a_f1Tcq397ej8CEe3b3DKJtnT1YdmlTmSxRldsr_7uaovbXO4j2x0e-9s-ufp_vW2f7fj9VpMbG1U-Tn2sFkl33jzCB_gUAAP__VKWNng) to start building your food future today.

name: Sarah McBride
subject: I wouldn’t ask if it weren’t important
body:
I know we can close this gap!
#
**Whew. Time is flying!**
Earlier this week, my team shared our goal of raising $10,000 from grassroots contributions through emails (like this one!) before the end of the month.
**Now, our deadline is three days away.** And we’re **$4,305** from reaching our goal.
[**I know if everyone reading this email pitches in even a little bit, we can close this gap. Can I count on you to pitch in $5 or anything you can?**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mcb-em-20240427?refcode=em20240427-1-188&amount=5&refcode2=188_21716_PwWWoN&akid=188%2E21716%2EPwWWoN)
**[Donate »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mcb-em-20240427?refcode=em20240427-1-188&refcode2=188_21716_PwWWoN&akid=188%2E21716%2EPwWWoN)**
Our campaign is powered by grassroots donors like you. And with your help, we’ve already talked to thousands of Delawareans about the issues that matter most for our future.
**But our work is far from over.** Our primary election is just months away, and we should fully expect Republican money to come in to try to stop us.
What we raise between now and the end of the month will determine how much we can keep investing in organizing on the ground — and how much we can plan to spend to spread our message to voters through mail and ads.

Thank you!
Sarah McBride

clean_body: I know we can close this gap! Whew. Time is flying! Earlier this week, my team shared our goal of raising $10,000 from grassroots contributions through emails (like this one!) before the end of the month. Now, our deadline is three days away. And we’re $4,305 from reaching our goal. Our campaign is powered by grassroots donors like you. And with your help, we’ve already talked to thousands of Delawareans about the issues that matter most for our future. But our work is far from over. Our primary election is just months away, and we should fully expect Republican money to come in to try to stop us. What we raise between now and the end of the month will determine how much we can keep investing in organizing on the ground — and how much we can plan to spend to spread our message to voters through mail and ads. Thank you! Sarah McBride

name: Jamaal Bowman
subject: re: One of the most competitive primaries in the country
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JUSTICE DEMOCRATS
body:
[1]Justice Democrats

Peter,

I first ran for Congress because too many of us, from the Bronx to
Westchester, were being failed by a broken system.

As a school principal, I witnessed too many of our children dying of gun
violence with too little attention and action from those in power. Too
little being done to make life better and easier for working families. Too
little action on the climate crisis.

Justice Democrats recruited me to run against a 16-term incumbent and
establishment Democrat in 2020 — with support from progressive grassroots
supporters like you, we beat the odds and won.

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/140221?c0=jdem-pts-email-jb.rltGKW&refcode=em20240427-34505&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&amount=5&t=1001&akid=34505%2E1203867%2EaEjjeO ]Now, I need your help again to fend off my AIPAC-backed moderate
challenger in this June’s primary election. Will you help re-elect me and
my fellow Squad members this year by splitting a donation to my campaign
and Justice Democrats today?

Together, we've stood up and delivered real progress for all, including
over $1 billion of funding for affordable housing, climate resiliency,
small businesses, gun violence prevention, and public schools in NY-16.

I’m keeping up the fight for Medicare for All, a Green New Deal, student
debt relief, and human rights for Palestinians. But after I joined the
rest of the Squad in becoming the first members of Congress to call for a
ceasefire in Gaza last year, AIPAC vowed to spend $100 million against us
and recruited an out-of-touch, moderate Democrat to run against me.

My opponent has since made racist and Islamophobic comments and accepted
nearly $1 million from a super PAC bankrolled by Trump megadonors.

This is one of the most competitive Democratic primaries in the entire
country, and we simply can’t afford to lose this seat to another career
politician who will put corporate special interests before the people.

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/140221?c0=jdem-pts-email-jb.rltGKW&refcode=em20240427-34505&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&amount=5&t=1002&akid=34505%2E1203867%2EaEjjeO ]That’s why I’m asking for your support today: can you rush
$5 or more to support me and fuel Justice Democrats’
campaign to Protect the Squad now?

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/140221?c0=jdem-pts-email-jb.rltGKW&refcode=em20240427-34505&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&amount=5&t=1021&akid=34505%2E1203867%2EaEjjeO ]Contribute $5

Peace and love,

Jamaal

Contribute to Justice Democrats: https://secure.actblue.com/donate/justicedemocrats?refcode=em20240427-34505-footer&t=1022&refcode2=34505_1203867_aEjjeO&akid=34505%2E1203867%2EaEjjeO

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way for us to reach you about opportunities to get involved. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, click here to unsubscribe: https://go.justicedemocrats.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=1023&akid=34505%2E1203867%2EaEjjeO

PAID FOR BY JUSTICE DEMOCRATS. Not authorized by any candidate or candidate’s committee.
Justice Democrats
1390 Columbia Ave #261
Lancaster PA 17603
Email us: us@justicedemocrats.com

body:
Our $125,000 End-of-Month goal helps Democratic pro-choice fight back 💪 |
---
[](https://click.everyaction.com/k/83854869/469714895/-120062714?sourceid=1053521&refcode=WTEFEP51_20240427_EOMBansUpdate_ND_v1s1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRUwvMS84NzA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiZjZjOTA1Ni1kMTA0LWVmMTEtOTZmMy03YzFlNTIxYjA3ZjkiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=S8JTrWDbf9RpzKiuUvxMBq9FTyM0spG5RXuJaV9aIqk=) Peter,

Republicans have worked overtime to dismantle reproductive health care state by state in post-_Roe v. Wade_ America. As a result, **nearly _one in three_ women of reproductive age live in a state where abortion is banned or mostly banned.**

The landscape is constantly changing as Republicans enact new restrictions — and Democratic pro-choice women fight back against these anti-choice attacks. That's why we wanted to update you on the status of abortion access in Pennsylvania: [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/83854870/469714896/-120062714?sourceid=1053521&refcode=WTEFEP51_20240427_EOMBansUpdate_ND_v1s1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRUwvMS84NzA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiZjZjOTA1Ni1kMTA0LWVmMTEtOTZmMy03YzFlNTIxYjA3ZjkiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=S8JTrWDbf9RpzKiuUvxMBq9FTyM0spG5RXuJaV9aIqk=) And this map will shift again soon. State Supreme Courts in Arizona and Florida recently ruled that Arizona's total abortion ban from 1864 and Florida Gov. Ron DeSantis' six-week ban, respectively, can take effect in the coming weeks.

We know that the overwhelming majority of Americans are pro-choice, Peter, because _when choice is on the ballot,_choice wins__. This cycle we'll need all hands on deck to stop Republicans' draconian plans to take this country, and our rights, back to the dark ages. [****We've set an ambitious $125,000 End-of-Month goal to support Democratic pro-choice women up and down the ballot who are fighting back. clean_body: Our $125,000 End-of-Month goal helps Democratic pro-choice fight back 💪 | = Peter, Republicans have worked overtime to dismantle reproductive health care state by state in post-Roe v. Wade America. As a result, nearly one in three women of reproductive age live in a state where abortion is banned or mostly banned. The landscape is constantly changing as Republicans enact new restrictions — and Democratic pro-choice women fight back against these anti-choice attacks. That's why we wanted to update you on the status of abortion access in Pennsylvania: = And this map will shift again soon. State Supreme Courts in Arizona and Florida recently ruled that Arizona's total abortion ban from 1864 and Florida Gov. Ron DeSantis' six-week ban, respectively, can take effect in the coming weeks. We know that the overwhelming majority of Americans are pro-choice, Peter, because when choice is on the ballot,choice wins. This cycle we'll need all hands on deck to stop Republicans' draconian plans to take this country, and our rights, back to the dark ages. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue, your donation will go through immediately: | = | = ---|--- = | = = | = Thank you for joining the fight, the EMILYs List team EMILYs List is a community of over five million members that helps elect Democratic pro-choice women to office. = = Paid for by EMILYs List and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. Team — Senate candidate Kari Lake and AZ-08 candidate Mark Finchem launched a baseless lawsuit in 2022 to ban ballot counting machines. They falsely claimed election fraud, all to further Donald Trump’s Big Lie. **But the Supreme Court DENIED Kari and Mark’s claims this week, officially putting an end to their witch hunt.[Check out the final ruling, then pitch in to help us defeat EVERY election denier on the ballot.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/83855759/469717757/-1974965524?refcode=AU_AZD_FR_GEN_EOM_AC90_20240427_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjUvMS8xMDU1MTYiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNDM2OGMwMzEtZDQwNC1lZjExLTk2ZjMtN2MxZTUyMWIwN2Y5IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=YOAIfhoxUjdr_FTzmEgeQRIlpbWgyUwaX9hmCNMzZKY=)** | | **"U.S. Supreme Court won’t take up Kari Lake’s bid to ban ballot counting machines"**
* * *
_“ _**None**_ of Plaintiffs’ allegations _**supported a plausible inference**_ that their individual votes in future elections will be adversely affected by the use of electronic tabulation, _**particularly given the robust safeguards in Arizona law,**_ the use of paper ballots, and the post-tabulation retention of those ballots,” the appellate court wrote. _ _— 9th Circuit Court of Appeals, October 2023_

Voting machines are safe and effective, and with leaders like Secretary of State Fontes making investments to continue to keep our elections secure, we can expand access to the ballot box and protect our democracy.
**[Arizonans deserve leaders who are working to protect their right to vote, not limit it. clean_body: We’re being outspent by MILLIONS now | = Y'all, I always heard politics is a dirty game, but these super PACs are being downright filthy. A MAGA-funded super PAC just reserved another six figure TV ad buy for one of my opponents. Bringing their grand total to $3,251,106. You know how much I've taken from super PACs that are fueled by insurrectionist-deniers? $0.00. = | = | = ---|--- = | = = | = Now a lot of politicians will tell you that once they get to Congress, they're going to crack down on corporate PACs interfering in election finance. But those same people are happy to take their help when it's benefiting them in a campaign. That's not me. Never has been. I'm running this campaign with integrity. I'm committed to being true to myself and the people I hope to serve from the jump. But right now, this MAGA super PAC is outspending me by nearly DOUBLE on TV ads. = = | = ---|--- = | = = | = Harry Dunn = = | = Harry Dunn for Congress PO Box 1449 Columbia, MD 21044 United States | mailto:info@harrydunnforcongress.com Paid for by Harry Dunn for Congress

name: Chuck Schumer
subject: re: a long email —
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the DSCC | PO Box 96047, Washington, DC 20090 | **[dscc
body:
I need your support
| | | It's Senator Schumer. This is a long email -- but because of how much is at stake, _you need to know it all._

**If you can’t read the whole thing, I’ll cut to the chase:**

**[This is a critical election cycle, and the GOP is on the brink of taking back the Senate. I wish I was exaggerating, but I'm not. So please, will you chip in $5 _(becomes $15!)_ before our end-of-month deadline to supercharge our Senate majority?](https://go.dscc.org/go/17905?amount=5&t=5&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&ask=5&amounts=5%2C10%2C20%2C50&code=DPE-FD-20240427-ChuckSchumer-SchumerLongForm-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-FD-20240427-ChuckSchumer-SchumerLongForm-Pros-sl1&akid=14465%2E9716520%2EAjsATm)**

_Here are the three most important things you need to know:_

**EXPERTS RANK MULTIPLE DEMOCRATIC SENATE SEATS AMONG THE MOST VULNERABLE THIS YEAR.**

Look -- if Republicans flip just TWO seats, they'll take back Senate control and enforce a hard-right agenda on the entire nation. And right now the GOP is targeting our most vulnerable senators.

_It gets worse:_

**SENATE REPUBLICANS SAW RECORD-BREAKING FUNDRAISING LAST CYCLE.**

I won’t beat around the bush: Senate Republicans and their megadonors have outraised us numerous times. That means they have the resources to blanket America in attack ads, pack thousands into MAGA rallies, and bankroll campaigns to take back the Senate. Meanwhile, Democratic fundraising is _down_ compared to previous elections.

_As a result:_

**ONE ELECTION MODEL GIVES REPUBLICANS AN OVER 80% CHANCE OF RETAKING THE SENATE!**

This is what I mean when I say the GOP is on the brink of victory. Our situation is _that fragile._ But the thing is, we've beaten tough odds like this before -- and with grassroots support from Democrats like you, I know we can again!

**[I’m telling you all this because we _NEED_ to fight back and act with urgency. So I’m asking you directly: Will you give $5 _(becomes $15!)_ before the critical end-of-month deadline to save our Senate?](https://go.dscc.org/go/17905?amount=5&t=6&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&ask=5&amounts=5%2C10%2C20%2C50&code=DPE-FD-20240427-ChuckSchumer-SchumerLongForm-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-FD-20240427-ChuckSchumer-SchumerLongForm-Pros-sl1&akid=14465%2E9716520%2EAjsATm)**

If you've saved payment info with ActBlue Express, your donation will be processed immediately. The first $10,000 received from this email will be TRIPLED:

| | [Donate $5 (Becomes $15)](https://go.dscc.org/go/17905?amount=5&t=7&amount=5&express_lane=true&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&ask=5&amounts=5%2C10%2C20%2C50&code=DPE-FD-20240427-ChuckSchumer-SchumerLongForm-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-FD-20240427-ChuckSchumer-SchumerLongForm-Pros-sl1&akid=14465%2E9716520%2EAjsATm)
---
| [Donate $10 (Becomes $30)](https://go.dscc.org/go/17905?amount=5&t=8&amount=10&express_lane=true&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&ask=5&amounts=5%2C10%2C20%2C50&code=DPE-FD-20240427-ChuckSchumer-SchumerLongForm-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-FD-20240427-ChuckSchumer-SchumerLongForm-Pros-sl1&akid=14465%2E9716520%2EAjsATm)
---
| [Donate $20 (Becomes $60)](https://go.dscc.org/go/17905?amount=5&t=9&amount=20&express_lane=true&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&ask=5&amounts=5%2C10%2C20%2C50&code=DPE-FD-20240427-ChuckSchumer-SchumerLongForm-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-FD-20240427-ChuckSchumer-SchumerLongForm-Pros-sl1&akid=14465%2E9716520%2EAjsATm)
---
| [Rush Another Amount](https://go.dscc.org/go/17905?amount=5&t=10&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&ask=5&amounts=5%2C10%2C20%2C50&code=DPE-FD-20240427-ChuckSchumer-SchumerLongForm-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-FD-20240427-ChuckSchumer-SchumerLongForm-Pros-sl1&akid=14465%2E9716520%2EAjsATm)
---

I’m so grateful for your continued support.

Chuck

name: Dave McCormick
subject: More lies from the Left
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Dave McCormick
body:
Please read this full message
[](http://links.justandfreegop.com/u/click?_t=8ca5ef3d31cc43bcb1fbe6968d953911&_m=dd42dbc2fa534584986bae19e0a7d24f&_e=QGpWGTibg8M092ffFDOrTAuco-kHO9tecPgWkAaSphk7AjKQnQ0t5FJ_96agVAUFnawHAL2rflDLT5B-7xqnmZY8IUGnl8g19pDGX5eJMRjeYrMpJjgpflbLD9EPcJYq3ORdNOgp_ui485-gXgKfMVILdFsEb1eWVtn8PMMupbrPzzVU4sEyJbv83fipygiv-xMnr7EzRctOZg9uPjzFNli2z_1oCGmtidPKUfSrFasugL9wxmR-LUWz4kHLkkNkRoak4UskG88dTAFRuubuGcWmiYPtLkfKYdfDE1YVzfu6Wtu22Ay5U63l1kWo-cGWsNO8ZrUUiAi7SPRsnJc6XIRXnpYq_b8kAmL4iulCFEWf8Lbd0OQtBGfMkBl1BnZ6)

Friend,

_The New York Times_ is writing a story filled with frivolous lies about my childhood.

If it weren't so demeaning to my parents' lifelong teaching careers and the town I'm so proud to have been raised in, it might be funny.

The simple fact is _The New York Times_ is lying.

**Here's the truth : and I hope you will read all the way to the end. **

Growing up, we lived on campus at Bloomsburg State College and my parents owned a farm ten minutes down the road.

I had summer jobs baling hay and trimming Christmas trees at nearby farms.

[](http://links.justandfreegop.com/u/click?_t=8ca5ef3d31cc43bcb1fbe6968d953911&_m=dd42dbc2fa534584986bae19e0a7d24f&_e=QGpWGTibg8M092ffFDOrTAuco-kHO9tecPgWkAaSphk7AjKQnQ0t5FJ_96agVAUFnawHAL2rflDLT5B-7xqnmZY8IUGnl8g19pDGX5eJMRjeYrMpJjgpflbLD9EPcJYq3ORdNOgp_ui485-gXgKfMVILdFsEb1eWVtn8PMMupbrPzzVU4sEyJbv83fipygiv-xMnr7EzRctOZg9uPjzFNli2z_1oCGmtidPKUfSrFaumCreF0YXy90a83OqbaH5bmqVTbDoGdKIfH39kCbkbpuMax5ruzk243LuLIlXss4ToOtA8k2lxQlKKQW0n5yhHbOfAtfA_dl45DOuujIt7HLo3_fauGWr2sVFi3ra5Qex_wcJac58M8xYEuxtju00d)

My dad started his career teaching history, economics, & democracy at Punxsutawney High. My mom began teaching fourth through sixth graders at a public school near Pittsburgh.

[](http://links.justandfreegop.com/u/click?_t=8ca5ef3d31cc43bcb1fbe6968d953911&_m=dd42dbc2fa534584986bae19e0a7d24f&_e=QGpWGTibg8M092ffFDOrTAuco-kHO9tecPgWkAaSphk7AjKQnQ0t5FJ_96agVAUFnawHAL2rflDLT5B-7xqnmZY8IUGnl8g19pDGX5eJMRjeYrMpJjgpflbLD9EPcJYq3ORdNOgp_ui485-gXgKfMVILdFsEb1eWVtn8PMMupbrPzzVU4sEyJbv83fipygiv-xMnr7EzRctOZg9uPjzFNli2z_1oCGmtidPKUfSrFaukYHd5sjFc_F25gqvSU1DCZ6cUHDCAJcMXStnu_bU3SGXoJ5ktX0YOJTPYpuaRxV5uUqEUwESnJKrStEWsJ8XuOpmoKwditOuxnku0jBh000kn75nq_7n1B7kKdgA7_q6m9QDAQlMAQEDdeN-XJO8-)

I'm incredibly proud that my dad was chosen to be president of Bloomsburg State College (now Bloomsburg State University) at only 34 years old.

[](http://links.justandfreegop.com/u/click?_t=8ca5ef3d31cc43bcb1fbe6968d953911&_m=dd42dbc2fa534584986bae19e0a7d24f&_e=QGpWGTibg8M092ffFDOrTAuco-kHO9tecPgWkAaSphk7AjKQnQ0t5FJ_96agVAUFnawHAL2rflDLT5B-7xqnmZY8IUGnl8g19pDGX5eJMRjeYrMpJjgpflbLD9EPcJYq3ORdNOgp_ui485-gXgKfMVILdFsEb1eWVtn8PMMupbrPzzVU4sEyJbv83fipygiv-xMnr7EzRctOZg9uPjzFNli2z_1oCGmtidPKUfSrFavDjxR88bFVNK8umS617enIw7BqByrEcD97QVUguD-RrOOKVtMHWYGeVnjn-CrhZ6Yc7_-1QzDJ1hi0zCE3vSC2gLM6K_Ekk9h_i4hAA5-PWjmONO4xlm8fjPk2ikV2NfTioiDdLyybYLtkZXgpi-yN)
It's incredible to me that this New York Times reporter somehow thinks this fact makes my dad "politically connected." **Does she know I 'm running against a career politician who's been riding his father's political coattails in elected office for three decades?**

I knew getting into this race could mean things would get nasty, but it's sad to see we've fallen so far that one of our nation's oldest papers of record is pushing the Democrats' baked narrative.

I'm so proud of my parents' teaching careers and to have been raised in Bloomsburg.
[](http://links.justandfreegop.com/u/click?_t=8ca5ef3d31cc43bcb1fbe6968d953911&_m=dd42dbc2fa534584986bae19e0a7d24f&_e=QGpWGTibg8M092ffFDOrTAuco-kHO9tecPgWkAaSphk7AjKQnQ0t5FJ_96agVAUFnawHAL2rflDLT5B-7xqnmZY8IUGnl8g19pDGX5eJMRjeYrMpJjgpflbLD9EPcJYq3ORdNOgp_ui485-gXgKfMVILdFsEb1eWVtn8PMMupbrPzzVU4sEyJbv83fipygiv-xMnr7EzRctOZg9uPjzFNli2z_1oCGmtidPKUfSrFatTFJ-A0NO3IyLk-djxmslugbuxu87uFvrv3LHC_nUO1Xv9vhPkiSPPIDiI4XW2hhGTOk6WELCdyvxF621xRFB0rvbBQMTdJFCnB_LEQPDPBweFhMK01WoVrGsWEm2JTnyXDLkJgHGNZm_OOWAZ2qgY)
It was there that I wrestled and played football and was nominated to the U.S. Military Academy at West Point.
[

](http://links.justandfreegop.com/u/click?_t=8ca5ef3d31cc43bcb1fbe6968d953911&_m=dd42dbc2fa534584986bae19e0a7d24f&_e=QGpWGTibg8M092ffFDOrTAuco-kHO9tecPgWkAaSphk7AjKQnQ0t5FJ_96agVAUFnawHAL2rflDLT5B-7xqnmZY8IUGnl8g19pDGX5eJMRjeYrMpJjgpflbLD9EPcJYq3ORdNOgp_ui485-gXgKfMVILdFsEb1eWVtn8PMMupbrPzzVU4sEyJbv83fipygiv-xMnr7EzRctOZg9uPjzFNli2z_1oCGmtidPKUfSrFasnzC_y2015ECfBhM_1rFhl6n5whUcrsDWDMONTgU3VE1OqVD8I-Ry_uTUJH3ygK3SbCXZy7F6dbjRRss6vuwz_SS8if60HLpNVtj1cK8xl6xsQImGgQs1y9FmHH37caVaP9WxhsfKXXMrKvWn8u9gU)
And it was there that I came home to a parade after serving in combat during the Gulf War.
[

](http://links.justandfreegop.com/u/click?_t=8ca5ef3d31cc43bcb1fbe6968d953911&_m=dd42dbc2fa534584986bae19e0a7d24f&_e=QGpWGTibg8M092ffFDOrTAuco-kHO9tecPgWkAaSphk7AjKQnQ0t5FJ_96agVAUFnawHAL2rflDLT5B-7xqnmZY8IUGnl8g19pDGX5eJMRjeYrMpJjgpflbLD9EPcJYq3ORdNOgp_ui485-gXgKfMVILdFsEb1eWVtn8PMMupbrPzzVU4sEyJbv83fipygiv-xMnr7EzRctOZg9uPjzFNli2z_1oCGmtidPKUfSrFavK3dYcfEtQqWOwOCDhcA3NeeIwmf0F9CH_Neo7WtJ0H42thI7-akqy01VZxkXkHNStD3B2UwjxhVuba_2BnplDf0alfqbRaCiMP7NIj4TiOuMgQEE9ap2UPD-a01uo5umhxwSKfZpNEvrZXaVYQByR)
**It 's a shame this reporter from New York City doesn't want to tell that story. I think it's a pretty great one.**

I've opened myself and my family up to attacks from the left, and every day feels like a battle. But I'm no stranger to fighting for what is right and if **we don 't elect leaders to go to DC to clean up the mess the career politicians made, we will lose America as we know it! **

Here's where I need your help, Friend. **We need to combat these lies from the New York Times with the TRUTH about me.** The Democrats are seeing the same polls you and I see. They know Joe Biden and my opponent Bob Casey are in trouble, and they are going to do WHATEVER IT TAKES to try and defeat me.

I hate asking for money -- I'm not a career politician, and it's not in my nature -- but I have no choice but to ask if we're going to hit our fundraising goal. _**[Will you chip in $29 or more right now to fight back against the lies from the Left?](http://links.justandfreegop.com/u/click?_t=8ca5ef3d31cc43bcb1fbe6968d953911&_m=dd42dbc2fa534584986bae19e0a7d24f&_e=QGpWGTibg8M092ffFDOrTAuco-kHO9tecPgWkAaSphk7AjKQnQ0t5FJ_96agVAUFnawHAL2rflDLT5B-7xqnmZY8IUGnl8g19pDGX5eJMRjeYrMpJjgpflbLD9EPcJYq3ORdNOgp_ui485-gXgKfMVILdFsEb1eWVtn8PMMupbrPzzVU4sEyJbv83fipygiv-xMnr7EzRctOZg9uPjzFNli2z_1oCGmtidPKUfSrFavfur1wzbGvtOVE4rgdBYLXhi7esMTjdK0NMrqddRaOh7KvLWuxWVGBk5Q2zKi8juG5cL26M_ih8bGaTi4YrEwY4vlYHelucBb29W2wYMFeZqNQIq72hrYIwNGHIHDhwMwWrpbx6NW8RLo7ie2g00Wy)**_

Chuck Schumer and his allies are working overtime to obliterate my campaign. They have committed to spend whatever it takes to defeat me. _**They know if I win this race in Pennsylvania, it 'll be IMPOSSIBLE for Democrats to keep their majority in the Senate. **_

clean_body: Please read this full message Friend, The New York Times is writing a story filled with frivolous lies about my childhood. If it weren't so demeaning to my parents' lifelong teaching careers and the town I'm so proud to have been raised in, it might be funny. The simple fact is The New York Times is lying. Here's the truth : and I hope you will read all the way to the end. Growing up, we lived on campus at Bloomsburg State College and my parents owned a farm ten minutes down the road. I had summer jobs baling hay and trimming Christmas trees at nearby farms. My dad started his career teaching history, economics, & democracy at Punxsutawney High. My mom began teaching fourth through sixth graders at a public school near Pittsburgh. - I'm incredibly proud that my dad was chosen to be president of Bloomsburg State College (now Bloomsburg State University) at only 34 years old. It's incredible to me that this New York Times reporter somehow thinks this fact makes my dad "politically connected." Does she know I 'm running against a career politician who's been riding his father's political coattails in elected office for three decades? I knew getting into this race could mean things would get nasty, but it's sad to see we've fallen so far that one of our nation's oldest papers of record is pushing the Democrats' baked narrative. I'm so proud of my parents' teaching careers and to have been raised in Bloomsburg. It was there that I wrestled and played football and was nominated to the U.S. Military Academy at West Point. And it was there that I came home to a parade after serving in combat during the Gulf War. It 's a shame this reporter from New York City doesn't want to tell that story. I think it's a pretty great one. I've opened myself and my family up to attacks from the left, and every day feels like a battle. But I'm no stranger to fighting for what is right and if we don 't elect leaders to go to DC to clean up the mess the career politicians made, we will lose America as we know it! Here's where I need your help, Friend. We need to combat these lies from the New York Times with the TRUTH about me. The Democrats are seeing the same polls you and I see. They know Joe Biden and my opponent Bob Casey are in trouble, and they are going to do WHATEVER IT TAKES to try and defeat me. I hate asking for money -- I'm not a career politician, and it's not in my nature -- but I have no choice but to ask if we're going to hit our fundraising goal. Chuck Schumer and his allies are working overtime to obliterate my campaign. They have committed to spend whatever it takes to defeat me. They know if I win this race in Pennsylvania, it 'll be IMPOSSIBLE for Democrats to keep their majority in the Senate. If we don't show the Democrats we can win this race, it's game over. That's why I'm hoping you can spare Your donation will take us one step closer to victory, and I am so grateful for your support. Thank you, Dave McCormick P.S. Democrats from all over the country are pouring money into this race to defeat me because they know this race could flip the Senate red. Paid for by Friends of Dave McCormick. Our mailing address is: PO BOX 23537 PITTSBURGH, PA 15222

name: Juan Ciscomani
subject: Where I stand.
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY CISCOMANI FOR CONGRESS
body:
I will ALWAYS fight for border security. |
---
| | [ ](https://juanciscomani.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4ed32a393c9fe1089f10fee94&id=9075b645b9&e=659fba240e)
---
| | Hey friend, Juan here,

As your voice in Congress, I'm taking bold steps to ensure our nation's safety and support our allies.

Last weekend, we voted on a critical package that included aid for our allies, border security, and reinvestments in the American military. My border security bill - _**H.R. 3602 the End the Border Catastrophe Act**_ \- would have:
* Restarted border construction
* Ended catch and release _AND_
* Brought back the “Remain in Mexico” policy

Unfortunately, this vote failed on the House floor even though we gained the support of some Democrat colleagues. After arriving in Washington immediately following the attacks by Iran on Israel, I knew we must support our allies but I also fought for OUR border security and to have my bill _**End the Border Catastrophe Act**_ come to the House Floor. Working with my colleagues on both sides of the aisle, I am committed to working to end our border crisis.

I want to be clear about where I stand: **We must be committed to our allies while also addressing the immediate needs here at home. **

Don’t let the naysayers convince you that America cannot do both. We are the greatest nation in the world and I am confident we can do both at the same time. What’s standing in the way? A Secretary who is _**complicit**_ in opening our borders and a President who’s _**derelict**_ in his duty to the American people.

Just this week, I was BACK on our southern border with our ranchers and local leaders. We cannot let up this fight: **ensuring America remains a beacon of strength and security both at home and abroad.** This is my commitment to you — balanced, strong, and decisive leadership.

Thank you for your continued support — it motivates me every day knowing I serve you and the people of Arizona’s 6th congressional district.

Juan

clean_body: I will ALWAYS fight for border security. | | | | | Hey friend, Juan here, As your voice in Congress, I'm taking bold steps to ensure our nation's safety and support our allies. Last weekend, we voted on a critical package that included aid for our allies, border security, and reinvestments in the American military. My border security bill - H.R. 3602 the End the Border Catastrophe Act \- would have: Restarted border construction Ended catch and release AND Brought back the “Remain in Mexico” policy Unfortunately, this vote failed on the House floor even though we gained the support of some Democrat colleagues. After arriving in Washington immediately following the attacks by Iran on Israel, I knew we must support our allies but I also fought for OUR border security and to have my bill End the Border Catastrophe Act come to the House Floor. Working with my colleagues on both sides of the aisle, I am committed to working to end our border crisis. I want to be clear about where I stand: We must be committed to our allies while also addressing the immediate needs here at home. Don’t let the naysayers convince you that America cannot do both. We are the greatest nation in the world and I am confident we can do both at the same time. What’s standing in the way? A Secretary who is complicit in opening our borders and a President who’s derelict in his duty to the American people. Just this week, I was BACK on our southern border with our ranchers and local leaders. We cannot let up this fight: ensuring America remains a beacon of strength and security both at home and abroad. This is my commitment to you — balanced, strong, and decisive leadership. Thank you for your continued support — it motivates me every day knowing I serve you and the people of Arizona’s 6th congressional district. Juan | "DONATE TODAY TO SECURE #AZ06" | | | PAID FOR BY CISCOMANI FOR CONGRESS | | | | | Copyright © 2024 Ciscomani for Congress, All rights reserved.

subject: RE: Republican Ballot Harvesting

body:
I have a plan for a CONSERVATIVE LANDSLIDE in 2024 - here's the gist:

| |

---
| | | Hey - I'm Byron Donalds.

The Republican National Committee named me the Co-Chairman of their most important initiative for the next election.

_**[I have a plan for a CONSERVATIVE LANDSLIDE in 2024- here's the gist:](http://links.freeliberty.co/u/click?_t=e3c9a4cac7f248a39c2a3d920479a441&_m=96238b5bae014df693195cfb358f0084&_e=YKhZCSq5SU76qnNboIuvS_v3dFsxte0UnIxkwdLf3PZ5-k0G85Uqm6mva6reWl9WlySA72QA8o-2yAj43qVGXPmA-qBdsGLhX0Ivqzj85vjeWq608-iYzY6EDiDXPfKjtUw9f7eL0wP4_C9FWHO51FfXpvx1AdO_uD3CLLi_OLc3dnDd9ahN8bDA6WAbwCEM2LszJOVqm7oWfUPkFtL92jiHQLXebd4cdQywHt5R3DnaP1G9RRi8yZB_XFyy7BhbcmZZX2BCRmuMmyM5ThvUk5coQnveyyKEUWsnO72aYHtVov_0i6sAC3NQGzwNF0A8nZ2MOoSUc1O-vLWQQXb00Xu4o0iCPAKaKdXnnTMRjPqSmTtytl1bQpbGb9Kps-LZSRNdKgcQLwbafbfrBEFfgrX3qQ5hPT5RzHX6FqubjYg%3D "I have a plan for a CONSERVATIVE LANDSLIDE in 2024 – here’s the gist:")**_
* If the Democrats vote early, we should push early voting too
* If they can ballot harvest, we should ballot harvest even better
* Invest in an 80,000-person team to ensure your vote is protected
* Mobilize GOP voters through neighbor-to-neighbor contact
* Expand voter contact efforts to connect with young Conservatives
* **Fight BAD ballot harvesting laws - let's make it easy to vote but hard to cheat**

I am proud to lead these efforts and help Conservatives WIN BIG up and down the ballot. These efforts will not only allow us to confront bad actors and stop cheating but will help our Party appeal to younger voters and swing-state independents.

There's just one problem: campaign operations like these are EXPENSIVE. It's not cheap running ads, printing flyers, recruiting volunteers, and expanding voter contact efforts.

_**[That's why I'm coming to you with an important request. Will you pitch in a few bucks to help jumpstart these efforts?](http://links.freeliberty.co/u/click?_t=e3c9a4cac7f248a39c2a3d920479a441&_m=96238b5bae014df693195cfb358f0084&_e=YKhZCSq5SU76qnNboIuvS_v3dFsxte0UnIxkwdLf3PZ5-k0G85Uqm6mva6reWl9WlySA72QA8o-2yAj43qVGXPmA-qBdsGLhX0Ivqzj85vjeWq608-iYzY6EDiDXPfKjtUw9f7eL0wP4_C9FWHO51FfXpvx1AdO_uD3CLLi_OLc3dnDd9ahN8bDA6WAbwCEM2LszJOVqm7oWfUPkFtL92jiHQLXebd4cdQywHt5R3DnaP1G9RRi8yZB_XFyy7BhbcmZZX2BCRmuMmyM5ThvUkxO7rT2hHP_I6K83OoPDwGd_1WPPfjEIUrPtq_d7uD98R8Xw41PLD2QEKuhxsjiXJ4isLbtXSnEytoedu-V8jwoEbPLdiF5LSaY0IrDAUftotxi9X9obVsCvI41Zh26HwfnLiqpdi5bQq--xE3hHDco%3D "That’s why I’m coming to you with an important request. Will you pitch in a few bucks to help jumpstart these efforts?")**_ I know it's a lot to ask but I can promise you this: it'll be worth it when we have **1)** a Conservative House Majority, **2)** a Conservative Senate, and **3)** a Conservative in the White House.

_If that doesn 't convince you to want to help, I don't know what will! Are you in?_

name: Bob Casey for Senate
subject: Take a look at this, Peter
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY BOB CASEY FOR SENATE INC
body:
# [](https://go.bobcasey.com/go/181?t=1&akid=2834%2E552475%2EoYAREP)
Peter,
Take a look at this — it’s a chart of fundraising in battleground Senate races across the Nation. **[Your contribution today has an impact on what this chart looks like in the future.](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/casey-em-20240427-3?refcode=em20240427-3&recurring=1&refcode2=2834_552475_oYAREP&akid=2834%2E552475%2EoYAREP)**
Do you see a pattern?
[](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/casey-em-20240427-3?refcode=em20240427-3&recurring=1&refcode2=2834_552475_oYAREP&akid=2834%2E552475%2EoYAREP)
In Florida, Democrats brought in more money than Republicans.
In Arizona, Democrats brought in more money than Republicans.
In Michigan, Democrats brought in more money than Republicans.
In Montana and Nevada, too, **_Democrats brought in more money than Republicans_**** _._**
But in Pennsylvania, **_Republicans brought in more money than Democrats_**. If we don’t turn that around, we are at risk of losing this Senate seat and PA flipping red.
Not for nothing, but Pennsylvania has a long history of deciding U.S. elections, meaning what happens here will decide what happens across the Nation.
**[Please, before it’s too late, rush a donation of any amount to help turn this trend around and keep Pennsylvania blue.](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/casey-em-20240427-3?refcode=em20240427-3&recurring=1&refcode2=2834_552475_oYAREP&akid=2834%2E552475%2EoYAREP)**
_Please use the links in this email to start a monthly donation through ActBlue._
[Donate $15 ››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/casey-em-20240427-3?recurring=1&amount=15&refcode=em20240427-3-el&refcode2=2834_552475_oYAREP&akid=2834%2E552475%2EoYAREP) [Donate $25 ››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/casey-em-20240427-3?recurring=1&amount=25&refcode=em20240427-3-el&refcode2=2834_552475_oYAREP&akid=2834%2E552475%2EoYAREP) [Donate $50 ››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/casey-em-20240427-3?recurring=1&amount=50&refcode=em20240427-3-el&refcode2=2834_552475_oYAREP&akid=2834%2E552475%2EoYAREP) [Donate $100 ››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/casey-em-20240427-3?recurring=1&amount=100&refcode=em20240427-3-el&refcode2=2834_552475_oYAREP&akid=2834%2E552475%2EoYAREP) [Donate $250 ››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/casey-em-20240427-3?recurring=1&amount=250&refcode=em20240427-3-el&refcode2=2834_552475_oYAREP&akid=2834%2E552475%2EoYAREP) [Other amount ››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/casey-em-20240427-3?recurring=1&refcode=em20240427-3&refcode2=2834_552475_oYAREP&akid=2834%2E552475%2EoYAREP)

name: Daniel Cooper, Deputy Campaign Manager
subject: I’m pretty disappointed
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Alsobrooks for Senate
body:
|
---
[ ](https://act.angelaalsobrooks.com/go/2092?t=1&akid=1512%2E52803%2E7KgHzf)

| | I wasn’t planning on emailing you today, but we just got word that Angela's self-funding, multi-millionaire primary opponent David Trone has launched disgusting ads attacking our campaign. Even worse, his attack ads feature people who the Baltimore Sun reveals endorsed Trone after receiving political donations from his personal fortune. You can help us recruit more volunteers by forwarding this email to your friends, or by sharing this link: [janepac.com/brownsville-gotv](https://click.everyaction.com/k/83857812/469724712/1745877430?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNi8xLzk2NzgyIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImQwNDRlMTc5LWUxMDQtZWYxMS05NmYzLTdjMWU1MjFiMDdmOSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=NyMB_7oS0MU_Ob57Zm8Iny3hYEDS5xADJsFYyRrpHzI=&emci=53fed462-cd04-ef11-96f3-7c1e521b07f9&emdi=d044e179-e104-ef11-96f3-7c1e521b07f9&ceid=4823105)_ Remember, the more callers we have on Monday, the more voters we can reach before the May 4 Election Day. We've included our full email form the other day below, but for convenience, [you can click here for more information and to RSVP!](https://click.everyaction.com/k/83857814/469724716/1865322956?utm_source=jfcp-email&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNi8xLzk2NzgyIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImQwNDRlMTc5LWUxMDQtZWYxMS05NmYzLTdjMWU1MjFiMDdmOSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=NyMB_7oS0MU_Ob57Zm8Iny3hYEDS5xADJsFYyRrpHzI=&emci=53fed462-cd04-ef11-96f3-7c1e521b07f9&emdi=d044e179-e104-ef11-96f3-7c1e521b07f9&ceid=4823105) Hope to see you there! Either way, thank you so much for your support. We will keep you in the loop on future opportunities to volunteer! With Gratitude, Jane PAC Organizing Team _\--- Orginal Message ---_ Hi Team, _**May 4, 2024 is Election Day in Brownsville, TX and early voting is already underway! **_Between now and then, one of the most important things we can do to put these candidates over the finish line is to help them contact as many voters as possible to ensure they have all the information they need to cast their ballots. [__**That’s why we’re joining forces with Lead Locally and the Port For All campaign for a virtual phone bank on Monday,**__ __**April 29 at 4:30 PT/6:30 CT**__](https://click.everyaction.com/k/83857816/469724718/1865322956?utm_source=jfcp-email&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNi8xLzk2NzgyIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImQwNDRlMTc5LWUxMDQtZWYxMS05NmYzLTdjMWU1MjFiMDdmOSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=NyMB_7oS0MU_Ob57Zm8Iny3hYEDS5xADJsFYyRrpHzI=&emci=53fed462-cd04-ef11-96f3-7c1e521b07f9&emdi=d044e179-e104-ef11-96f3-7c1e521b07f9&ceid=4823105). This will be a great opportunity to hear from our founder, Jane Fonda, and the candidates we’re supporting in this crucial race. **[](https://click.everyaction.com/k/83857818/469724720/1865322956?utm_source=jfcp-email&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNi8xLzk2NzgyIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImQwNDRlMTc5LWUxMDQtZWYxMS05NmYzLTdjMWU1MjFiMDdmOSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=NyMB_7oS0MU_Ob57Zm8Iny3hYEDS5xADJsFYyRrpHzI=&emci=53fed462-cd04-ef11-96f3-7c1e521b07f9&emdi=d044e179-e104-ef11-96f3-7c1e521b07f9&ceid=4823105)** | [RSVP](https://click.everyaction.com/k/83857825/469724724/1211840883?utm_source=jfcp-email&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNi8xLzk2NzgyIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImQwNDRlMTc5LWUxMDQtZWYxMS05NmYzLTdjMWU1MjFiMDdmOSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=NyMB_7oS0MU_Ob57Zm8Iny3hYEDS5xADJsFYyRrpHzI=&emci=53fed462-cd04-ef11-96f3-7c1e521b07f9&emdi=d044e179-e104-ef11-96f3-7c1e521b07f9&ceid=4823105)
---
We’ll kick things off with a quick word from Jane and our endorsed candidates, followed by a brief training before we hop on the phones. So, whether you’re a seasoned phone banker or a first-timer, this is a great opportunity to support some amazing candidates. In case you’re not familiar with this race yet, here’s a quick recap:
The Port Commission (formally known as the Brownsville Navigation District Commission) makes decisions that directly affect the livelihoods of thousands of South Texans. They get to decide between policies that cater to the biggest corporate polluters and policies that prioritize a liveable future for all of our communities by promoting sustainable and equitable development.
That’s why we’re supporting the three candidates who comprise the Port For All slate:
* **Josette Cruz Hinojosa,** focused on community needs and improving workers' conditions at the Port.
* **Patrick Everitt** , committed to bringing healthier jobs and a cleaner environment to Brownsville.
* **Andres Rios** , who brings invaluable experience, driven by a personal commitment to his family and community.

Your voice can help ensure these candidates have the support they need in the upcoming elections. Can we count on you to join us and make a difference? [RSVP here to join us on Monday!](https://click.everyaction.com/k/83857829/469724731/1865322956?utm_source=jfcp-email&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNi8xLzk2NzgyIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImQwNDRlMTc5LWUxMDQtZWYxMS05NmYzLTdjMWU1MjFiMDdmOSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=NyMB_7oS0MU_Ob57Zm8Iny3hYEDS5xADJsFYyRrpHzI=&emci=53fed462-cd04-ef11-96f3-7c1e521b07f9&emdi=d044e179-e104-ef11-96f3-7c1e521b07f9&ceid=4823105)
We hope to see you there!
Jane Fonda Climate PAC Organizing Team
