So, whether you’re a seasoned phone banker or a first-timer, this is a great opportunity to support some amazing candidates. In case you’re not familiar with this race yet, here’s a quick recap: The Port Commission (formally known as the Brownsville Navigation District Commission) makes decisions that directly affect the livelihoods of thousands of South Texans. They get to decide between policies that cater to the biggest corporate polluters and policies that prioritize a liveable future for all of our communities by promoting sustainable and equitable development. That’s why we’re supporting the three candidates who comprise the Port For All slate: Josette Cruz Hinojosa, focused on community needs and improving workers' conditions at the Port. Patrick Everitt , committed to bringing healthier jobs and a cleaner environment to Brownsville. Andres Rios , who brings invaluable experience, driven by a personal commitment to his family and community. Your voice can help ensure these candidates have the support they need in the upcoming elections. Can we count on you to join us and make a difference? We hope to see you there! Jane Fonda Climate PAC Organizing Team | = | = = Follow along: | | ---|---|--- Paid for by Jane Fonda Climate PAC, not authorized by any candidate or candidate’s committee. Jane Fonda Climate PAC 600 Pennsylvania Ave SE #15180 Washington, DC 20003 United States

name: Debbie (personal)
subject: I'm not afraid of a tough fight
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Debbie for Florida
body:
down to the wire
| | |
---
Friend, we're down to the wire here: My biggest end-of-month deadline yet is right around the corner, and we're still pacing $82,011 short of my $800,000 goal. This is my biggest goal yet — and we need all hands on deck if we're going to reach this critical milestone for my campaign.
I knew that hitting this goal wouldn't be easy. But I'm not afraid of a tough fight, and Florida deserves a senator who will _never_ back down. Will you let me explain? **[(If you're short on time, I really need your help to make up the gap here. Please, can you rush $5 right now to help me hit this goal and flip Florida blue?)](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/83858029/469725342/1820369458?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&amount=5&refcode=jtk1137-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDYvMS8xMDc1MjUiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiYjU5ZWNlMmMtZTIwNC1lZjExLTk2ZjMtN2MxZTUyMWIwN2Y5IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=FjEo8qy6CFlRC3zdT1jTINcurVzeIU62j6fh2PsYkG0=)**
Growing up, my older sisters were fearless. As a young immigrant from Ecuador, new to America and struggling to find a community here, I needed advocates and role models exactly like them. Through lessons and by example, they taught me to always stand up for myself no matter what, whether I was facing schoolyard bullies or the teacher who refused to call on me because of my accent.
My sisters and my mom have always been my fiercest advocates. **They showed me what it meant to work hard, how to fight for the future you deserve, and when to stand up and say _ya no más_ — enough is enough.**
I've carried their lessons with me my entire life, inspiring me to take on bullies in both the halls of my high school and the halls of Congress. And right now, Florida families have a bully as a senator.
Rick Scott only cares about three things: his interests, his far-right agenda, and his massive fortune. He's spent his time in the Senate attacking programs that help working families, pushing dangerous and out-of-touch policies, lying to voters, and promoting Trump's lies. I'm sick and tired of watching Rick Scott bully Florida families and push our state backward. **_Ya no más._ I'm running to show this bully that Floridians deserve strong leadership and a brighter future.**
**But Rick Scott has a massive fortune that he's using to bankroll his campaign.****That's why I've set this huge end-of-month goal. And I'm counting on your help to hit it. Please, will you rush[ $5 or more before midnight to help me defeat Rick Scott and stand up for Florida? Our race is neck and neck, but we could fall behind if we miss this goal!](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/83858030/469725343/1820369458?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk1137-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDYvMS8xMDc1MjUiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiYjU5ZWNlMmMtZTIwNC1lZjExLTk2ZjMtN2MxZTUyMWIwN2Y5IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=FjEo8qy6CFlRC3zdT1jTINcurVzeIU62j6fh2PsYkG0=)**

subject: Did you see the updated Senate rankings?

body:
| [](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=998585bb067e4641aa1282e3d96257c4&_e=gVdx2JV3xDdLrjLjjBqm2Q_PD5mwFboygZmeZdGspqF0E5hc2Vxd7ZGRCk5G4wsgIwB_qd9EjVjx3XY4aYnW0FCVIYl1ZGd0pO6eNAJ4Sjak0539EmfN2kBCEPciOcsgT2MWv-UjMICOOTDo0RuNqYYZeHWVL_S17Fb8mAHdPqRWUqEh34yXLnh4keA4kAEfo7tecfG6U7yNjZK6WQuOVkyKcj4_XK-jGDeF0QXuR93srQLKdVn-Z8KWfKcA47HgSYoRRv7pUv2-fNrVsS-O8SpOpRS3vqAr6WnuHAEZO64-J6y8pwuzxZ4r906Cxr18PmMXyLXfnnh6WlctaJyrKRjo0tzqp0AIx_STNCGqfoJ7UniVfb-UjJ3Fp8-_CYlA2lDD09skmVBXfmq1K6cNrWaHCmHStNvLdckeynHL4VjRD4CM-1fPuXbfPGMhe-fM)

Peter,

It's becoming clearer by the day that this Senate race in Montana is going to be _the_ race that will decide control of the Senate.

But don't take my word for it. Recently, the political newspaper The Hill published an updated list of the five Senate seats **most likely to flip.**

**Can you guess which race was listed at the top of the article?**

**If you guessed Montana, you'd be correct.**

**If polls are to be believed, then this race is too close to call.**[**A survey from last month had our campaign trailing our opponent by just two points, a statistical dead -heat.**](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=998585bb067e4641aa1282e3d96257c4&_e=gVdx2JV3xDdLrjLjjBqm2Q_PD5mwFboygZmeZdGspqF0E5hc2Vxd7ZGRCk5G4wsgIwB_qd9EjVjx3XY4aYnW0FCVIYl1ZGd0pO6eNAJ4Sjak0539EmfN2kBCEPciOcsgT2MWv-UjMICOOTDo0RuNqYYZeHWVL_S17Fb8mAHdPqRWUqEh34yXLnh4keA4kAEfo7tecfG6U7yNjZK6WQuOVkyKcj4_XK-jGDeF0QXuR93srQLKdVn-Z8KWfKcA47HgSYoRRv7pUv2-fNrVsS-O8SpOpRS3vqAr6WnuHAEZO65A58V6Z_BviP5WLULXPeXxfOWoeUm-NRbEFu4GqGqHTqOeHO8WbC6YbsgU-Q_oT4IYEPSxxinvuhzTxFFN4n2SyJ0EtvzgUvIBiOv0doJ6r7TukLvqOpmuDMgIcdGTaco8ce1Gfdc2owqFLCwmxU9j)

**I'm asking you to spare $2 right now if you can. $2 from several thousand conservatives will allow us to start reaching out to voters following the whirlwind end -of-quarter push. **

**Your $2 contribution will be put toward:**

**
1. Paying for airtime on Montana TV markets

2. Buying yard signs that will increase our campaign’s visibility around our great state

**
**In a race as close as the one we're facing, every dollar is make or break.**

[**CHIP IN $2 ->**](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=998585bb067e4641aa1282e3d96257c4&_e=gVdx2JV3xDdLrjLjjBqm2Q_PD5mwFboygZmeZdGspqF0E5hc2Vxd7ZGRCk5G4wsgIwB_qd9EjVjx3XY4aYnW0FCVIYl1ZGd0pO6eNAJ4Sjak0539EmfN2kBCEPciOcsgT2MWv-UjMICOOTDo0RuNqYYZeHWVL_S17Fb8mAHdPqRWUqEh34yXLnh4keA4kAEfo7tecfG6U7yNjZK6WQuOVkyKcj4_XK-jGDeF0QXuR93srQLKdVn-Z8KWfKcA47HgSYoRRv7pUv2-fNrVsS-O8SpOpRS3vqAr6WnuHAEZO64m8cANE_5gEPQZ4c6ZyEUULYvab6D_z01_XIJ33WNoS_2yO4unq80UNgTyq7CDmuzSmE5qCMPNCCfV6Rk5F-FOs0-RZmCZdQ4cypEwlyXNd48VdUwlezCD1ocDIZGeQU2JiuGb69gL_S7-hf5Oo8EG)
**Please let us know if we can count on you for your support today!**

**For America's Future,**
[](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=998585bb067e4641aa1282e3d96257c4&_e=gVdx2JV3xDdLrjLjjBqm2Q_PD5mwFboygZmeZdGspqF0E5hc2Vxd7ZGRCk5G4wsgIwB_qd9EjVjx3XY4aYnW0FCVIYl1ZGd0pO6eNAJ4Sjak0539EmfN2kBCEPciOcsgT2MWv-UjMICOOTDo0RuNqYYZeHWVL_S17Fb8mAHdPqRWUqEh34yXLnh4keA4kAEfo7tecfG6U7yNjZK6WQuOVkyKcj4_XK-jGDeF0QXuR93srQLKdVn-Z8KWfKcA47HgSYoRRv7pUv2-fNrVsS-O8SpOpRS3vqAr6WnuHAEZO659AUem7QjZjXccdnxN5hGiUpR4jMVtwnBFVstivb6EUXh6VZEdDwGU7_cW6LjXvskCl85WCtou5AY8PBcnVA-DzJf7FjQSZjx8CfAL1dP2U7sZYtOgI6Ra4TkaHXsBUIkgjrIxpy7zRqJ5UaEY-7oE)

clean_body: | Peter, It's becoming clearer by the day that this Senate race in Montana is going to be the race that will decide control of the Senate. But don't take my word for it. Recently, the political newspaper The Hill published an updated list of the five Senate seats most likely to flip. Can you guess which race was listed at the top of the article? If you guessed Montana, you'd be correct. If polls are to be believed, then this race is too close to call. I'm asking you to spare $2 right now if you can. $2 from several thousand conservatives will allow us to start reaching out to voters following the whirlwind end -of-quarter push. Your $2 contribution will be put toward: 1. Paying for airtime on Montana TV markets 2. Buying yard signs that will increase our campaign’s visibility around our great state In a race as close as the one we're facing, every dollar is make or break. Please let us know if we can count on you for your support today! For America's Future, Tim Sheehy - Tim Sheehy is a former Navy SEAL. ICYMI, Robert F. Kennedy, Jr.'s VP running mate Nicole Shanahan took to Twitter to blast both parties for sending an additional $60 billion of your tax dollars to Ukraine.
Nicole Shanahan posted on [X.com](https://www.kennedy24.com/r?u=Z_o1v5uRNRxRYZz5aguEaqWPmdcC4eskoLp4JKQp5_9dSQaTfqibIhX7rz2Tf6CMTpml11aNOeIeCZ7X5pNenfNaIqNPuImULAcxpRAslWH0Zeg31MvaN8oRmwxk94UkDxbqXjXUNvVXXxHAiVrEdef7BYrNgM5y-iZLUBCAyXI&e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=shanahan_tweet_4_27_24_nd1&n=3),

name: Corey, Team Scott
subject: Our country is UNDER ATTACK
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rick Scott for Florida
body:
| | | Peter,

Joe Biden is attacking our liberties like no other President has before.

body:
We have an important question to ask you. | | |
---
Peter -- In a moment, we’re going to ask you to make a donation to President Biden’s campaign. But first, we hope you’ll give us a chance to explain why. Our official FEC deadline is just days away -- **and it’s critical we hit our fundraising goals to show Trump and the MAGA Right that our campaign is strong and ready to defeat them this November.** Here’s the problem: _Grassroots donations have slowed to a crawl today, and our numbers are not where they need to be._ So, our goal is to see 236 more donations come in from Cresco before midnight tonight to get us back on track. **We could really use your help to get us across the finish line.** [**Will you make a $5 donation to our people-powered campaign? name: ColinAllred.com
subject: good news and bad news
disclaimer_text: Paid for by VPP
body:
| **This is amazing: TWO polls in a row show Colin Allred TIED with Ted Cruz! **

**But here's the bad news:** Now that we’ve officially kicked off the general election campaign, Ted Cruz is calling in every favor he's got. GOP mega donors have already poured more than $51 MILLION into his campaign, and as you read this, they're flooding him with even more to try to defeat Colin.

Our best defense is reaching as many voters as we can between now and Election Day – at their doors, on their phones, and on their TVs. But that gets expensive _real fast._

**That's why we need your help:** [Will you please rush $10 right now to Colin and the Voter Protection Project so that we can keep this momentum going through November? We need to raise $65,000 before midnight, but right now, we're still falling short and we need your help to close that gap. →](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/66298?t=6&akid=13929%2E878179%2E6PoKUT) | [DONATE »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/66298?t=7&akid=13929%2E878179%2E6PoKUT)
---
**Despite what he may say, Ted Cruz is shaking in his boots.** CNN already called him the most vulnerable GOP Senator in the country, and he only won his last election in 2018 by _2.6 percentage points._

Now, he's going to do everything he can to buy six more years – and trust me, he's got the right-wing donors to do it. But we've already proven we've got what it takes to defeat him, and that we have the grassroots power to reach the thousands of voters we need to do it.

**But it all depends on you, so please:** [Can you give $10, $20, whatever you're able to Colin and the Voter Protection Project so that we can continue to reach Texas voters far and wide? If we can hit this $65,000 goal, then we'll be one huge step closer to taking home the victory on Election Day. →](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/66298?t=8&akid=13929%2E878179%2E6PoKUT)
If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your split donation between Colin Allred and VPP will go through immediately:

Let's do this,

Team Allred
| | Paid for by VPP
(www.protectvoting.org)
Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. 401 2nd Ave. S, Ste. 303, Seattle, WA 98104

The Voter Protection Project is on an important mission: To end partisan gerrymandering and voter suppression by electing candidates at the state and federal levels that are forceful advocates for voting rights. Our enfranchisement agenda includes working to ensure that every state has automatic voter registration and online voter registration, convenient early voting, and independent redistricting commissions to ensure politicians are not able to draw their own maps.

Please, consider making a [one-time contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/121?t=1&akid=13929%2E878179%2E6PoKUT). **Or, to make the most powerful lasting impact and help us oust Republicans up and down the ballot who attack our right to vote, make a[monthly sustaining contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/122?t=2&akid=13929%2E878179%2E6PoKUT).**

name: Jon Tester
subject: Every day matters

body:
Jason Crow For Congress [https://nvlupin.blob.core.windows.net/images/van/NGP/NGP21/1/88523/images/logoJC%20(1).png]
Jon Tester is up for reelection in one of the most competitive Senate races this November. Please take a minute to read his message below, then consider splitting a donation between his and Jason’s campaigns.

https://secure.actblue.com/donate/crow-split-tester [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/crow-split-tester]

Hey there, it’s Jon Tester. Jason asked me to reach out:

As hard as it is for me to believe, planting season is just around the corner. That’s the thing about time, it always moves faster than we think it will.

I know it’s easy to look at the calendar and say “Election Day is far away. I’ve got time” — but I can tell you, every day matters and every action counts more than you know. Right now, I’m Mitch McConnell’s #1 target, and his super PACs have already committed $50 million to beat me... with more sure to follow.

The truth is without your support helping us fight back against their attacks today, we could lose this toss-up race in November.

Outside groups will spend a truckload of money trying on this race, making this the most expensive election in Montana’s history. Right now, we’re being outspent online, and that’s bad news. So it’s absolutely critical we hit our upcoming fundraising goal.

Everyday I wake up and fight for hardworking folks like you, to make health care more affordable, to lower costs for families, because it’s a fight worth fighting. But right now I need your help, and we’re running out of time.

So please, will you split a couple of bucks between my campaign and Jason Crow before our end-of-month deadline? Right now is the best time to make a difference. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/crow-split-tester]

If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your split donation between Jason Crow and Jon Tester will go through immediately:

SPLIT $10 >> [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/crow-split-tester?amount=10&express_lane=true]
SPLIT $17.77 >> [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/crow-split-tester?amount=17.77&express_lane=true]

SPLIT $25 >> [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/crow-split-tester?amount=25&express_lane=true]
SPLIT $50 >> [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/crow-split-tester?amount=50&express_lane=true]

SPLIT $100 >> [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/crow-split-tester?amount=100&express_lane=true]
ANOTHER AMOUNT [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/crow-split-tester]

Thanks. Your support means a lot to me.

— Jon Tester
Jason Crow for Congress
8547 E Arapahoe Road, STE J-543
Greenwood Village, CO 80112
United States

body:
|

[ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/83859396/469730205/227139380?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83OTA4MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmNjk5YmZkMC1lYjA0LWVmMTEtOTZmMy03YzFlNTIxYjA3ZjkiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=pgHC0dxoC7o30nVFhhTRz0p512nT6AvZhHKGLH4t8Oo=&emci=c7fa6b0c-d003-ef11-96f3-7c1e521b07f9&emdi=f699bfd0-eb04-ef11-96f3-7c1e521b07f9&ceid=43566853)

With the primary now behind us, I wanted to take a moment to say thank you to you, Peter. Together, we have laid the groundwork for a victory in November. At every turn, the support of people just like you has allowed us to build a campaign that this team can and should be proud of.

[**_Now that the general election is officially underway, we need to double down on our efforts. That’s why I’m personally asking if you’ll split $20 between my campaign and the Georgia Dems to become a General Election Founding Donor._**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/83859398/469730207/1703534649?refcode=20240427.3_BC_4AY&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83OTA4MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmNjk5YmZkMC1lYjA0LWVmMTEtOTZmMy03YzFlNTIxYjA3ZjkiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=pgHC0dxoC7o30nVFhhTRz0p512nT6AvZhHKGLH4t8Oo=) The real fight starts now, Peter. We’re up against a mega-millionaire hedge fund executive who has the backing and resources of the entire Republican party, including Donald Trump.

If I’m going to continue working to lower costs for working families, build a stronger economy that works for everyone, and ensure that our seniors and veterans have the benefits they've earned, I need you behind me every step of the way.

[**_Please, if you can, split $20 between me and the GA Dems to power our campaign from now until Election Day. The path to the Senate and the White House hinges on Pennsylvania, and we can’t afford to take our foot off the gas._**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/83859399/469730208/1703534649?refcode=20240427.3_BC_4AY&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83OTA4MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmNjk5YmZkMC1lYjA0LWVmMTEtOTZmMy03YzFlNTIxYjA3ZjkiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=pgHC0dxoC7o30nVFhhTRz0p512nT6AvZhHKGLH4t8Oo=) | _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_

**** YOUR EXCLUSIVE POLL IS DUE BY 11:59 PM ****
President Biden courageously stepped up to lead our country after the disastrous Trump presidency. He’s _**steered**_ the nation out of a health and economic disaster, _**invested**_ in clean and renewable energy, and _**restored**_ trust in democracy.

name: Schrier for Congress
subject: The most important election of our lifetime
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Dr. Kim Schrier for Congress
body:
You’ve probably heard from us many times before: [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/83859656/469731066/693975070?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MTExMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4OTgxYzYyOC1mMDA0LWVmMTEtOTZmMy03YzFlNTIxYjA3ZjkiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=mmhUhxAJglYiE3aWzWj65Jsw_RXI6ZVGKgvsDFo1DAA=&emci=d82ea6b9-0c04-ef11-96f3-7c1e521b07f9&emdi=8981c628-f004-ef11-96f3-7c1e521b07f9&ceid=15820338)
---
Peter,

**We are facing the most critical election of our lifetime.**

You may be wondering how every election is our most crucial one yet, so in a moment, we're going to explain how your involvement this November could impact the future of our country. **[But if you already know what's at stake, you can chip in $5 here to help Kim hit her end-of-month fundraising goal>>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/83859657/469731067/-1888718625?refcode=em24_240427_eom1_fndd_gq_act___TS_ettx&utm_campaign=em24_240427_eom1_fndd_gq_act___TS_ettx&utm_medium=email&refcode2=8981c628-f004-ef11-96f3-7c1e521b07f9&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MTExMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4OTgxYzYyOC1mMDA0LWVmMTEtOTZmMy03YzFlNTIxYjA3ZjkiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=mmhUhxAJglYiE3aWzWj65Jsw_RXI6ZVGKgvsDFo1DAA=)**

In the past year alone, we've seen dysfunction in Congress like never before. The inability of this Republican majority to work not just across the aisle, but within their own party, has created devastating consequences for the American people. From knocking down legislation to secure our borders to bringing our country to the brink of a government shutdown multiple times, there is nothing Republicans won't do to self-serve their own interests.

This selfishness is what led Kim to run for Congress in 2017—defeating a Republican representative who voted down healthcare protections despite his own constituents warning him of the dire consequences that would arise from his vote.

It's Congress's job to stand up for our communities and ensure legislation in Washington is working for our best interests, not for politicians or special interests. And the moment we see our government deviating from this principle, it's our responsibility to use our voices at the ballot box to get things back on track.

This November, we have a shot at taking back the House and ending this Republican nightmare in Washington. With the Republican majority at its lowest ever, we know that together, we can flip enough seats from red to blue.

But Peter, all that work will mean nothing if we don't hold on to our own most vulnerable seats like Kim's here in WA-08. Republicans are pouring in their own resources, ready to spend whatever they can to defeat Kim in November. That's why your support has never been more important.

**[Kim's facing her first end-of-month deadline of the new quarter. To ensure her success, we need to raise $20,000 before midnight on Tuesday. Can Kim count on you to chip in $5, or whatever you can afford, to help us hit our goal and restore order to clean_body: You’ve probably heard from us many times before: Peter, We are facing the most critical election of our lifetime. You may be wondering how every election is our most crucial one yet, so in a moment, we're going to explain how your involvement this November could impact the future of our country. = In the past year alone, we've seen dysfunction in Congress like never before. The inability of this Republican majority to work not just across the aisle, but within their own party, has created devastating consequences for the American people. From knocking down legislation to secure our borders to bringing our country to the brink of a government shutdown multiple times, there is nothing Republicans won't do to self-serve their own interests. This selfishness is what led Kim to run for Congress in 2017—defeating a Republican representative who voted down healthcare protections despite his own constituents warning him of the dire consequences that would arise from his vote. It's Congress's job to stand up for our communities and ensure legislation in Washington is working for our best interests, not for politicians or special interests. And the moment we see our government deviating from this principle, it's our responsibility to use our voices at the ballot box to get things back on track. This November, we have a shot at taking back the House and ending this Republican nightmare in Washington. With the Republican majority at its lowest ever, we know that together, we can flip enough seats from red to blue. But Peter, all that work will mean nothing if we don't hold on to our own most vulnerable seats like Kim's here in WA-08. Republicans are pouring in their own resources, ready to spend whatever they can to defeat Kim in November. That's why your support has never been more important. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | = | | = | | = ---|---|---|---|--- = | | = | | = ---|---|---|---|--- Thank you, Schrier for Congress Rep. Kim Schrier is a doctor, scientist, and mom, fighting for Washington's 8th District in Congress. This is one of the most competitive districts in the country, so we need your help to keep Kim in Congress. Chip in now to help protect Kim's seat this November and take back the House. = ** Paid for by Dr. Kim Schrier for Congress Contributions or gifts to Dr. Kim Schrier for Congress are not tax deductible. Dr. Kim Schrier for Congress PO Box 2728 Issaquah, WA 98027 United States

_Aloha Peter, I wanted to pass along this message from my friend Tammy Baldwin’s campaign. — Mazie_
* * *
Hi Peter, it's Senator Tammy Baldwin. When I came out in college, I couldn’t imagine someone like me running for office, let alone winning. But earlier generations paved the way for me and other LGBTQ+ candidates to get to where we are today. [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/83859712/469731132/-17087835?refcode=AU_MKH_FR_TAN_GEN_AC_20240427_PM2_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDUvMS83MTU3NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4ZjgxYzYyOC1mMDA0LWVmMTEtOTZmMy03YzFlNTIxYjA3ZjkiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=hFZg4kBiMjomqT3Km_5g4TC2ViTWX-SbSgDqY7ll-mA=) **Our stories won’t be erased by right-wing extremists like Ron DeSantis.** As Governor of Florida, DeSantis has signed some of the nation’s most draconian and hateful policies into law — including a book ban targeting stories written by or about LGBTQ+ people. **One of his most recent bans targets a book because it simply mentions that I was the first openly-gay U.S. Senator elected in our nation’s history.** I’ve spent years fighting back against anti-LGBTQ+ extremism from right-wing politicians like DeSantis, and I won’t quit until all LGBTQ+ Americans are free to be who they are and love who they love without fear. Advocating for our rights and freedoms in the U.S. Senate has never been more important. [**That’s why I’m personally asking you to split a donation between my reelection campaign and Mazie today. With your help, we can defend our Democratic Senate majority and continue to fight back against anti-LGBTQ+ extremism.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/83859713/469731133/-17087835?refcode=AU_MKH_FR_TAN_GEN_AC_20240427_PM2_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDUvMS83MTU3NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4ZjgxYzYyOC1mMDA0LWVmMTEtOTZmMy03YzFlNTIxYjA3ZjkiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=hFZg4kBiMjomqT3Km_5g4TC2ViTWX-SbSgDqY7ll-mA=) _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your split donation between Mazie Hirono and Tammy Baldwin will go through immediately:_ | | [CHIP IN $10 NOW](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/83859714/469731134/-17087835?express_lane=true&amount=10&refcode=AU_MKH_FR_TAN_GEN_AC_20240427_PM2_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDUvMS83MTU3NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4ZjgxYzYyOC1mMDA0LWVmMTEtOTZmMy03YzFlNTIxYjA3ZjkiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=hFZg4kBiMjomqT3Km_5g4TC2ViTWX-SbSgDqY7ll-mA=)

One of his most recent bans targets a book because it simply mentions that I was the first openly-gay U.S. Senator elected in our nation’s history. I’ve spent years fighting back against anti-LGBTQ+ extremism from right-wing politicians like DeSantis, and I won’t quit until all LGBTQ+ Americans are free to be who they are and love who they love without fear. Advocating for our rights and freedoms in the U.S. Senate has never been more important. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your split donation between Mazie Hirono and Tammy Baldwin will go through immediately: | | = = | = = | = = Thank you for stepping up today. Your support means the world to me. — Tammy Baldwin Friends of Mazie Hirono 335 Merchant Street #677 Honolulu, HI 96809 United States mailto:info@mazieforhawaii.com | Paid for by Mazie Hirono For Hawaii

body:

|
---
Peter, did you see what Trump said this morning?

"Trent Staggs is 100% MAGA, and is running to fill The Mitt Romney, a Total Loser, Seat as the next Senator from the Great State of Utah! A Highly Successful Entrepreneur, who has served brilliantly as Mayor of Riverton for the past six years, Trent knows how to Create Jobs, Stop Inflation, Grow the Economy, and Secure the Border. As your next Senator, Trent will help us Unleash American Energy, Support our Military/Vets, and Protect our always-under-siege Second Amendment. Trent Staggs has my Complete and Total Endorsement - He will be a GREAT Senator, and never let you down!" \- President Trump VIA Truth Social

body:
Can you help us get there?
#
Peter,
We’re three days away from the deadline for our most aggressive end-of-month goal yet — raising $500,000 online in the month of April.
We know this is an ambitious goal. But we also know how we can reach it.
**If every person reading this email chipped in just $4, _we would exceed our goal_** — and keep building the momentum of this powerful grassroots movement, which is completely fueled by real people like you.
**[CHIP IN $4](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/48893?refcode=em20240427-5380&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=4&t=1&akid=5380%2E614464%2EUFrXHv)**
This election is our only opportunity to hold Josh Hawley accountable and take this Senate seat back for everyday Missourians – **[and we hope you’ll help us do it.](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/48893?refcode=em20240427-5380&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=2&akid=5380%2E614464%2EUFrXHv)**
Thanks for your support,
Team Kunce
